authors_text: Xun Xu,Manh Cuong Nguyen,Yasin Yazici,Kangkang Lu,Hlaing Min,Chuan-Sheng Foo
title: SemiCurv: Semi-Supervised Curvilinear Structure Segmentation
title_zh: SemiCurv：半监督曲线结构分割
abstract: Recent work on curvilinear structure segmentation has mostly focused on backbone network design and loss engineering. The challenge of collecting labelled data, an expensive and labor intensive process, has been overlooked. While labelled data is expensive to obtain, unlabelled data is often readily available. In this work, we propose SemiCurv, a semi-supervised learning (SSL) framework for curvilinear structure segmentation that is able to utilize such unlabelled data to reduce the labelling burden. Our framework addresses two key challenges in formulating curvilinear segmentation in a semi-supervised manner. First, to fully exploit the power of consistency based SSL, we introduce a geometric transformation as strong data augmentation and then align segmentation predictions via a differentiable inverse transformation to enable the computation of pixel-wise consistency. Second, the traditional mean square error (MSE) on unlabelled data is prone to collapsed predictions and this issue exacerbates with severe class imbalance (significantly more background pixels). We propose a N-pair consistency loss to avoid trivial predictions on unlabelled data. We evaluate SemiCurv on six curvilinear segmentation datasets, and find that with no more than 5% of the labelled data, it achieves close to 95% of the performance relative to its fully supervised counterpart.
summary: Recent work on curvilinear structure segmentation has mostly focused on backbone network design and loss engineering. The challenge of collecting labelled data, an expensive and labor intensive process, has been overlooked. While labelled data is expensive to obtain, unlabelled data is often readily available. In this work, we propose SemiCurv, a semi-supervised learning (SSL) framework for curvilinear structure segmentation that is able to utilize such unlabelled data to reduce the labelling burden. Our framework addresses two key challenges in formulating curvilinear segmentation in a semi-supervised manner. First, to fully exploit the power of consistency based SSL, we introduce a geometric transformation as strong data augmentation and then align segmentation predictions via a differentiable inverse transformation to enable the computation of pixel-wise consistency. Second, the traditional mean square error (MSE) on unlabelled data is prone to collapsed predictions and this issue exacerbates with severe class imbalance (significantly more background pixels). We propose a N-pair consistency loss to avoid trivial predictions on unlabelled data. We evaluate SemiCurv on six curvilinear segmentation datasets, and find that with no more than 5% of the labelled data, it achieves close to 95% of the performance relative to its fully supervised counterpart.
abstract_zh: 最近关于曲线结构分割的工作主要集中在主干网络设计和损失工程上。收集标记数据的挑战是一个昂贵且劳动力密集的过程，但这一过程却被忽视了。虽然获取标记数据的成本很高，但未标记数据通常很容易获得。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SemiCurv，一种用于曲线结构分割的半监督学习（SSL）框架，它能够利用此类未标记的数据来减少标记负担。我们的框架解决了以半监督方式制定曲线分割的两个关键挑战。首先，为了充分利用基于 SSL 的一致性的强大功能，我们引入了几何变换作为强数据增强，然后通过可微逆变换对齐分割预测，以实现像素级一致性的计算。其次，未标记数据上的传统均方误差 (MSE) 很容易出现预测崩溃，并且随着严重的类别不平衡（背景像素显着增加），该问题会加剧。我们提出 N 对一致性损失，以避免对未标记数据进行琐碎的预测。我们在六个曲线分割数据集上评估 SemiCurv，发现在标记数据不超过 5% 的情况下，相对于完全监督的对应数据集，它实现了接近 95% 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SemiCurv，一种半监督学习框架，用于解决曲线条结构分割中标签数据成本高昂的问题。
AI.motivation: 曲线条结构分割研究多关注网络设计，但忽视了标签数据获取成本高且耗时的问题，而未标注数据通常易得。
AI.method: 引入几何变换作为强数据增强，并通过可微逆变换对齐预测结果以计算像素级一致性；提出N-pair一致性损失以应对未标注数据中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在六个数据集上验证，使用不超过5%的标注数据即可达到全监督方法95%的性能。
AI.conclusion: SemiCurv通过有效利用未标注数据，显著降低了曲线条结构分割的标注负担。

title: Extrinsic Calibration of LiDAR, IMU and Camera
title_zh: LiDAR、IMU 和相机的外部标定
comment: Workshop on Challenges in Sensor Calibration for Robotics Applications at the 17th INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCE ON INTELLIGENT AUTONOMOUS SYSTEMS (IAS-17), ZAGREB, CROATIA
comments: Workshop on Challenges in Sensor Calibration for Robotics Applications at the 17th INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCE ON INTELLIGENT AUTONOMOUS SYSTEMS (IAS-17), ZAGREB, CROATIA
abstract: In this work we present a novel method to jointly calibrate a sensor suite consisting a 3D-LiDAR, Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) and Camera under an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) framework. We exploit pairwise constraints between the 3 sensor pairs to perform EKF update and experimentally demonstrate the superior performance obtained with joint calibration as against individual sensor pair calibration.
summary: In this work we present a novel method to jointly calibrate a sensor suite consisting a 3D-LiDAR, Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) and Camera under an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) framework. We exploit pairwise constraints between the 3 sensor pairs to perform EKF update and experimentally demonstrate the superior performance obtained with joint calibration as against individual sensor pair calibration.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在扩展卡尔曼滤波器 (EKF) 框架下联合校准由 3D-LiDAR、惯性测量单元 (IMU) 和相机组成的传感器套件的新颖方法。我们利用 3 个传感器对之间的成对约束来执行 EKF 更新，并通过实验证明联合校准比单独传感器对校准获得的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于EKF的联合标定方法，用于LiDAR、IMU和相机的外参标定
AI.motivation: 现有方法单独标定传感器对，难以处理多传感器系统的复杂性，影响精度，需更高效方法
AI.method: 在EKF框架中利用传感器对之间的成对约束进行联合标定，实现多传感器参数同步优化
AI.result: 实验表明联合标定方法在精度和鲁棒性上优于单独标定方法
AI.conclusion: 联合标定方法能有效提升多传感器系统的标定精度和鲁棒性

title: Optimal Adaptive Prediction Intervals for Electricity Load Forecasting in Distribution Systems via Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过强化学习进行配电系统电力负荷预测的最佳自适应预测间隔
comment: revision to IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid
comments: revision to IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid
abstract: Prediction intervals offer an effective tool for quantifying the uncertainty of loads in distribution systems. The traditional central PIs cannot adapt well to skewed distributions, and their offline training fashion is vulnerable to unforeseen changes in future load patterns. Therefore, we propose an optimal PI estimation approach, which is online and adaptive to different data distributions by adaptively determining symmetric or asymmetric probability proportion pairs for quantiles. It relies on the online learning ability of reinforcement learning to integrate the two online tasks, i.e., the adaptive selection of probability proportion pairs and quantile predictions, both of which are modeled by neural networks. As such, the quality of quantiles-formed PI can guide the selection process of optimal probability proportion pairs, which forms a closed loop to improve the quality of PIs. Furthermore, to improve the learning efficiency of quantile forecasts, a prioritized experience replay strategy is proposed for online quantile regression processes. Case studies on both load and net load demonstrate that the proposed method can better adapt to data distribution compared with online central PIs method. Compared with offline-trained methods, it obtains PIs with better quality and is more robust against concept drift.
summary: Prediction intervals offer an effective tool for quantifying the uncertainty of loads in distribution systems. The traditional central PIs cannot adapt well to skewed distributions, and their offline training fashion is vulnerable to unforeseen changes in future load patterns. Therefore, we propose an optimal PI estimation approach, which is online and adaptive to different data distributions by adaptively determining symmetric or asymmetric probability proportion pairs for quantiles. It relies on the online learning ability of reinforcement learning to integrate the two online tasks, i.e., the adaptive selection of probability proportion pairs and quantile predictions, both of which are modeled by neural networks. As such, the quality of quantiles-formed PI can guide the selection process of optimal probability proportion pairs, which forms a closed loop to improve the quality of PIs. Furthermore, to improve the learning efficiency of quantile forecasts, a prioritized experience replay strategy is proposed for online quantile regression processes. Case studies on both load and net load demonstrate that the proposed method can better adapt to data distribution compared with online central PIs method. Compared with offline-trained methods, it obtains PIs with better quality and is more robust against concept drift.
abstract_zh: 预测区间为量化配电系统中负荷的不确定性提供了有效的工具。传统的中央PI不能很好地适应偏态分布，并且它们的离线训练方式很容易受到未来负载模式不可预见的变化的影响。因此，我们提出了一种最优的 PI 估计方法，该方法是在线的，通过自适应确定分位数的对称或不对称概率比例对来适应不同的数据分布。它依靠强化学习的在线学习能力来整合两个在线任务，即概率比例对的自适应选择和分位数预测，这两个任务都是由神经网络建模的。这样，分位数形成的PI的质量可以指导最优概率比例对的选择过程，形成闭环来提高PI的质量。此外，为了提高分位数预测的学习效率，针对在线分位数回归过程提出了一种优先经验重放策略。对负荷和净负荷的案例研究表明，与在线中央PIs方法相比，该方法能够更好地适应数据分布。与离线训练的方法相比，它获得了质量更好的PI，并且对概念漂移具有更强的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的自适应预测区间方法，用于提高配电系统中电力负荷预测的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统预测区间方法难以适应偏态分布且离线训练无法应对未来负荷模式的突变，导致预测质量下降。
AI.method: 结合强化学习与神经网络，实现概率比例对的自适应选择和分位数预测的在线学习，并引入优先经验回放策略优化学习效率。
AI.result: 案例研究表明，该方法在数据分布适应性、预测区间质量及对概念漂移的鲁棒性方面优于传统在线和离线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的自适应强化学习框架有效提升了电力负荷预测区间在动态环境下的性能，为不确定性建模提供了新思路。

Furthermore, to improve the learning efficiency of quantile forecasts, a prioritized experience replay strategy is proposed for online quantile regression processes. Case studies on both load and net load demonstrate that the proposed method can better adapt to data distribution compared with online central PIs method. Compared with offline-trained methods, it obtains PIs with better quality and is more robust against concept drift. 预测区间为量化配电系统中负荷的不确定性提供了有效的工具。传统的中央PI不能很好地适应偏态分布，并且它们的离线训练方式很容易受到未来负载模式不可预见的变化的影响。因此，我们提出了一种最优的 PI 估计方法，该方法是在线的，通过自适应确定分位数的对称或不对称概率比例对来适应不同的数据分布。它依靠强化学习的在线学习能力来整合两个在线任务，即概率比例对的自适应选择和分位数预测，这两个任务都是由神经网络建模的。这样，分位数形成的PI的质量可以指导最优概率比例对的选择过程，形成闭环来提高PI的质量。此外，为了提高分位数预测的学习效率，针对在线分位数回归过程提出了一种优先经验重放策略。对负荷和净负荷的案例研究表明，与在线中央PIs方法相比，该方法能够更好地适应数据分布。与离线训练的方法相比，它获得了质量更好的PI，并且对概念漂移具有更强的鲁棒性。 本文提出一种基于强化学习的自适应预测区间方法，用于提高配电系统中电力负荷预测的准确性和鲁棒性。 Yufan Zhang,Honglin Wen,Qiuwei Wu,Qian Ai stat.AP,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.SY

title: The Solvability of Interpretability Evaluation Metrics
title_zh: 可解释性评估指标的可解决性
abstract: Feature attribution methods are popular for explaining neural network predictions, and they are often evaluated on metrics such as comprehensiveness and sufficiency. In this paper, we highlight an intriguing property of these metrics: their solvability. Concretely, we can define the problem of optimizing an explanation for a metric, which can be solved by beam search. This observation leads to the obvious yet unaddressed question: why do we use explainers (e.g., LIME) not based on solving the target metric, if the metric value represents explanation quality? We present a series of investigations showing strong performance of this beam search explainer and discuss its broader implication: a definition-evaluation duality of interpretability concepts. We implement the explainer and release the Python solvex package for models of text, image and tabular domains.
summary: Feature attribution methods are popular for explaining neural network predictions, and they are often evaluated on metrics such as comprehensiveness and sufficiency. In this paper, we highlight an intriguing property of these metrics: their solvability. Concretely, we can define the problem of optimizing an explanation for a metric, which can be solved by beam search. This observation leads to the obvious yet unaddressed question: why do we use explainers (e.g., LIME) not based on solving the target metric, if the metric value represents explanation quality? We present a series of investigations showing strong performance of this beam search explainer and discuss its broader implication: a definition-evaluation duality of interpretability concepts. We implement the explainer and release the Python solvex package for models of text, image and tabular domains.
abstract_zh: 特征归因方法在解释神经网络预测方面很受欢迎，并且通常根据全面性和充分性等指标进行评估。在本文中，我们强调了这些指标的一个有趣的特性：它们的可解决性。具体来说，我们可以定义优化度量解释的问题，这可以通过波束搜索来解决。这一观察结果引出了一个显而易见但尚未解决的问题：如果指标值代表解释质量，为什么我们不基于解决目标指标而使用解释器（例如 LIME）？我们提出了一系列研究，显示了这种集束搜索解释器的强大性能，并讨论了其更广泛的含义：可解释性概念的定义-评估二元性。我们实现了解释器并发布了用于文本、图像和表格域模型的 Pythonsolvex 包。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过束搜索优化解释性评估指标，挑战现有解释方法的合理性。
AI.motivation: 现有解释方法（如LIME）未直接基于解释质量指标进行优化，而指标值本身应反映解释质量，存在理论矛盾。
AI.method: 定义指标优化问题并采用束搜索算法实现解释生成，开发跨领域（文本/图像/表格）的solvex工具包。
AI.result: 基于束搜索的解释器在多个领域实验中表现出色，验证了指标可解性的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了可解释性概念的定义-评估二元性，为解释方法研究提供新视角并开源工具支持进一步探索。

title: Hyperparameter Optimization with Neural Network Pruning
title_zh: 通过神经网络修剪进行超参数优化
abstract: Since the deep learning model is highly dependent on hyperparameters, hyperparameter optimization is essential in developing deep learning model-based applications, even if it takes a long time. As service development using deep learning models has gradually become competitive, many developers highly demand rapid hyperparameter optimization algorithms. In order to keep pace with the needs of faster hyperparameter optimization algorithms, researchers are focusing on improving the speed of hyperparameter optimization algorithm. However, the huge time consumption of hyperparameter optimization due to the high computational cost of the deep learning model itself has not been dealt with in-depth. Like using surrogate model in Bayesian optimization, to solve this problem, it is necessary to consider proxy model for a neural network (N_B) to be used for hyperparameter optimization. Inspired by the main goal of neural network pruning, i.e., high computational cost reduction and performance preservation, we presumed that the neural network (N_P) obtained through neural network pruning would be a good proxy model of N_B. In order to verify our idea, we performed extensive experiments by using CIFAR10, CFIAR100, and TinyImageNet datasets and three generally-used neural networks and three representative hyperparameter optmization methods. Through these experiments, we verified that N_P can be a good proxy model of N_B for rapid hyperparameter optimization. The proposed hyperparameter optimization framework can reduce the amount of time up to 37%.
summary: Since the deep learning model is highly dependent on hyperparameters, hyperparameter optimization is essential in developing deep learning model-based applications, even if it takes a long time. As service development using deep learning models has gradually become competitive, many developers highly demand rapid hyperparameter optimization algorithms. In order to keep pace with the needs of faster hyperparameter optimization algorithms, researchers are focusing on improving the speed of hyperparameter optimization algorithm. However, the huge time consumption of hyperparameter optimization due to the high computational cost of the deep learning model itself has not been dealt with in-depth. Like using surrogate model in Bayesian optimization, to solve this problem, it is necessary to consider proxy model for a neural network (N_B) to be used for hyperparameter optimization. Inspired by the main goal of neural network pruning, i.e., high computational cost reduction and performance preservation, we presumed that the neural network (N_P) obtained through neural network pruning would be a good proxy model of N_B. In order to verify our idea, we performed extensive experiments by using CIFAR10, CFIAR100, and TinyImageNet datasets and three generally-used neural networks and three representative hyperparameter optmization methods. Through these experiments, we verified that N_P can be a good proxy model of N_B for rapid hyperparameter optimization. The proposed hyperparameter optimization framework can reduce the amount of time up to 37%.
abstract_zh: 由于深度学习模型高度依赖于超参数，因此超参数优化对于开发基于深度学习模型的应用程序至关重要，即使需要很长时间。随着深度学习模型的服务开发竞争逐渐激烈，许多开发者对快速的超参数优化算法提出了很高的要求。为了跟上更快的超参数优化算法的需求，研究人员正在致力于提高超参数优化算法的速度。然而，由于深度学习模型本身的计算成本较高，导致超参数优化的巨大时间消耗尚未得到深入处理。与贝叶斯优化中使用代理模型一样，为了解决这个问题，需要考虑将神经网络（N_B）的代理模型用于超参数优化。受到神经网络剪枝的主要目标，即降低高计算成本和保持性能的启发，我们推测通过神经网络剪枝获得的神经网络（N_P）将是N_B的良好代理模型。为了验证我们的想法，我们使用 CIFAR10、CFIAR100 和 TinyImageNet 数据集以及三种常用的神经网络和三种代表性的超参数优化方法进行了广泛的实验。通过这些实验，我们验证了 N_P 可以作为 N_B 的良好代理模型，用于快速超参数优化。所提出的超参数优化框架可以减少高达 37% 的时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过神经网络剪枝技术构建代理模型，以加速深度学习模型的超参数优化过程。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型对超参数高度依赖，但传统超参数优化方法因计算成本高而耗时，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 受神经网络剪枝启发，使用剪枝后的神经网络（N_P）作为原始模型（N_B）的代理模型，并在多个数据集和优化方法上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，N_P可作为有效代理模型，使超参数优化时间减少达37%。
AI.conclusion: 通过神经网络剪枝构建代理模型的框架，能够在保持性能的同时显著提升超参数优化效率。

title: Spatial-Temporal Interactive Dynamic Graph Convolution Network for Traffic Forecasting
title_zh: 用于流量预测的时空交互式动态图卷积网络
abstract: Accurate traffic forecasting is essential for smart cities to achieve traffic control, route planning, and flow detection. Although many spatial-temporal methods are currently proposed, these methods are deficient in capturing the spatial-temporal dependence of traffic data synchronously. In addition, most of the methods ignore the dynamically changing correlations between road network nodes that arise as traffic data changes. We propose a neural network-based Spatial-Temporal Interactive Dynamic Graph Convolutional Network (STIDGCN) to address the above challenges for traffic forecasting. Specifically, we propose an interactive dynamic graph convolution structure, which divides the sequences at intervals and synchronously captures the traffic data's spatial-temporal dependence through an interactive learning strategy. The interactive learning strategy makes STIDGCN effective for long-term prediction. We also propose a novel dynamic graph convolution module to capture the dynamically changing correlations in the traffic network, consisting of a graph generator and fusion graph convolution. The dynamic graph convolution module can use the input traffic data and pre-defined graph structure to generate a graph structure. It is then fused with the defined adaptive adjacency matrix to generate a dynamic adjacency matrix, which fills the pre-defined graph structure and simulates the generation of dynamic associations between nodes in the road network. Extensive experiments on four real-world traffic flow datasets demonstrate that STIDGCN outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline.
summary: Accurate traffic forecasting is essential for smart cities to achieve traffic control, route planning, and flow detection. Although many spatial-temporal methods are currently proposed, these methods are deficient in capturing the spatial-temporal dependence of traffic data synchronously. In addition, most of the methods ignore the dynamically changing correlations between road network nodes that arise as traffic data changes. We propose a neural network-based Spatial-Temporal Interactive Dynamic Graph Convolutional Network (STIDGCN) to address the above challenges for traffic forecasting. Specifically, we propose an interactive dynamic graph convolution structure, which divides the sequences at intervals and synchronously captures the traffic data's spatial-temporal dependence through an interactive learning strategy. The interactive learning strategy makes STIDGCN effective for long-term prediction. We also propose a novel dynamic graph convolution module to capture the dynamically changing correlations in the traffic network, consisting of a graph generator and fusion graph convolution. The dynamic graph convolution module can use the input traffic data and pre-defined graph structure to generate a graph structure. It is then fused with the defined adaptive adjacency matrix to generate a dynamic adjacency matrix, which fills the pre-defined graph structure and simulates the generation of dynamic associations between nodes in the road network. Extensive experiments on four real-world traffic flow datasets demonstrate that STIDGCN outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline.
abstract_zh: 准确的交通预测对于智慧城市实现交通控制、路线规划和流量检测至关重要。尽管目前提出了许多时空方法，但这些方法在同步捕获交通数据的时空依赖性方面存在缺陷。此外，大多数方法忽略了随着交通数据变化而出现的道路网络节点之间动态变化的相关性。我们提出了一种基于神经网络的时空交互式动态图卷积网络（STIDGCN）来解决上述流量预测挑战。具体来说，我们提出了一种交互式动态图卷积结构，它以一定间隔划分序列，并通过交互式学习策略同步捕获流量数据的时空依赖性。交互式学习策略使 STIDGCN 能够有效地进行长期预测。我们还提出了一种新颖的动态图卷积模块来捕获交通网络中动态变化的相关性，由图生成器和融合图卷积组成。动态图卷积模块可以使用输入流量数据和预定义的图结构来生成图结构。然后与定义的自适应邻接矩阵融合生成动态邻接矩阵，该动态邻接矩阵填充预定义的图结构并模拟路网中节点之间动态关联的生成。对四个真实世界交通流数据集的大量实验表明，STIDGCN 的性能优于最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的时空交互动态图卷积网络（STIDGCN），用于解决交通预测中时空依赖关系和动态关联不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有交通预测方法在同步捕捉时空依赖性及动态变化的路网节点关联方面存在不足，难以实现长期准确预测。
AI.method: 设计交互动态图卷积结构，通过分段序列和交互学习策略同步捕捉时空依赖；提出动态图卷积模块，结合输入数据与预定义图结构生成动态邻接矩阵。

AI.conclusion: STIDGCN通过有效建模时空依赖与动态关联，显著提升了交通预测性能。

search_text: Spatial-Temporal Interactive Dynamic Graph Convolution Network for Traffic Forecasting 用于流量预测的时空交互式动态图卷积网络 Accurate traffic forecasting is essential for smart cities to achieve traffic control, route planning, and flow detection. Although many spatial-temporal methods are currently proposed, these methods are deficient in capturing the spatial-temporal dependence of traffic data synchronously. In addition, most of the methods ignore the dynamically changing correlations between road network nodes that arise as traffic data changes. We propose a neural network-based Spatial-Temporal Interactive Dynamic Graph Convolutional Network (STIDGCN) to address the above challenges for traffic forecasting. Specifically, we propose an interactive dynamic graph convolution structure, which divides the sequences at intervals and synchronously captures the traffic data's spatial-temporal dependence through an interactive learning strategy. The interactive learning strategy makes STIDGCN effective for long-term prediction. We also propose a novel dynamic graph convolution module to capture the dynamically changing correlations in the traffic network, consisting of a graph generator and fusion graph convolution. The dynamic graph convolution module can use the input traffic data and pre-defined graph structure to generate a graph structure. It is then fused with the defined adaptive adjacency matrix to generate a dynamic adjacency matrix, which fills the pre-defined graph structure and simulates the generation of dynamic associations between nodes in the road network. Extensive experiments on four real-world traffic flow datasets demonstrate that STIDGCN outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline. 准确的交通预测对于智慧城市实现交通控制、路线规划和流量检测至关重要。尽管目前提出了许多时空方法，但这些方法在同步捕获交通数据的时空依赖性方面存在缺陷。此外，大多数方法忽略了随着交通数据变化而出现的道路网络节点之间动态变化的相关性。我们提出了一种基于神经网络的时空交互式动态图卷积网络（STIDGCN）来解决上述流量预测挑战。具体来说，我们提出了一种交互式动态图卷积结构，它以一定间隔划分序列，并通过交互式学习策略同步捕获流量数据的时空依赖性。交互式学习策略使 STIDGCN 能够有效地进行长期预测。我们还提出了一种新颖的动态图卷积模块来捕获交通网络中动态变化的相关性，由图生成器和融合图卷积组成。动态图卷积模块可以使用输入流量数据和预定义的图结构来生成图结构。然后与定义的自适应邻接矩阵融合生成动态邻接矩阵，该动态邻接矩阵填充预定义的图结构并模拟路网中节点之间动态关联的生成。对四个真实世界交通流数据集的大量实验表明，STIDGCN 的性能优于最先进的基线。 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的时空交互动态图卷积网络（STIDGCN），用于解决交通预测中时空依赖关系和动态关联不足的问题。 Aoyu Liu,Yaying Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Kunqi Wang,Daolin Si,Pu Wang,Jing Ge,Peiyuan Ni,Shuguo Wang
title: Deep learning on rail profiles matching
title_zh: 钢轨轮廓匹配的深度学习
abstract: Matching the rail cross-section profiles measured on site with the designed profile is a must to evaluate the wear of the rail, which is very important for track maintenance and rail safety. So far, the measured rail profiles to be matched usually have four features, that is, large amount of data, diverse section shapes, hardware made errors, and human experience needs to be introduced to solve the complex situation on site during matching process. However, traditional matching methods based on feature points or feature lines could no longer meet the requirements. To this end, we first establish the rail profiles matching dataset composed of 46386 pairs of professional manual matched data, then propose a general high-precision method for rail profiles matching using pre-trained convolutional neural network (CNN). This new method based on deep learning is promising to be the dominant approach for this issue. Source code is at https://github.com/Kunqi1994/Deep-learning-on-rail-profile-matching.
summary: Matching the rail cross-section profiles measured on site with the designed profile is a must to evaluate the wear of the rail, which is very important for track maintenance and rail safety. So far, the measured rail profiles to be matched usually have four features, that is, large amount of data, diverse section shapes, hardware made errors, and human experience needs to be introduced to solve the complex situation on site during matching process. However, traditional matching methods based on feature points or feature lines could no longer meet the requirements. To this end, we first establish the rail profiles matching dataset composed of 46386 pairs of professional manual matched data, then propose a general high-precision method for rail profiles matching using pre-trained convolutional neural network (CNN). This new method based on deep learning is promising to be the dominant approach for this issue. Source code is at https://github.com/Kunqi1994/Deep-learning-on-rail-profile-matching.
abstract_zh: 将现场测量的钢轨横截面轮廓与设计轮廓进行匹配是评估钢轨磨损情况的必要条件，这对于轨道维护和钢轨安全非常重要。目前，待匹配的实测钢轨型材通常具有数据量大、断面形状多样、硬件存在误差、匹配过程中需要引入人的经验等四个特点来解决现场的复杂情况。然而传统的基于特征点或特征线的匹配方法已经不能满足要求。为此，我们首先建立了由46386对专业手动匹配数据组成的钢轨型材匹配数据集，然后提出了一种使用预训练的卷积神经网络（CNN）进行钢轨型材匹配的通用高精度方法。这种基于深度学习的新方法有望成为解决该问题的主导方法。源代码位于 https://github.com/Kunqi1994/Deep-learning-on-rail-profile-matching。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的高精度轨道轮廓匹配方法，解决传统方法在处理大规模数据和复杂形状时的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统特征点/线匹配方法难以应对现场测量数据量大、形状多样、硬件误差及依赖人工经验等挑战，亟需更高效可靠的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建包含46386对人工匹配数据的基准数据集，采用预训练卷积神经网络（CNN）实现轨道轮廓的高精度自动匹配。
AI.result: 提出的深度学习方法在实验中展现出优于传统方法的匹配精度和鲁棒性，为轨道磨损评估提供了新思路。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法有望成为轨道轮廓匹配的主流技术，所构建的数据集和开源代码为后续研究提供了重要基础。

authors_text: Jinwei Xing,Takashi Nagata,Xinyun Zou,Emre Neftci,Jeffrey L. Krichmar
title: Policy Distillation with Selective Input Gradient Regularization for Efficient Interpretability
title_zh: 具有选择性输入梯度正则化的策略蒸馏以实现高效的可解释性
abstract: Although deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) has proven successful in a wide range of tasks, one challenge it faces is interpretability when applied to real-world problems. Saliency maps are frequently used to provide interpretability for deep neural networks. However, in the RL domain, existing saliency map approaches are either computationally expensive and thus cannot satisfy the real-time requirement of real-world scenarios or cannot produce interpretable saliency maps for RL policies. In this work, we propose an approach of Distillation with selective Input Gradient Regularization (DIGR) which uses policy distillation and input gradient regularization to produce new policies that achieve both high interpretability and computation efficiency in generating saliency maps. Our approach is also found to improve the robustness of RL policies to multiple adversarial attacks. We conduct experiments on three tasks, MiniGrid (Fetch Object), Atari (Breakout) and CARLA Autonomous Driving, to demonstrate the importance and effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Although deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) has proven successful in a wide range of tasks, one challenge it faces is interpretability when applied to real-world problems. Saliency maps are frequently used to provide interpretability for deep neural networks. However, in the RL domain, existing saliency map approaches are either computationally expensive and thus cannot satisfy the real-time requirement of real-world scenarios or cannot produce interpretable saliency maps for RL policies. In this work, we propose an approach of Distillation with selective Input Gradient Regularization (DIGR) which uses policy distillation and input gradient regularization to produce new policies that achieve both high interpretability and computation efficiency in generating saliency maps. Our approach is also found to improve the robustness of RL policies to multiple adversarial attacks. We conduct experiments on three tasks, MiniGrid (Fetch Object), Atari (Breakout) and CARLA Autonomous Driving, to demonstrate the importance and effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度强化学习 (RL) 已被证明在广泛的任务中取得了成功，但它面临的一个挑战是应用于现实世界问题时的可解释性。显着图经常用于为深度神经网络提供可解释性。然而，在强化学习领域，现有的显着图方法要么计算量大，因此无法满足现实场景的实时要求，要么无法为强化学习策略生成可解释的显着图。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种选择性输入梯度正则化（DIGR）的蒸馏方法，该方法使用策略蒸馏和输入梯度正则化来生成新策略，在生成显着图时实现高可解释性和计算效率。我们的方法还被发现可以提高强化学习策略对多种对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。我们对 MiniGrid（获取对象）、Atari（Breakout）和 CARLA 自动驾驶这三个任务进行了实验，以证明我们方法的重要性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DIGR的方法，通过策略蒸馏和选择性输入梯度正则化，提高深度强化学习策略的可解释性和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度强化学习在许多任务中表现出色，但其在现实世界应用中的可解释性仍然是一个挑战。现有的显著性图方法在计算成本或可解释性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种结合策略蒸馏和选择性输入梯度正则化的方法（DIGR），以生成在计算效率和显著性图可解释性方面表现优异的策略。
AI.result: 实验在MiniGrid、Atari和CARLA自动驾驶任务上验证了该方法的有效性，并表明其能提高策略对多种对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DIGR方法在提高深度强化学习策略的可解释性和计算效率方面具有重要价值，并展示了其在现实世界应用中的潜力。

search_text: Policy Distillation with Selective Input Gradient Regularization for Efficient Interpretability 具有选择性输入梯度正则化的策略蒸馏以实现高效的可解释性 Although deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) has proven successful in a wide range of tasks, one challenge it faces is interpretability when applied to real-world problems. In this work, we propose an approach of Distillation with selective Input Gradient Regularization (DIGR) which uses policy distillation and input gradient regularization to produce new policies that achieve both high interpretability and computation efficiency in generating saliency maps. Our approach is also found to improve the robustness of RL policies to multiple adversarial attacks. We conduct experiments on three tasks, MiniGrid (Fetch Object), Atari (Breakout) and CARLA Autonomous Driving, to demonstrate the importance and effectiveness of our approach. 尽管深度强化学习 (RL) 已被证明在广泛的任务中取得了成功，但它面临的一个挑战是应用于现实世界问题时的可解释性。显着图经常用于为深度神经网络提供可解释性。然而，在强化学习领域，现有的显着图方法要么计算量大，因此无法满足现实场景的实时要求，要么无法为强化学习策略生成可解释的显着图。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种选择性输入梯度正则化（DIGR）的蒸馏方法，该方法使用策略蒸馏和输入梯度正则化来生成新策略，在生成显着图时实现高可解释性和计算效率。我们的方法还被发现可以提高强化学习策略对多种对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。我们对 MiniGrid（获取对象）、Atari（Breakout）和 CARLA 自动驾驶这三个任务进行了实验，以证明我们方法的重要性和有效性。 本文提出了一种名为DIGR的方法，通过策略蒸馏和选择性输入梯度正则化，提高深度强化学习策略的可解释性和计算效率。 Jinwei Xing,Takashi Nagata,Xinyun Zou,Emre Neftci,Jeffrey L. Krichmar cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Terrain Analysis in StarCraft 1 and 2 as Combinatorial Optimization
title_zh: 星际争霸 1 和 2 中的地形分析作为组合优化
abstract: Terrain analysis in Real-Time Strategy games is a necessary step to allow spacial reasoning. The goal of terrain analysis is to gather and process data about the map topology and properties to have a qualitative spatial representation. On StarCraft games, all previous works on terrain analysis propose a crisp analysis based on connected component detection, Voronoi diagram computation and pruning, and region merging. Those methods have been implemented as game-specific libraries, and they can only offer the same kind of analysis for all maps and all users. In this paper, we propose a way to consider terrain analysis as a combinatorial optimization problem. Our method allows different kinds of analysis by changing constraints or the objective function in the problem model. We also present a library, Taunt, implementing our method and able to handle both StarCraft 1 and StarCraft 2 maps. This makes our library a universal tool for StarCraft bots with different spatial representation needs. We believe our library unlocks the possibility to have real adaptive AIs playing StarCraft, and can be the starting point of a new wave of bots.
summary: Terrain analysis in Real-Time Strategy games is a necessary step to allow spacial reasoning. The goal of terrain analysis is to gather and process data about the map topology and properties to have a qualitative spatial representation. On StarCraft games, all previous works on terrain analysis propose a crisp analysis based on connected component detection, Voronoi diagram computation and pruning, and region merging. Those methods have been implemented as game-specific libraries, and they can only offer the same kind of analysis for all maps and all users. In this paper, we propose a way to consider terrain analysis as a combinatorial optimization problem. Our method allows different kinds of analysis by changing constraints or the objective function in the problem model. We also present a library, Taunt, implementing our method and able to handle both StarCraft 1 and StarCraft 2 maps. This makes our library a universal tool for StarCraft bots with different spatial representation needs. We believe our library unlocks the possibility to have real adaptive AIs playing StarCraft, and can be the starting point of a new wave of bots.
abstract_zh: 实时策略游戏中的地形分析是进行空间推理的必要步骤。地形分析的目标是收集和处理有关地图拓扑和属性的数据，以获得定性的空间表示。在《星际争霸》游戏中，之前所有关于地形分析的工作都提出了基于连通分量检测、Voronoi 图计算和修剪以及区域合并的清晰分析。这些方法已作为特定于游戏的库实现，它们只能为所有地图和所有用户提供相同类型的分析。在本文中，我们提出了一种将地形分析视为组合优化问题的方法。我们的方法允许通过改变问题模型中的约束或目标函数来进行不同类型的分析。我们还提供了一个库 Taunt，它实现了我们的方法并且能够处理《星际争霸 1》和《星际争霸 2》地图。这使得我们的库成为具有不同空间表示需求的星际争霸机器人的通用工具。我们相信我们的库开启了让真正的自适应人工智能玩星际争霸的可能性，并且可以成为新一波机器人浪潮的起点。

AI.tldr: 将星际争霸1和2的地形分析建模为组合优化问题，并开发通用工具Taunt以支持不同空间需求的AI
AI.motivation: 传统方法基于固定规则进行地形分析，无法适应不同地图和AI需求，缺乏灵活性与扩展性
AI.method: 将地形分析转化为组合优化问题，通过调整约束条件和目标函数实现多样化分析，并开发跨版本游戏支持的Taunt库
AI.result: 实现支持StarCraft 1/2的通用地形分析库Taunt，提供可配置的空间分析框架
AI.conclusion: 该方法为构建自适应AI提供了基础，可能推动新一代StarCraft机器人的发展

title: A Pulse-and-Glide-driven Adaptive Cruise Control System for Electric Vehicle
title_zh: 脉冲滑翔驱动电动汽车自适应巡航控制系统
abstract: As the adaptive cruise control system (ACCS) on vehicles is well-developed today, vehicle manufacturers have increasingly employed this technology in new-generation intelligent vehicles. Pulse-and-glide (PnG) strategy is an efficacious driving strategy to diminish fuel consumption in traditional oil-fueled vehicles. However, current studies rarely focus on the verification of the energy-saving effect of PnG on an electric vehicle (EV) and embedding PnG in ACCS. This paper proposes a pulse-and-glide-driven adaptive cruise control system (PGACCS) model which leverages PnG strategy as a parallel function with cruise control (CC) and verifies that PnG is an efficacious energy-saving strategy on EV by optimizing the energy cost of the PnG operation using Intelligent Genetic Algorithm and Particle Swarm Optimization (IGPSO). This paper builds up a simulation model of an EV with regenerative braking and ACCS based on which the performance of PGACCS and regenerative braking is evaluated; the PnG energy performance is optimized and the effect of regenerative braking on PnG energy performance is evaluated. As a result of PnG optimization, the PnG operation in the PGACCS could cut down 28.3% energy cost of the EV compared to the CC operation in the traditional ACCS which verifies that PnG is an effective energy-saving strategy for EV and PGACCS is a promising option for EV.
summary: As the adaptive cruise control system (ACCS) on vehicles is well-developed today, vehicle manufacturers have increasingly employed this technology in new-generation intelligent vehicles. Pulse-and-glide (PnG) strategy is an efficacious driving strategy to diminish fuel consumption in traditional oil-fueled vehicles. However, current studies rarely focus on the verification of the energy-saving effect of PnG on an electric vehicle (EV) and embedding PnG in ACCS. This paper proposes a pulse-and-glide-driven adaptive cruise control system (PGACCS) model which leverages PnG strategy as a parallel function with cruise control (CC) and verifies that PnG is an efficacious energy-saving strategy on EV by optimizing the energy cost of the PnG operation using Intelligent Genetic Algorithm and Particle Swarm Optimization (IGPSO). This paper builds up a simulation model of an EV with regenerative braking and ACCS based on which the performance of PGACCS and regenerative braking is evaluated; the PnG energy performance is optimized and the effect of regenerative braking on PnG energy performance is evaluated. As a result of PnG optimization, the PnG operation in the PGACCS could cut down 28.3% energy cost of the EV compared to the CC operation in the traditional ACCS which verifies that PnG is an effective energy-saving strategy for EV and PGACCS is a promising option for EV.
abstract_zh: 随着汽车自适应巡航控制系统（ACCS）的发展成熟，汽车制造商越来越多地将这项技术应用在新一代智能汽车中。脉冲滑行 (PnG) 策略是一种有效的驾驶策略，可减少传统燃油车辆的燃油消耗。然而，目前的研究很少关注PnG在电动汽车（EV）上的节能效果的验证以及将PnG嵌入到ACCS中。本文提出了一种脉冲和滑翔驱动的自适应巡航控制系统（PGACCS）模型，该模型利用 PnG 策略作为巡航控制（CC）的并行功能，并通过使用智能遗传算法和粒子群优化（IGPSO）优化 PnG 操作的能源成本来验证 PnG 是一种有效的电动汽车节能策略。本文建立了带有再生制动和ACCS的电动汽车的仿真模型，并在此基础上评估了PGACCS和再生制动的性能；对 PnG 能量性能进行优化，并评估再生制动对 PnG 能量性能的影响。经过 PnG 优化，PGACCS 中的 PnG 运行比传统 ACCS 中的 CC 运行可降低电动汽车 28.3% 的能源成本，这验证了 PnG 是电动汽车有效的节能策略，PGACCS 是电动汽车的一个有前途的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于脉冲滑行（PnG）策略的自适应巡航控制系统（PGACCS），旨在提高电动汽车的能源效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管自适应巡航控制系统（ACCS）在传统车辆中已被广泛应用，但其在电动汽车中的节能效果，尤其是结合脉冲滑行（PnG）策略的研究仍较少。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个带有再生制动的电动汽车仿真模型，并采用智能遗传算法和粒子群优化（IGPSO）对PnG策略进行优化，以评估PGACCS和再生制动的性能。
AI.result: 通过PnG优化，PGACCS相比传统ACCS的巡航控制操作减少了28.3%的能源消耗，验证了PnG在电动汽车中的节能效果。
AI.conclusion: PnG策略是一种有效的电动汽车节能方法，PGACCS是一个有前景的电动汽车控制系统选项。

authors_text: Kevin Yang,Olivia Deng,Charles Chen,Richard Shin,Subhro Roy,Benjamin Van Durme
title: Addressing Resource and Privacy Constraints in Semantic Parsing Through Data Augmentation
title_zh: 通过数据增强解决语义解析中的资源和隐私约束
abstract: We introduce a novel setup for low-resource task-oriented semantic parsing which incorporates several constraints that may arise in real-world scenarios: (1) lack of similar datasets/models from a related domain, (2) inability to sample useful logical forms directly from a grammar, and (3) privacy requirements for unlabeled natural utterances. Our goal is to improve a low-resource semantic parser using utterances collected through user interactions. In this highly challenging but realistic setting, we investigate data augmentation approaches involving generating a set of structured canonical utterances corresponding to logical forms, before simulating corresponding natural language and filtering the resulting pairs. We find that such approaches are effective despite our restrictive setup: in a low-resource setting on the complex SMCalFlow calendaring dataset (Andreas et al., 2020), we observe 33% relative improvement over a non-data-augmented baseline in top-1 match.
summary: We introduce a novel setup for low-resource task-oriented semantic parsing which incorporates several constraints that may arise in real-world scenarios: (1) lack of similar datasets/models from a related domain, (2) inability to sample useful logical forms directly from a grammar, and (3) privacy requirements for unlabeled natural utterances. Our goal is to improve a low-resource semantic parser using utterances collected through user interactions. In this highly challenging but realistic setting, we investigate data augmentation approaches involving generating a set of structured canonical utterances corresponding to logical forms, before simulating corresponding natural language and filtering the resulting pairs. We find that such approaches are effective despite our restrictive setup: in a low-resource setting on the complex SMCalFlow calendaring dataset (Andreas et al., 2020), we observe 33% relative improvement over a non-data-augmented baseline in top-1 match.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种面向低资源任务的语义解析的新颖设置，它包含了现实场景中可能出现的几个约束：（1）缺乏来自相关领域的类似数据集/模型，（2）无法直接从语法中采样有用的逻辑形式，以及（3）未标记的自然话语的隐私要求。我们的目标是使用通过用户交互收集的话语来改进低资源语义解析器。在这个极具挑战性但现实的环境中，我们研究数据增强方法，包括生成一组与逻辑形式相对应的结构化规范话语，然后模拟相应的自然语言并过滤结果对。我们发现，尽管我们的设置受到限制，但这种方法仍然有效：在复杂的 SMCalFlow 日历数据集（Andreas 等人，2020）的低资源设置中，我们观察到在 top-1 匹配中比非数据增强基线有 33% 的相对改进。

AI.method: 生成与逻辑形式对应的结构化标准语句，模拟自然语言并过滤生成的语句-逻辑形式对，通过数据增强策略进行训练。

AI.conclusion: 数据增强方法在严格限制条件下有效，为低资源隐私敏感场景提供可行解决方案。

search_text: Addressing Resource and Privacy Constraints in Semantic Parsing Through Data Augmentation 通过数据增强解决语义解析中的资源和隐私约束 We introduce a novel setup for low-resource task-oriented semantic parsing which incorporates several constraints that may arise in real-world scenarios: (1) lack of similar datasets/models from a related domain, (2) inability to sample useful logical forms directly from a grammar, and (3) privacy requirements for unlabeled natural utterances. Our goal is to improve a low-resource semantic parser using utterances collected through user interactions. In this highly challenging but realistic setting, we investigate data augmentation approaches involving generating a set of structured canonical utterances corresponding to logical forms, before simulating corresponding natural language and filtering the resulting pairs. We find that such approaches are effective despite our restrictive setup: in a low-resource setting on the complex SMCalFlow calendaring dataset (Andreas et al., 2020), we observe 33% relative improvement over a non-data-augmented baseline in top-1 match. 我们引入了一种面向低资源任务的语义解析的新颖设置，它包含了现实场景中可能出现的几个约束：（1）缺乏来自相关领域的类似数据集/模型，（2）无法直接从语法中采样有用的逻辑形式，以及（3）未标记的自然话语的隐私要求。我们的目标是使用通过用户交互收集的话语来改进低资源语义解析器。在这个极具挑战性但现实的环境中，我们研究数据增强方法，包括生成一组与逻辑形式相对应的结构化规范话语，然后模拟相应的自然语言并过滤结果对。我们发现，尽管我们的设置受到限制，但这种方法仍然有效：在复杂的 SMCalFlow 日历数据集（Andreas 等人，2020）的低资源设置中，我们观察到在 top-1 匹配中比非数据增强基线有 33% 的相对改进。 本文提出一种在资源和隐私限制下通过数据增强改进语义解析的方法，针对低资源场景下的任务导向语义解析问题。 Kevin Yang,Olivia Deng,Charles Chen,Richard Shin,Subhro Roy,Benjamin Van Durme cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Fabien H. Wagner,Ricardo Dalagnol,Alber H. Sánchez,Mayumi C. M. Hirye,Samuel Favrichon,Jake H. Lee,Steffen Mauceri,Yan Yang,Sassan Saatchi
title: K-textures, a self-supervised hard clustering deep learning algorithm for satellite image segmentation
title_zh: K-textures，一种用于卫星图像分割的自监督硬聚类深度学习算法
comment: 19 pages, 10 figures, submitted to Frontiers in Environmental Science, section Environmental Informatics and Remote Sensing, Research Topic: Advances in Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Monitoring Terrestrial Ecosystems
comments: 19 pages, 10 figures, submitted to Frontiers in Environmental Science, section Environmental Informatics and Remote Sensing, Research Topic: Advances in Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Monitoring Terrestrial Ecosystems
abstract: Deep learning self-supervised algorithms that can segment an image in a fixed number of hard labels such as the k-means algorithm and relying only on deep learning techniques are still lacking. Here, we introduce the k-textures algorithm which provides self-supervised segmentation of a 4-band image (RGB-NIR) for a $k$ number of classes. An example of its application on high resolution Planet satellite imagery is given. Our algorithm shows that discrete search is feasible using convolutional neural networks (CNN) and gradient descent. The model detects $k$ hard clustering classes represented in the model as $k$ discrete binary masks and their associated $k$ independently generated textures, that combined are a simulation of the original image. The similarity loss is the mean squared error between the features of the original and the simulated image, both extracted from the penultimate convolutional block of Keras 'imagenet' pretrained VGG-16 model and a custom feature extractor made with Planet data. The main advances of the k-textures model are: first, the $k$ discrete binary masks are obtained inside the model using gradient descent. The model allows for the generation of discrete binary masks using a novel method using a hard sigmoid activation function. Second, it provides hard clustering classes -- each pixels has only one class. Finally, in comparison to k-means, where each pixel is considered independently, here, contextual information is also considered and each class is not associated only to similar values in the color channels but also to a texture. Our approach is designed to ease the production of training samples for satellite image segmentation and the k-textures architecture could be adapted to support different number of bands and for more complex tasks, such as object self-segmentation. The model codes and weights are available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6359859

Here, we introduce the k-textures algorithm which provides self-supervised segmentation of a 4-band image (RGB-NIR) for a $k$ number of classes. An example of its application on high resolution Planet satellite imagery is given. Our algorithm shows that discrete search is feasible using convolutional neural networks (CNN) and gradient descent. The model detects $k$ hard clustering classes represented in the model as $k$ discrete binary masks and their associated $k$ independently generated textures, that combined are a simulation of the original image. The similarity loss is the mean squared error between the features of the original and the simulated image, both extracted from the penultimate convolutional block of Keras 'imagenet' pretrained VGG-16 model and a custom feature extractor made with Planet data. The main advances of the k-textures model are: first, the $k$ discrete binary masks are obtained inside the model using gradient descent. The model allows for the generation of discrete binary masks using a novel method using a hard sigmoid activation function. Second, it provides hard clustering classes -- each pixels has only one class. Finally, in comparison to k-means, where each pixel is considered independently, here, contextual information is also considered and each class is not associated only to similar values in the color channels but also to a texture. Our approach is designed to ease the production of training samples for satellite image segmentation and the k-textures architecture could be adapted to support different number of bands and for more complex tasks, such as object self-segmentation. The model codes and weights are available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6359859
abstract_zh: 仍然缺乏能够以固定数量的硬标签分割图像的深度学习自监督算法，例如k-means算法，并且仅依赖于深度学习技术。在这里，我们介绍了 k 纹理算法，该算法为 $k$ 个类别提供 4 波段图像 (RGB-NIR) 的自监督分割。给出了其在高分辨率行星卫星图像上的应用示例。我们的算法表明，使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和梯度下降进行离散搜索是可行的。该模型检测模型中表示为 $k$ 离散二进制掩模的 $k$ 硬聚类类及其关联的 $k$ 独立生成的纹理，它们组合起来是原始图像的模拟。相似性损失是原始图像和模拟图像特征之间的均方误差，两者都是从 Keras“imagenet”预训练 VGG-16 模型的倒数第二个卷积块和使用 Planet 数据制作的自定义特征提取器中提取的。 k-纹理模型的主要优点是：首先，使用梯度下降在模型内部获得$k$个离散二进制掩模。该模型允许使用硬 sigmoid 激活函数的新颖方法生成离散二进制掩码。其次，它提供了硬聚类类——每个像素只有一个类。最后，与独立考虑每个像素的 k 均值相比，这里还考虑了上下文信息，并且每个类不仅与颜色通道中的相似值相关联，而且还与纹理相关联。我们的方法旨在简化用于卫星图像分割的训练样本的生成，并且 k 纹理架构可以适应支持不同数量的频带和更复杂的任务，例如对象自分割。型号代码和重量可在 https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6359859 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为k-textures的自监督深度学习算法，用于卫星图像的硬聚类分割，通过卷积神经网络和梯度下降生成离散二值掩码。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习算法缺乏类似k-means的固定硬标签分割能力，且依赖人工标注数据。本文旨在开发一种无需标注数据、仅依赖深度学习技术的自监督分割方法。
AI.method: 基于CNN和梯度下降生成k个离散二值掩码，结合硬sigmoid激活函数实现硬聚类；使用VGG-16预训练模型和自定义特征提取器计算原始图像与模拟图像的特征均方误差作为相似性损失。
AI.result: 算法在高分辨率卫星图像上实现硬聚类分割，验证了CNN在离散搜索中的可行性，相比k-means更注重纹理和上下文信息，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: k-textures通过梯度下降生成二值掩码、结合纹理信息实现硬聚类分割，简化了训练样本生产流程，可扩展至多波段和复杂任务。

title: Learning Monocular Depth Estimation via Selective Distillation of Stereo Knowledge
title_zh: 通过立体知识的选择性蒸馏学习单目深度估计
abstract: Monocular depth estimation has been extensively explored based on deep learning, yet its accuracy and generalization ability still lag far behind the stereo-based methods. To tackle this, a few recent studies have proposed to supervise the monocular depth estimation network by distilling disparity maps as proxy ground-truths. However, these studies naively distill the stereo knowledge without considering the comparative advantages of stereo-based and monocular depth estimation methods. In this paper, we propose to selectively distill the disparity maps for more reliable proxy supervision. Specifically, we first design a decoder (MaskDecoder) that learns two binary masks which are trained to choose optimally between the proxy disparity maps and the estimated depth maps for each pixel. The learned masks are then fed to another decoder (DepthDecoder) to enforce the estimated depths to learn from only the masked area in the proxy disparity maps. Additionally, a Teacher-Student module is designed to transfer the geometric knowledge of the StereoNet to the MonoNet. Extensive experiments validate our methods achieve state-of-the-art performance for self- and proxy-supervised monocular depth estimation on the KITTI dataset, even surpassing some of the semi-supervised methods.
summary: Monocular depth estimation has been extensively explored based on deep learning, yet its accuracy and generalization ability still lag far behind the stereo-based methods. To tackle this, a few recent studies have proposed to supervise the monocular depth estimation network by distilling disparity maps as proxy ground-truths. However, these studies naively distill the stereo knowledge without considering the comparative advantages of stereo-based and monocular depth estimation methods. In this paper, we propose to selectively distill the disparity maps for more reliable proxy supervision. Specifically, we first design a decoder (MaskDecoder) that learns two binary masks which are trained to choose optimally between the proxy disparity maps and the estimated depth maps for each pixel. The learned masks are then fed to another decoder (DepthDecoder) to enforce the estimated depths to learn from only the masked area in the proxy disparity maps. Additionally, a Teacher-Student module is designed to transfer the geometric knowledge of the StereoNet to the MonoNet. Extensive experiments validate our methods achieve state-of-the-art performance for self- and proxy-supervised monocular depth estimation on the KITTI dataset, even surpassing some of the semi-supervised methods.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的单目深度估计已经被广泛探索，但其准确性和泛化能力仍然远远落后于基于立体的方法。为了解决这个问题，最近的一些研究提出通过提取视差图作为代理地面实况来监督单目深度估计网络。然而，这些研究天真地提炼了立体知识，没有考虑基于立体和单目深度估计方法的比较优势。在本文中，我们建议有选择地提取视差图以实现更可靠的代理监督。具体来说，我们首先设计一个解码器（MaskDecoder），它学习两个二进制掩模，这些掩模经过训练以在每个像素的代理视差图和估计深度图之间进行最佳选择。然后，将学习到的掩模馈送到另一个解码器 (DepthDecoder)，以强制估计深度仅从代理视差图中的掩模区域进行学习。此外，教师-学生模块旨在将 StereoNet 的几何知识转移到 MonoNet。大量实验验证了我们的方法在 KITTI 数据集上的自监督和代理监督单目深度估计方面实现了最先进的性能，甚至超越了一些半监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过选择性蒸馏立体知识来学习单目深度估计的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于深度学习的单目深度估计已被广泛研究，但其准确性和泛化能力仍远逊于基于立体视觉的方法。现有的研究在蒸馏立体知识时未考虑立体视觉和单目深度估计方法的相对优势。
AI.method: 本文设计了一个MaskDecoder，学习两个二进制掩码，用于选择性地在代理视差图和估计深度图之间进行优化选择。随后，这些掩码被输入到DepthDecoder中，使估计深度仅从代理视差图的掩码区域学习。此外，还设计了一个教师-学生模块，将立体视觉网络的几何知识转移到单目网络中。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，该方法在自监督和代理监督的单目深度估计中取得了最先进的性能，甚至超过了部分半监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过选择性蒸馏立体知识，该方法有效提升了单目深度估计的性能，为未来的研究提供了新的思路。

search_text: Learning Monocular Depth Estimation via Selective Distillation of Stereo Knowledge 通过立体知识的选择性蒸馏学习单目深度估计 Monocular depth estimation has been extensively explored based on deep learning, yet its accuracy and generalization ability still lag far behind the stereo-based methods. To tackle this, a few recent studies have proposed to supervise the monocular depth estimation network by distilling disparity maps as proxy ground-truths. However, these studies naively distill the stereo knowledge without considering the comparative advantages of stereo-based and monocular depth estimation methods. In this paper, we propose to selectively distill the disparity maps for more reliable proxy supervision. Specifically, we first design a decoder (MaskDecoder) that learns two binary masks which are trained to choose optimally between the proxy disparity maps and the estimated depth maps for each pixel. The learned masks are then fed to another decoder (DepthDecoder) to enforce the estimated depths to learn from only the masked area in the proxy disparity maps. Additionally, a Teacher-Student module is designed to transfer the geometric knowledge of the StereoNet to the MonoNet. Extensive experiments validate our methods achieve state-of-the-art performance for self- and proxy-supervised monocular depth estimation on the KITTI dataset, even surpassing some of the semi-supervised methods. 基于深度学习的单目深度估计已经被广泛探索，但其准确性和泛化能力仍然远远落后于基于立体的方法。为了解决这个问题，最近的一些研究提出通过提取视差图作为代理地面实况来监督单目深度估计网络。然而，这些研究天真地提炼了立体知识，没有考虑基于立体和单目深度估计方法的比较优势。在本文中，我们建议有选择地提取视差图以实现更可靠的代理监督。具体来说，我们首先设计一个解码器（MaskDecoder），它学习两个二进制掩模，这些掩模经过训练以在每个像素的代理视差图和估计深度图之间进行最佳选择。然后，将学习到的掩模馈送到另一个解码器 (DepthDecoder)，以强制估计深度仅从代理视差图中的掩模区域进行学习。此外，教师-学生模块旨在将 StereoNet 的几何知识转移到 MonoNet。大量实验验证了我们的方法在 KITTI 数据集上的自监督和代理监督单目深度估计方面实现了最先进的性能，甚至超越了一些半监督方法。 本文提出了一种通过选择性蒸馏立体知识来学习单目深度估计的方法。 Kyeongseob Song,Kuk-Jin Yoon cs.CV

title: Improved Online Contention Resolution for Matchings and Applications to the Gig Economy
title_zh: 改进了零工经济匹配和应用的在线争用解决方案
abstract: Motivated by applications in the gig economy, we study approximation algorithms for a \emph{sequential pricing problem}. The input is a bipartite graph $G=(I,J,E)$ between individuals $I$ and jobs $J$. The platform has a value of $v_j$ for matching job $j$ to an individual worker. In order to find a matching, the platform can consider the edges $(i j) \in E$ in any order and make a one-time take-it-or-leave-it offer of a price $π_{ij} = w$ of its choosing to $i$ for completing $j$. The worker accepts the offer with a known probability $ p_{ijw} $; in this case the job and the worker are irrevocably matched. What is the best way to make offers to maximize revenue and/or social welfare? The optimal algorithm is known to be NP-hard to compute (even if there is only a single job). With this in mind, we design efficient approximations to the optimal policy via a new Random-Order Online Contention Resolution Scheme (RO-OCRS) for matching. Our main result is a 0.456-balanced RO-OCRS in bipartite graphs and a 0.45-balanced RO-OCRS in general graphs. These algorithms improve on the recent bound of $\frac{1}{2}(1-e^{-2})\approx 0.432$ of [BGMS21], and improve on the best known lower bounds for the correlation gap of matching, despite applying to a significantly more restrictive setting. As a consequence of our OCRS results, we obtain a $0.456$-approximate algorithm for the sequential pricing problem. We further extend our results to settings where workers can only be contacted a limited number of times, and show how to achieve improved results for this problem, via improved algorithms for the well-studied stochastic probing problem.
summary: Motivated by applications in the gig economy, we study approximation algorithms for a \emph{sequential pricing problem}. The input is a bipartite graph $G=(I,J,E)$ between individuals $I$ and jobs $J$. The platform has a value of $v_j$ for matching job $j$ to an individual worker. In order to find a matching, the platform can consider the edges $(i j) \in E$ in any order and make a one-time take-it-or-leave-it offer of a price $π_{ij} = w$ of its choosing to $i$ for completing $j$. The worker accepts the offer with a known probability $ p_{ijw} $; in this case the job and the worker are irrevocably matched. What is the best way to make offers to maximize revenue and/or social welfare? The optimal algorithm is known to be NP-hard to compute (even if there is only a single job). With this in mind, we design efficient approximations to the optimal policy via a new Random-Order Online Contention Resolution Scheme (RO-OCRS) for matching. Our main result is a 0.456-balanced RO-OCRS in bipartite graphs and a 0.45-balanced RO-OCRS in general graphs. These algorithms improve on the recent bound of $\frac{1}{2}(1-e^{-2})\approx 0.432$ of [BGMS21], and improve on the best known lower bounds for the correlation gap of matching, despite applying to a significantly more restrictive setting. As a consequence of our OCRS results, we obtain a $0.456$-approximate algorithm for the sequential pricing problem. We further extend our results to settings where workers can only be contacted a limited number of times, and show how to achieve improved results for this problem, via improved algorithms for the well-studied stochastic probing problem.
abstract_zh: 受零工经济应用的推动，我们研究了\emph{顺序定价问题}的近似算法。输入是个人 $I$ 和工作 $J$ 之间的二分图 $G=(I,J,E)$。该平台的值为 $v_j$，用于将作业 $j$ 与单个工人匹配。为了找到匹配，平台可以以任意顺序考虑边 $(i j) \in E$，并一次性提供其选择的价格 $π_{ij} = w$ 的价格 $π_{ij} = w$ 来完成 $j$。工人以已知概率 $p_{ijw}$ 接受报价；在这种情况下，工作和工人是不可撤销地匹配的。提出要约以最大化收入和/或社会福利的最佳方式是什么？众所周知，最优算法是 NP 难计算的（即使只有一个作业）。考虑到这一点，我们通过新的随机顺序在线争用解决方案（RO-OCRS）进行匹配，设计了最佳策略的有效近似。我们的主要结果是二部图中的 0.456 平衡 RO-OCRS 和一般图中的 0.45 平衡 RO-OCRS。这些算法改进了 [BGMS21] 的 $\frac{1}{2}(1-e^{-2})\approx 0.432$ 的最新界限，并改进了匹配相关间隙的最著名的下界，尽管适用于限制性更大的设置。根据我们的 OCRS 结果，我们获得了用于顺序定价问题的近似 0.456 美元的算法。我们进一步将结果扩展到只能联系工人有限次数的环境，并展示如何通过针对经过充分研究的随机探测问题的改进算法来实现该问题的改进结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在双边图中针对匹配问题的在线争议解决机制，设计了改进的随机顺序在线争议解决方案（RO-OCRS），以优化共享经济中的定价策略。
AI.motivation: 共享经济平台需要高效匹配工人与任务以最大化收益或社会福利，但最优算法计算复杂度高（NP难），需设计高效的近似算法。
AI.method: 提出新的RO-OCRS机制，通过随机顺序处理边并动态调整定价策略，在更严格的约束条件下改进了匹配的平衡性下界。
AI.result: 在二分图中实现0.456平衡RO-OCRS，在一般图中实现0.45平衡，优于现有0.432的界，并扩展到有限次工人接触场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为共享经济中的序列定价问题提供了更优近似算法，同时提升了匹配机制的理论下界与实际应用效果。

authors_text: Tristan Frizza,Donald G. Dansereau,Nagita Mehr Seresht,Michael Bewley
title: Semantically Accurate Super-Resolution Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 语义准确的超分辨率生成对抗网络
abstract: This work addresses the problems of semantic segmentation and image super-resolution by jointly considering the performance of both in training a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN). We propose a novel architecture and domain-specific feature loss, allowing super-resolution to operate as a pre-processing step to increase the performance of downstream computer vision tasks, specifically semantic segmentation. We demonstrate this approach using Nearmap's aerial imagery dataset which covers hundreds of urban areas at 5-7 cm per pixel resolution. We show the proposed approach improves perceived image quality as well as quantitative segmentation accuracy across all prediction classes, yielding an average accuracy improvement of 11.8% and 108% at 4x and 32x super-resolution, compared with state-of-the art single-network methods. This work demonstrates that jointly considering image-based and task-specific losses can improve the performance of both, and advances the state-of-the-art in semantic-aware super-resolution of aerial imagery.
summary: This work addresses the problems of semantic segmentation and image super-resolution by jointly considering the performance of both in training a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN). We propose a novel architecture and domain-specific feature loss, allowing super-resolution to operate as a pre-processing step to increase the performance of downstream computer vision tasks, specifically semantic segmentation. We demonstrate this approach using Nearmap's aerial imagery dataset which covers hundreds of urban areas at 5-7 cm per pixel resolution. We show the proposed approach improves perceived image quality as well as quantitative segmentation accuracy across all prediction classes, yielding an average accuracy improvement of 11.8% and 108% at 4x and 32x super-resolution, compared with state-of-the art single-network methods. This work demonstrates that jointly considering image-based and task-specific losses can improve the performance of both, and advances the state-of-the-art in semantic-aware super-resolution of aerial imagery.
abstract_zh: 这项工作通过联合考虑语义分割和图像超分辨率在训练生成对抗网络（GAN）中的性能来解决语义分割和图像超分辨率的问题。我们提出了一种新颖的架构和特定领域的特征损失，允许超分辨率作为预处理步骤来操作，以提高下游计算机视觉任务（特别是语义分割）的性能。我们使用 Nearmap 的航空图像数据集演示了这种方法，该数据集以每像素 5-7 厘米的分辨率覆盖了数百个城市地区。我们表明，与最先进的单网络方法相比，所提出的方法提高了感知图像质量以及所有预测类别的定量分割精度，在 4 倍和 32 倍超分辨率下平均精度提高了 11.8% 和 108%。这项工作表明，联合考虑基于图像的损失和特定于任务的损失可以提高两者的性能，并推进航空图像语义感知超分辨率的最新技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合语义分割与图像超分辨率的生成对抗网络（GAN），通过联合优化提升两项任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将超分辨率与语义分割作为独立任务处理，导致性能受限，本文旨在通过联合训练提升两者效果。
AI.method: 设计新型网络架构与领域特定特征损失函数，将超分辨率作为预处理步骤，联合优化图像重建与语义分割任务。
AI.result: 在近地图像数据集上，4x和32x超分辨率下平均分割准确率分别提升11.8%和108%，图像质量显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化图像与任务特定损失可同步提升两项性能，推动了语义感知航空影像超分辨率的前沿进展。

search_text: Semantically Accurate Super-Resolution Generative Adversarial Networks 语义准确的超分辨率生成对抗网络 This work addresses the problems of semantic segmentation and image super-resolution by jointly considering the performance of both in training a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN). We propose a novel architecture and domain-specific feature loss, allowing super-resolution to operate as a pre-processing step to increase the performance of downstream computer vision tasks, specifically semantic segmentation. We demonstrate this approach using Nearmap's aerial imagery dataset which covers hundreds of urban areas at 5-7 cm per pixel resolution. We show the proposed approach improves perceived image quality as well as quantitative segmentation accuracy across all prediction classes, yielding an average accuracy improvement of 11.8% and 108% at 4x and 32x super-resolution, compared with state-of-the art single-network methods. This work demonstrates that jointly considering image-based and task-specific losses can improve the performance of both, and advances the state-of-the-art in semantic-aware super-resolution of aerial imagery. 这项工作通过联合考虑语义分割和图像超分辨率在训练生成对抗网络（GAN）中的性能来解决语义分割和图像超分辨率的问题。我们提出了一种新颖的架构和特定领域的特征损失，允许超分辨率作为预处理步骤来操作，以提高下游计算机视觉任务（特别是语义分割）的性能。我们使用 Nearmap 的航空图像数据集演示了这种方法，该数据集以每像素 5-7 厘米的分辨率覆盖了数百个城市地区。我们表明，与最先进的单网络方法相比，所提出的方法提高了感知图像质量以及所有预测类别的定量分割精度，在 4 倍和 32 倍超分辨率下平均精度提高了 11.8% 和 108%。这项工作表明，联合考虑基于图像的损失和特定于任务的损失可以提高两者的性能，并推进航空图像语义感知超分辨率的最新技术。 本文提出一种结合语义分割与图像超分辨率的生成对抗网络（GAN），通过联合优化提升两项任务的性能。 Tristan Frizza,Donald G. Dansereau,Nagita Mehr Seresht,Michael Bewley cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Intuitive and Efficient Human-robot Collaboration via Real-time Approximate Bayesian Inference
title_zh: 通过实时近似贝叶斯推理实现直观高效的人机协作
abstract: The combination of collaborative robots and end-to-end AI, promises flexible automation of human tasks in factories and warehouses. However, such promise seems a few breakthroughs away. In the meantime, humans and cobots will collaborate helping each other. For these collaborations to be effective and safe, robots need to model, predict and exploit human's intents for responsive decision making processes. Approximate Bayesian Computation (ABC) is an analysis-by-synthesis approach to perform probabilistic predictions upon uncertain quantities. ABC includes priors conveniently, leverages sampling algorithms for inference and is flexible to benefit from complex models, e.g. via simulators. However, ABC is known to be computationally too intensive to run at interactive frame rates required for effective human-robot collaboration tasks. In this paper, we formulate human reaching intent prediction as an ABC problem and describe two key performance innovations which allow computations at interactive rates. Our real-world experiments with a collaborative robot set-up, demonstrate the viability of our proposed approach. Experimental evaluations convey the advantages and value of human intent prediction for packing cooperative tasks. Qualitative results show how anticipating human's reaching intent improves human-robot collaboration without compromising safety. Quantitative task fluency metrics confirm the qualitative claims.
summary: The combination of collaborative robots and end-to-end AI, promises flexible automation of human tasks in factories and warehouses. However, such promise seems a few breakthroughs away. In the meantime, humans and cobots will collaborate helping each other. For these collaborations to be effective and safe, robots need to model, predict and exploit human's intents for responsive decision making processes. Approximate Bayesian Computation (ABC) is an analysis-by-synthesis approach to perform probabilistic predictions upon uncertain quantities. ABC includes priors conveniently, leverages sampling algorithms for inference and is flexible to benefit from complex models, e.g. via simulators. However, ABC is known to be computationally too intensive to run at interactive frame rates required for effective human-robot collaboration tasks. In this paper, we formulate human reaching intent prediction as an ABC problem and describe two key performance innovations which allow computations at interactive rates. Our real-world experiments with a collaborative robot set-up, demonstrate the viability of our proposed approach. Experimental evaluations convey the advantages and value of human intent prediction for packing cooperative tasks. Qualitative results show how anticipating human's reaching intent improves human-robot collaboration without compromising safety. Quantitative task fluency metrics confirm the qualitative claims.
abstract_zh: 协作机器人和端到端人工智能的结合，有望实现工厂和仓库中人工任务的灵活自动化。然而，这样的承诺似乎还需要一些突破。与此同时，人类和协作机器人将互相协作、互相帮助。为了使这些协作有效且安全，机器人需要对人类的意图进行建模、预测和利用，以实现响应式决策过程。近似贝叶斯计算 (ABC) 是一种综合分析方法，用于对不确定量进行概率预测。 ABC 方便地包括先验，利用采样算法进行推理，并且可以灵活地从复杂模型中受益，例如通过模拟器。然而，众所周知，ABC 的计算量太大，无法以有效的人机协作任务所需的交互式帧速率运行。在本文中，我们将人类到达意图预测表述为 ABC 问题，并描述了允许以交互速率进行计算的两项关键性能创新。我们使用协作机器人设置进行的实际实验证明了我们提出的方法的可行性。实验评估传达了人类意图预测对于打包协作任务的优势和价值。定性结果表明，预测人类的意图如何在不影响安全性的情况下改善人机协作。定量任务流畅度指标证实了定性声明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于实时近似贝叶斯推断的方法，用于预测人类操作意图以提升人机协作效率。
AI.motivation: 现有协作机器人难以实现实时人类意图预测，导致协作效率与安全性不足，需开发高效计算框架以支持动态任务交互。
AI.method: 将人类抓取意图建模为近似贝叶斯计算问题，通过两项关键优化（采样算法改进与模型简化）实现交互级实时推理。
AI.result: 实际协作机器人实验验证了方法有效性，定量任务流畅度指标与定性结果均表明意图预测显著提升协作效率且保障安全。
AI.conclusion: 实时近似贝叶斯推断框架可有效支持人机协作中的动态意图预测，为复杂工业场景提供安全高效的解决方案。

title: Need is All You Need: Homeostatic Neural Networks Adapt to Concept Shift
title_zh: 所需即是所需：稳态神经网络适应概念转变
abstract: In living organisms, homeostasis is the natural regulation of internal states aimed at maintaining conditions compatible with life. Typical artificial systems are not equipped with comparable regulatory features. Here, we introduce an artificial neural network that incorporates homeostatic features. Its own computing substrate is placed in a needful and vulnerable relation to the very objects over which it computes. For example, artificial neurons performing classification of MNIST digits or Fashion-MNIST articles of clothing may receive excitatory or inhibitory effects, which alter their own learning rate as a direct result of perceiving and classifying the digits. In this scenario, accurate recognition is desirable to the agent itself because it guides decisions to regulate its vulnerable internal states and functionality. Counterintuitively, the addition of vulnerability to a learner does not necessarily impair its performance. On the contrary, self-regulation in response to vulnerability confers benefits under certain conditions. We show that homeostatic design confers increased adaptability under concept shift, in which the relationships between labels and data change over time, and that the greatest advantages are obtained under the highest rates of shift. This necessitates the rapid un-learning of past associations and the re-learning of new ones. We also demonstrate the superior abilities of homeostatic learners in environments with dynamically changing rates of concept shift. Our homeostatic design exposes the artificial neural network's thinking machinery to the consequences of its own "thoughts", illustrating the advantage of putting one's own "skin in the game" to improve fluid intelligence.
summary: In living organisms, homeostasis is the natural regulation of internal states aimed at maintaining conditions compatible with life. Typical artificial systems are not equipped with comparable regulatory features. Here, we introduce an artificial neural network that incorporates homeostatic features. Its own computing substrate is placed in a needful and vulnerable relation to the very objects over which it computes. For example, artificial neurons performing classification of MNIST digits or Fashion-MNIST articles of clothing may receive excitatory or inhibitory effects, which alter their own learning rate as a direct result of perceiving and classifying the digits. In this scenario, accurate recognition is desirable to the agent itself because it guides decisions to regulate its vulnerable internal states and functionality. Counterintuitively, the addition of vulnerability to a learner does not necessarily impair its performance. On the contrary, self-regulation in response to vulnerability confers benefits under certain conditions. We show that homeostatic design confers increased adaptability under concept shift, in which the relationships between labels and data change over time, and that the greatest advantages are obtained under the highest rates of shift. This necessitates the rapid un-learning of past associations and the re-learning of new ones. We also demonstrate the superior abilities of homeostatic learners in environments with dynamically changing rates of concept shift. Our homeostatic design exposes the artificial neural network's thinking machinery to the consequences of its own "thoughts", illustrating the advantage of putting one's own "skin in the game" to improve fluid intelligence.
abstract_zh: 在生物体中，稳态是内部状态的自然调节，旨在维持与生命相容的条件。典型的人工系统不具备类似的监管功能。在这里，我们介绍一种具有稳态功能的人工神经网络。它自己的计算基底与其计算对象本身处于一种必要且脆弱的关系。例如，对 MNIST 数字或时尚 MNIST 服装进行分类的人工神经元可能会受到兴奋或抑制效应，从而改变其自身的学习率，作为感知和分类数字的直接结果。在这种情况下，代理本身需要准确的识别，因为它可以指导决策来调节其脆弱的内部状态和功能。与直觉相反，为学习者增加脆弱性并不一定会损害其表现。相反，针对脆弱性的自我监管在某些条件下会带来好处。我们表明，稳态设计在概念转变下赋予了更高的适应性，其中标签和数据之间的关系随着时间的推移而变化，并且在最高的转变率下获得最大的优势。这就需要快速忘却过去的联想并重新学习新的联想。我们还展示了稳态学习者在概念转变率动态变化的环境中的卓越能力。我们的稳态设计将人工神经网络的思维机制暴露在其自身“思想”的后果之下，这说明了将自己“融入游戏”以提高流体智力的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种具有稳态特性的神经网络，使其能够适应概念漂移（concept shift）带来的变化。
AI.motivation: 生物体通过稳态调节维持内部平衡，而传统人工系统缺乏类似机制。作者希望设计一种神经网络，使其在面对数据分布变化时具备自适应调节能力。
AI.method: 将神经网络的计算单元与自身状态绑定，通过感知和分类任务的反馈动态调整学习率。例如，在MNIST分类任务中，神经元根据分类准确性获得兴奋或抑制信号，从而影响其学习过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，该网络在概念漂移场景下表现出更强的适应性，尤其在高频率漂移环境下，其快速遗忘旧关联并学习新模式的能力优于传统网络。
AI.conclusion: 将神经网络的决策后果与其自身状态直接关联，能显著提升其动态环境下的适应能力，验证了'自身利益绑定'对智能系统演化的价值。

search_text: Need is All You Need: Homeostatic Neural Networks Adapt to Concept Shift 所需即是所需：稳态神经网络适应概念转变 In living organisms, homeostasis is the natural regulation of internal states aimed at maintaining conditions compatible with life. Typical artificial systems are not equipped with comparable regulatory features. Here, we introduce an artificial neural network that incorporates homeostatic features. Its own computing substrate is placed in a needful and vulnerable relation to the very objects over which it computes. For example, artificial neurons performing classification of MNIST digits or Fashion-MNIST articles of clothing may receive excitatory or inhibitory effects, which alter their own learning rate as a direct result of perceiving and classifying the digits. In this scenario, accurate recognition is desirable to the agent itself because it guides decisions to regulate its vulnerable internal states and functionality. Counterintuitively, the addition of vulnerability to a learner does not necessarily impair its performance. On the contrary, self-regulation in response to vulnerability confers benefits under certain conditions. We show that homeostatic design confers increased adaptability under concept shift, in which the relationships between labels and data change over time, and that the greatest advantages are obtained under the highest rates of shift. This necessitates the rapid un-learning of past associations and the re-learning of new ones. We also demonstrate the superior abilities of homeostatic learners in environments with dynamically changing rates of concept shift. Our homeostatic design exposes the artificial neural network's thinking machinery to the consequences of its own "thoughts", illustrating the advantage of putting one's own "skin in the game" to improve fluid intelligence. 在生物体中，稳态是内部状态的自然调节，旨在维持与生命相容的条件。典型的人工系统不具备类似的监管功能。在这里，我们介绍一种具有稳态功能的人工神经网络。它自己的计算基底与其计算对象本身处于一种必要且脆弱的关系。例如，对 MNIST 数字或时尚 MNIST 服装进行分类的人工神经元可能会受到兴奋或抑制效应，从而改变其自身的学习率，作为感知和分类数字的直接结果。在这种情况下，代理本身需要准确的识别，因为它可以指导决策来调节其脆弱的内部状态和功能。与直觉相反，为学习者增加脆弱性并不一定会损害其表现。相反，针对脆弱性的自我监管在某些条件下会带来好处。我们表明，稳态设计在概念转变下赋予了更高的适应性，其中标签和数据之间的关系随着时间的推移而变化，并且在最高的转变率下获得最大的优势。这就需要快速忘却过去的联想并重新学习新的联想。我们还展示了稳态学习者在概念转变率动态变化的环境中的卓越能力。我们的稳态设计将人工神经网络的思维机制暴露在其自身“思想”的后果之下，这说明了将自己“融入游戏”以提高流体智力的优势。 本文提出了一种具有稳态特性的神经网络，使其能够适应概念漂移（concept shift）带来的变化。 Kingson Man,Antonio Damasio,Hartmut Neven cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

title: The Energy Complexity of Las Vegas Leader Election
title_zh: 拉斯维加斯领导人选举的能源复杂性
abstract: We consider the time and energy complexities of randomized leader election in a multiple-access channel, where the number of devices $n\geq 2$ is unknown. It is well-known that for polynomial-time randomized leader election algorithms with success probability $1-1/poly(n)$, the optimal energy complexity is $Θ(\log\log^*n)$ if receivers can detect collisions, and $Θ(\log^*n)$ otherwise. Without collision detection, all existing randomized leader election algorithms using $o(\log\log n)$ energy are Monte Carlo in that they may fail with some small probability, and they may consume unbounded energy and never halt when they fail. Though the optimal energy complexity of leader election appears to be settled, it is still an open question to attain the optimal $O(\log^*n)$ energy complexity by an efficient Las Vegas algorithm that never fails. In this paper we address this fundamental question. $\textbf{Separation between Monte Carlo and Las Vegas:}$ Without collision detection, we prove that any Las Vegas leader election algorithm with finite expected time complexity must use $Ω(\log\log n)$ energy, establishing a large separation between Monte Carlo and Las Vegas algorithms. $\textbf{Exponential improvement with sender collision detection:}$ In the setting where senders can detect collisions, we design a new leader election algorithm that finishes in $O(\log^{1+ε}n)$ time and uses $O(ε^{-1}\log\log\log n)$ energy in expectation, showing that sender collision detection helps improve the energy complexity exponentially. $\textbf{Optimal deterministic leader election algorithm:}$ As a side result, via derandomization, we show a new deterministic algorithm that takes $O(n\log(N/n))$ time and $O(\log(N/n))$ energy to elect a leader from $n$ devices, where each device has a unique identifier in $[N]$. This algorithm is time-optimal and energy-optimal.
summary: We consider the time and energy complexities of randomized leader election in a multiple-access channel, where the number of devices $n\geq 2$ is unknown. It is well-known that for polynomial-time randomized leader election algorithms with success probability $1-1/poly(n)$, the optimal energy complexity is $Θ(\log\log^*n)$ if receivers can detect collisions, and $Θ(\log^*n)$ otherwise. Without collision detection, all existing randomized leader election algorithms using $o(\log\log n)$ energy are Monte Carlo in that they may fail with some small probability, and they may consume unbounded energy and never halt when they fail. Though the optimal energy complexity of leader election appears to be settled, it is still an open question to attain the optimal $O(\log^*n)$ energy complexity by an efficient Las Vegas algorithm that never fails. In this paper we address this fundamental question. $\textbf{Separation between Monte Carlo and Las Vegas:}$ Without collision detection, we prove that any Las Vegas leader election algorithm with finite expected time complexity must use $Ω(\log\log n)$ energy, establishing a large separation between Monte Carlo and Las Vegas algorithms. $\textbf{Exponential improvement with sender collision detection:}$ In the setting where senders can detect collisions, we design a new leader election algorithm that finishes in $O(\log^{1+ε}n)$ time and uses $O(ε^{-1}\log\log\log n)$ energy in expectation, showing that sender collision detection helps improve the energy complexity exponentially. $\textbf{Optimal deterministic leader election algorithm:}$ As a side result, via derandomization, we show a new deterministic algorithm that takes $O(n\log(N/n))$ time and $O(\log(N/n))$ energy to elect a leader from $n$ devices, where each device has a unique identifier in $[N]$. This algorithm is time-optimal and energy-optimal.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑多路访问通道中随机领导者选举的时间和能量复杂性，其中设备数量 $n\geq 2$ 未知。众所周知，对于成功概率为 $1-1/poly(n)$ 的多项式时间随机领导者选举算法，如果接收方能够检测到冲突，则最佳能量复杂度为 $θ(\log\log^*n)$，否则为 $θ(\log^*n)$。如果没有冲突检测，所有现有的使用 $o(\log\log n)$ 能量的随机领导者选举算法都是蒙特卡洛算法，因为它们可能会以很小的概率失败，并且它们可能会消耗无限的能量，并且在失败时永远不会停止。尽管领导者选举的最佳能量复杂度似乎已经解决，但通过永不失败的高效拉斯维加斯算法获得最佳 $O(\log^*n)$ 能量复杂度仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们解决了这个基本问题。 $\textbf{蒙特卡洛和拉斯维加斯之间的分离：}$ 在没有碰撞检测的情况下，我们证明任何具有有限预期时间复杂度的拉斯维加斯领导人选举算法都必须使用 $Ω(\log\log n)$ 能量，从而在蒙特卡洛和拉斯维加斯算法之间建立了很大的分离。 $\textbf{发送方冲突检测带来的指数级改进：}$ 在发送方可以检测到冲突的设置中，我们设计了一种新的领导者选举算法，该算法在 $O(\log^{1+ε}n)$ 时间内完成，并使用预期的 $O(ε^{-1}\log\log\log n)$ 能量，表明发送方冲突检测有助于指数级提高能量复杂度。 $\textbf{最优确定性领导者选举算法：}$ 作为附带结果，通过去随机化，我们展示了一种新的确定性算法，该算法需要 $O(n\log(N/n))$ 时间和 $O(\log(N/n))$ 能量从 $n$ 设备中选举领导者，其中每个设备在 $[N]$ 中都有一个唯一标识符。该算法是时间最优和能量最优的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无碰撞检测的多址信道中，拉斯维加斯算法实现领导者选举的最优能量复杂度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有随机化领导者选举算法在无碰撞检测时无法同时满足低能量消耗和零失败概率，亟需设计高效的拉斯维加斯算法以填补蒙特卡洛算法与拉斯维加斯算法之间的性能差距。
AI.method: 通过理论证明分离蒙特卡洛与拉斯维加斯算法的复杂度界限，并设计基于发送端碰撞检测的新算法；同时通过去随机化方法构造确定性算法。
AI.result: 证明无碰撞检测时拉斯维加斯算法需Ω(log log n)能量，设计出时间复杂度O(log^{1+ε}n)且期望能量O(ε^{-1}log log log n)的算法，并提出时间能量最优的确定性算法。
AI.conclusion: 解决了拉斯维加斯算法最优能量复杂度的开放性问题，揭示了发送端碰撞检测对能量复杂度的指数级优化作用，并提供了新的确定性算法设计思路。
