result: 理论预测与参与者对AI决策的预期高度吻合，证明人类通过自身解释逻辑与AI解释进行相似性比较的假设成立。
conclusion: 该理论为XAI提供了首个可计算的心理学验证框架，推动解释性AI从经验验证向理论驱动转变。
search_text: A Psychological Theory of Explainability 可解释性的心理学理论 The goal of explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) is to generate human-interpretable explanations, but there are no computationally precise theories of how humans interpret AI generated explanations. The lack of theory means that validation of XAI must be done empirically, on a case-by-case basis, which prevents systematic theory-building in XAI. We propose a psychological theory of how humans draw conclusions from saliency maps, the most common form of XAI explanation, which for the first time allows for precise prediction of explainee inference conditioned on explanation. Our theory posits that absent explanation humans expect the AI to make similar decisions to themselves, and that they interpret an explanation by comparison to the explanations they themselves would give. Comparison is formalized via Shepard's universal law of generalization in a similarity space, a classic theory from cognitive science. A pre-registered user study on AI image classifications with saliency map explanations demonstrate that our theory quantitatively matches participants' predictions of the AI. 可解释人工智能（XAI）的目标是生成人类可解释的解释，但对于人类如何解释人工智能生成的解释，还没有计算精确的理论。缺乏理论意味着 XAI 的验证必须根据具体情况凭经验进行，这阻碍了 XAI 的系统理论构建。我们提出了一种关于人类如何从显着图（XAI 解释的最常见形式）中得出结论的心理学理论，该理论首次允许以解释为条件的被解释者推理的精确预测。我们的理论认为，在缺乏解释的情况下，人类期望人工智能做出与自己类似的决定，并且他们通过与自己给出的解释进行比较来解释解释。比较是通过谢泼德在相似空间中的普遍概括法则形式化的，这是认知科学的经典理论。一项关于人工智能图像分类的预注册用户研究以及显着图解释表明，我们的理论在数量上与参与者对人工智能的预测相匹配。 本文提出一个心理理论，解释人类如何从显著性图（saliency maps）中推断AI决策逻辑，并首次实现对解释效果的量化预测。 Scott Cheng-Hsin Yang,Tomas Folke,Patrick Shafto cs.AI,cs.LG

title: MAS2HP: A Multi Agent System to Predict Protein Structure in 2D HP model
title_zh: MAS2HP：在 2D HP 模型中预测蛋白质结构的多智能体系统
abstract: Protein Structure Prediction (PSP) is an unsolved problem in the field of computational biology. The problem of protein structure prediction is about predicting the native conformation of a protein, while its sequence of amino acids is known. Regarding processing limitations of current computer systems, all-atom simulations for proteins are typically unpractical; several reduced models of proteins have been proposed. Additionally, due to intrinsic hardness of calculations even in reduced models, many computational methods mainly based on artificial intelligence have been proposed to solve the problem. Agent-based modeling is a relatively new method for modeling systems composed of interacting items. In this paper we proposed a new approach for protein structure prediction by using agent-based modeling (ABM) in two dimensional hydrophobic-hydrophilic model. We broke the whole process of protein structure prediction into two steps: the first step, which was introduced in our previous paper, is about biasing the linear sequence to gain a primary energy, and the next step, which will be explained in this paper, is about using ABM with a predefined set of rules, to find the best conformation in the least possible amount of time and steps. This method was implemented in NETLOGO. We have tested this algorithm on several benchmark sequences ranging from 20 to 50-mers in two dimensional Hydrophobic-Hydrophilic lattice models. Comparing to the result of the other algorithms, our method is capable of finding the best known conformations in a significantly shorter time. A major problem in PSP simulation is that as the sequence length increases the time consumed to predict a valid structure will exponentially increase. In contrast, by using MAS2HP the effect of increase in sequence length on spent time has changed from exponentially to linear.
summary: Protein Structure Prediction (PSP) is an unsolved problem in the field of computational biology. The problem of protein structure prediction is about predicting the native conformation of a protein, while its sequence of amino acids is known. Regarding processing limitations of current computer systems, all-atom simulations for proteins are typically unpractical; several reduced models of proteins have been proposed. Additionally, due to intrinsic hardness of calculations even in reduced models, many computational methods mainly based on artificial intelligence have been proposed to solve the problem. Agent-based modeling is a relatively new method for modeling systems composed of interacting items. In this paper we proposed a new approach for protein structure prediction by using agent-based modeling (ABM) in two dimensional hydrophobic-hydrophilic model. We broke the whole process of protein structure prediction into two steps: the first step, which was introduced in our previous paper, is about biasing the linear sequence to gain a primary energy, and the next step, which will be explained in this paper, is about using ABM with a predefined set of rules, to find the best conformation in the least possible amount of time and steps. This method was implemented in NETLOGO. We have tested this algorithm on several benchmark sequences ranging from 20 to 50-mers in two dimensional Hydrophobic-Hydrophilic lattice models. Comparing to the result of the other algorithms, our method is capable of finding the best known conformations in a significantly shorter time. A major problem in PSP simulation is that as the sequence length increases the time consumed to predict a valid structure will exponentially increase. In contrast, by using MAS2HP the effect of increase in sequence length on spent time has changed from exponentially to linear.
abstract_zh: 蛋白质结构预测（PSP）是计算生物学领域尚未解决的问题。蛋白质结构预测问题是在已知氨基酸序列的情况下预测蛋白质的天然构象。鉴于当前计算机系统的处理限制，蛋白质的全原子模拟通常是不切实际的。已经提出了几种简化的蛋白质模型。此外，由于即使在简化模型中计算也存在固有的困难，人们提出了许多主要基于人工智能的计算方法来解决该问题。基于代理的建模是一种相对较新的方法，用于对由交互项组成的系统进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了一种在二维疏水-亲水模型中使用基于代理的建模（ABM）来预测蛋白质结构的新方法。我们将蛋白质结构预测的整个过程分为两个步骤：第一步，在我们之前的论文中介绍过，是关于偏置线性序列以获得初级能量，下一步，将在本文中解释，是使用带有一组预定义规则的 ABM，以尽可能少的时间和步骤找到最佳构象。该方法在NETLOGO中实现。我们已经在二维疏水-亲水晶格模型中的 20 到 50 聚体的多个基准序列上测试了该算法。与其他算法的结果相比，我们的方法能够在更短的时间内找到最著名的构象。 PSP 模拟中的一个主要问题是，随着序列长度的增加，预测有效结构所需的时间将呈指数增长。相比之下，通过使用 MAS2HP，序列长度的增加对花费时间的影响已从指数变为线性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体系统（MAS2HP）的二维疏水-亲水（HP）模型蛋白质结构预测方法。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质结构预测（PSP）因计算复杂度高且传统方法在长序列上效率低下，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将预测过程分为两步：首先通过偏置线性序列获取初级能量，再利用预定义规则的基于智能体的建模（ABM）在NETLOGO中快速搜索最优构象。
AI.result: 在20至50聚体的二维HP模型基准序列测试中，MAS2HP显著缩短了预测时间，且时间复杂度从指数级降至线性级。
AI.conclusion: MAS2HP通过多智能体系统有效解决了长序列预测的计算瓶颈，为蛋白质结构预测提供了高效且可扩展的新方法。

title: Connection-minimal Abduction in EL via Translation to FOL -- Technical Report
title_zh: 通过翻译至 FOL 进行 EL 中的最小连接绑架 -- 技术报告
comment: This paper is the technical report version, including appendices, of an IJCAR 2022 paper (to appear)
comments: This paper is the technical report version, including appendices, of an IJCAR 2022 paper (to appear)
abstract: Abduction in description logics finds extensions of a knowledge base to make it entail an observation. As such, it can be used to explain why the observation does not follow, to repair incomplete knowledge bases, and to provide possible explanations for unexpected observations. We consider TBox abduction in the lightweight description logic EL, where the observation is a concept inclusion and the background knowledge is a TBox, i.e., a set of concept inclusions. To avoid useless answers, such problems usually come with further restrictions on the solution space and/or minimality criteria that help sort the chaff from the grain. We argue that existing minimality notions are insufficient, and introduce connection minimality. This criterion follows Occam's razor by rejecting hypotheses that use concept inclusions unrelated to the problem at hand. We show how to compute a special class of connection-minimal hypotheses in a sound and complete way. Our technique is based on a translation to first-order logic, and constructs hypotheses based on prime implicates. We evaluate a prototype implementation of our approach on ontologies from the medical domain.
summary: Abduction in description logics finds extensions of a knowledge base to make it entail an observation. As such, it can be used to explain why the observation does not follow, to repair incomplete knowledge bases, and to provide possible explanations for unexpected observations. We consider TBox abduction in the lightweight description logic EL, where the observation is a concept inclusion and the background knowledge is a TBox, i.e., a set of concept inclusions. To avoid useless answers, such problems usually come with further restrictions on the solution space and/or minimality criteria that help sort the chaff from the grain. We argue that existing minimality notions are insufficient, and introduce connection minimality. This criterion follows Occam's razor by rejecting hypotheses that use concept inclusions unrelated to the problem at hand. We show how to compute a special class of connection-minimal hypotheses in a sound and complete way. Our technique is based on a translation to first-order logic, and constructs hypotheses based on prime implicates. We evaluate a prototype implementation of our approach on ontologies from the medical domain.
abstract_zh: 描述逻辑中的溯因找到知识库的扩展，使其包含观察。因此，它可以用来解释为什么观察结果不成立，修复不完整的知识库，并为意外的观察结果提供可能的解释。我们在轻量级描述逻辑EL中考虑TBox溯因，其中观察是概念包含，背景知识是TBox，即一组概念包含。为了避免无用的答案，此类问题通常会进一步限制解决方案空间和/或最小化标准，以帮助从谷物中剔除谷壳。我们认为现有的最小化概念是不够的，并引入连接最小化。该标准遵循奥卡姆剃刀原理，拒绝使用与当前问题无关的概念包含的假设。我们展示了如何以合理且完整的方式计算一类特殊的连接最小假设。我们的技术基于对一阶逻辑的转换，并基于素数蕴涵构建假设。我们评估了医学领域本体方法的原型实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在轻量级描述逻辑EL中通过转换为一阶逻辑（FOL）来实现连接最小化归结的方法，以解决知识库扩展问题。
AI.motivation: 现有归结方法的最小化标准不足以过滤无关假设，导致解决方案冗余。本文旨在引入连接最小性准则，通过排除与问题无关的概念包含，提升归结结果的相关性和简洁性。
AI.method: 将EL中的TBox归结问题转化为FOL，利用素蕴含（prime implicates）构建连接最小化假设，并通过原型系统验证方法的可行性。
AI.result: 在医学领域本体上验证了原型系统，证明该方法能有效生成连接最小化的归结假设，符合奥卡姆剃刀原则。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的连接最小性准则及FOL转换方法为EL中的归结问题提供了新的解决方案，适用于需要高效解释和修复知识库的场景。

We evaluate a prototype implementation of our approach on ontologies from the medical domain. 描述逻辑中的溯因找到知识库的扩展，使其包含观察。因此，它可以用来解释为什么观察结果不成立，修复不完整的知识库，并为意外的观察结果提供可能的解释。我们在轻量级描述逻辑EL中考虑TBox溯因，其中观察是概念包含，背景知识是TBox，即一组概念包含。为了避免无用的答案，此类问题通常会进一步限制解决方案空间和/或最小化标准，以帮助从谷物中剔除谷壳。我们认为现有的最小化概念是不够的，并引入连接最小化。该标准遵循奥卡姆剃刀原理，拒绝使用与当前问题无关的概念包含的假设。我们展示了如何以合理且完整的方式计算一类特殊的连接最小假设。我们的技术基于对一阶逻辑的转换，并基于素数蕴涵构建假设。我们评估了医学领域本体方法的原型实现。 本文提出了一种在轻量级描述逻辑EL中通过转换为一阶逻辑（FOL）来实现连接最小化归结的方法，以解决知识库扩展问题。 Fajar Haifani,Patrick Koopmann,Sophie Tourret,Christoph Weidenbach cs.AI,cs.LO

title: Data-driven Driver Model for Speed Advisory Systems in Partially Automated Vehicles
title_zh: 半自动车辆速度咨询系统的数据驱动驾驶员模型
abstract: Vehicle control algorithms exploiting connectivity and automation, such as Connected and Automated Vehicles (CAVs) or Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS), have the opportunity to improve energy savings. However, lower levels of automation involve a human-machine interaction stage, where the presence of a human driver affects the performance of the control algorithm in closed loop. This occurs for instance in the case of Eco-Driving control algorithms implemented as a velocity advisory system, where the driver is displayed an optimal speed trajectory to follow to reduce energy consumption. Achieving the control objectives relies on the human driver perfectly following the recommended speed. If the driver is unable to follow the recommended speed, a decline in energy savings and poor vehicle performance may occur. This warrants the creation of methods to model and forecast the response of a human driver when operating in the loop with a speed advisory system. This work focuses on developing a sequence to sequence long-short term memory (LSTM)-based driver behavior model that models the interaction of the human driver to a suggested desired vehicle speed trajectory in real-world conditions. A driving simulator is used for data collection and training the driver model, which is then compared against the driving data and a deterministic model. Results show close proximity of the LSTM-based model with the driving data, demonstrating that the model can be adopted as a tool to design human-centered speed advisory systems.

However, lower levels of automation involve a human-machine interaction stage, where the presence of a human driver affects the performance of the control algorithm in closed loop. This work focuses on developing a sequence to sequence long-short term memory (LSTM)-based driver behavior model that models the interaction of the human driver to a suggested desired vehicle speed trajectory in real-world conditions. A driving simulator is used for data collection and training the driver model, which is then compared against the driving data and a deterministic model. Results show close proximity of the LSTM-based model with the driving data, demonstrating that the model can be adopted as a tool to design human-centered speed advisory systems.
abstract_zh: 利用连接性和自动化的车辆控制算法，例如联网和自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 或高级驾驶员辅助系统 (ADAS)，有机会提高节能效果。然而，较低水平的自动化涉及人机交互阶段，其中人类驾驶员的存在会影响闭环控制算法的性能。例如，在作为速度咨询系统实现的生态驾驶控制算法的情况下，就会发生这种情况，其中向驾驶员显示要遵循的最佳速度轨迹，以减少能耗。实现控制目标依赖于人类驾驶员完全遵循建议的速度。如果驾驶员无法遵循建议的速度，则可能会出现节能下降和车辆性能下降的情况。这就需要创建方法来建模和预测人类驾驶员在使用速度咨询系统进行循环操作时的响应。这项工作的重点是开发一个基于序列到序列的长期短期记忆 (LSTM) 的驾驶员行为模型，该模型模拟人类驾驶员在现实条件下与建议的所需车辆速度轨迹的交互。驾驶模拟器用于数据收集和训练驾驶员模型，然后将其与驾驶数据和确定性模型进行比较。结果显示基于 LSTM 的模型与驾驶数据非常接近，表明该模型可以用作设计以人为本的速度咨询系统的工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的序列到序列驾驶员行为模型，用于预测半自动化车辆中驾驶员对速度建议系统的响应，以优化能耗。
AI.motivation: 现有生态驾驶控制算法依赖驾驶员严格遵循建议速度，但实际中驾驶员行为差异会导致能耗效率下降，需建立人类驾驶员响应模型以改进系统设计。
AI.method: 通过驾驶模拟器采集真实驾驶数据，训练LSTM模型模拟驾驶员对建议速度轨迹的响应，并与实际驾驶数据及确定性模型进行对比验证。
AI.result: LSTM模型预测结果与实际驾驶数据高度吻合，证明该模型能有效模拟驾驶员行为，为设计以人为中心的速度建议系统提供工具支持。
AI.conclusion: 基于LSTM的驾驶员行为模型可准确预测人类对速度建议的响应，为半自动化车辆的能耗优化和人机协同控制提供理论依据。

title: Conditional Visual Servoing for Multi-Step Tasks
title_zh: 多步骤任务的条件视觉服务
abstract: Visual Servoing has been effectively used to move a robot into specific target locations or to track a recorded demonstration. It does not require manual programming, but it is typically limited to settings where one demonstration maps to one environment state. We propose a modular approach to extend visual servoing to scenarios with multiple demonstration sequences. We call this conditional servoing, as we choose the next demonstration conditioned on the observation of the robot. This method presents an appealing strategy to tackle multi-step problems, as individual demonstrations can be combined flexibly into a control policy. We propose different selection functions and compare them on a shape-sorting task in simulation. With the reprojection error yielding the best overall results, we implement this selection function on a real robot and show the efficacy of the proposed conditional servoing. For videos of our experiments, please check out our project page: https://lmb.informatik.uni-freiburg.de/projects/conditional_servoing/
summary: Visual Servoing has been effectively used to move a robot into specific target locations or to track a recorded demonstration. It does not require manual programming, but it is typically limited to settings where one demonstration maps to one environment state. We propose a modular approach to extend visual servoing to scenarios with multiple demonstration sequences. We call this conditional servoing, as we choose the next demonstration conditioned on the observation of the robot. This method presents an appealing strategy to tackle multi-step problems, as individual demonstrations can be combined flexibly into a control policy. We propose different selection functions and compare them on a shape-sorting task in simulation. With the reprojection error yielding the best overall results, we implement this selection function on a real robot and show the efficacy of the proposed conditional servoing. For videos of our experiments, please check out our project page: https://lmb.informatik.uni-freiburg.de/projects/conditional_servoing/
abstract_zh: 视觉伺服已被有效地用于将机器人移动到特定的目标位置或跟踪录制的演示。它不需要手动编程，但通常仅限于一个演示映射到一种环境状态的设置。我们提出了一种模块化方法，将视觉伺服扩展到具有多个演示序列的场景。我们称之为条件伺服，因为我们根据机器人的观察来选择下一个演示。该方法提出了一种解决多步骤问题的有吸引力的策略，因为单独的演示可以灵活地组合成控制策略。我们提出了不同的选择函数，并在模拟中的形状排序任务上对它们进行了比较。由于重投影误差产生了最佳的整体结果，我们在真实的机器人上实现了这个选择函数，并展示了所提出的条件伺服的功效。有关我们实验的视频，请查看我们的项目页面：https://lmb.informatik.uni-freiburg.de/projects/conditional_servoing/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种条件视觉伺服方法，用于解决多步骤任务，通过根据机器人观察动态选择演示序列。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉伺服方法通常仅适用于单次演示映射到单一环境状态的场景，难以处理需要多步骤操作的复杂任务。
AI.method: 提出模块化条件伺服框架，基于当前观察选择下一演示序列，并通过不同选择函数（如重投影误差）进行比较验证。
AI.result: 在模拟环境中完成形状分类任务验证方法有效性，并在真实机器人上实现，重投影误差选择函数表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 条件视觉伺服通过灵活组合演示序列，为多步骤机器人控制提供了有效解决方案。

title: An Application of a Multivariate Estimation of Distribution Algorithm to Cancer Chemotherapy
title_zh: 多变量分布估计算法在癌症化疗中的应用
comment: Tech report, originally published at Missouri EDA Lab, in support of extended abstract (poster) with same title presented at GECCO 2008
comments: Tech report, originally published at Missouri EDA Lab, in support of extended abstract (poster) with same title presented at GECCO 2008
abstract: Chemotherapy treatment for cancer is a complex optimisation problem with a large number of interacting variables and constraints. A number of different probabilistic algorithms have been applied to it with varying success. In this paper we expand on this by applying two estimation of distribution algorithms to the problem. One is UMDA, which uses a univariate probabilistic model similar to previously applied EDAs. The other is hBOA, the first EDA using a multivariate probabilistic model to be applied to the chemotherapy problem. While instinct would lead us to predict that the more sophisticated algorithm would yield better performance on a complex problem like this, we show that it is outperformed by the algorithms using the simpler univariate model. We hypothesise that this is caused by the more sophisticated algorithm being impeded by the large number of interactions in the problem which are unnecessary for its solution.
summary: Chemotherapy treatment for cancer is a complex optimisation problem with a large number of interacting variables and constraints. A number of different probabilistic algorithms have been applied to it with varying success. In this paper we expand on this by applying two estimation of distribution algorithms to the problem. One is UMDA, which uses a univariate probabilistic model similar to previously applied EDAs. The other is hBOA, the first EDA using a multivariate probabilistic model to be applied to the chemotherapy problem. While instinct would lead us to predict that the more sophisticated algorithm would yield better performance on a complex problem like this, we show that it is outperformed by the algorithms using the simpler univariate model. We hypothesise that this is caused by the more sophisticated algorithm being impeded by the large number of interactions in the problem which are unnecessary for its solution.
abstract_zh: 癌症化疗是一个复杂的优化问题，具有大量相互作用的变量和约束。许多不同的概率算法已被应用到它并取得了不同程度的成功。在本文中，我们通过将两种分布估计算法应用于该问题来对此进行扩展。一种是 UMDA，它使用与之前应用的 EDA 类似的单变量概率模型。另一个是hBOA，第一个使用多元概率模型应用于化疗问题的EDA。虽然本能会让我们预测更复杂的算法在解决此类复杂问题时会产生更好的性能，但我们表明使用更简单的单变量模型的算法优于它。我们假设这是由于更复杂的算法受到问题中大量交互的阻碍而引起的，而这些交互对于其解决方案来说是不必要的。

AI.tldr: 本文将两种分布估计算法（UMDA和hBOA）应用于癌症化疗方案优化，探讨其性能差异。
AI.motivation: 化疗方案优化涉及复杂变量交互和约束，现有概率算法效果不一，需验证不同模型的有效性。
AI.method: 采用单变量模型UMDA和首个多变量模型hBOA进行对比实验，评估其在化疗优化中的表现。
AI.result: 预期更复杂的hBOA未超越简单UMDA，推测因冗余交互干扰了多变量模型的优化过程。
AI.conclusion: 多变量模型可能因问题中不必要的交互而失效，需进一步研究模型与问题结构的适配性。

search_text: An Application of a Multivariate Estimation of Distribution Algorithm to Cancer Chemotherapy 多变量分布估计算法在癌症化疗中的应用 Chemotherapy treatment for cancer is a complex optimisation problem with a large number of interacting variables and constraints. A number of different probabilistic algorithms have been applied to it with varying success. In this paper we expand on this by applying two estimation of distribution algorithms to the problem. One is UMDA, which uses a univariate probabilistic model similar to previously applied EDAs. The other is hBOA, the first EDA using a multivariate probabilistic model to be applied to the chemotherapy problem. While instinct would lead us to predict that the more sophisticated algorithm would yield better performance on a complex problem like this, we show that it is outperformed by the algorithms using the simpler univariate model. We hypothesise that this is caused by the more sophisticated algorithm being impeded by the large number of interactions in the problem which are unnecessary for its solution. 癌症化疗是一个复杂的优化问题，具有大量相互作用的变量和约束。许多不同的概率算法已被应用到它并取得了不同程度的成功。在本文中，我们通过将两种分布估计算法应用于该问题来对此进行扩展。一种是 UMDA，它使用与之前应用的 EDA 类似的单变量概率模型。另一个是hBOA，第一个使用多元概率模型应用于化疗问题的EDA。虽然本能会让我们预测更复杂的算法在解决此类复杂问题时会产生更好的性能，但我们表明使用更简单的单变量模型的算法优于它。我们假设这是由于更复杂的算法受到问题中大量交互的阻碍而引起的，而这些交互对于其解决方案来说是不必要的。 本文将两种分布估计算法（UMDA和hBOA）应用于癌症化疗方案优化，探讨其性能差异。 Alexander Brownlee,Martin Pelikan,John McCall,Andrei Petrovski cs.AI,q-bio.QM

title: Can You Still See Me?: Reconstructing Robot Operations Over End-to-End Encrypted Channels
title_zh: 你还能看到我吗？：通过端到端加密通道重建机器人操作
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, 9 tables, Poster presented at wisec'22
comments: 13 pages, 7 figures, 9 tables, Poster presented at wisec'22
abstract: Connected robots play a key role in Industry 4.0, providing automation and higher efficiency for many industrial workflows. Unfortunately, these robots can leak sensitive information regarding these operational workflows to remote adversaries. While there exists mandates for the use of end-to-end encryption for data transmission in such settings, it is entirely possible for passive adversaries to fingerprint and reconstruct entire workflows being carried out -- establishing an understanding of how facilities operate. In this paper, we investigate whether a remote attacker can accurately fingerprint robot movements and ultimately reconstruct operational workflows. Using a neural network approach to traffic analysis, we find that one can predict TLS-encrypted movements with around ~60% accuracy, increasing to near-perfect accuracy under realistic network conditions. Further, we also find that attackers can reconstruct warehousing workflows with similar success. Ultimately, simply adopting best cybersecurity practices is clearly not enough to stop even weak (passive) adversaries.
summary: Connected robots play a key role in Industry 4.0, providing automation and higher efficiency for many industrial workflows. Unfortunately, these robots can leak sensitive information regarding these operational workflows to remote adversaries. While there exists mandates for the use of end-to-end encryption for data transmission in such settings, it is entirely possible for passive adversaries to fingerprint and reconstruct entire workflows being carried out -- establishing an understanding of how facilities operate. In this paper, we investigate whether a remote attacker can accurately fingerprint robot movements and ultimately reconstruct operational workflows. Using a neural network approach to traffic analysis, we find that one can predict TLS-encrypted movements with around ~60% accuracy, increasing to near-perfect accuracy under realistic network conditions. Further, we also find that attackers can reconstruct warehousing workflows with similar success. Ultimately, simply adopting best cybersecurity practices is clearly not enough to stop even weak (passive) adversaries.
abstract_zh: 联网机器人在工业 4.0 中发挥着关键作用，为许多工业工作流程提供自动化和更高的效率。不幸的是，这些机器人可能会将有关这些操作工作流程的敏感信息泄露给远程对手。尽管在此类设置中存在使用端到端加密进行数据传输的规定，但被动的对手完全有可能识别和重建正在执行的整个工作流程，从而了解设施的运行方式。在本文中，我们研究远程攻击者是否能够准确地识别机器人运动并最终重建操作工作流程。使用神经网络方法进行流量分析，我们发现可以以约 60% 的准确度预测 TLS 加密的移动，在实际网络条件下提高到近乎完美的准确度。此外，我们还发现攻击者可以以类似的成功重建仓储工作流程。最终，仅仅采用最佳网络安全实践显然不足以阻止甚至是弱小的（被动）对手。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在端到端加密通信下，远程攻击者能否通过流量分析重建工业机器人的操作流程。
AI.motivation: 工业机器人通过加密传输数据时，仍可能因流量特征泄露敏感操作信息，现有安全措施难以防范此类被动攻击。
AI.method: 采用神经网络对TLS加密流量进行分析，模拟不同网络环境下的机器人运动轨迹预测与仓储工作流重建。
AI.result: 在实验环境中实现约60%的加密运动轨迹预测准确率，真实网络条件下接近100%；成功还原仓储作业流程关键步骤。
AI.conclusion: 单纯依赖加密等传统安全手段无法有效防御被动流量分析攻击，需设计新型通信防护机制。

title: Human Emotion Classification based on EEG Signals Using Recurrent Neural Network And KNN
title_zh: 使用循环神经网络和 KNN 基于脑电信号的人类情绪分类
abstract: In human contact, emotion is very crucial. Attributes like words, voice intonation, facial expressions, and kinesics can all be used to portray one's feelings. However, brain-computer interface (BCI) devices have not yet reached the level required for emotion interpretation. With the rapid development of machine learning algorithms, dry electrode techniques, and different real-world applications of the brain-computer interface for normal individuals, emotion categorization from EEG data has recently gotten a lot of attention. Electroencephalogram (EEG) signals are a critical resource for these systems. The primary benefit of employing EEG signals is that they reflect true emotion and are easily resolved by computer systems. In this work, EEG signals associated with good, neutral, and negative emotions were identified using channel selection preprocessing. However, researchers had a limited grasp of the specifics of the link between various emotional states until now. To identify EEG signals, we used discrete wavelet transform and machine learning techniques such as recurrent neural network (RNN) and k-nearest neighbor (kNN) algorithm. Initially, the classifier methods were utilized for channel selection. As a result, final feature vectors were created by integrating the features of EEG segments from these channels. Using the RNN and kNN algorithms, the final feature vectors with connected positive, neutral, and negative emotions were categorized independently. The classification performance of both techniques is computed and compared. Using RNN and kNN, the average overall accuracies were 94.844 % and 93.438 %, respectively.
summary: In human contact, emotion is very crucial. Attributes like words, voice intonation, facial expressions, and kinesics can all be used to portray one's feelings. However, brain-computer interface (BCI) devices have not yet reached the level required for emotion interpretation. With the rapid development of machine learning algorithms, dry electrode techniques, and different real-world applications of the brain-computer interface for normal individuals, emotion categorization from EEG data has recently gotten a lot of attention. Electroencephalogram (EEG) signals are a critical resource for these systems. The primary benefit of employing EEG signals is that they reflect true emotion and are easily resolved by computer systems. In this work, EEG signals associated with good, neutral, and negative emotions were identified using channel selection preprocessing. However, researchers had a limited grasp of the specifics of the link between various emotional states until now. To identify EEG signals, we used discrete wavelet transform and machine learning techniques such as recurrent neural network (RNN) and k-nearest neighbor (kNN) algorithm. Initially, the classifier methods were utilized for channel selection. As a result, final feature vectors were created by integrating the features of EEG segments from these channels. Using the RNN and kNN algorithms, the final feature vectors with connected positive, neutral, and negative emotions were categorized independently. The classification performance of both techniques is computed and compared. Using RNN and kNN, the average overall accuracies were 94.844 % and 93.438 %, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在人与人的交往中，情感是非常重要的。言语、语调、面部表情、动作等属性都可以用来描绘一个人的感受。然而，脑机接口（BCI）设备尚未达到情绪解读所需的水平。随着机器学习算法、干电极技术以及正常人脑机接口在现实世界中的不同应用的快速发展，脑电图数据的情绪分类最近受到了广泛的关注。脑电图 (EEG) 信号是这些系统的关键资源。使用脑电图信号的主要好处是它们反映了真实的情绪并且很容易被计算机系统解析。在这项工作中，使用通道选择预处理来识别与良好、中性和负面情绪相关的脑电图信号。然而，到目前为止，研究人员对各种情绪状态之间联系的细节了解有限。为了识别脑电图信号，我们使用了离散小波变换和机器学习技术，例如循环神经网络（RNN）和k近邻（kNN）算法。最初，分类器方法用于通道选择。因此，通过整合这些通道的脑电图片段的特征来创建最终的特征向量。使用 RNN 和 kNN 算法，将具有连接的积极、中性和消极情绪的最终特征向量独立分类。计算并比较了两种技术的分类性能。使用 RNN 和 kNN，平均总体准确率分别为 94.844 % 和 93.438 %。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于EEG信号结合循环神经网络（RNN）和K近邻（KNN）算法的人类情绪分类方法。
AI.motivation: 脑机接口设备在情绪解读方面存在局限，而EEG信号能真实反映情绪且易于计算机处理，因此需探索更有效的分类方法。
AI.method: 通过通道选择预处理和离散小波变换提取EEG特征，利用RNN和KNN算法对积极、中性和消极情绪进行分类，并比较两种方法的性能。
AI.result: RNN和KNN的平均总体准确率分别为94.844%和93.438%。
AI.conclusion: RNN在EEG情绪分类任务中表现优于KNN，为情绪识别提供了有效技术路径。

Using the RNN and kNN algorithms, the final feature vectors with connected positive, neutral, and negative emotions were categorized independently. The classification performance of both techniques is computed and compared. Using RNN and kNN, the average overall accuracies were 94.844 % and 93.438 %, respectively. 在人与人的交往中，情感是非常重要的。言语、语调、面部表情、动作等属性都可以用来描绘一个人的感受。然而，脑机接口（BCI）设备尚未达到情绪解读所需的水平。随着机器学习算法、干电极技术以及正常人脑机接口在现实世界中的不同应用的快速发展，脑电图数据的情绪分类最近受到了广泛的关注。脑电图 (EEG) 信号是这些系统的关键资源。使用脑电图信号的主要好处是它们反映了真实的情绪并且很容易被计算机系统解析。在这项工作中，使用通道选择预处理来识别与良好、中性和负面情绪相关的脑电图信号。然而，到目前为止，研究人员对各种情绪状态之间联系的细节了解有限。为了识别脑电图信号，我们使用了离散小波变换和机器学习技术，例如循环神经网络（RNN）和k近邻（kNN）算法。最初，分类器方法用于通道选择。因此，通过整合这些通道的脑电图片段的特征来创建最终的特征向量。使用 RNN 和 kNN 算法，将具有连接的积极、中性和消极情绪的最终特征向量独立分类。计算并比较了两种技术的分类性能。使用 RNN 和 kNN，平均总体准确率分别为 94.844 % 和 93.438 %。 本文提出基于EEG信号结合循环神经网络（RNN）和K近邻（KNN）算法的人类情绪分类方法。 Shashank Joshi,Falak Joshi eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG

title: Semi-Supervised Building Footprint Generation with Feature and Output Consistency Training
title_zh: 具有特征和输出一致性训练的半监督建筑足迹生成
abstract: Accurate and reliable building footprint maps are vital to urban planning and monitoring, and most existing approaches fall back on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for building footprint generation. However, one limitation of these methods is that they require strong supervisory information from massive annotated samples for network learning. State-of-the-art semi-supervised semantic segmentation networks with consistency training can help to deal with this issue by leveraging a large amount of unlabeled data, which encourages the consistency of model output on data perturbation. Considering that rich information is also encoded in feature maps, we propose to integrate the consistency of both features and outputs in the end-to-end network training of unlabeled samples, enabling to impose additional constraints. Prior semi-supervised semantic segmentation networks have established the cluster assumption, in which the decision boundary should lie in the vicinity of low sample density. In this work, we observe that for building footprint generation, the low-density regions are more apparent at the intermediate feature representations within the encoder than the encoder's input or output. Therefore, we propose an instruction to assign the perturbation to the intermediate feature representations within the encoder, which considers the spatial resolution of input remote sensing imagery and the mean size of individual buildings in the study area. The proposed method is evaluated on three datasets with different resolutions: Planet dataset (3 m/pixel), Massachusetts dataset (1 m/pixel), and Inria dataset (0.3 m/pixel). Experimental results show that the proposed approach can well extract more complete building structures and alleviate omission errors.
summary: Accurate and reliable building footprint maps are vital to urban planning and monitoring, and most existing approaches fall back on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for building footprint generation. However, one limitation of these methods is that they require strong supervisory information from massive annotated samples for network learning. State-of-the-art semi-supervised semantic segmentation networks with consistency training can help to deal with this issue by leveraging a large amount of unlabeled data, which encourages the consistency of model output on data perturbation. Considering that rich information is also encoded in feature maps, we propose to integrate the consistency of both features and outputs in the end-to-end network training of unlabeled samples, enabling to impose additional constraints. Prior semi-supervised semantic segmentation networks have established the cluster assumption, in which the decision boundary should lie in the vicinity of low sample density. In this work, we observe that for building footprint generation, the low-density regions are more apparent at the intermediate feature representations within the encoder than the encoder's input or output. Therefore, we propose an instruction to assign the perturbation to the intermediate feature representations within the encoder, which considers the spatial resolution of input remote sensing imagery and the mean size of individual buildings in the study area. The proposed method is evaluated on three datasets with different resolutions: Planet dataset (3 m/pixel), Massachusetts dataset (1 m/pixel), and Inria dataset (0.3 m/pixel). Experimental results show that the proposed approach can well extract more complete building structures and alleviate omission errors.
abstract_zh: 准确可靠的建筑足迹图对于城市规划和监测至关重要，大多数现有方法都依赖于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 来生成建筑足迹。然而，这些方法的一个局限性是它们需要来自大量带注释样本的强大监督信息才能进行网络学习。最先进的具有一致性训练的半监督语义分割网络可以通过利用大量未标记的数据来帮助解决这个问题，从而促进数据扰动时模型输出的一致性。考虑到丰富的信息也被编码在特征图中，我们建议在未标记样本的端到端网络训练中整合特征和输出的一致性，从而能够施加额外的约束。现有的半监督语义分割网络已经建立了聚类假设，其中决策边界应位于低样本密度附近。在这项工作中，我们观察到，对于建筑足迹生成，低密度区域在编码器内的中间特征表示上比编码器的输入或输出更明显。因此，我们提出了一种将扰动分配给编码器内的中间特征表示的指令，该指令考虑了输入遥感图像的空间分辨率和研究区域中各个建筑物的平均大小。所提出的方法在具有不同分辨率的三个数据集上进行评估：Planet 数据集（3 m/像素）、Massachusetts 数据集（1 m/像素）和 Inria 数据集（0.3 m/像素）。实验结果表明，该方法能够很好地提取更完整的建筑结构并减少遗漏错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督建筑足迹生成方法，通过结合特征和输出一致性训练，减少对大规模标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑足迹生成方法依赖大量标注样本，而半监督学习可通过利用未标注数据缓解此问题。但传统方法仅关注输出一致性，未充分挖掘特征图中的信息。
AI.method: 在编码器中间特征层引入空间扰动，结合输入遥感影像分辨率与研究区建筑平均尺寸，通过特征与输出一致性约束进行端到端训练。
AI.result: 在Planet（3m）、Massachusetts（1m）、Inria（0.3m）三个不同分辨率数据集上均表现出更完整的建筑结构提取能力和更低的遗漏误差。
AI.conclusion: 通过同时利用特征层与输出层的一致性约束，该方法有效提升了半监督建筑足迹生成的精度，且对多分辨率遥感数据具有适应性。

authors_text: Rafia Inam,Alberto Yukinobu Hata,Vlasjov Prifti,Sara Abbaspour Asadollah
title: A Comprehensive Study on Artificial Intelligence Algorithms to Implement Safety Using Communication Technologies
title_zh: 利用通信技术实现安全的人工智能算法的综合研究
abstract: The recent development of artificial intelligence (AI) has increased the interest of researchers and practitioners towards applying its techniques into multiple domains like automotive, health care and air space to achieve automation. Combined to these applications, the attempt to use AI techniques into carrying out safety issues is momentarily at a progressive state. As AI problems are getting even more complex, large processing power is demanded for safety-critical systems to fulfill real-time requirements. These challenges can be solved through edge or cloud computing, which makes the communication an integral part of the solution. This study aims at providing a comprehensive picture of the state of the art AI based safety solutions that uses different communication technologies in diverse application domains. To achieve this, a systematic mapping study is conducted and 565 relevant papers are shortlisted through a multistage selection process, which are then analyzed according to a systematically defined classification framework. The results of the study are based on these main objectives: to clarify current research gaps in the field, to identify the possibility of increased usage of cellular communication in multiple domains, to identify the mostly used AI algorithms and to summarize the emerging future research trends on the topic. The results demonstrate that automotive domain is the one applying AI and communication the most to implement safety and the most used AI in this domain is neural networks, clustering and computer vision; applying cellular communication to automotive domain is highest; the use of non-cellular communication technologies is dominant however a clear trend of a rapid increase in the use of cellular communication is observed specially from 2020 with the roll-out of 5G technology.
summary: The recent development of artificial intelligence (AI) has increased the interest of researchers and practitioners towards applying its techniques into multiple domains like automotive, health care and air space to achieve automation. Combined to these applications, the attempt to use AI techniques into carrying out safety issues is momentarily at a progressive state. As AI problems are getting even more complex, large processing power is demanded for safety-critical systems to fulfill real-time requirements. These challenges can be solved through edge or cloud computing, which makes the communication an integral part of the solution. This study aims at providing a comprehensive picture of the state of the art AI based safety solutions that uses different communication technologies in diverse application domains. To achieve this, a systematic mapping study is conducted and 565 relevant papers are shortlisted through a multistage selection process, which are then analyzed according to a systematically defined classification framework. The results of the study are based on these main objectives: to clarify current research gaps in the field, to identify the possibility of increased usage of cellular communication in multiple domains, to identify the mostly used AI algorithms and to summarize the emerging future research trends on the topic. The results demonstrate that automotive domain is the one applying AI and communication the most to implement safety and the most used AI in this domain is neural networks, clustering and computer vision; applying cellular communication to automotive domain is highest; the use of non-cellular communication technologies is dominant however a clear trend of a rapid increase in the use of cellular communication is observed specially from 2020 with the roll-out of 5G technology.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）的最新发展增加了研究人员和从业者将其技术应用于汽车、医疗保健和航空航天等多个领域以实现自动化的兴趣。结合这些应用，利用人工智能技术解决安全问题的尝试目前正处于进展阶段。随着人工智能问题变得越来越复杂，安全关键系统需要强大的处理能力来满足实时要求。这些挑战可以通过边缘计算或云计算来解决，这使得通信成为解决方案不可或缺的一部分。本研究旨在全面介绍最先进的基于人工智能的安全解决方案，该解决方案在不同的应用领域使用不​​同的通信技术。为了实现这一目标，我们进行了系统的映射研究，并通过多阶段的筛选过程选出了 565 篇相关论文，然后根据系统定义的分类框架进行分析。研究结果基于以下主要目标：澄清该领域当前的研究差距，确定在多个领域增加蜂窝通信使用的可能性，确定最常用的人工智能算法，并总结该主题的未来研究趋势。结果表明，汽车领域是最常应用人工智能和通信来实现安全的领域，该领域最常用的人工智能是神经网络、集群和计算机视觉；蜂窝通信在汽车领域的应用程度最高；非蜂窝通信技术的使用占主导地位，但随着 5G 技术的推出，特别是从 2020 年开始，我们观察到蜂窝通信的使用快速增加的明显趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统映射研究，综述了人工智能算法结合通信技术实现安全性的最新研究现状，分析了不同应用领域中的技术应用趋势。
AI.motivation: 随着人工智能技术复杂度提升，安全关键系统对实时性和计算能力的需求增加，需借助边缘计算或云计算解决挑战，通信技术成为核心环节。
AI.method: 采用多阶段筛选流程从565篇论文中选取样本，基于系统定义的分类框架进行分析，明确研究缺口、技术应用分布及未来趋势。
AI.result: 汽车领域最广泛结合AI与通信技术实现安全，主流算法为神经网络、聚类和计算机视觉；蜂窝通信在汽车领域应用最多，5G推动其使用快速增长。
AI.conclusion: 当前研究聚焦汽车领域，蜂窝通信（尤其5G）呈上升趋势，但非蜂窝技术仍占主导，未来需进一步探索跨领域应用及技术融合创新。

conclusion: 当前研究聚焦汽车领域，蜂窝通信（尤其5G）呈上升趋势，但非蜂窝技术仍占主导，未来需进一步探索跨领域应用及技术融合创新。
search_text: A Comprehensive Study on Artificial Intelligence Algorithms to Implement Safety Using Communication Technologies 利用通信技术实现安全的人工智能算法的综合研究 The recent development of artificial intelligence (AI) has increased the interest of researchers and practitioners towards applying its techniques into multiple domains like automotive, health care and air space to achieve automation. Combined to these applications, the attempt to use AI techniques into carrying out safety issues is momentarily at a progressive state. As AI problems are getting even more complex, large processing power is demanded for safety-critical systems to fulfill real-time requirements. These challenges can be solved through edge or cloud computing, which makes the communication an integral part of the solution. This study aims at providing a comprehensive picture of the state of the art AI based safety solutions that uses different communication technologies in diverse application domains. To achieve this, a systematic mapping study is conducted and 565 relevant papers are shortlisted through a multistage selection process, which are then analyzed according to a systematically defined classification framework. The results of the study are based on these main objectives: to clarify current research gaps in the field, to identify the possibility of increased usage of cellular communication in multiple domains, to identify the mostly used AI algorithms and to summarize the emerging future research trends on the topic. The results demonstrate that automotive domain is the one applying AI and communication the most to implement safety and the most used AI in this domain is neural networks, clustering and computer vision; applying cellular communication to automotive domain is highest; the use of non-cellular communication technologies is dominant however a clear trend of a rapid increase in the use of cellular communication is observed specially from 2020 with the roll-out of 5G technology. 人工智能（AI）的最新发展增加了研究人员和从业者将其技术应用于汽车、医疗保健和航空航天等多个领域以实现自动化的兴趣。结合这些应用，利用人工智能技术解决安全问题的尝试目前正处于进展阶段。随着人工智能问题变得越来越复杂，安全关键系统需要强大的处理能力来满足实时要求。这些挑战可以通过边缘计算或云计算来解决，这使得通信成为解决方案不可或缺的一部分。本研究旨在全面介绍最先进的基于人工智能的安全解决方案，该解决方案在不同的应用领域使用不​​同的通信技术。为了实现这一目标，我们进行了系统的映射研究，并通过多阶段的筛选过程选出了 565 篇相关论文，然后根据系统定义的分类框架进行分析。研究结果基于以下主要目标：澄清该领域当前的研究差距，确定在多个领域增加蜂窝通信使用的可能性，确定最常用的人工智能算法，并总结该主题的未来研究趋势。结果表明，汽车领域是最常应用人工智能和通信来实现安全的领域，该领域最常用的人工智能是神经网络、集群和计算机视觉；蜂窝通信在汽车领域的应用程度最高；非蜂窝通信技术的使用占主导地位，但随着 5G 技术的推出，特别是从 2020 年开始，我们观察到蜂窝通信的使用快速增加的明显趋势。 本文通过系统映射研究，综述了人工智能算法结合通信技术实现安全性的最新研究现状，分析了不同应用领域中的技术应用趋势。 Rafia Inam,Alberto Yukinobu Hata,Vlasjov Prifti,Sara Abbaspour Asadollah cs.AI,cs.NI

authors_text: François Smekens,Nicolas Freud,Bruno Sixou,Guillaume Beslon,Jean M Létang
title: Variable length genetic algorithm with continuous parameters optimization of beam layout in proton therapy
title_zh: 质子治疗中束流布局连续参数优化的变长遗传算法
abstract: Proton therapy is a modality in fast development. Characterized by a maximum dose deposition at the end of the proton trajectory followed by a sharp fall-off, proton beams can deliver a highly conformal dose to the tumor while sparing organs at risk and surrounding healthy tissues. New treatment planning systems based on spot scanning techniques can now propose multi-field optimization. However, in most cases, this optimization only processes the field fluences whereas the choice of ballistics (field geometry) is left to the oncologist and medical physicist. In this work, we investigate a new optimization framework based on a genetic approach. This tool is intended to explore new irradiation schemes and to evaluate the potential of actual or future irradiation systems. We propose to optimize simultaneously the target points and beam incidence angles in a continuous manner and with a variable number of beams. No \textit{a priori} technological constraints are taken into account, \textit{i.e.}~the beam energy values, incidence directions and target points are free parameters. The proposed algorithm is based on a modified version of classical genetic operators: mutation, crossover and selection. We use the real coding associated with random perturbations of the parameters to obtain a continuous variation of the potential solutions. We also introduce a perturbation in the exchange points of the crossover to allow variations of the number of beams. These variations are controlled by introducing a beam fluence lower limit. In this paper, we present a complete description of the algorithm and of its behaviour in an elementary test case. The proposed method is finally assessed in a clinically-realistic test case.
summary: Proton therapy is a modality in fast development. Characterized by a maximum dose deposition at the end of the proton trajectory followed by a sharp fall-off, proton beams can deliver a highly conformal dose to the tumor while sparing organs at risk and surrounding healthy tissues. New treatment planning systems based on spot scanning techniques can now propose multi-field optimization. However, in most cases, this optimization only processes the field fluences whereas the choice of ballistics (field geometry) is left to the oncologist and medical physicist. In this work, we investigate a new optimization framework based on a genetic approach. This tool is intended to explore new irradiation schemes and to evaluate the potential of actual or future irradiation systems. We propose to optimize simultaneously the target points and beam incidence angles in a continuous manner and with a variable number of beams. No \textit{a priori} technological constraints are taken into account, \textit{i.e.}~the beam energy values, incidence directions and target points are free parameters. The proposed algorithm is based on a modified version of classical genetic operators: mutation, crossover and selection. We use the real coding associated with random perturbations of the parameters to obtain a continuous variation of the potential solutions. We also introduce a perturbation in the exchange points of the crossover to allow variations of the number of beams. These variations are controlled by introducing a beam fluence lower limit. In this paper, we present a complete description of the algorithm and of its behaviour in an elementary test case. The proposed method is finally assessed in a clinically-realistic test case.
abstract_zh: 质子治疗是一种快速发展的治疗方式。质子束的特点是在质子轨迹末端出现最大剂量沉积，然后急剧下降，可以向肿瘤提供高度适形的剂量，同时保护处于危险中的器官和周围的健康组织。基于点扫描技术的新治疗计划系统现在可以提出多区域优化。然而，在大多数情况下，这种优化仅处理场影响，而弹道学（场几何）的选择则留给肿瘤学家和医学物理学家。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种基于遗传方法的新优化框架。该工具旨在探索新的辐照方案并评估实际或未来辐照系统的潜力。我们建议以连续的方式和可变数量的光束同时优化目标点和光束入射角。不考虑先验技术限制，即光束能量值、入射方向和目标点是自由参数。所提出的算法基于经典遗传算子的修改版本：变异、交叉和选择。我们使用与参数的随机扰动相关的实编码来获得潜在解决方案的连续变化。我们还在分频器的交换点中引入扰动，以允许光束数量的变化。这些变化是通过引入束流注量下限来控制的。在本文中，我们在基本测试用例中提供了算法及其行为的完整描述。所提出的方法最终在临床真实的测试案例中进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于遗传算法的可变长度优化方法，用于质子治疗中连续参数的射束布局优化。
AI.motivation: 现有质子治疗计划系统在多野优化中仅处理射野强度，而射束几何参数需由专家手动选择，缺乏自动化优化框架。
AI.method: 改进遗传算法操作符（变异、交叉、选择），结合实数编码与随机扰动实现连续参数优化，并通过交叉点扰动实现射束数量可变，以射束流量下限控制参数变化。
AI.result: 在基础测试案例和临床真实案例中验证了算法有效性，展示了优化后的射束布局方案潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为质子治疗提供了无需先验技术约束的自动化射束布局优化框架，可探索新型照射系统方案。

title: Improved Utility Analysis of Private CountSketch
title_zh: 改进的 Private CountSketch 效用分析
abstract: Sketching is an important tool for dealing with high-dimensional vectors that are sparse (or well-approximated by a sparse vector), especially useful in distributed, parallel, and streaming settings. It is known that sketches can be made differentially private by adding noise according to the sensitivity of the sketch, and this has been used in private analytics and federated learning settings. The post-processing property of differential privacy implies that all estimates computed from the sketch can be released within the given privacy budget. In this paper we consider the classical CountSketch, made differentially private with the Gaussian mechanism, and give an improved analysis of its estimation error. Perhaps surprisingly, the privacy-utility trade-off is essentially the best one could hope for, independent of the number of repetitions in CountSketch: The error is almost identical to the error from non-private CountSketch plus the noise needed to make the vector private in the original, high-dimensional domain.
summary: Sketching is an important tool for dealing with high-dimensional vectors that are sparse (or well-approximated by a sparse vector), especially useful in distributed, parallel, and streaming settings. It is known that sketches can be made differentially private by adding noise according to the sensitivity of the sketch, and this has been used in private analytics and federated learning settings. The post-processing property of differential privacy implies that all estimates computed from the sketch can be released within the given privacy budget. In this paper we consider the classical CountSketch, made differentially private with the Gaussian mechanism, and give an improved analysis of its estimation error. Perhaps surprisingly, the privacy-utility trade-off is essentially the best one could hope for, independent of the number of repetitions in CountSketch: The error is almost identical to the error from non-private CountSketch plus the noise needed to make the vector private in the original, high-dimensional domain.
abstract_zh: 草图绘制是处理稀疏高维向量（或通过稀疏向量很好地近似）的重要工具，在分布式、并行和流式设置中特别有用。众所周知，可以通过根据草图的敏感性添加噪声来使草图具有差分隐私性，这已用于私有分析和联邦学习设置中。差异隐私的后处理特性意味着根据草图计算的所有估计都可以在给定的隐私预算内发布。在本文中，我们考虑使用高斯机制进行差分隐私的经典 CountSketch，并对其估计误差进行改进的分析。也许令人惊讶的是，隐私与实用性的权衡本质上是最好的，与 CountSketch 中的重复次数无关：该错误几乎与非私有 CountSketch 的错误加上在原始高维域中使向量私有所需的噪声相同。

AI.tldr: 改进差分隐私CountSketch的效用分析
AI.motivation: 现有差分隐私分析未充分揭示CountSketch重复次数对隐私-效用权衡的影响，需更精确量化隐私保护下的估计误差
AI.method: 基于高斯机制实现差分隐私，在经典CountSketch框架下改进误差分析方法，建立隐私预算与估计误差的数学关系
AI.result: 发现隐私-效用权衡与重复次数无关，误差等于非私有CountSketch误差加上原始高维域隐私噪声
AI.conclusion: 该分析为设计高效隐私保护算法提供了理论依据，证明当前隐私机制已接近最优性能边界

authors_text: Jiawei Shen,Andrea Mifsud,Lijie Xie,Abdulaziz Alshaya,Christos Papavassiliou
title: A High-Voltage Characterisation Platform For Emerging Resistive Switching Technologies
title_zh: 适用于新兴电阻开关技术的高压表征平台

comments: 5 pages. To be published in ISCAS 2022 and made available on IEEEXplore
abstract: Emerging memristor-based array architectures have been effectively employed in non-volatile memories and neuromorphic computing systems due to their density, scalability and capability of storing information. Nonetheless, to demonstrate a practical on-chip memristor-based system, it is essential to have the ability to apply large programming voltage ranges during the characterisation procedures for various memristor technologies. This work presents a 16x16 high voltage memristor characterisation array employing high voltage CMOS circuitry. The proposed system has a maximum programming range of $\pm22V$ to allow on-chip electroforming and I-V sweep. In addition, a Kelvin voltage sensing system is implemented to improve the readout accuracy for low memristance measurements. This work addresses the limitation of conventional CMOS-memristor platforms which can only operate at low voltages, thus limiting the characterisation range and integration options of memristor technologies.

abstract_zh: 新兴的基于忆阻器的阵列架构由于其密度、可扩展性和存储信息的能力，已被有效地应用于非易失性存储器和神经形态计算系统。尽管如此，为了演示基于片上忆阻器的实用系统，必须能够在各种忆阻器技术的表征过程中应用大编程电压范围。这项工作提出了一个采用高压 CMOS 电路的 16x16 高压忆阻器表征阵列。所提出的系统的最大编程范围为 $\pm22V$，以允许片上电铸和 I-V 扫描。此外，还采用开尔文电压传感系统来提高低忆阻测量的读出精度。这项工作解决了传统 CMOS 忆阻器平台只能在低电压下工作的局限性，从而限制了忆阻器技术的表征范围和集成选项。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种支持±22V高电压范围的16x16忆阻器特性测试平台，解决了传统CMOS平台电压限制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统CMOS-忆阻器平台受限于低压操作，难以完整表征新兴忆阻器技术的宽电压特性及集成潜力。
AI.method: 基于高电压CMOS电路构建16x16测试阵列，集成Kelvin电压传感技术以提升低阻值测量精度。
AI.result: 实现±22V编程电压范围，支持片上电形成与I-V特性测试，验证了平台对多种忆阻器技术的兼容性。
AI.conclusion: 该平台突破了传统低压限制，为高密度忆阻器阵列在非易失存储与神经形态计算中的应用提供了关键测试基础设施。

authors_text: Yuhao Mo,Chu Han,Yu Liu,Min Liu,Zhenwei Shi,Jiatai Lin,Bingchao Zhao,Chunwang Huang,Bingjiang Qiu,Yanfen Cui,Lei Wu,Xipeng Pan,Zeyan Xu,Xiaomei Huang,Zaiyi Liu,Ying Wang,Changhong Liang
title: HoVer-Trans: Anatomy-aware HoVer-Transformer for ROI-free Breast Cancer Diagnosis in Ultrasound Images
title_zh: HoVer-Trans：具有解剖学意识的 HoVer-Transformer，用于超声图像中的无 ROI 乳腺癌诊断
abstract: Ultrasonography is an important routine examination for breast cancer diagnosis, due to its non-invasive, radiation-free and low-cost properties. However, the diagnostic accuracy of breast cancer is still limited due to its inherent limitations. It would be a tremendous success if we can precisely diagnose breast cancer by breast ultrasound images (BUS). Many learning-based computer-aided diagnostic methods have been proposed to achieve breast cancer diagnosis/lesion classification. However, most of them require a pre-define ROI and then classify the lesion inside the ROI. Conventional classification backbones, such as VGG16 and ResNet50, can achieve promising classification results with no ROI requirement. But these models lack interpretability, thus restricting their use in clinical practice. In this study, we propose a novel ROI-free model for breast cancer diagnosis in ultrasound images with interpretable feature representations. We leverage the anatomical prior knowledge that malignant and benign tumors have different spatial relationships between different tissue layers, and propose a HoVer-Transformer to formulate this prior knowledge. The proposed HoVer-Trans block extracts the inter- and intra-layer spatial information horizontally and vertically. We conduct and release an open dataset GDPH&SYSUCC for breast cancer diagnosis in BUS. The proposed model is evaluated in three datasets by comparing with four CNN-based models and two vision transformer models via five-fold cross validation. It achieves state-of-the-art classification performance with the best model interpretability. In the meanwhile, our proposed model outperforms two senior sonographers on the breast cancer diagnosis when only one BUS image is given.
summary: Ultrasonography is an important routine examination for breast cancer diagnosis, due to its non-invasive, radiation-free and low-cost properties. However, the diagnostic accuracy of breast cancer is still limited due to its inherent limitations. It would be a tremendous success if we can precisely diagnose breast cancer by breast ultrasound images (BUS). Many learning-based computer-aided diagnostic methods have been proposed to achieve breast cancer diagnosis/lesion classification. However, most of them require a pre-define ROI and then classify the lesion inside the ROI. Conventional classification backbones, such as VGG16 and ResNet50, can achieve promising classification results with no ROI requirement. But these models lack interpretability, thus restricting their use in clinical practice. In this study, we propose a novel ROI-free model for breast cancer diagnosis in ultrasound images with interpretable feature representations. We leverage the anatomical prior knowledge that malignant and benign tumors have different spatial relationships between different tissue layers, and propose a HoVer-Transformer to formulate this prior knowledge. The proposed HoVer-Trans block extracts the inter- and intra-layer spatial information horizontally and vertically. We conduct and release an open dataset GDPH&SYSUCC for breast cancer diagnosis in BUS. The proposed model is evaluated in three datasets by comparing with four CNN-based models and two vision transformer models via five-fold cross validation. It achieves state-of-the-art classification performance with the best model interpretability. In the meanwhile, our proposed model outperforms two senior sonographers on the breast cancer diagnosis when only one BUS image is given.
abstract_zh: 超声检查具有无创、无辐射、低成本的特点，是乳腺癌诊断的重要常规检查。然而，由于其固有的局限性，乳腺癌的诊断准确性仍然受到限制。如果我们能够通过乳腺超声图像（BUS）精确诊断乳腺癌，那将是一个巨大的成功。已经提出了许多基于学习的计算机辅助诊断方法来实现乳腺癌诊断/病变分类。然而，大多数都需要预先定义 ROI，然后对 ROI 内的病变进行分类。传统的分类主干网，例如 VGG16 和 ResNet50，可以在没有 ROI 要求的情况下实现有前景的分类结果。但这些模型缺乏可解释性，从而限制了它们在临床实践中的使用。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的无 ROI 模型，用于在具有可解释特征表示的超声图像中诊断乳腺癌。我们利用恶性肿瘤和良性肿瘤在不同组织层之间具有不同空间关系的解剖学先验知识，并提出了 HoVer-Transformer 来制定这种先验知识。所提出的 HoVer-Trans 块水平和垂直提取层间和层内空间信息。我们在 BUS 中进行并发布了用于乳腺癌诊断的开放数据集 GDPH&SYSUCC。通过五倍交叉验证与四个基于 CNN 的模型和两个视觉变换器模型进行比较，在三个数据集中对所提出的模型进行评估。它实现了最先进的分类性能和最佳的模型可解释性。与此同时，当仅给出一张 BUS 图像时，我们提出的模型在乳腺癌诊断方面优于两名高级超声医师。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需预定义感兴趣区域（ROI）的乳腺癌诊断模型HoVer-Trans，通过可解释的特征表示实现超声图像的乳腺癌分类。
AI.motivation: 现有乳腺超声图像诊断方法依赖预定义ROI且缺乏可解释性，限制了临床应用。传统模型如VGG16和ResNet50虽无需ROI但可解释性差，需开发兼具高准确率与可解释性的诊断模型。
AI.method: 基于解剖学先验知识设计HoVer-Transformer模块，通过水平和垂直方向提取层间及层内空间信息，结合构建的公开数据集GDPH&SYSUCC进行五折交叉验证。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上优于四种CNN模型和两种视觉Transformer模型，达到最先进分类性能；在单张超声图像诊断任务中超越两名资深超声科医生。
AI.conclusion: HoVer-Trans通过解剖学引导的可解释特征表示显著提升乳腺癌诊断准确率，为临床提供可靠且可解释的辅助诊断工具。

authors_text: Giuseppe Vecchio,Simone Palazzo,Dario C. Guastella,Ignacio Carlucho,Stefano V. Albrecht,Giovanni Muscato,Concetto Spampinato
title: MIDGARD: A Simulation Platform for Autonomous Navigation in Unstructured Environments
title_zh: MIDGARD：非结构化环境中自主导航的仿真平台
abstract: We present MIDGARD, an open-source simulation platform for autonomous robot navigation in outdoor unstructured environments. MIDGARD is designed to enable the training of autonomous agents (e.g., unmanned ground vehicles) in photorealistic 3D environments, and to support the generalization skills of learning-based agents through the variability in training scenarios. MIDGARD's main features include a configurable, extensible, and difficulty-driven procedural landscape generation pipeline, with fast and photorealistic scene rendering based on Unreal Engine. Additionally, MIDGARD has built-in support for OpenAI Gym, a programming interface for feature extension (e.g., integrating new types of sensors, customizing exposing internal simulation variables), and a variety of simulated agent sensors (e.g., RGB, depth and instance/semantic segmentation). We evaluate MIDGARD's capabilities as a benchmarking tool for robot navigation utilizing a set of state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms. The results demonstrate MIDGARD's suitability as a simulation and training environment, as well as the effectiveness of our procedural generation approach in controlling scene difficulty, which directly reflects on accuracy metrics. MIDGARD build, source code and documentation are available at https://midgardsim.org/.
summary: We present MIDGARD, an open-source simulation platform for autonomous robot navigation in outdoor unstructured environments. MIDGARD is designed to enable the training of autonomous agents (e.g., unmanned ground vehicles) in photorealistic 3D environments, and to support the generalization skills of learning-based agents through the variability in training scenarios. MIDGARD's main features include a configurable, extensible, and difficulty-driven procedural landscape generation pipeline, with fast and photorealistic scene rendering based on Unreal Engine. Additionally, MIDGARD has built-in support for OpenAI Gym, a programming interface for feature extension (e.g., integrating new types of sensors, customizing exposing internal simulation variables), and a variety of simulated agent sensors (e.g., RGB, depth and instance/semantic segmentation). We evaluate MIDGARD's capabilities as a benchmarking tool for robot navigation utilizing a set of state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms. The results demonstrate MIDGARD's suitability as a simulation and training environment, as well as the effectiveness of our procedural generation approach in controlling scene difficulty, which directly reflects on accuracy metrics. MIDGARD build, source code and documentation are available at https://midgardsim.org/.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 MIDGARD，这是一个用于室外非结构化环境中自主机器人导航的开源仿真平台。 MIDGARD 旨在实现在逼真的 3D 环境中训练自主代理（例如无人地面车辆），并通过训练场景的变化来支持基于学习的代理的泛化技能。 MIDGARD 的主要功能包括可配置、可扩展和难度驱动的程序景观生成管道，以及基于虚幻引擎的快速且逼真的场景渲染。此外，MIDGARD 内置了对 OpenAI Gym 的支持、用于功能扩展的编程接口（例如，集成新型传感器、自定义公开内部模拟变量）以及各种模拟代理传感器（例如 RGB、深度和实例/语义分割）。我们利用一组最先进的强化学习算法来评估 MIDGARD 作为机器人导航基准测试工具的能力。结果证明了 MIDGARD 作为模拟和训练环境的适用性，以及我们的程序生成方法在控制场景难度方面的有效性，这直接反映在准确性指标上。 MIDGARD 构建、源代码和文档可在 https://midgardsim.org/ 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了MIDGARD，一个用于自主机器人在非结构化户外环境中导航的开源仿真平台。
AI.motivation: 现有仿真平台难以满足自主代理在复杂多变的真实环境中训练的需求，需更高灵活性和真实感的工具。
AI.method: 基于Unreal Engine实现快速逼真渲染，结合可配置的程序化地形生成管道，并集成OpenAI Gym接口及多种传感器模拟。
AI.result: 通过前沿强化学习算法验证，证明MIDGARD在场景难度控制与训练效果评估上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MIDGARD为机器人导航研究提供了高效仿真环境，其程序化生成方法能有效提升训练效果。

search_text: MIDGARD: A Simulation Platform for Autonomous Navigation in Unstructured Environments MIDGARD：非结构化环境中自主导航的仿真平台 We present MIDGARD, an open-source simulation platform for autonomous robot navigation in outdoor unstructured environments. MIDGARD is designed to enable the training of autonomous agents (e.g., unmanned ground vehicles) in photorealistic 3D environments, and to support the generalization skills of learning-based agents through the variability in training scenarios. MIDGARD's main features include a configurable, extensible, and difficulty-driven procedural landscape generation pipeline, with fast and photorealistic scene rendering based on Unreal Engine. Additionally, MIDGARD has built-in support for OpenAI Gym, a programming interface for feature extension (e.g., integrating new types of sensors, customizing exposing internal simulation variables), and a variety of simulated agent sensors (e.g., RGB, depth and instance/semantic segmentation). We evaluate MIDGARD's capabilities as a benchmarking tool for robot navigation utilizing a set of state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms. The results demonstrate MIDGARD's suitability as a simulation and training environment, as well as the effectiveness of our procedural generation approach in controlling scene difficulty, which directly reflects on accuracy metrics. MIDGARD build, source code and documentation are available at https://midgardsim.org/. 我们推出 MIDGARD，这是一个用于室外非结构化环境中自主机器人导航的开源仿真平台。 MIDGARD 旨在实现在逼真的 3D 环境中训练自主代理（例如无人地面车辆），并通过训练场景的变化来支持基于学习的代理的泛化技能。 MIDGARD 的主要功能包括可配置、可扩展和难度驱动的程序景观生成管道，以及基于虚幻引擎的快速且逼真的场景渲染。此外，MIDGARD 内置了对 OpenAI Gym 的支持、用于功能扩展的编程接口（例如，集成新型传感器、自定义公开内部模拟变量）以及各种模拟代理传感器（例如 RGB、深度和实例/语义分割）。我们利用一组最先进的强化学习算法来评估 MIDGARD 作为机器人导航基准测试工具的能力。结果证明了 MIDGARD 作为模拟和训练环境的适用性，以及我们的程序生成方法在控制场景难度方面的有效性，这直接反映在准确性指标上。 MIDGARD 构建、源代码和文档可在 https://midgardsim.org/ 上获取。 本文介绍了MIDGARD，一个用于自主机器人在非结构化户外环境中导航的开源仿真平台。 Giuseppe Vecchio,Simone Palazzo,Dario C. title: Feedback Gradient Descent: Efficient and Stable Optimization with Orthogonality for DNNs
title_zh: 反馈梯度下降：DNN 的高效稳定正交优化
abstract: The optimization with orthogonality has been shown useful in training deep neural networks (DNNs). To impose orthogonality on DNNs, both computational efficiency and stability are important. However, existing methods utilizing Riemannian optimization or hard constraints can only ensure stability while those using soft constraints can only improve efficiency. In this paper, we propose a novel method, named Feedback Gradient Descent (FGD), to our knowledge, the first work showing high efficiency and stability simultaneously. FGD induces orthogonality based on the simple yet indispensable Euler discretization of a continuous-time dynamical system on the tangent bundle of the Stiefel manifold. In particular, inspired by a numerical integration method on manifolds called Feedback Integrators, we propose to instantiate it on the tangent bundle of the Stiefel manifold for the first time. In the extensive image classification experiments, FGD comprehensively outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods in terms of accuracy, efficiency, and stability.
summary: The optimization with orthogonality has been shown useful in training deep neural networks (DNNs). To impose orthogonality on DNNs, both computational efficiency and stability are important. However, existing methods utilizing Riemannian optimization or hard constraints can only ensure stability while those using soft constraints can only improve efficiency. In this paper, we propose a novel method, named Feedback Gradient Descent (FGD), to our knowledge, the first work showing high efficiency and stability simultaneously. FGD induces orthogonality based on the simple yet indispensable Euler discretization of a continuous-time dynamical system on the tangent bundle of the Stiefel manifold. In particular, inspired by a numerical integration method on manifolds called Feedback Integrators, we propose to instantiate it on the tangent bundle of the Stiefel manifold for the first time. In the extensive image classification experiments, FGD comprehensively outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods in terms of accuracy, efficiency, and stability.
abstract_zh: 正交优化已被证明在训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 时非常有用。为了对 DNN 施加正交性，计算效率和稳定性都很重要。然而，现有的利用黎曼优化或硬约束的方法只能保证稳定性，而使用软约束的方法只能提高效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，称为反馈梯度下降（FGD），据我们所知，这是第一个同时表现出高效率和稳定性的工作。 FGD 基于 Stiefel 流形切丛上连续时间动力系统的简单但不可或缺的欧拉离散化引入正交性。特别是，受到称为反馈积分器的流形数值积分方法的启发，我们建议首次在 Stiefel 流形的切丛上实例化它。在广泛的图像分类实验中，FGD 在准确性、效率和稳定性方面全面优于现有的最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Feedback Gradient Descent (FGD)的新方法，通过正交性约束实现深度神经网络的高效且稳定的优化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在深度神经网络训练中难以同时保证正交性约束的计算效率与稳定性，硬约束方法稳定性强但效率低，软约束方法效率高但稳定性不足。
AI.method: 基于Stiefel流形切丛的连续时间动力系统欧拉离散化，首次将反馈积分器数值积分方法应用于该流形切丛，实现正交性约束的高效稳定优化。
AI.result: 在图像分类实验中，FGD在准确率、计算效率和训练稳定性方面均优于现有最先进的优化方法。
AI.conclusion: FGD通过创新性地结合流形动力学与反馈积分器，首次实现了正交性约束下深度神经网络训练的高效与稳定统一，为优化方法提供了新思路。

title: Bias and Fairness on Multimodal Emotion Detection Algorithms
title_zh: 多模态情绪检测算法的偏差和公平性
abstract: Numerous studies have shown that machine learning algorithms can latch onto protected attributes such as race and gender and generate predictions that systematically discriminate against one or more groups. To date the majority of bias and fairness research has been on unimodal models. In this work, we explore the biases that exist in emotion recognition systems in relationship to the modalities utilized, and study how multimodal approaches affect system bias and fairness. We consider audio, text, and video modalities, as well as all possible multimodal combinations of those, and find that text alone has the least bias, and accounts for the majority of the models' performances, raising doubts about the worthiness of multimodal emotion recognition systems when bias and fairness are desired alongside model performance.
summary: Numerous studies have shown that machine learning algorithms can latch onto protected attributes such as race and gender and generate predictions that systematically discriminate against one or more groups. To date the majority of bias and fairness research has been on unimodal models. In this work, we explore the biases that exist in emotion recognition systems in relationship to the modalities utilized, and study how multimodal approaches affect system bias and fairness. We consider audio, text, and video modalities, as well as all possible multimodal combinations of those, and find that text alone has the least bias, and accounts for the majority of the models' performances, raising doubts about the worthiness of multimodal emotion recognition systems when bias and fairness are desired alongside model performance.
abstract_zh: 大量研究表明，机器学习算法可以锁定种族和性别等受保护的属性，并生成系统性歧视一个或多个群体的预测。迄今为止，大多数偏见和公平性研究都是针对单峰模型。在这项工作中，我们探讨了情感识别系统中存在的与所使用的模式相关的偏差，并研究多模式方法如何影响系统偏差和公平性。我们考虑了音频、文本和视频模态，以及这些模态的所有可能的多模态组合，发现单独的文本具有最小的偏差，并且占模型性能的大部分，当模型性能同时需要偏差和公平性时，对多模态情感识别系统的价值产生了怀疑。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多模态情绪检测算法中的偏见和公平性问题，分析不同模态（音频、文本、视频）及其组合对系统偏见的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有偏见和公平性研究主要集中在单模态模型，而多模态情绪识别系统的公平性尚未被充分探讨，需明确多模态方法是否能兼顾性能与公平性。
AI.method: 通过对比音频、文本、视频单模态及多模态组合模型，评估其在情绪检测中的偏见程度及整体性能表现。
AI.result: 文本模态单独使用时偏见最少且性能最佳，多模态组合并未显著提升公平性，反而可能引入更多偏见。
AI.conclusion: 在追求模型性能与公平性的场景下，文本单模态模型可能比多模态系统更优，多模态方法的必要性存疑。

search_text: Bias and Fairness on Multimodal Emotion Detection Algorithms 多模态情绪检测算法的偏差和公平性 Numerous studies have shown that machine learning algorithms can latch onto protected attributes such as race and gender and generate predictions that systematically discriminate against one or more groups. To date the majority of bias and fairness research has been on unimodal models. In this work, we explore the biases that exist in emotion recognition systems in relationship to the modalities utilized, and study how multimodal approaches affect system bias and fairness. We consider audio, text, and video modalities, as well as all possible multimodal combinations of those, and find that text alone has the least bias, and accounts for the majority of the models' performances, raising doubts about the worthiness of multimodal emotion recognition systems when bias and fairness are desired alongside model performance. 大量研究表明，机器学习算法可以锁定种族和性别等受保护的属性，并生成系统性歧视一个或多个群体的预测。迄今为止，大多数偏见和公平性研究都是针对单峰模型。在这项工作中，我们探讨了情感识别系统中存在的与所使用的模式相关的偏差，并研究多模式方法如何影响系统偏差和公平性。我们考虑了音频、文本和视频模态，以及这些模态的所有可能的多模态组合，发现单独的文本具有最小的偏差，并且占模型性能的大部分，当模型性能同时需要偏差和公平性时，对多模态情感识别系统的价值产生了怀疑。 本文研究多模态情绪检测算法中的偏见和公平性问题，分析不同模态（音频、文本、视频）及其组合对系统偏见的影响。 Matheus Schmitz,Rehan Ahmed,Jimi Cao cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV

title: Compatible deep neural network framework with financial time series data, including data preprocessor, neural network model and trading strategy
title_zh: 与金融时间序列数据兼容的深度神经网络框架，包括数据预处理器、神经网络模型和交易策略
abstract: Experience has shown that trading in stock and cryptocurrency markets has the potential to be highly profitable. In this light, considerable effort has been recently devoted to investigate how to apply machine learning and deep learning to interpret and predict market behavior. This research introduces a new deep neural network architecture and a novel idea of how to prepare financial data before feeding them to the model. In the data preparation part, the first step is to generate many features using technical indicators and then apply the XGBoost model for feature engineering. Splitting data into three categories and using separate autoencoders, we extract high-level mixed features at the second step. This data preprocessing is introduced to predict price movements. Regarding modeling, different convolutional layers, an long short-term memory unit, and several fully-connected layers have been designed to perform binary classification. This research also introduces a trading strategy to exploit the trained model outputs. Three different datasets are used to evaluate this method, where results indicate that this framework can provide us with profitable and robust predictions.
summary: Experience has shown that trading in stock and cryptocurrency markets has the potential to be highly profitable. In this light, considerable effort has been recently devoted to investigate how to apply machine learning and deep learning to interpret and predict market behavior. This research introduces a new deep neural network architecture and a novel idea of how to prepare financial data before feeding them to the model. In the data preparation part, the first step is to generate many features using technical indicators and then apply the XGBoost model for feature engineering. Splitting data into three categories and using separate autoencoders, we extract high-level mixed features at the second step. This data preprocessing is introduced to predict price movements. Regarding modeling, different convolutional layers, an long short-term memory unit, and several fully-connected layers have been designed to perform binary classification. This research also introduces a trading strategy to exploit the trained model outputs. Three different datasets are used to evaluate this method, where results indicate that this framework can provide us with profitable and robust predictions.
abstract_zh: 经验表明，股票和加密货币市场的交易有可能获得高额利润。有鉴于此，最近人们投入了大量精力来研究如何应用机器学习和深度学习来解释和预测市场行为。这项研究引入了一种新的深度神经网络架构，以及如何在将金融数据输入模型之前准备它们的新颖想法。在数据准备部分，第一步是利用技术指标生成很多特征，然后应用XGBoost模型进行特征工程。将数据分为三类并使用单独的自动编码器，我们在第二步中提取高级混合特征。引入此数据预处理是为了预测价格变动。在建模方面，设计了不同的卷积层、长短期记忆单元和几个全连接层来执行二元分类。这项研究还引入了一种利用经过训练的模型输出的交易策略。使用三个不同的数据集来评估该方法，结果表明该框架可以为我们提供有利可图且稳健的预测。

AI.tldr: 构建兼容深度神经网络框架，整合金融时间序列数据预处理、模型和交易策略以预测价格走势。
AI.motivation: 股票和加密货币交易具有高利润潜力，但传统方法难以有效预测市场行为，需结合机器学习与深度学习提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 数据预处理阶段通过技术指标生成特征并用XGBoost进行特征工程，再利用三类自编码器提取混合特征；模型采用卷积层、LSTM和全连接层实现二分类；结合训练模型输出设计交易策略。
AI.result: 在三个数据集测试中，框架展示了盈利且稳健的价格走势预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过创新的数据预处理和模型设计，有效提升了金融时间序列预测的准确性，为交易策略提供了可靠支持。

authors_text: Lijie Xie,Jiawei Shen,Andrea Mifsud,Chaohan Wang,Abdulaziz Alshaya,Christos Papavassiliou
title: A Wide Dynamic Range Read-out System For Resistive Switching Technology
title_zh: 用于电阻开关技术的宽动态范围读出系统
comment: 5 pages, To be published in ISCAS 2022 and made available on IEEE Xplore
comments: 5 pages, To be published in ISCAS 2022 and made available on IEEE Xplore
abstract: The memristor, because of its controllability over a wide dynamic range of resistance, has emerged as a promising device for data storage and analog computation. A major challenge is the accurate measurement of memristance over a wide dynamic range. In this paper, a novel read-out circuit with feedback adjustment is proposed to measure and digitise input current in the range between 20nA and 2mA. The magnitude of the input currents is estimated by a 5-stage logarithmic current-to-voltage amplifier which scales a linear analog-to-digital converter. This way the least significant bit tracks the absolute input magnitude. This circuit is applicable to reading single memristor conductance, and is also preferable in analog computing where read-out accuracy is particularly critical. The circuits have been realized in Bipolar-CMOS-DMOS (BCD) Gen2 technology.
summary: The memristor, because of its controllability over a wide dynamic range of resistance, has emerged as a promising device for data storage and analog computation. A major challenge is the accurate measurement of memristance over a wide dynamic range. In this paper, a novel read-out circuit with feedback adjustment is proposed to measure and digitise input current in the range between 20nA and 2mA. The magnitude of the input currents is estimated by a 5-stage logarithmic current-to-voltage amplifier which scales a linear analog-to-digital converter. This way the least significant bit tracks the absolute input magnitude. This circuit is applicable to reading single memristor conductance, and is also preferable in analog computing where read-out accuracy is particularly critical. The circuits have been realized in Bipolar-CMOS-DMOS (BCD) Gen2 technology.
abstract_zh: 忆阻器由于其在宽动态电阻范围内的可控性，已成为数据存储和模拟计算的有前途的器件。一个主要挑战是在宽动态范围内精确测量忆阻。本文提出了一种具有反馈调节功能的新型读出电路，用于测量 20nA 至 2mA 范围内的输入电流并将其数字化。输入电流的大小由 5 级对数电流电压放大器估算，该放大器可缩放线性模数转换器。这样，最低有效位跟踪绝对输入幅度。该电路适用于读取单个忆阻器电导，并且也适用于读出精度特别关键的模拟计算。该电路采用双极-CMOS-DMOS (BCD) Gen2 技术实现。

AI.tldr: 设计一种宽动态范围读出系统，用于精确测量忆阻器的电阻值，适用于数据存储和模拟计算。
AI.motivation: 忆阻器因可调电阻范围广泛而具有应用潜力，但现有技术难以准确测量其宽动态范围的阻值，亟需高精度读出方案。
AI.method: 提出带反馈调节的读出电路，采用五级对数电流-电压放大器配合线性ADC，通过分段缩放实现动态范围扩展，并基于BCD Gen2工艺实现电路。
AI.result: 实现20nA至2mA的电流测量，最低有效位与输入幅值匹配，适用于单忆阻器读取及对精度要求高的模拟计算场景。
AI.conclusion: 该电路有效解决了宽动态范围测量难题，验证了BCD工艺在高精度忆阻器读出系统中的可行性。

authors_text: Andrea Mifsud,Jiawei Shen,Peilong Feng,Lijie Xie,Chaohan Wang,Yihan Pan,Sachin Maheshwari,Shady Agwa,Spyros Stathopoulos,Shiwei Wang,Alexander Serb,Christos Papavassiliou,Themis Prodromakis,Timothy G. Constandinou
title: A CMOS-based Characterisation Platform for Emerging RRAM Technologies
title_zh: 适用于新兴 RRAM 技术的基于 CMOS 的表征平台
comment: 5 pages. To be published in ISCAS 2022 and made available on IEEE Xplore
comments: 5 pages. To be published in ISCAS 2022 and made available on IEEE Xplore
abstract: Mass characterisation of emerging memory devices is an essential step in modelling their behaviour for integration within a standard design flow for existing integrated circuit designers. This work develops a novel characterisation platform for emerging resistive devices with a capacity of up to 1 million devices on-chip. Split into four independent sub-arrays, it contains on-chip column-parallel DACs for fast voltage programming of the DUT. On-chip readout circuits with ADCs are also available for fast read operations covering 5-decades of input current (20nA to 2mA). This allows a device's resistance range to be between 1k$Ω$ and 10M$Ω$ with a minimum voltage range of $\pm$1.5V on the device.
summary: Mass characterisation of emerging memory devices is an essential step in modelling their behaviour for integration within a standard design flow for existing integrated circuit designers. This work develops a novel characterisation platform for emerging resistive devices with a capacity of up to 1 million devices on-chip. Split into four independent sub-arrays, it contains on-chip column-parallel DACs for fast voltage programming of the DUT. On-chip readout circuits with ADCs are also available for fast read operations covering 5-decades of input current (20nA to 2mA). This allows a device's resistance range to be between 1k$Ω$ and 10M$Ω$ with a minimum voltage range of $\pm$1.5V on the device.
abstract_zh: 新兴存储器件的质量特性分析是对现有集成电路设计人员在标准设计流程中集成其行为进行建模的重要步骤。这项工作为新兴电阻器件开发了一种新颖的表征平台，片上容量高达 100 万个器件。它分为四个独立的子阵列，包含片上列并行 DAC，用于 DUT 的快速电压编程。带有 ADC 的片上读出电路还可用于覆盖 5 个十年的输入电流（20nA 至 2mA）的快速读取操作。这使得设备的电阻范围介于 1k$Ω$ 和 10M$Ω$ 之间，设备上的最小电压范围为 $\pm$1.5V。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于CMOS的新型RRAM技术大规模表征平台，支持单芯片集成百万级器件测试。
AI.motivation: 新兴存储器件的行为建模需要高效的大规模表征手段，传统方法存在测试效率低、覆盖范围有限等瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计包含四个独立子数组的CMOS平台，集成列并行DAC和ADC电路，实现±1.5V电压编程与20nA-2mA电流读取能力。
AI.result: 平台可覆盖1kΩ-10MΩ电阻范围，支持单芯片并行测试100万器件，完成5个数量级电流检测。
AI.conclusion: 该平台为新兴RRAM器件的标准化设计流程提供了高效可靠的表征解决方案。
