search_text: A CMOS-based Characterisation Platform for Emerging RRAM Technologies 适用于新兴 RRAM 技术的基于 CMOS 的表征平台 Mass characterisation of emerging memory devices is an essential step in modelling their behaviour for integration within a standard design flow for existing integrated circuit designers. This work develops a novel characterisation platform for emerging resistive devices with a capacity of up to 1 million devices on-chip. Split into four independent sub-arrays, it contains on-chip column-parallel DACs for fast voltage programming of the DUT. On-chip readout circuits with ADCs are also available for fast read operations covering 5-decades of input current (20nA to 2mA). This allows a device's resistance range to be between 1k$Ω$ and 10M$Ω$ with a minimum voltage range of $\pm$1.5V on the device. 新兴存储器件的质量特性分析是对现有集成电路设计人员在标准设计流程中集成其行为进行建模的重要步骤。这项工作为新兴电阻器件开发了一种新颖的表征平台，片上容量高达 100 万个器件。它分为四个独立的子阵列，包含片上列并行 DAC，用于 DUT 的快速电压编程。带有 ADC 的片上读出电路还可用于覆盖 5 个十年的输入电流（20nA 至 2mA）的快速读取操作。这使得设备的电阻范围介于 1k$Ω$ 和 10M$Ω$ 之间，设备上的最小电压范围为 $\pm$1.5V。 开发一种基于CMOS的新型RRAM技术大规模表征平台，支持单芯片集成百万级器件测试。 Andrea Mifsud,Jiawei Shen,Peilong Feng,Lijie Xie,Chaohan Wang,Yihan Pan,Sachin Maheshwari,Shady Agwa,Spyros Stathopoulos,Shiwei Wang,Alexander Serb,Christos Papavassiliou,Themis Prodromakis,Timothy G. Constandinou cs.ET,eess.SY

authors_text: H. T. Wang,J. S. Zhang,C. X. Zhang,Z. X. Zhao,W. F. Geng
title: Automatic Stack Velocity Picking Using an Unsupervised Ensemble Learning Method
title_zh: 使用无监督集成学习方法的自动堆栈速度选取
abstract: Seismic velocity picking algorithms that are both accurate and efficient can greatly speed up seismic data processing, with the primary approach being the use of velocity spectra. Despite the development of some supervised deep learning-based approaches to automatically pick the velocity, they often come with costly manual labeling expenses or lack interpretability. In comparison, using physical knowledge to drive unsupervised learning techniques has the potential to solve this problem in an efficient manner. We suggest an Unsupervised Ensemble Learning (UEL) approach to achieving a balance between reliance on labeled data and picking accuracy, with the aim of determining the stack velocity. UEL makes use of the data from nearby velocity spectra and other known sources to help pick efficient and reasonable velocity points, which are acquired through a clustering technique. Testing on both the synthetic and field data sets shows that UEL is more reliable and precise in auto-picking than traditional clustering-based techniques and the widely used Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) method.
summary: Seismic velocity picking algorithms that are both accurate and efficient can greatly speed up seismic data processing, with the primary approach being the use of velocity spectra. Despite the development of some supervised deep learning-based approaches to automatically pick the velocity, they often come with costly manual labeling expenses or lack interpretability. In comparison, using physical knowledge to drive unsupervised learning techniques has the potential to solve this problem in an efficient manner. We suggest an Unsupervised Ensemble Learning (UEL) approach to achieving a balance between reliance on labeled data and picking accuracy, with the aim of determining the stack velocity. UEL makes use of the data from nearby velocity spectra and other known sources to help pick efficient and reasonable velocity points, which are acquired through a clustering technique. Testing on both the synthetic and field data sets shows that UEL is more reliable and precise in auto-picking than traditional clustering-based techniques and the widely used Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) method.
abstract_zh: 准确高效的地震速度拾取算法可以大大加快地震数据处理速度，主要方法是使用速度谱。尽管开发了一些基于监督的深度学习的方法来自动选择速度，但它们通常会带来昂贵的手动标记费用或缺乏可解释性。相比之下，使用物理知识来驱动无监督学习技术有可能以有效的方式解决这个问题。我们建议采用无监督集成学习（UEL）方法来实现对标记数据的依赖和拾取准确性之间的平衡，目的是确定堆栈速度。 UEL 利用来自附近速度谱和其他已知来源的数据来帮助选择通过聚类技术获取的有效且合理的速度点。对合成数据集和现场数据集的测试表明，UEL 在自动拾取方面比传统的基于聚类的技术和广泛使用的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 方法更加可靠和精确。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督集成学习方法（UEL），用于自动挑选地震数据中的堆叠速度，以提高准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有监督深度学习方法依赖昂贵的手动标注且缺乏可解释性，而传统无监督方法在精度上存在不足，需结合物理知识改进。
AI.method: 通过整合邻近速度谱数据和物理先验知识，采用无监督集成学习框架与聚类技术，减少对标注数据的依赖并提升速度挑选的合理性。
AI.result: 在合成数据和实际地震数据集上验证，UEL方法在可靠性和精度上优于传统聚类方法和卷积神经网络（CNN）。
AI.conclusion: UEL方法有效平衡了标注数据依赖与挑选精度，为地震数据处理提供了高效且可解释的解决方案。

authors_text: Laura Pryor,Jacob Mallet,Rushit Dave,Naeem Seliya,Mounika Vanamala,Evelyn Sowells Boone
title: Evaluation of a User Authentication Schema Using Behavioral Biometrics and Machine Learning
title_zh: 使用行为生物识别和机器学习评估用户身份验证模式
abstract: The amount of secure data being stored on mobile devices has grown immensely in recent years. However, the security measures protecting this data have stayed static, with few improvements being done to the vulnerabilities of current authentication methods such as physiological biometrics or passwords. Instead of these methods, behavioral biometrics has recently been researched as a solution to these vulnerable authentication methods. In this study, we aim to contribute to the research being done on behavioral biometrics by creating and evaluating a user authentication scheme using behavioral biometrics. The behavioral biometrics used in this study include touch dynamics and phone movement, and we evaluate the performance of different single-modal and multi-modal combinations of the two biometrics. Using two publicly available datasets - BioIdent and Hand Movement Orientation and Grasp (H-MOG), this study uses seven common machine learning algorithms to evaluate performance. The algorithms used in the evaluation include Random Forest, Support Vector Machine, K-Nearest Neighbor, Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, Multilayer Perceptron, and Long Short-Term Memory Recurrent Neural Networks, with accuracy rates reaching as high as 86%.
summary: The amount of secure data being stored on mobile devices has grown immensely in recent years. However, the security measures protecting this data have stayed static, with few improvements being done to the vulnerabilities of current authentication methods such as physiological biometrics or passwords. Instead of these methods, behavioral biometrics has recently been researched as a solution to these vulnerable authentication methods. In this study, we aim to contribute to the research being done on behavioral biometrics by creating and evaluating a user authentication scheme using behavioral biometrics. The behavioral biometrics used in this study include touch dynamics and phone movement, and we evaluate the performance of different single-modal and multi-modal combinations of the two biometrics. Using two publicly available datasets - BioIdent and Hand Movement Orientation and Grasp (H-MOG), this study uses seven common machine learning algorithms to evaluate performance. The algorithms used in the evaluation include Random Forest, Support Vector Machine, K-Nearest Neighbor, Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, Multilayer Perceptron, and Long Short-Term Memory Recurrent Neural Networks, with accuracy rates reaching as high as 86%.
abstract_zh: 近年来，移动设备上存储的安全数据量大幅增长。然而，保护这些数据的安全措施仍然保持不变，对当前身份验证方法（例如生理生物识别或密码）的漏洞几乎没有做出任何改进。最近研究的行为生物识别技术取代了这些方法，作为这些易受攻击的身份验证方法的解决方案。在这项研究中，我们的目标是通过使用行为生物识别技术创建和评估用户身份验证方案，为行为生物识别技术的研究做出贡献。本研究中使用的行为生物识别技术包括触摸动力学和手机移动，我们评估了两种生物识别技术的不同单模态和多模态组合的性能。本研究使用两个公开可用的数据集 - BioIdent 和手部运动方向和抓握 (H-MOG)，使用七种常见的机器学习算法来评估性能。评估中使用的算法包括随机森林、支持向量机、K近邻、朴素贝叶斯、逻辑回归、多层感知器和长短期记忆递归神经网络，准确率高达86%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了一种基于行为生物特征和机器学习的用户认证方案，使用触摸动态和手机运动数据进行验证。
AI.motivation: 传统认证方法（如密码和生理生物特征）存在安全漏洞，需探索更安全的替代方案以保护移动设备中的敏感数据。
AI.method: 结合BioIdent和H-MOG数据集，采用随机森林、支持向量机等七种机器学习算法，评估单模态和多模态行为生物特征（触摸动态与手机运动）的认证性能。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，所提方案的最高准确率可达86%，验证了行为生物特征与机器学习结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 行为生物特征结合机器学习可作为传统认证方法的可行补充，未来需进一步优化多模态融合策略以提升安全性。

The algorithms used in the evaluation include Random Forest, Support Vector Machine, K-Nearest Neighbor, Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, Multilayer Perceptron, and Long Short-Term Memory Recurrent Neural Networks, with accuracy rates reaching as high as 86%. 近年来，移动设备上存储的安全数据量大幅增长。然而，保护这些数据的安全措施仍然保持不变，对当前身份验证方法（例如生理生物识别或密码）的漏洞几乎没有做出任何改进。最近研究的行为生物识别技术取代了这些方法，作为这些易受攻击的身份验证方法的解决方案。在这项研究中，我们的目标是通过使用行为生物识别技术创建和评估用户身份验证方案，为行为生物识别技术的研究做出贡献。本研究中使用的行为生物识别技术包括触摸动力学和手机移动，我们评估了两种生物识别技术的不同单模态和多模态组合的性能。本研究使用两个公开可用的数据集 - BioIdent 和手部运动方向和抓握 (H-MOG)，使用七种常见的机器学习算法来评估性能。评估中使用的算法包括随机森林、支持向量机、K近邻、朴素贝叶斯、逻辑回归、多层感知器和长短期记忆递归神经网络，准确率高达86%。 本文提出并评估了一种基于行为生物特征和机器学习的用户认证方案，使用触摸动态和手机运动数据进行验证。 Laura Pryor,Jacob Mallet,Rushit Dave,Naeem Seliya,Mounika Vanamala,Evelyn Sowells Boone cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yufeng Shi,Shuhuang Chen,Xinge You,Qinmu Peng,Weihua Ou,Yue Zhao
title: Deep Supervised Information Bottleneck Hashing for Cross-modal Retrieval based Computer-aided Diagnosis
title_zh: 基于跨模态检索的计算机辅助诊断的深度监督信息瓶颈哈希
abstract: Mapping X-ray images, radiology reports, and other medical data as binary codes in the common space, which can assist clinicians to retrieve pathology-related data from heterogeneous modalities (i.e., hashing-based cross-modal medical data retrieval), provides a new view to promot computeraided diagnosis. Nevertheless, there remains a barrier to boost medical retrieval accuracy: how to reveal the ambiguous semantics of medical data without the distraction of superfluous information. To circumvent this drawback, we propose Deep Supervised Information Bottleneck Hashing (DSIBH), which effectively strengthens the discriminability of hash codes. Specifically, the Deep Deterministic Information Bottleneck (Yu, Yu, and Principe 2021) for single modality is extended to the cross-modal scenario. Benefiting from this, the superfluous information is reduced, which facilitates the discriminability of hash codes. Experimental results demonstrate the superior accuracy of the proposed DSIBH compared with state-of-the-arts in cross-modal medical data retrieval tasks.
summary: Mapping X-ray images, radiology reports, and other medical data as binary codes in the common space, which can assist clinicians to retrieve pathology-related data from heterogeneous modalities (i.e., hashing-based cross-modal medical data retrieval), provides a new view to promot computeraided diagnosis. Nevertheless, there remains a barrier to boost medical retrieval accuracy: how to reveal the ambiguous semantics of medical data without the distraction of superfluous information. To circumvent this drawback, we propose Deep Supervised Information Bottleneck Hashing (DSIBH), which effectively strengthens the discriminability of hash codes. Specifically, the Deep Deterministic Information Bottleneck (Yu, Yu, and Principe 2021) for single modality is extended to the cross-modal scenario. Benefiting from this, the superfluous information is reduced, which facilitates the discriminability of hash codes. Experimental results demonstrate the superior accuracy of the proposed DSIBH compared with state-of-the-arts in cross-modal medical data retrieval tasks.
abstract_zh: 将X射线图像、放射学报告和其他医疗数据映射为公共空间中的二进制代码，可以帮助临床医生从异构模态中检索病理相关数据（即基于哈希的跨模态医疗数据检索），为促进计算机辅助诊断提供了新的视角。然而，提高医学检索准确性仍然存在一个障碍：如何在不受到多余信息干扰的情况下揭示医学数据的模糊语义。为了克服这个缺点，我们提出了深度监督信息瓶颈哈希（DSIBH），它有效地增强了哈希码的可辨别性。具体来说，单模态的深度确定性信息瓶颈（Yu、Yu 和 Principe 2021）扩展到跨模态场景。受益于此，减少了多余的信息，从而有利于哈希码的可辨别性。实验结果表明，与跨模式医疗数据检索任务中最先进的技术相比，所提出的 DSIBH 具有更高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度监督信息瓶颈哈希的跨模态检索方法，用于计算机辅助诊断，通过将医学图像和文本等异构数据映射到共同的二进制空间以提升检索准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态医学数据检索方法难以有效去除冗余信息并揭示医疗数据的模糊语义，导致检索精度受限。
AI.method: 扩展单模态深度确定性信息瓶颈框架至跨模态场景，通过监督学习减少冗余信息干扰，增强哈希码的判别能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，DSIBH在跨模态医学数据检索任务中优于现有最先进方法，准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: DSIBH通过有效抑制冗余信息提升了哈希码的语义判别性，为跨模态医学数据检索和计算机辅助诊断提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jessie J. Smith,Saleema Amershi,Solon Barocas,Hanna Wallach,Jennifer Wortman Vaughan
title: REAL ML: Recognizing, Exploring, and Articulating Limitations of Machine Learning Research
title_zh: REAL ML：认识、探索和阐明机器学习研究的局限性
comment: This work appears in the 2022 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '22)
comments: This work appears in the 2022 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '22)
abstract: Transparency around limitations can improve the scientific rigor of research, help ensure appropriate interpretation of research findings, and make research claims more credible. Despite these benefits, the machine learning (ML) research community lacks well-developed norms around disclosing and discussing limitations. To address this gap, we conduct an iterative design process with 30 ML and ML-adjacent researchers to develop and test REAL ML, a set of guided activities to help ML researchers recognize, explore, and articulate the limitations of their research. Using a three-stage interview and survey study, we identify ML researchers' perceptions of limitations, as well as the challenges they face when recognizing, exploring, and articulating limitations. We develop REAL ML to address some of these practical challenges, and highlight additional cultural challenges that will require broader shifts in community norms to address. We hope our study and REAL ML help move the ML research community toward more active and appropriate engagement with limitations.
summary: Transparency around limitations can improve the scientific rigor of research, help ensure appropriate interpretation of research findings, and make research claims more credible. Despite these benefits, the machine learning (ML) research community lacks well-developed norms around disclosing and discussing limitations. To address this gap, we conduct an iterative design process with 30 ML and ML-adjacent researchers to develop and test REAL ML, a set of guided activities to help ML researchers recognize, explore, and articulate the limitations of their research. Using a three-stage interview and survey study, we identify ML researchers' perceptions of limitations, as well as the challenges they face when recognizing, exploring, and articulating limitations. We develop REAL ML to address some of these practical challenges, and highlight additional cultural challenges that will require broader shifts in community norms to address. We hope our study and REAL ML help move the ML research community toward more active and appropriate engagement with limitations.
abstract_zh: 限制的透明度可以提高研究的科学严谨性，有助于确保对研究结果的适当解释，并使研究主张更加可信。尽管有这些好处，机器学习 (ML) 研究社区在披露和讨论局限性方面缺乏完善的规范。为了解决这一差距，我们与 30 名 ML 和 ML 相关研究人员进行了迭代设计流程，以开发和测试 REAL ML，这是一组指导活动，旨在帮助 ML 研究人员认识、探索和阐明其研究的局限性。通过三阶段访谈和调查研究，我们确定了机器学习研究人员对局限性的看法，以及他们在认识、探索和阐明局限性时面临的挑战。我们开发 REAL ML 来解决其中一些实际挑战，并强调需要更广泛地改变社区规范来解决的其他文化挑战。我们希望我们的研究和 REAL ML 有助于推动 ML 研究社区在限制条件下更加积极和适当地参与。

AI.tldr: 开发REAL ML工具，帮助机器学习研究者识别、探索并阐述研究局限性，以提高研究透明度和科学严谨性。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习研究社区缺乏系统性规范来披露和讨论研究局限，可能影响研究可信度和实际应用效果。
AI.method: 通过与30名研究者合作的迭代设计过程，结合三阶段访谈和调查，开发并验证REAL ML这一结构化工具。
AI.result: 提出REAL ML工具缓解实际操作挑战，同时揭示需要社区文化层面变革的深层问题。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为提升机器学习领域研究透明度提供了实践工具，但需推动社区规范的系统性改进。

authors_text: Zhi Qi,Hong Xie,Ye Li,Jian Tan,FeiFei Li,John C. S. Lui
title: LPC-AD: Fast and Accurate Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection via Latent Predictive Coding
title_zh: LPC-AD：通过潜在预测编码快速准确的多变量时间序列异常检测
abstract: This paper proposes LPC-AD, a fast and accurate multivariate time series (MTS) anomaly detection method. LPC-AD is motivated by the ever-increasing needs for fast and accurate MTS anomaly detection methods to support fast troubleshooting in cloud computing, micro-service systems, etc. LPC-AD is fast in the sense that its reduces the training time by as high as 38.2% compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) deep learning methods that focus on training speed. LPC-AD is accurate in the sense that it improves the detection accuracy by as high as 18.9% compared to SOTA sophisticated deep learning methods that focus on enhancing detection accuracy. Methodologically, LPC-AD contributes a generic architecture LPC-Reconstruct for one to attain different trade-offs between training speed and detection accuracy. More specifically, LPC-Reconstruct is built on ideas from autoencoder for reducing redundancy in time series, latent predictive coding for capturing temporal dependence in MTS, and randomized perturbation for avoiding overfitting of anomalous dependence in the training data. We present simple instantiations of LPC-Reconstruct to attain fast training speed, where we propose a simple randomized perturbation method. The superior performance of LPC-AD over SOTA methods is validated by extensive experiments on four large real-world datasets. Experiment results also show the necessity and benefit of each component of the LPC-Reconstruct architecture and that LPC-AD is robust to hyper parameters.
summary: This paper proposes LPC-AD, a fast and accurate multivariate time series (MTS) anomaly detection method. LPC-AD is motivated by the ever-increasing needs for fast and accurate MTS anomaly detection methods to support fast troubleshooting in cloud computing, micro-service systems, etc. LPC-AD is fast in the sense that its reduces the training time by as high as 38.2% compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) deep learning methods that focus on training speed. LPC-AD is accurate in the sense that it improves the detection accuracy by as high as 18.9% compared to SOTA sophisticated deep learning methods that focus on enhancing detection accuracy. Methodologically, LPC-AD contributes a generic architecture LPC-Reconstruct for one to attain different trade-offs between training speed and detection accuracy. More specifically, LPC-Reconstruct is built on ideas from autoencoder for reducing redundancy in time series, latent predictive coding for capturing temporal dependence in MTS, and randomized perturbation for avoiding overfitting of anomalous dependence in the training data. We present simple instantiations of LPC-Reconstruct to attain fast training speed, where we propose a simple randomized perturbation method. The superior performance of LPC-AD over SOTA methods is validated by extensive experiments on four large real-world datasets. Experiment results also show the necessity and benefit of each component of the LPC-Reconstruct architecture and that LPC-AD is robust to hyper parameters.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了LPC-AD，一种快速、准确的多元时间序列（MTS）异常检测方法。 LPC-AD 的诞生源于对快速、准确的 MTS 异常检测方法不断增长的需求，以支持云计算、微服务系统等中的快速故障排除。LPC-AD 的速度快是指与注重训练速度的最先进 (SOTA) 深度学习方法相比，它可以将训练时间缩短高达 38.2%。 LPC-AD 的精确性在于，与专注于提高检测精度的 SOTA 复杂深度学习方法相比，它的检测精度提高了 18.9%。从方法上来说，LPC-AD 提供了一种通用架构 LPC-Reconstruct，以实现训练速度和检测精度之间的不同权衡。更具体地说，LPC-Reconstruct 是基于自动编码器的思想构建的，用于减少时间序列中的冗余，潜在预测编码用于捕获 MTS 中​​的时间依赖性，以及随机扰动用于避免训练数据中异常依赖性的过度拟合。我们提出了 LPC-Reconstruct 的简单实例，以实现快速训练，并提出了一种简单的随机扰动方法。 LPC-AD 相对于 SOTA 方法的优越性能通过对四个大型现实数据集的大量实验得到了验证。实验结果还表明了 LPC-Reconstruct 架构每个组件的必要性和好处，以及 LPC-AD 对超参数的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LPC-AD方法，通过潜层预测编码实现多变量时间序列的快速且准确的异常检测。
AI.motivation: 随着云计算和微服务系统对快速故障排查的需求增加，亟需兼顾训练速度与检测精度的多变量时间序列异常检测方法。
AI.method: 设计LPC-Reconstruct通用架构，结合自编码器降冗余、潜层预测编码建模时序依赖、随机扰动防过拟合，并提出简单随机扰动方法实现速度与精度的权衡。
AI.result: 在四个真实数据集上验证了LPC-AD优于现有方法，训练时间减少38.2%，检测精度提升18.9%，且对超参数鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: LPC-AD通过架构创新有效平衡了速度与精度，各组件必要性及鲁棒性得到实验验证，为MTS异常检测提供新思路。

search_text: LPC-AD: Fast and Accurate Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection via Latent Predictive Coding LPC-AD：通过潜在预测编码快速准确的多变量时间序列异常检测 This paper proposes LPC-AD, a fast and accurate multivariate time series (MTS) anomaly detection method. LPC-AD is motivated by the ever-increasing needs for fast and accurate MTS anomaly detection methods to support fast troubleshooting in cloud computing, micro-service systems, etc. LPC-AD is fast in the sense that its reduces the training time by as high as 38.2% compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) deep learning methods that focus on training speed. LPC-AD is accurate in the sense that it improves the detection accuracy by as high as 18.9% compared to SOTA sophisticated deep learning methods that focus on enhancing detection accuracy. Methodologically, LPC-AD contributes a generic architecture LPC-Reconstruct for one to attain different trade-offs between training speed and detection accuracy. More specifically, LPC-Reconstruct is built on ideas from autoencoder for reducing redundancy in time series, latent predictive coding for capturing temporal dependence in MTS, and randomized perturbation for avoiding overfitting of anomalous dependence in the training data. We present simple instantiations of LPC-Reconstruct to attain fast training speed, where we propose a simple randomized perturbation method. The superior performance of LPC-AD over SOTA methods is validated by extensive experiments on four large real-world datasets. Experiment results also show the necessity and benefit of each component of the LPC-Reconstruct architecture and that LPC-AD is robust to hyper parameters. 本文提出了LPC-AD，一种快速、准确的多元时间序列（MTS）异常检测方法。 LPC-AD 的诞生源于对快速、准确的 MTS 异常检测方法不断增长的需求，以支持云计算、微服务系统等中的快速故障排除。LPC-AD 的速度快是指与注重训练速度的最先进 (SOTA) 深度学习方法相比，它可以将训练时间缩短高达 38.2%。 LPC-AD 的精确性在于，与专注于提高检测精度的 SOTA 复杂深度学习方法相比，它的检测精度提高了 18.9%。从方法上来说，LPC-AD 提供了一种通用架构 LPC-Reconstruct，以实现训练速度和检测精度之间的不同权衡。更具体地说，LPC-Reconstruct 是基于自动编码器的思想构建的，用于减少时间序列中的冗余，潜在预测编码用于捕获 MTS 中​​的时间依赖性，以及随机扰动用于避免训练数据中异常依赖性的过度拟合。我们提出了 LPC-Reconstruct 的简单实例，以实现快速训练，并提出了一种简单的随机扰动方法。 LPC-AD 相对于 SOTA 方法的优越性能通过对四个大型现实数据集的大量实验得到了验证。实验结果还表明了 LPC-Reconstruct 架构每个组件的必要性和好处，以及 LPC-AD 对超参数的鲁棒性。 本文提出LPC-AD方法，通过潜层预测编码实现多变量时间序列的快速且准确的异常检测。 Zhi Qi,Hong Xie,Ye Li,Jian Tan,FeiFei Li,John C. S. Lui cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Perturbation of Deep Autoencoder Weights for Model Compression and Classification of Tabular Data
title_zh: 用于模型压缩和表格数据分类的深度自动编码器权重的扰动
abstract: Fully connected deep neural networks (DNN) often include redundant weights leading to overfitting and high memory requirements. Additionally, the performance of DNN is often challenged by traditional machine learning models in tabular data classification. In this paper, we propose periodical perturbations (prune and regrow) of DNN weights, especially at the self-supervised pre-training stage of deep autoencoders. The proposed weight perturbation strategy outperforms dropout learning in four out of six tabular data sets in downstream classification tasks. The L1 or L2 regularization of weights at the same pretraining stage results in inferior classification performance compared to dropout or our weight perturbation routine. Unlike dropout learning, the proposed weight perturbation routine additionally achieves 15% to 40% sparsity across six tabular data sets for the compression of deep pretrained models. Our experiments reveal that a pretrained deep autoencoder with weight perturbation or dropout can outperform traditional machine learning in tabular data classification when fully connected DNN fails miserably. However, traditional machine learning models appear superior to any deep models when a tabular data set contains uncorrelated variables. Therefore, the success of deep models can be attributed to the inevitable presence of correlated variables in real-world data sets.
summary: Fully connected deep neural networks (DNN) often include redundant weights leading to overfitting and high memory requirements. Additionally, the performance of DNN is often challenged by traditional machine learning models in tabular data classification. In this paper, we propose periodical perturbations (prune and regrow) of DNN weights, especially at the self-supervised pre-training stage of deep autoencoders. The proposed weight perturbation strategy outperforms dropout learning in four out of six tabular data sets in downstream classification tasks. The L1 or L2 regularization of weights at the same pretraining stage results in inferior classification performance compared to dropout or our weight perturbation routine. Unlike dropout learning, the proposed weight perturbation routine additionally achieves 15% to 40% sparsity across six tabular data sets for the compression of deep pretrained models. Our experiments reveal that a pretrained deep autoencoder with weight perturbation or dropout can outperform traditional machine learning in tabular data classification when fully connected DNN fails miserably. However, traditional machine learning models appear superior to any deep models when a tabular data set contains uncorrelated variables. Therefore, the success of deep models can be attributed to the inevitable presence of correlated variables in real-world data sets.
abstract_zh: 全连接深度神经网络 (DNN) 通常包含冗余权重，导致过度拟合和高内存需求。此外，DNN 的性能经常受到表格数据分类中传统机器学习模型的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 DNN 权重的周期性扰动（修剪和重新增长），特别是在深度自动编码器的自监督预训练阶段。在下游分类任务中的六分之四的表格数据集中，所提出的权重扰动策略优于辍学学习。与 dropout 或我们的权重扰动例程相比，同一预训练阶段的权重 L1 或 L2 正则化会导致分类性能较差。与 dropout 学习不同，所提出的权重扰动例程还可以在六个表格数据集上实现 15% 至 40% 的稀疏性，以压缩深度预训练模型。我们的实验表明，当完全连接的 DNN 严重失败时，具有权重扰动或 dropout 的预训练深度自动编码器可以在表格数据分类中优于传统机器学习。然而，当表格数据集包含不相关的变量时，传统的机器学习模型似乎优于任何深度模型。因此，深度模型的成功可以归因于现实世界数据集中不可避免地存在相关变量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过周期性扰动深度自编码器权重的方法，实现模型压缩并提升表格数据分类性能。
AI.motivation: 全连接深度神经网络存在冗余权重导致过拟合和高内存消耗，且在表格数据分类任务中常不如传统机器学习模型。
AI.method: 在自编码器预训练阶段引入周期性权重扰动（剪枝与再生），并与Dropout及L1/L2正则化方法对比，评估模型压缩效果与分类性能。
AI.result: 权重扰动策略在四分之三的表格数据集上优于Dropout，实现15%-40%的模型稀疏度；当数据存在相关变量时，深度模型优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 深度模型在现实数据中的成功依赖于变量间相关性，而权重扰动方法能有效压缩模型并提升表格数据分类效果。

authors_text: Han Wang,Zhou Huang,Xiao Zhou,Ganmin Yin,Yi Bao,Yi Zhang
title: DouFu: A Double Fusion Joint Learning Method For Driving Trajectory Representation
title_zh: DouFu：一种用于驾驶轨迹表示的双融合联合学习方法
abstract: Driving trajectory representation learning is of great significance for various location-based services, such as driving pattern mining and route recommendation. However, previous representation generation approaches tend to rarely address three challenges: 1) how to represent the intricate semantic intentions of mobility inexpensively; 2) complex and weak spatial-temporal dependencies due to the sparsity and heterogeneity of the trajectory data; 3) route selection preferences and their correlation to driving behavior. In this paper, we propose a novel multimodal fusion model, DouFu, for trajectory representation joint learning, which applies multimodal learning and attention fusion module to capture the internal characteristics of trajectories. We first design movement, route, and global features generated from the trajectory data and urban functional zones and then analyze them respectively with the attention encoder or feed forward network. The attention fusion module incorporates route features with movement features to create a better spatial-temporal embedding. With the global semantic feature, DouFu produces a comprehensive embedding for each trajectory. We evaluate representations generated by our method and other baseline models on classification and clustering tasks. Empirical results show that DouFu outperforms other models in most of the learning algorithms like the linear regression and the support vector machine by more than 10%.
summary: Driving trajectory representation learning is of great significance for various location-based services, such as driving pattern mining and route recommendation. However, previous representation generation approaches tend to rarely address three challenges: 1) how to represent the intricate semantic intentions of mobility inexpensively; 2) complex and weak spatial-temporal dependencies due to the sparsity and heterogeneity of the trajectory data; 3) route selection preferences and their correlation to driving behavior. In this paper, we propose a novel multimodal fusion model, DouFu, for trajectory representation joint learning, which applies multimodal learning and attention fusion module to capture the internal characteristics of trajectories. We first design movement, route, and global features generated from the trajectory data and urban functional zones and then analyze them respectively with the attention encoder or feed forward network. The attention fusion module incorporates route features with movement features to create a better spatial-temporal embedding. With the global semantic feature, DouFu produces a comprehensive embedding for each trajectory. We evaluate representations generated by our method and other baseline models on classification and clustering tasks. Empirical results show that DouFu outperforms other models in most of the learning algorithms like the linear regression and the support vector machine by more than 10%.
abstract_zh: 驾驶轨迹表示学习对于各种基于位置的服务具有重要意义，例如驾驶模式挖掘和路线推荐。然而，以前的表示生成方法往往很少解决三个挑战：1）如何廉价地表示移动性的复杂语义意图； 2）由于轨迹数据的稀疏性和异质性，时空依赖性复杂且弱； 3）路线选择偏好及其与驾驶行为的相关性。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于轨迹表示联合学习的新型多模态融合模型DouFu，该模型应用多模态学习和注意力融合模块来捕获轨迹的内部特征。我们首先设计从轨迹数据和城市功能区生成的运动、路线和全局特征，然后分别使用注意力编码器或前馈网络对其进行分析。注意力融合模块将路线特征与运动特征结合起来，以创建更好的时空嵌入。利用全局语义特征，豆福为每个轨迹生成全面的嵌入。我们评估我们的方法和其他基线模型在分类和聚类任务上生成的表示。实证结果表明，豆福在大多数学习算法（如线性回归、支持向量机）上均优于其他模型 10% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DouFu的双融合联合学习方法，用于改进驾驶轨迹表示学习，以解决现有方法在语义意图表示、时空依赖建模和路线偏好关联方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹表示方法难以有效处理轨迹数据的语义意图建模、稀疏异构数据导致的复杂时空依赖关系以及路线偏好与驾驶行为的关联性问题。
AI.method: 设计运动特征、路线特征和全局语义特征，通过注意力编码器和前馈网络分别分析，并利用注意力融合模块整合路线与运动特征，最终结合全局语义生成综合轨迹嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在分类和聚类任务中，DouFu方法在多数算法（如线性回归和支持向量机）上优于基线模型超过10%。

search_text: DouFu: A Double Fusion Joint Learning Method For Driving Trajectory Representation DouFu：一种用于驾驶轨迹表示的双融合联合学习方法 Driving trajectory representation learning is of great significance for various location-based services, such as driving pattern mining and route recommendation. However, previous representation generation approaches tend to rarely address three challenges: 1) how to represent the intricate semantic intentions of mobility inexpensively; 2) complex and weak spatial-temporal dependencies due to the sparsity and heterogeneity of the trajectory data; 3) route selection preferences and their correlation to driving behavior. In this paper, we propose a novel multimodal fusion model, DouFu, for trajectory representation joint learning, which applies multimodal learning and attention fusion module to capture the internal characteristics of trajectories. We first design movement, route, and global features generated from the trajectory data and urban functional zones and then analyze them respectively with the attention encoder or feed forward network. The attention fusion module incorporates route features with movement features to create a better spatial-temporal embedding. With the global semantic feature, DouFu produces a comprehensive embedding for each trajectory. We evaluate representations generated by our method and other baseline models on classification and clustering tasks. Empirical results show that DouFu outperforms other models in most of the learning algorithms like the linear regression and the support vector machine by more than 10%. 驾驶轨迹表示学习对于各种基于位置的服务具有重要意义，例如驾驶模式挖掘和路线推荐。然而，以前的表示生成方法往往很少解决三个挑战：1）如何廉价地表示移动性的复杂语义意图； 2）由于轨迹数据的稀疏性和异质性，时空依赖性复杂且弱； 3）路线选择偏好及其与驾驶行为的相关性。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于轨迹表示联合学习的新型多模态融合模型DouFu，该模型应用多模态学习和注意力融合模块来捕获轨迹的内部特征。我们首先设计从轨迹数据和城市功能区生成的运动、路线和全局特征，然后分别使用注意力编码器或前馈网络对其进行分析。注意力融合模块将路线特征与运动特征结合起来，以创建更好的时空嵌入。利用全局语义特征，豆福为每个轨迹生成全面的嵌入。我们评估我们的方法和其他基线模型在分类和聚类任务上生成的表示。实证结果表明，豆福在大多数学习算法（如线性回归、支持向量机）上均优于其他模型 10% 以上。 本文提出一种名为DouFu的双融合联合学习方法，用于改进驾驶轨迹表示学习，以解决现有方法在语义意图表示、时空依赖建模和路线偏好关联方面的不足。 Han Wang,Zhou Huang,Xiao Zhou,Ganmin Yin,Yi Bao,Yi Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Tongtao Zhang,Biswadip Dey,Krishna Veeraraghavan,Harshad Kulkarni,Amit Chakraborty
title: Demystifying the Data Need of ML-surrogates for CFD Simulations
title_zh: 揭秘 CFD 模拟的 ML 替代数据需求
abstract: Computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations, a critical tool in various engineering applications, often require significant time and compute power to predict flow properties. The high computational cost associated with CFD simulations significantly restricts the scope of design space exploration and limits their use in planning and operational control. To address this issue, machine learning (ML) based surrogate models have been proposed as a computationally efficient tool to accelerate CFD simulations. However, a lack of clarity about CFD data requirements often challenges the widespread adoption of ML-based surrogates among design engineers and CFD practitioners. In this work, we propose an ML-based surrogate model to predict the temperature distribution inside the cabin of a passenger vehicle under various operating conditions and use it to demonstrate the trade-off between prediction performance and training dataset size. Our results show that the prediction accuracy is high and stable even when the training size is gradually reduced from 2000 to 200. The ML-based surrogates also reduce the compute time from ~30 minutes to around ~9 milliseconds. Moreover, even when only 50 CFD simulations are used for training, the temperature trend (e.g., locations of hot/cold regions) predicted by the ML-surrogate matches quite well with the results from CFD simulations.
summary: Computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations, a critical tool in various engineering applications, often require significant time and compute power to predict flow properties. The high computational cost associated with CFD simulations significantly restricts the scope of design space exploration and limits their use in planning and operational control. To address this issue, machine learning (ML) based surrogate models have been proposed as a computationally efficient tool to accelerate CFD simulations. However, a lack of clarity about CFD data requirements often challenges the widespread adoption of ML-based surrogates among design engineers and CFD practitioners. In this work, we propose an ML-based surrogate model to predict the temperature distribution inside the cabin of a passenger vehicle under various operating conditions and use it to demonstrate the trade-off between prediction performance and training dataset size. Our results show that the prediction accuracy is high and stable even when the training size is gradually reduced from 2000 to 200. The ML-based surrogates also reduce the compute time from ~30 minutes to around ~9 milliseconds. Moreover, even when only 50 CFD simulations are used for training, the temperature trend (e.g., locations of hot/cold regions) predicted by the ML-surrogate matches quite well with the results from CFD simulations.
abstract_zh: 计算流体动力学 (CFD) 模拟是各种工程应用中的关键工具，通常需要大量时间和计算能力来预测流动特性。 CFD 模拟相关的高计算成本极大地限制了设计空间探索的范围，并限制了它们在规划和操作控制中的使用。为了解决这个问题，基于机器学习 (ML) 的代理模型被提议作为一种计算高效的工具来加速 CFD 模拟。然而，CFD 数据要求缺乏明确性往往会影响设计工程师和 CFD 从业者广泛采用基于机器学习的替代方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于机器学习的代理模型来预测各种操作条件下乘用车车厢内的温度分布，并用它来演示预测性能和训练数据集大小之间的权衡。我们的结果表明，即使训练规模从 2000 逐渐减少到 200，预测精度仍然很高且稳定。基于 ML 的代理还将计算时间从约 30 分钟减少到约 9 毫秒。此外，即使仅使用 50 个 CFD 模拟进行训练，ML 替代预测的温度趋势（例如热/冷区域的位置）也与 CFD 模拟的结果非常匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于机器学习的代理模型，用于预测乘客车辆舱内温度分布，以加速计算流体动力学（CFD）模拟。
AI.motivation: CFD模拟计算成本高，限制了设计空间探索和实际应用，需通过机器学习代理模型降低计算开销并明确数据需求。
AI.method: 构建机器学习代理模型，通过减少训练数据集规模（2000至200）分析预测性能与数据量的权衡，并对比CFD结果验证模型准确性。
AI.result: 模型在训练数据减少至200时仍保持高精度，计算时间从约30分钟缩短至9毫秒；仅用50次CFD模拟训练时，温度分布趋势与CFD结果高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习代理模型能以较低数据需求和计算成本实现高精度CFD模拟，为工程设计提供高效替代方案。

To address this issue, machine learning (ML) based surrogate models have been proposed as a computationally efficient tool to accelerate CFD simulations. Our results show that the prediction accuracy is high and stable even when the training size is gradually reduced from 2000 to 200. Moreover, even when only 50 CFD simulations are used for training, the temperature trend (e.g., locations of hot/cold regions) predicted by the ML-surrogate matches quite well with the results from CFD simulations. 计算流体动力学 (CFD) 模拟是各种工程应用中的关键工具，通常需要大量时间和计算能力来预测流动特性。 CFD 模拟相关的高计算成本极大地限制了设计空间探索的范围，并限制了它们在规划和操作控制中的使用。为了解决这个问题，基于机器学习 (ML) 的代理模型被提议作为一种计算高效的工具来加速 CFD 模拟。然而，CFD 数据要求缺乏明确性往往会影响设计工程师和 CFD 从业者广泛采用基于机器学习的替代方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于机器学习的代理模型来预测各种操作条件下乘用车车厢内的温度分布，并用它来演示预测性能和训练数据集大小之间的权衡。我们的结果表明，即使训练规模从 2000 逐渐减少到 200，预测精度仍然很高且稳定。基于 ML 的代理还将计算时间从约 30 分钟减少到约 9 毫秒。此外，即使仅使用 50 个 CFD 模拟进行训练，ML 替代预测的温度趋势（例如热/冷区域的位置）也与 CFD 模拟的结果非常匹配。 本文提出基于机器学习的代理模型，用于预测乘客车辆舱内温度分布，以加速计算流体动力学（CFD）模拟。 Tongtao Zhang,Biswadip Dey,Krishna Veeraraghavan,Harshad Kulkarni,Amit Chakraborty cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Sidahmed Yalles,Mohamed Handaoui,Jean-Emile Dartois,Olivier Barais,Laurent d'Orazio,Jalil Boukhobza
title: RISCLESS: A Reinforcement Learning Strategy to Exploit Unused Cloud Resources
title_zh: RISCLESS：利用未使用的云资源的强化学习策略
abstract: One of the main objectives of Cloud Providers (CP) is to guarantee the Service-Level Agreement (SLA) of customers while reducing operating costs. To achieve this goal, CPs have built large-scale datacenters. This leads, however, to underutilized resources and an increase in costs. A way to improve the utilization of resources is to reclaim the unused parts and resell them at a lower price. Providing SLA guarantees to customers on reclaimed resources is a challenge due to their high volatility. Some state-of-the-art solutions consider keeping a proportion of resources free to absorb sudden variation in workloads. Others consider stable resources on top of the volatile ones to fill in for the lost resources. However, these strategies either reduce the amount of reclaimable resources or operate on less volatile ones such as Amazon Spot instance. In this paper, we proposed RISCLESS, a Reinforcement Learning strategy to exploit unused Cloud resources. Our approach consists of using a small proportion of stable on-demand resources alongside the ephemeral ones in order to guarantee customers SLA and reduce the overall costs. The approach decides when and how much stable resources to allocate in order to fulfill customers' demands. RISCLESS improved the CPs' profits by an average of 15.9% compared to state-of-the-art strategies. It also reduced the SLA violation time by an average of 36.7% while increasing the amount of used ephemeral resources by 19.5% on average
summary: One of the main objectives of Cloud Providers (CP) is to guarantee the Service-Level Agreement (SLA) of customers while reducing operating costs. To achieve this goal, CPs have built large-scale datacenters. This leads, however, to underutilized resources and an increase in costs. A way to improve the utilization of resources is to reclaim the unused parts and resell them at a lower price. Providing SLA guarantees to customers on reclaimed resources is a challenge due to their high volatility. Some state-of-the-art solutions consider keeping a proportion of resources free to absorb sudden variation in workloads. Others consider stable resources on top of the volatile ones to fill in for the lost resources. However, these strategies either reduce the amount of reclaimable resources or operate on less volatile ones such as Amazon Spot instance. In this paper, we proposed RISCLESS, a Reinforcement Learning strategy to exploit unused Cloud resources. Our approach consists of using a small proportion of stable on-demand resources alongside the ephemeral ones in order to guarantee customers SLA and reduce the overall costs. The approach decides when and how much stable resources to allocate in order to fulfill customers' demands. RISCLESS improved the CPs' profits by an average of 15.9% compared to state-of-the-art strategies. It also reduced the SLA violation time by an average of 36.7% while increasing the amount of used ephemeral resources by 19.5% on average
abstract_zh: 云提供商（CP）的主要目标之一是保证客户的服务级别协议（SLA），同时降低运营成本。为了实现这一目标，CP建设了大规模的数据中心。然而，这导致资源利用不足和成本增加。提高资源利用率的一个方法是回收未使用的零件并以较低的价格转售。由于回收资源的高波动性，向客户提供 SLA 保证是一项挑战。一些最先进的解决方案考虑保留一定比例的可用资源，以吸收工作负载的突然变化。其他人则认为稳定的资源位于不稳定的资源之上，以填补丢失的资源。然而，这些策略要么减少可回收资源的数量，要么在波动性较小的资源（例如 Amazon Spot 实例）上运行。在本文中，我们提出了 RISCLESS，这是一种利用未使用的云资源的强化学习策略。我们的方法包括使用一小部分稳定的按需资源和临时资源，以保证客户的 SLA 并降低总体成本。该方法决定何时以及分配多少稳定资源以满足客户的需求。与最先进的策略相比，RISCLESS 将 CP 的利润平均提高了 15.9%。它还将 SLA 违规时间平均减少了 36.7%，同时将临时资源使用量平均增加了 19.5%

AI.tldr: 本文提出RISCLESS策略，利用强化学习优化云资源分配，以提高资源利用率并降低成本。
AI.motivation: 云服务提供商面临资源利用率低和运营成本高的问题，现有方案难以平衡资源回收与SLA保障，需更高效策略。
AI.method: 结合稳定按需资源与临时资源，通过强化学习动态决策稳定资源分配时机与规模，确保SLA并提升资源回收率。
AI.result: 相比现有方案，RISCLESS使云提供商利润平均提升15.9%，SLA违规时间减少36.7%，临时资源利用率提高19.5%。
AI.conclusion: RISCLESS通过智能资源分配有效平衡成本与SLA保障，为云资源优化提供新思路。

search_text: RISCLESS: A Reinforcement Learning Strategy to Exploit Unused Cloud Resources RISCLESS：利用未使用的云资源的强化学习策略 One of the main objectives of Cloud Providers (CP) is to guarantee the Service-Level Agreement (SLA) of customers while reducing operating costs. To achieve this goal, CPs have built large-scale datacenters. This leads, however, to underutilized resources and an increase in costs. A way to improve the utilization of resources is to reclaim the unused parts and resell them at a lower price. Providing SLA guarantees to customers on reclaimed resources is a challenge due to their high volatility. Some state-of-the-art solutions consider keeping a proportion of resources free to absorb sudden variation in workloads. Others consider stable resources on top of the volatile ones to fill in for the lost resources. However, these strategies either reduce the amount of reclaimable resources or operate on less volatile ones such as Amazon Spot instance. In this paper, we proposed RISCLESS, a Reinforcement Learning strategy to exploit unused Cloud resources. Our approach consists of using a small proportion of stable on-demand resources alongside the ephemeral ones in order to guarantee customers SLA and reduce the overall costs. The approach decides when and how much stable resources to allocate in order to fulfill customers' demands. RISCLESS improved the CPs' profits by an average of 15.9% compared to state-of-the-art strategies. It also reduced the SLA violation time by an average of 36.7% while increasing the amount of used ephemeral resources by 19.5% on average 云提供商（CP）的主要目标之一是保证客户的服务级别协议（SLA），同时降低运营成本。为了实现这一目标，CP建设了大规模的数据中心。然而，这导致资源利用不足和成本增加。提高资源利用率的一个方法是回收未使用的零件并以较低的价格转售。由于回收资源的高波动性，向客户提供 SLA 保证是一项挑战。一些最先进的解决方案考虑保留一定比例的可用资源，以吸收工作负载的突然变化。其他人则认为稳定的资源位于不稳定的资源之上，以填补丢失的资源。然而，这些策略要么减少可回收资源的数量，要么在波动性较小的资源（例如 Amazon Spot 实例）上运行。在本文中，我们提出了 RISCLESS，这是一种利用未使用的云资源的强化学习策略。我们的方法包括使用一小部分稳定的按需资源和临时资源，以保证客户的 SLA 并降低总体成本。该方法决定何时以及分配多少稳定资源以满足客户的需求。与最先进的策略相比，RISCLESS 将 CP 的利润平均提高了 15.9%。它还将 SLA 违规时间平均减少了 36.7%，同时将临时资源使用量平均增加了 19.5% 本文提出RISCLESS策略，利用强化学习优化云资源分配，以提高资源利用率并降低成本。 Sidahmed Yalles,Mohamed Handaoui,Jean-Emile Dartois,Olivier Barais,Laurent d'Orazio,Jalil Boukhobza cs.DC,cs.AI

title: Landing AI on Networks: An equipment vendor viewpoint on Autonomous Driving Networks
title_zh: 将人工智能落地网络：设备供应商对自动驾驶网络的看法
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Network and Service Management, 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Network and Service Management, 2022
abstract: The tremendous achievements of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in computer vision, natural language processing, games and robotics, has extended the reach of the AI hype to other fields: in telecommunication networks, the long term vision is to let AI fully manage, and autonomously drive, all aspects of network operation. In this industry vision paper, we discuss challenges and opportunities of Autonomous Driving Network (ADN) driven by AI technologies. To understand how AI can be successfully landed in current and future networks, we start by outlining challenges that are specific to the networking domain, putting them in perspective with advances that AI has achieved in other fields. We then present a system view, clarifying how AI can be fitted in the network architecture. We finally discuss current achievements as well as future promises of AI in networks, mentioning a roadmap to avoid bumps in the road that leads to true large-scale deployment of AI technologies in networks.
summary: The tremendous achievements of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in computer vision, natural language processing, games and robotics, has extended the reach of the AI hype to other fields: in telecommunication networks, the long term vision is to let AI fully manage, and autonomously drive, all aspects of network operation. In this industry vision paper, we discuss challenges and opportunities of Autonomous Driving Network (ADN) driven by AI technologies. To understand how AI can be successfully landed in current and future networks, we start by outlining challenges that are specific to the networking domain, putting them in perspective with advances that AI has achieved in other fields. We then present a system view, clarifying how AI can be fitted in the network architecture. We finally discuss current achievements as well as future promises of AI in networks, mentioning a roadmap to avoid bumps in the road that leads to true large-scale deployment of AI technologies in networks.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）在计算机视觉、自然语言处理、游戏和机器人领域取得的巨大成就，将人工智能炒作的范围扩展到其他领域：在电信网络中，长期愿景是让人工智能全面管理和自主驱动网络运营的各个方面。在这篇行业愿景论文中，我们讨论了人工智能技术驱动的自动驾驶网络（ADN）的挑战和机遇。为了了解人工智能如何在当前和未来的网络中成功落地，我们首先概述网络领域特有的挑战，并将其与人工智能在其他领域取得的进步放在一起。然后，我们提出一个系统视图，阐明如何将人工智能融入网络架构中。最后，我们讨论了人工智能在网络中的当前成就和未来前景，并提出了一个路线图，以避免在网络中真正大规模部署人工智能技术的道路上出现障碍。

AI.tldr: 本文从设备供应商视角探讨人工智能（AI）在自主驾驶网络（ADN）中的落地挑战与机遇，分析AI技术如何适配网络架构并规划未来部署路径。
AI.motivation: AI在计算机视觉、自然语言处理等领域取得突破，促使电信行业探索AI驱动的自主网络管理，但网络领域存在独特挑战需针对性解决。
AI.method: 通过对比AI在其他领域的进展，梳理网络领域特定挑战，提出系统架构整合方案，并总结当前技术成果与未来研发方向。
AI.result: 明确了AI在ADN中的应用框架，列举了现有技术突破案例，提出了避免大规模部署障碍的路线图与关键技术攻关方向。
AI.conclusion: AI有望实现网络自主运维，但需解决实时性、可靠性等核心问题，未来需跨领域协作推动标准化与技术创新。

authors_text: Felipe Maia Polo,Rafael Izbicki,Evanildo Gomes Lacerda Jr,Juan Pablo Ibieta-Jimenez,Renato Vicente
title: A unified framework for dataset shift diagnostics
title_zh: 数据集转移诊断的统一框架
abstract: Supervised learning techniques typically assume training data originates from the target population. Yet, in reality, dataset shift frequently arises, which, if not adequately taken into account, may decrease the performance of their predictors. In this work, we propose a novel and flexible framework called DetectShift that quantifies and tests for multiple dataset shifts, encompassing shifts in the distributions of $(X, Y)$, $X$, $Y$, $X|Y$, and $Y|X$. DetectShift equips practitioners with insights into data shifts, facilitating the adaptation or retraining of predictors using both source and target data. This proves extremely valuable when labeled samples in the target domain are limited. The framework utilizes test statistics with the same nature to quantify the magnitude of the various shifts, making results more interpretable. It is versatile, suitable for regression and classification tasks, and accommodates diverse data forms - tabular, text, or image. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of DetectShift in detecting dataset shifts even in higher dimensions.
summary: Supervised learning techniques typically assume training data originates from the target population. Yet, in reality, dataset shift frequently arises, which, if not adequately taken into account, may decrease the performance of their predictors. In this work, we propose a novel and flexible framework called DetectShift that quantifies and tests for multiple dataset shifts, encompassing shifts in the distributions of $(X, Y)$, $X$, $Y$, $X|Y$, and $Y|X$. DetectShift equips practitioners with insights into data shifts, facilitating the adaptation or retraining of predictors using both source and target data. This proves extremely valuable when labeled samples in the target domain are limited. The framework utilizes test statistics with the same nature to quantify the magnitude of the various shifts, making results more interpretable. It is versatile, suitable for regression and classification tasks, and accommodates diverse data forms - tabular, text, or image. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of DetectShift in detecting dataset shifts even in higher dimensions.
abstract_zh: 监督学习技术通常假设训练数据来自目标人群。然而，实际上，数据集变化经常发生，如果没有充分考虑到这一点，可能会降低预测器的性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖且灵活的框架，称为 DetectShift，它可以量化和测试多个数据集的变化，包括 $(X, Y)$、$X$、$Y$、$X|Y$ 和 $Y|X$ 分布的变化。 DetectShift 使从业人员能够深入了解数据变化，促进使用源数据和目标数据对预测器进行调整或重新训练。当目标域中的标记样本有限时，这证明非常有价值。该框架利用具有相同性质的测试统计来量化各种变化的幅度，使结果更易于解释。它用途广泛，适用于回归和分类任务，并可容纳多种数据形式 - 表格、文本或图像。实验结果证明了 DetectShift 即使在更高维度上也能有效检测数据集变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DetectShift的统一框架，用于量化和检测多种数据集偏移问题，适用于回归和分类任务及多种数据形式。
AI.motivation: 监督学习假设训练数据与目标数据同分布，但实际中数据集偏移普遍存在，可能显著降低模型性能，尤其在目标领域标注数据有限时更需有效检测方法。
AI.method: 构建统一检验统计量框架，同时量化(X,Y)、X、Y、X|Y和Y|X的分布偏移，支持回归/分类任务及表格/文本/图像数据，通过统计检验提供可解释结果。
AI.result: 实验验证DetectShift在高维数据场景下能有效检测多种数据集偏移，为模型适应性调整提供可靠依据。
AI.conclusion: DetectShift框架为数据偏移诊断提供了通用解决方案，帮助从业者在数据分布变化时优化模型训练策略。

The framework utilizes test statistics with the same nature to quantify the magnitude of the various shifts, making results more interpretable. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of DetectShift in detecting dataset shifts even in higher dimensions. 监督学习技术通常假设训练数据来自目标人群。然而，实际上，数据集变化经常发生，如果没有充分考虑到这一点，可能会降低预测器的性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖且灵活的框架，称为 DetectShift，它可以量化和测试多个数据集的变化，包括 $(X, Y)$、$X$、$Y$、$X|Y$ 和 $Y|X$ 分布的变化。 DetectShift 使从业人员能够深入了解数据变化，促进使用源数据和目标数据对预测器进行调整或重新训练。当目标域中的标记样本有限时，这证明非常有价值。该框架利用具有相同性质的测试统计来量化各种变化的幅度，使结果更易于解释。它用途广泛，适用于回归和分类任务，并可容纳多种数据形式 - 表格、文本或图像。实验结果证明了 DetectShift 即使在更高维度上也能有效检测数据集变化。 本文提出了一种名为DetectShift的统一框架，用于量化和检测多种数据集偏移问题，适用于回归和分类任务及多种数据形式。 Felipe Maia Polo,Rafael Izbicki,Evanildo Gomes Lacerda Jr,Juan Pablo Ibieta-Jimenez,Renato Vicente stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ME

authors_text: Ming Fan,Wenying Wei,Wuxia Jin,Zijiang Yang,Ting Liu
title: Explanation-Guided Fairness Testing through Genetic Algorithm
title_zh: 通过遗传算法进行解释引导的公平性测试
abstract: The fairness characteristic is a critical attribute of trusted AI systems. A plethora of research has proposed diverse methods for individual fairness testing. However, they are suffering from three major limitations, i.e., low efficiency, low effectiveness, and model-specificity. This work proposes ExpGA, an explanationguided fairness testing approach through a genetic algorithm (GA). ExpGA employs the explanation results generated by interpretable methods to collect high-quality initial seeds, which are prone to derive discriminatory samples by slightly modifying feature values. ExpGA then adopts GA to search discriminatory sample candidates by optimizing a fitness value. Benefiting from this combination of explanation results and GA, ExpGA is both efficient and effective to detect discriminatory individuals. Moreover, ExpGA only requires prediction probabilities of the tested model, resulting in a better generalization capability to various models. Experiments on multiple real-world benchmarks, including tabular and text datasets, show that ExpGA presents higher efficiency and effectiveness than four state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: The fairness characteristic is a critical attribute of trusted AI systems. A plethora of research has proposed diverse methods for individual fairness testing. However, they are suffering from three major limitations, i.e., low efficiency, low effectiveness, and model-specificity. This work proposes ExpGA, an explanationguided fairness testing approach through a genetic algorithm (GA). ExpGA employs the explanation results generated by interpretable methods to collect high-quality initial seeds, which are prone to derive discriminatory samples by slightly modifying feature values. ExpGA then adopts GA to search discriminatory sample candidates by optimizing a fitness value. Benefiting from this combination of explanation results and GA, ExpGA is both efficient and effective to detect discriminatory individuals. Moreover, ExpGA only requires prediction probabilities of the tested model, resulting in a better generalization capability to various models. Experiments on multiple real-world benchmarks, including tabular and text datasets, show that ExpGA presents higher efficiency and effectiveness than four state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 公平性是可信人工智能系统的一个关键属性。大量研究提出了多种个人公平性测试方法。然而，它们面临着三个主要限制，即低效率、低有效性和模型特异性。这项工作提出了 ExpGA，一种通过遗传算法 (GA) 引导解释的公平性测试方法。 ExpGA利用可解释方法生成的解释结果来收集高质量的初始种子，这些初始种子很容易通过稍微修改特征值来导出歧视性样本。 ExpGA 然后采用 GA 通过优化适应度值来搜索有区别的候选样本。受益于解释结果和 GA 的结合，ExpGA 能够高效且有效地检测歧视性个体。而且，ExpGA只需要测试模型的预测概率，从而对各种模型具有更好的泛化能力。对多个现实世界基准（包括表格和文本数据集）的实验表明，ExpGA 比四种最先进的方法具有更高的效率和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ExpGA方法，通过结合解释结果与遗传算法提升公平性测试的效率与效果。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性测试方法存在效率低、效果差及模型特定性问题，需更通用高效的解决方案。
AI.method: ExpGA利用可解释方法生成初始种子，通过遗传算法优化适应度值搜索歧视样本，仅需模型预测概率即可泛化至多种模型。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集实验中，ExpGA相较四种先进方法展现出更高的效率与检测效果。
AI.conclusion: ExpGA通过解释引导与遗传算法结合，有效解决公平性测试难题，具备良好模型泛化能力。

authors_text: Khemraj Shukla,Mengjia Xu,Nathaniel Trask,George Em Karniadakis
title: Scalable algorithms for physics-informed neural and graph networks
title_zh: 适用于物理信息神经网络和图网络的可扩展算法
comment: 26 pages, 13 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.10013
comments: 26 pages, 13 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.10013
abstract: Physics-informed machine learning (PIML) has emerged as a promising new approach for simulating complex physical and biological systems that are governed by complex multiscale processes for which some data are also available. In some instances, the objective is to discover part of the hidden physics from the available data, and PIML has been shown to be particularly effective for such problems for which conventional methods may fail. Unlike commercial machine learning where training of deep neural networks requires big data, in PIML big data are not available. Instead, we can train such networks from additional information obtained by employing the physical laws and evaluating them at random points in the space-time domain. Such physics-informed machine learning integrates multimodality and multifidelity data with mathematical models, and implements them using neural networks or graph networks. Here, we review some of the prevailing trends in embedding physics into machine learning, using physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) based primarily on feed-forward neural networks and automatic differentiation. For more complex systems or systems of systems and unstructured data, graph neural networks (GNNs) present some distinct advantages, and here we review how physics-informed learning can be accomplished with GNNs based on graph exterior calculus to construct differential operators; we refer to these architectures as physics-informed graph networks (PIGNs). We present representative examples for both forward and inverse problems and discuss what advances are needed to scale up PINNs, PIGNs and more broadly GNNs for large-scale engineering problems.
summary: Physics-informed machine learning (PIML) has emerged as a promising new approach for simulating complex physical and biological systems that are governed by complex multiscale processes for which some data are also available. In some instances, the objective is to discover part of the hidden physics from the available data, and PIML has been shown to be particularly effective for such problems for which conventional methods may fail. Unlike commercial machine learning where training of deep neural networks requires big data, in PIML big data are not available. Instead, we can train such networks from additional information obtained by employing the physical laws and evaluating them at random points in the space-time domain. Such physics-informed machine learning integrates multimodality and multifidelity data with mathematical models, and implements them using neural networks or graph networks. Here, we review some of the prevailing trends in embedding physics into machine learning, using physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) based primarily on feed-forward neural networks and automatic differentiation. For more complex systems or systems of systems and unstructured data, graph neural networks (GNNs) present some distinct advantages, and here we review how physics-informed learning can be accomplished with GNNs based on graph exterior calculus to construct differential operators; we refer to these architectures as physics-informed graph networks (PIGNs). We present representative examples for both forward and inverse problems and discuss what advances are needed to scale up PINNs, PIGNs and more broadly GNNs for large-scale engineering problems.
abstract_zh: 物理信息机器学习（PIML）已成为一种有前途的新方法，用于模拟复杂的物理和生物系统，这些系统受复杂的多尺度过程控制，并且一些数据也可用。在某些情况下，目标是从可用数据中发现部分隐藏的物理现象，而 PIML 已被证明对于传统方法可能无法解决的此类问题特别有效。与深度神经网络训练需要大数据的商业机器学习不同，PIML 中不提供大数据。相反，我们可以利用物理定律获得的附加信息来训练这样的网络，并在时空域的随机点对其进行评估。这种基于物理的机器学习将多模态和多保真度数据与数学模型相结合，并使用神经网络或图网络来实现它们。在这里，我们回顾了使用主要基于前馈神经网络和自动微分的物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 将物理嵌入到机器学习中的一些流行趋势。对于更复杂的系统或系统的系统和非结构化数据，图神经网络（GNN）呈现出一些明显的优势，在这里我们回顾一下如何使用基于图外演算的 GNN 来构建微分算子来完成物理信息学习；我们将这些架构称为物理信息图网络（PIGN）。我们提出了正向和逆向问题的代表性示例，并讨论了针对大规模工程问题扩大 PINN、PIGN 和更广泛的 GNN 需要哪些进展。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了可扩展的物理信息神经网络和图网络算法，用于解决复杂物理系统的模拟与逆问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理多尺度、数据有限的复杂物理系统时效果不佳，需结合物理定律与机器学习以提升模型可靠性。
AI.method: 基于前馈神经网络和自动微分构建物理信息神经网络（PINNs），并利用图外微积分开发物理信息图网络（PIGNs）处理非结构化数据。
AI.result: 展示了PINNs和PIGNs在正问题与逆问题中的应用案例，指出当前算法在大规模工程问题中的可扩展性仍需改进。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息机器学习需进一步优化算法架构与计算效率，以应对更复杂的工程场景需求。

In some instances, the objective is to discover part of the hidden physics from the available data, and PIML has been shown to be particularly effective for such problems for which conventional methods may fail. Unlike commercial machine learning where training of deep neural networks requires big data, in PIML big data are not available. authors_text: Affaf Junaid Ahamad Momin,Gabriele Nava,Giuseppe LErario,Hosameldin Awadalla Omer Mohamed,Fabio Bergonti,Punith Reddy Vanteddu,Francesco Braghin,Daniele Pucci
title: Nonlinear Model Identification and Observer Design for Thrust Estimation of Small-scale Turbojet Engines
title_zh: 小型涡轮喷气发动机推力估计的非线性模型辨识和观测器设计
abstract: Jet-powered vertical takeoff and landing (VTOL) drones require precise thrust estimation to ensure adequate stability margins and robust maneuvering. Small-scale turbojets have become good candidates for powering heavy aerial drones. However, due to limited instrumentation available in these turbojets, estimating the precise thrust using classical techniques is not straightforward. In this paper, we present a methodology to accurately estimate the online thrust for the small-scale turbojets used on the iRonCub - an aerial humanoid robot. We use a grey-box method to capture the turbojet system dynamics with a nonlinear state-space model based on the data acquired from a custom engine test bench. This model is then used to design an extended Kalman filter that estimates the turbojet thrust only from the angular speed measurements. We exploited the parameter estimation algorithm to ensure that the EKF gives smooth and accurate estimates even at engine failures. The designed EKF was validated on the test bench where the mean absolute error in estimated thrust was found to be within 2% of rated peak thrust.
summary: Jet-powered vertical takeoff and landing (VTOL) drones require precise thrust estimation to ensure adequate stability margins and robust maneuvering. Small-scale turbojets have become good candidates for powering heavy aerial drones. However, due to limited instrumentation available in these turbojets, estimating the precise thrust using classical techniques is not straightforward. In this paper, we present a methodology to accurately estimate the online thrust for the small-scale turbojets used on the iRonCub - an aerial humanoid robot. We use a grey-box method to capture the turbojet system dynamics with a nonlinear state-space model based on the data acquired from a custom engine test bench. This model is then used to design an extended Kalman filter that estimates the turbojet thrust only from the angular speed measurements. We exploited the parameter estimation algorithm to ensure that the EKF gives smooth and accurate estimates even at engine failures. The designed EKF was validated on the test bench where the mean absolute error in estimated thrust was found to be within 2% of rated peak thrust.
abstract_zh: 喷气动力垂直起降 (VTOL) 无人机需要精确的推力估计，以确保足够的稳定性裕度和稳健的机动性。小型涡轮喷气发动机已成为为重型无人机提供动力的良好选择。然而，由于这些涡轮喷气发动机中可用的仪器有限，使用经典技术估计精确推力并不简单。在本文中，我们提出了一种精确估计 iRonCub（一种空中人形机器人）上使用的小型涡轮喷气发动机在线推力的方法。我们使用灰盒方法通过基于从定制发动机测试台获取的数据的非线性状态空间模型来捕获涡轮喷气发动机系统动力学。然后，该模型用于设计扩展卡尔曼滤波器，仅根据角速度测量来估计涡轮喷气发动机的推力。我们利用参数估计算法来确保即使在发动机故障时 EKF 也能提供平滑且准确的估计。设计的 EKF 在测试台上进行了验证，估计推力的平均绝对误差在额定峰值推力的 2% 以内。

AI.tldr: 设计一种用于小型涡轮喷气发动机的推力估计方法，以提高VTOL无人机的稳定性和机动性
AI.motivation: 由于小型涡轮喷气发动机的仪器限制，传统方法难以准确估计推力，需开发新方法以确保无人机稳定性

AI.result: 测试显示推力估计的平均绝对误差在额定峰值推力的2%以内
AI.conclusion: 提出的EKF方法在发动机故障下仍能提供平滑准确的推力估计，验证了其有效性

search_text: Nonlinear Model Identification and Observer Design for Thrust Estimation of Small-scale Turbojet Engines 小型涡轮喷气发动机推力估计的非线性模型辨识和观测器设计 Jet-powered vertical takeoff and landing (VTOL) drones require precise thrust estimation to ensure adequate stability margins and robust maneuvering. Small-scale turbojets have become good candidates for powering heavy aerial drones. However, due to limited instrumentation available in these turbojets, estimating the precise thrust using classical techniques is not straightforward. In this paper, we present a methodology to accurately estimate the online thrust for the small-scale turbojets used on the iRonCub - an aerial humanoid robot. We use a grey-box method to capture the turbojet system dynamics with a nonlinear state-space model based on the data acquired from a custom engine test bench. This model is then used to design an extended Kalman filter that estimates the turbojet thrust only from the angular speed measurements. We exploited the parameter estimation algorithm to ensure that the EKF gives smooth and accurate estimates even at engine failures. The designed EKF was validated on the test bench where the mean absolute error in estimated thrust was found to be within 2% of rated peak thrust. 喷气动力垂直起降 (VTOL) 无人机需要精确的推力估计，以确保足够的稳定性裕度和稳健的机动性。小型涡轮喷气发动机已成为为重型无人机提供动力的良好选择。然而，由于这些涡轮喷气发动机中可用的仪器有限，使用经典技术估计精确推力并不简单。在本文中，我们提出了一种精确估计 iRonCub（一种空中人形机器人）上使用的小型涡轮喷气发动机在线推力的方法。我们使用灰盒方法通过基于从定制发动机测试台获取的数据的非线性状态空间模型来捕获涡轮喷气发动机系统动力学。然后，该模型用于设计扩展卡尔曼滤波器，仅根据角速度测量来估计涡轮喷气发动机的推力。我们利用参数估计算法来确保即使在发动机故障时 EKF 也能提供平滑且准确的估计。设计的 EKF 在测试台上进行了验证，估计推力的平均绝对误差在额定峰值推力的 2% 以内。 设计一种用于小型涡轮喷气发动机的推力估计方法，以提高VTOL无人机的稳定性和机动性 Affaf Junaid Ahamad Momin,Gabriele Nava,Giuseppe LErario,Hosameldin Awadalla Omer Mohamed,Fabio Bergonti,Punith Reddy Vanteddu,Francesco Braghin,Daniele Pucci cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Zachary Seymour,Niluthpol Chowdhury Mithun,Han-Pang Chiu,Supun Samarasekera,Rakesh Kumar
title: GraphMapper: Efficient Visual Navigation by Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: GraphMapper：通过场景图生成进行高效的视觉导航
abstract: Understanding the geometric relationships between objects in a scene is a core capability in enabling both humans and autonomous agents to navigate in new environments. A sparse, unified representation of the scene topology will allow agents to act efficiently to move through their environment, communicate the environment state with others, and utilize the representation for diverse downstream tasks. To this end, we propose a method to train an autonomous agent to learn to accumulate a 3D scene graph representation of its environment by simultaneously learning to navigate through said environment. We demonstrate that our approach, GraphMapper, enables the learning of effective navigation policies through fewer interactions with the environment than vision-based systems alone. Further, we show that GraphMapper can act as a modular scene encoder to operate alongside existing Learning-based solutions to not only increase navigational efficiency but also generate intermediate scene representations that are useful for other future tasks.
summary: Understanding the geometric relationships between objects in a scene is a core capability in enabling both humans and autonomous agents to navigate in new environments. A sparse, unified representation of the scene topology will allow agents to act efficiently to move through their environment, communicate the environment state with others, and utilize the representation for diverse downstream tasks. To this end, we propose a method to train an autonomous agent to learn to accumulate a 3D scene graph representation of its environment by simultaneously learning to navigate through said environment. We demonstrate that our approach, GraphMapper, enables the learning of effective navigation policies through fewer interactions with the environment than vision-based systems alone. Further, we show that GraphMapper can act as a modular scene encoder to operate alongside existing Learning-based solutions to not only increase navigational efficiency but also generate intermediate scene representations that are useful for other future tasks.
abstract_zh: 理解场景中对象之间的几何关系是使人类和自主代理能够在新环境中导航的核心能力。场景拓扑的稀疏、统一表示将允许代理有效地在其环境中移动、与其他人交流环境状态，并利用该表示来执行不同的下游任务。为此，我们提出了一种方法来训练自主代理，通过同时学习在所述环境中导航来学习积累其环境的 3D 场景图表示。我们证明，与单独基于视觉的系统相比，我们的方法 GraphMapper 能够通过更少的与环境的交互来学习有效的导航策略。此外，我们还表明 GraphMapper 可以充当模块化场景编码器，与现有的基于学习的解决方案一起运行，不仅可以提高导航效率，还可以生成对其他未来任务有用的中间场景表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GraphMapper方法，通过生成场景图实现自主代理的高效视觉导航。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉导航系统依赖大量环境交互，且缺乏统一场景表示，难以支持多任务应用。
AI.method: 训练自主代理在导航过程中同步学习生成3D场景图，将场景拓扑结构与导航策略联合优化。
AI.result: GraphMapper相比纯视觉系统减少环境交互次数，且生成的场景图可作为模块化编码器提升导航效率并支持下游任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过场景图表示实现了高效导航，为多任务场景理解提供了可复用的中间表征。

authors_text: Dinghao Yang,Bin Wang,Weijia Li,Yiqi Lin,Conghui He
title: Exploring the Interactive Guidance for Unified and Effective Image Matting
title_zh: 探索统一有效的图像抠图的交互式指导
abstract: Recent image matting studies are developing towards proposing trimap-free or interactive methods for complete complex image matting tasks. Although avoiding the extensive labors of trimap annotation, existing methods still suffer from two limitations: (1) For the single image with multiple objects, it is essential to provide extra interaction information to help determining the matting target; (2) For transparent objects, the accurate regression of alpha matte from RGB image is much more difficult compared with the opaque ones. In this work, we propose a Unified Interactive image Matting method, named UIM, which solves the limitations and achieves satisfying matting results for any scenario. Specifically, UIM leverages multiple types of user interaction to avoid the ambiguity of multiple matting targets, and we compare the pros and cons of different annotation types in detail. To unify the matting performance for transparent and opaque objects, we decouple image matting into two stages, i.e., foreground segmentation and transparency prediction. Moreover, we design a multi-scale attentive fusion module to alleviate the vagueness in the boundary region. Experimental results demonstrate that UIM achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Composition-1K test set and a synthetic unified dataset.
summary: Recent image matting studies are developing towards proposing trimap-free or interactive methods for complete complex image matting tasks. Although avoiding the extensive labors of trimap annotation, existing methods still suffer from two limitations: (1) For the single image with multiple objects, it is essential to provide extra interaction information to help determining the matting target; (2) For transparent objects, the accurate regression of alpha matte from RGB image is much more difficult compared with the opaque ones. In this work, we propose a Unified Interactive image Matting method, named UIM, which solves the limitations and achieves satisfying matting results for any scenario. Specifically, UIM leverages multiple types of user interaction to avoid the ambiguity of multiple matting targets, and we compare the pros and cons of different annotation types in detail. To unify the matting performance for transparent and opaque objects, we decouple image matting into two stages, i.e., foreground segmentation and transparency prediction. Moreover, we design a multi-scale attentive fusion module to alleviate the vagueness in the boundary region. Experimental results demonstrate that UIM achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Composition-1K test set and a synthetic unified dataset.
abstract_zh: 最近的图像抠图研究正在朝着提出用于完成复杂图像抠图任务的无三图或交互式方法的方向发展。虽然避免了三图标注的大量工作，但现有方法仍然存在两个局限性：（1）对于具有多个对象的单个图像，必须提供额外的交互信息来帮助确定抠图目标； (2) 对于透明物体，从 RGB 图像中准确回归 alpha matte 比不透明物体要困难得多。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种统一的交互式图像抠图方法，称为UIM，它解决了局限性并在任何场景下都能获得令人满意的抠图结果。具体来说，UIM 利用多种类型的用户交互来避免多个抠图目标的歧义，并且我们详细比较了不同注释类型的优缺点。为了统一透明和不透明物体的抠图性能，我们将图像抠图分解为两个阶段，即前景分割和透明度预测。此外，我们设计了一个多尺度注意融合模块来减轻边界区域的模糊性。实验结果表明，UIM 在 Composition-1K 测试集和合成统一数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的交互式图像抠图方法UIM，解决多目标场景和透明物体抠图的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有抠图方法在处理多目标图像时需额外交互信息，且对透明物体的alpha matte回归困难，缺乏统一解决方案。
AI.method: UIM通过多类型用户交互消除目标模糊性，将抠图分为前景分割与透明度预测两阶段，并设计多尺度注意力融合模块优化边界细节。
AI.result: 在Composition-1K测试集和合成数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: UIM通过交互引导与分阶段处理，实现了对多目标及透明物体的统一高效抠图，为复杂场景提供新思路。

To unify the matting performance for transparent and opaque objects, we decouple image matting into two stages, i.e., foreground segmentation and transparency prediction. Moreover, we design a multi-scale attentive fusion module to alleviate the vagueness in the boundary region. Experimental results demonstrate that UIM achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Composition-1K test set and a synthetic unified dataset. 最近的图像抠图研究正在朝着提出用于完成复杂图像抠图任务的无三图或交互式方法的方向发展。虽然避免了三图标注的大量工作，但现有方法仍然存在两个局限性：（1）对于具有多个对象的单个图像，必须提供额外的交互信息来帮助确定抠图目标； (2) 对于透明物体，从 RGB 图像中准确回归 alpha matte 比不透明物体要困难得多。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种统一的交互式图像抠图方法，称为UIM，它解决了局限性并在任何场景下都能获得令人满意的抠图结果。具体来说，UIM 利用多种类型的用户交互来避免多个抠图目标的歧义，并且我们详细比较了不同注释类型的优缺点。为了统一透明和不透明物体的抠图性能，我们将图像抠图分解为两个阶段，即前景分割和透明度预测。此外，我们设计了一个多尺度注意融合模块来减轻边界区域的模糊性。实验结果表明，UIM 在 Composition-1K 测试集和合成统一数据集上实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种统一的交互式图像抠图方法UIM，解决多目标场景和透明物体抠图的挑战。 Dinghao Yang,Bin Wang,Weijia Li,Yiqi Lin,Conghui He cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Jan Ole von Hartz,Eugenio Chisari,Tim Welschehold,Abhinav Valada
title: Self-Supervised Learning of Multi-Object Keypoints for Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: 机器人操作多目标关键点的自监督学习
comment: Presented at IEEE ICRA 2022 Workshop 'Reinforcement Learning for Contact-Rich Manipulation'
comments: Presented at IEEE ICRA 2022 Workshop 'Reinforcement Learning for Contact-Rich Manipulation'
abstract: In recent years, policy learning methods using either reinforcement or imitation have made significant progress. However, both techniques still suffer from being computationally expensive and requiring large amounts of training data. This problem is especially prevalent in real-world robotic manipulation tasks, where access to ground truth scene features is not available and policies are instead learned from raw camera observations. In this paper, we demonstrate the efficacy of learning image keypoints via the Dense Correspondence pretext task for downstream policy learning. Extending prior work to challenging multi-object scenes, we show that our model can be trained to deal with important problems in representation learning, primarily scale-invariance and occlusion. We evaluate our approach on diverse robot manipulation tasks, compare it to other visual representation learning approaches, and demonstrate its flexibility and effectiveness for sample-efficient policy learning.
summary: In recent years, policy learning methods using either reinforcement or imitation have made significant progress. However, both techniques still suffer from being computationally expensive and requiring large amounts of training data. This problem is especially prevalent in real-world robotic manipulation tasks, where access to ground truth scene features is not available and policies are instead learned from raw camera observations. In this paper, we demonstrate the efficacy of learning image keypoints via the Dense Correspondence pretext task for downstream policy learning. Extending prior work to challenging multi-object scenes, we show that our model can be trained to deal with important problems in representation learning, primarily scale-invariance and occlusion. We evaluate our approach on diverse robot manipulation tasks, compare it to other visual representation learning approaches, and demonstrate its flexibility and effectiveness for sample-efficient policy learning.
abstract_zh: 近年来，使用强化或模仿的政策学习方法取得了重大进展。然而，这两种技术仍然存在计算成本昂贵且需要大量训练数据的问题。这个问题在现实世界的机器人操作任务中尤其普遍，在这些任务中无法访问地面真实场景特征，而是从原始相机观察中学习策略。在本文中，我们展示了通过密集对应借口任务学习图像关键点以进行下游策略学习的有效性。将先前的工作扩展到具有挑战性的多对象场景，我们表明我们的模型可以经过训练来处理表示学习中的重要问题，主要是尺度不变性和遮挡。我们评估我们在不同机器人操作任务上的方法，将其与其他视觉表示学习方法进行比较，并证明其对于样本高效策略学习的灵活性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督学习方法，用于在机器人操作任务中学习多对象关键点，以解决传统方法计算成本高和数据需求大的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习或模仿学习的策略方法在真实机器人操作任务中面临计算成本高、依赖大量标注数据的挑战，且难以获取场景真实特征。
AI.method: 通过密集对应（Dense Correspondence）预训练任务学习图像关键点，扩展至多对象场景并解决尺度不变性和遮挡问题。
AI.result: 在多种机器人操作任务中验证了方法的有效性，相比其他视觉表征学习方法表现出更高的样本效率和灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人操作中的表征学习提供了高效且数据友好的解决方案，推动了少样本策略学习的发展。

title: A Study of the Attention Abnormality in Trojaned BERTs
title_zh: 木马 BERT 注意力异常研究
abstract: Trojan attacks raise serious security concerns. In this paper, we investigate the underlying mechanism of Trojaned BERT models. We observe the attention focus drifting behavior of Trojaned models, i.e., when encountering an poisoned input, the trigger token hijacks the attention focus regardless of the context. We provide a thorough qualitative and quantitative analysis of this phenomenon, revealing insights into the Trojan mechanism. Based on the observation, we propose an attention-based Trojan detector to distinguish Trojaned models from clean ones. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first paper to analyze the Trojan mechanism and to develop a Trojan detector based on the transformer's attention.
summary: Trojan attacks raise serious security concerns. In this paper, we investigate the underlying mechanism of Trojaned BERT models. We observe the attention focus drifting behavior of Trojaned models, i.e., when encountering an poisoned input, the trigger token hijacks the attention focus regardless of the context. We provide a thorough qualitative and quantitative analysis of this phenomenon, revealing insights into the Trojan mechanism. Based on the observation, we propose an attention-based Trojan detector to distinguish Trojaned models from clean ones. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first paper to analyze the Trojan mechanism and to develop a Trojan detector based on the transformer's attention.
abstract_zh: 特洛伊木马攻击引起严重的安全问题。在本文中，我们研究了木马 BERT 模型的底层机制。我们观察到木马模型的注意力焦点漂移行为，即，当遇到有毒输入时，触发令牌会劫持注意力焦点，无论上下文如何。我们对这种现象进行了彻底的定性和定量分析，揭示了对特洛伊木马机制的见解。根据观察，我们提出了一种基于注意力的木马检测器来区分木马模型和干净模型。据我们所知，这是第一篇分析木马机制并开发基于变压器注意力的木马检测器的论文。

AI.tldr: 研究被后门攻击的BERT模型中的注意力异常现象，并提出基于注意力机制的检测方法。
AI.motivation: 后门攻击威胁模型安全，现有检测方法不足，需深入分析其机制并开发有效检测手段。
AI.method: 通过定性和定量分析被触发时的注意力焦点漂移，设计基于注意力模式的检测算法。
AI.result: 提出首个基于Transformer注意力的后门检测器，有效区分被感染与正常模型。
AI.conclusion: 揭示后门攻击的注意力异常机制，为基于Transformer模型的安全检测提供新方法。

title: MulT: An End-to-End Multitask Learning Transformer
title_zh: MulT：端到端多任务学习转换器
abstract: We propose an end-to-end Multitask Learning Transformer framework, named MulT, to simultaneously learn multiple high-level vision tasks, including depth estimation, semantic segmentation, reshading, surface normal estimation, 2D keypoint detection, and edge detection. Based on the Swin transformer model, our framework encodes the input image into a shared representation and makes predictions for each vision task using task-specific transformer-based decoder heads. At the heart of our approach is a shared attention mechanism modeling the dependencies across the tasks. We evaluate our model on several multitask benchmarks, showing that our MulT framework outperforms both the state-of-the art multitask convolutional neural network models and all the respective single task transformer models. Our experiments further highlight the benefits of sharing attention across all the tasks, and demonstrate that our MulT model is robust and generalizes well to new domains. Our project website is at https://ivrl.github.io/MulT/.
summary: We propose an end-to-end Multitask Learning Transformer framework, named MulT, to simultaneously learn multiple high-level vision tasks, including depth estimation, semantic segmentation, reshading, surface normal estimation, 2D keypoint detection, and edge detection. Based on the Swin transformer model, our framework encodes the input image into a shared representation and makes predictions for each vision task using task-specific transformer-based decoder heads. At the heart of our approach is a shared attention mechanism modeling the dependencies across the tasks. We evaluate our model on several multitask benchmarks, showing that our MulT framework outperforms both the state-of-the art multitask convolutional neural network models and all the respective single task transformer models. Our experiments further highlight the benefits of sharing attention across all the tasks, and demonstrate that our MulT model is robust and generalizes well to new domains. Our project website is at https://ivrl.github.io/MulT/.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个名为 MulT 的端到端多任务学习 Transformer 框架，用于同时学习多个高级视觉任务，包括深度估计、语义分割、重新着色、表面法线估计、2D 关键点检测和边缘检测。基于 Swin 变压器模型，我们的框架将输入图像编码为共享表示，并使用特定于任务的基于变压器的解码器头对每个视觉任务进行预测。我们方法的核心是共享注意力机制，对任务之间的依赖关系进行建模。我们在多个多任务基准上评估我们的模型，表明我们的 MulT 框架优于最先进的多任务卷积神经网络模型和所有各自的单任务 Transformer 模型。我们的实验进一步强调了在所有任务之间共享注意力的好处，并证明我们的 MulT 模型是稳健的并且可以很好地推广到新领域。我们的项目网站位于 https://ivrl.github.io/MulT/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的多任务学习Transformer框架MulT，用于同时学习多个高级视觉任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效共享跨任务信息，导致多任务学习效率低下，且单任务模型难以兼顾多种视觉任务。
AI.method: 基于Swin Transformer模型，通过共享编码器生成图像的统一表示，并采用任务特定解码器头进行预测，核心是跨任务共享的注意力机制。
AI.result: 在多个多任务基准测试中，MulT优于现有多任务CNN模型和单任务Transformer模型，且具有良好的领域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 共享跨任务注意力机制能有效提升多任务学习性能，MulT框架在鲁棒性和泛化性上表现优异。
