Based on the Swin transformer model, our framework encodes the input image into a shared representation and makes predictions for each vision task using task-specific transformer-based decoder heads. At the heart of our approach is a shared attention mechanism modeling the dependencies across the tasks. We evaluate our model on several multitask benchmarks, showing that our MulT framework outperforms both the state-of-the art multitask convolutional neural network models and all the respective single task transformer models. Our experiments further highlight the benefits of sharing attention across all the tasks, and demonstrate that our MulT model is robust and generalizes well to new domains. Our project website is at https://ivrl.github.io/MulT/. 我们提出了一个名为 MulT 的端到端多任务学习 Transformer 框架，用于同时学习多个高级视觉任务，包括深度估计、语义分割、重新着色、表面法线估计、2D 关键点检测和边缘检测。基于 Swin 变压器模型，我们的框架将输入图像编码为共享表示，并使用特定于任务的基于变压器的解码器头对每个视觉任务进行预测。我们方法的核心是共享注意力机制，对任务之间的依赖关系进行建模。我们在多个多任务基准上评估我们的模型，表明我们的 MulT 框架优于最先进的多任务卷积神经网络模型和所有各自的单任务 Transformer 模型。我们的实验进一步强调了在所有任务之间共享注意力的好处，并证明我们的 MulT 模型是稳健的并且可以很好地推广到新领域。我们的项目网站位于 https://ivrl.github.io/MulT/。 本文提出一种端到端的多任务学习Transformer框架MulT，用于同时学习多个高级视觉任务。 Deblina Bhattacharjee,Tong Zhang,Sabine Süsstrunk,Mathieu Salzmann cs.CV

authors_text: Tong Hui,Antonello Paolino,Gabriele Nava,Giuseppe L'Erario,Fabio Di Natale,Fabio Bergonti,Francesco Braghin,Daniele Pucci
title: Centroidal Aerodynamic Modeling and Control of Flying Multibody Robots
title_zh: 飞行多体机器人的质心气动建模与控制
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, to be published in IEEE ICRA 2022. Presentation video: https://youtu.be/WDb-OVlh5XA
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures, to be published in IEEE ICRA 2022. Presentation video: https://youtu.be/WDb-OVlh5XA
abstract: This paper presents a modeling and control framework for multibody flying robots subject to non-negligible aerodynamic forces acting on the centroidal dynamics. First, aerodynamic forces are calculated during robot flight in different operating conditions by means of Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) analysis. Then, analytical models of the aerodynamics coefficients are generated from the dataset collected with CFD analysis. The obtained simplified aerodynamic model is also used to improve the flying robot control design. We present two control strategies: compensating for the aerodynamic effects via feedback linearization and enforcing the controller robustness with gain-scheduling. Simulation results on the jet-powered humanoid robot iRonCub validate the proposed approach.
summary: This paper presents a modeling and control framework for multibody flying robots subject to non-negligible aerodynamic forces acting on the centroidal dynamics. First, aerodynamic forces are calculated during robot flight in different operating conditions by means of Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) analysis. Then, analytical models of the aerodynamics coefficients are generated from the dataset collected with CFD analysis. The obtained simplified aerodynamic model is also used to improve the flying robot control design. We present two control strategies: compensating for the aerodynamic effects via feedback linearization and enforcing the controller robustness with gain-scheduling. Simulation results on the jet-powered humanoid robot iRonCub validate the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种多体飞行机器人的建模和控制框架，该机器人受到作用于质心动力学的不可忽略的气动力的影响。首先，通过计算流体动力学（CFD）分析来计算机器人在不同操作条件下飞行时的气动力。然后，根据 CFD 分析收集的数据集生成空气动力学系数的分析模型。获得的简化空气动力学模型也用于改进飞行机器人控制设计。我们提出了两种控制策略：通过反馈线性化补偿空气动力学效应，并通过增益调度增强控制器的鲁棒性。喷气动力人形机器人 iRonCub 的仿真结果验证了所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对受显著空气动力影响的飞行多体机器人的建模与控制框架，通过CFD分析和控制策略设计实现有效控制。
AI.motivation: 现有飞行多体机器人控制方法未充分考虑空气动力对质心动力学的影响，导致控制性能不足。
AI.method: 基于CFD分析计算空气动力，构建解析模型并设计反馈线性化补偿与增益调度控制策略。
AI.result: 在iRonCub仿真实验中验证了所提方法的有效性，提升了飞行控制性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为多体飞行机器人提供了兼顾空气动力补偿与鲁棒性的控制解决方案。

authors_text: Hossein A. Rahmani,Mohammadmehdi Naghiaei,Mahdi Dehghan,Mohammad Aliannejadi
title: Experiments on Generalizability of User-Oriented Fairness in Recommender Systems
title_zh: 推荐系统中面向用户的公平性的泛化实验
abstract: Recent work in recommender systems mainly focuses on fairness in recommendations as an important aspect of measuring recommendations quality. A fairness-aware recommender system aims to treat different user groups similarly. Relevant work on user-oriented fairness highlights the discriminative behavior of fairness-unaware recommendation algorithms towards a certain user group, defined based on users' activity level. Typical solutions include proposing a user-centered fairness re-ranking framework applied on top of a base ranking model to mitigate its unfair behavior towards a certain user group i.e., disadvantaged group. In this paper, we re-produce a user-oriented fairness study and provide extensive experiments to analyze the dependency of their proposed method on various fairness and recommendation aspects, including the recommendation domain, nature of the base ranking model, and user grouping method. Moreover, we evaluate the final recommendations provided by the re-ranking framework from both user- (e.g., NDCG, user-fairness) and item-side (e.g., novelty, item-fairness) metrics. We discover interesting trends and trade-offs between the model's performance in terms of different evaluation metrics. For instance, we see that the definition of the advantaged/disadvantaged user groups plays a crucial role in the effectiveness of the fairness algorithm and how it improves the performance of specific base ranking models. Finally, we highlight some important open challenges and future directions in this field. We release the data, evaluation pipeline, and the trained models publicly on https://github.com/rahmanidashti/FairRecSys.
summary: Recent work in recommender systems mainly focuses on fairness in recommendations as an important aspect of measuring recommendations quality. A fairness-aware recommender system aims to treat different user groups similarly. Relevant work on user-oriented fairness highlights the discriminative behavior of fairness-unaware recommendation algorithms towards a certain user group, defined based on users' activity level. Typical solutions include proposing a user-centered fairness re-ranking framework applied on top of a base ranking model to mitigate its unfair behavior towards a certain user group i.e., disadvantaged group. In this paper, we re-produce a user-oriented fairness study and provide extensive experiments to analyze the dependency of their proposed method on various fairness and recommendation aspects, including the recommendation domain, nature of the base ranking model, and user grouping method. Moreover, we evaluate the final recommendations provided by the re-ranking framework from both user- (e.g., NDCG, user-fairness) and item-side (e.g., novelty, item-fairness) metrics. We discover interesting trends and trade-offs between the model's performance in terms of different evaluation metrics. For instance, we see that the definition of the advantaged/disadvantaged user groups plays a crucial role in the effectiveness of the fairness algorithm and how it improves the performance of specific base ranking models. Finally, we highlight some important open challenges and future directions in this field. We release the data, evaluation pipeline, and the trained models publicly on https://github.com/rahmanidashti/FairRecSys.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统最近的工作主要集中在推荐的公平性上，作为衡量推荐质量的一个重要方面。公平感知推荐系统旨在以相似的方式对待不同的用户组。面向用户的公平性的相关工作突出了公平无意识推荐算法对基于用户活动水平定义的特定用户组的歧视行为。典型的解决方案包括提出一个以用户为中心的公平重新排名框架，应用于基本排名模型之上，以减轻其对特定用户群体（即弱势群体）的不公平行为。在本文中，我们重新进行了面向用户的公平性研究，并提供了大量的实验来分析他们提出的方法对各种公平性和推荐方面的依赖性，包括推荐领域、基本排名模型的性质和用户分组方法。此外，我们从用户（例如，NDCG、用户公平性）和项目方（例如，新颖性、项目公平性）指标评估重排序框架提供的最终建议。我们发现模型在不同评估指标方面的性能之间存在有趣的趋势和权衡。例如，我们看到优势/劣势用户群体的定义对于公平算法的有效性以及它如何提高特定基本排名模型的性能起着至关重要的作用。最后，我们强调了该领域的一些重要的开放挑战和未来方向。我们在 https://github.com/rahmanidashti/FairRecSys 上公开发布数据、评估流程和训练模型。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验分析用户导向公平性在推荐系统中的通用性，研究其在不同推荐领域、基础模型和用户分组方法下的依赖性。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统公平性研究缺乏对方法通用性的系统评估，需明确公平性算法在不同场景下的有效性和适用性。
AI.method: 复现用户导向公平性研究，设计多维度实验验证方法对推荐领域、基础模型及用户分组方式的依赖性，并从用户和物品视角进行多指标评估。
AI.result: 发现用户群体定义对公平性算法效果起关键作用，特定基础模型性能提升显著，但存在推荐质量与公平性指标间的权衡现象。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了公平性方法的通用性挑战，指出需进一步研究跨场景适应性，并公开数据与模型以推动领域发展。

title: Measuring Alignment Bias in Neural Seq2Seq Semantic Parsers
title_zh: 测量神经 Seq2Seq 语义解析器中的对齐偏差
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures. In Proceedings of the 11th Joint Conference on Lexical and Computational Semantics. 2022
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures. In Proceedings of the 11th Joint Conference on Lexical and Computational Semantics. 2022
abstract: Prior to deep learning the semantic parsing community has been interested in understanding and modeling the range of possible word alignments between natural language sentences and their corresponding meaning representations. Sequence-to-sequence models changed the research landscape suggesting that we no longer need to worry about alignments since they can be learned automatically by means of an attention mechanism. More recently, researchers have started to question such premise. In this work we investigate whether seq2seq models can handle both simple and complex alignments. To answer this question we augment the popular Geo semantic parsing dataset with alignment annotations and create Geo-Aligned. We then study the performance of standard seq2seq models on the examples that can be aligned monotonically versus examples that require more complex alignments. Our empirical study shows that performance is significantly better over monotonic alignments.
summary: Prior to deep learning the semantic parsing community has been interested in understanding and modeling the range of possible word alignments between natural language sentences and their corresponding meaning representations. Sequence-to-sequence models changed the research landscape suggesting that we no longer need to worry about alignments since they can be learned automatically by means of an attention mechanism. More recently, researchers have started to question such premise. In this work we investigate whether seq2seq models can handle both simple and complex alignments. To answer this question we augment the popular Geo semantic parsing dataset with alignment annotations and create Geo-Aligned. We then study the performance of standard seq2seq models on the examples that can be aligned monotonically versus examples that require more complex alignments. Our empirical study shows that performance is significantly better over monotonic alignments.
abstract_zh: 在深度学习之前，语义解析社区一直对理解和建模自然语言句子及其相应含义表示之间可能的单词对齐范围感兴趣。序列到序列模型改变了研究格局，表明我们不再需要担心比对，因为它们可以通过注意力机制自动学习。最近，研究人员开始质疑这一前提。在这项工作中，我们研究 seq2seq 模型是否可以处理简单和复杂的比对。为了回答这个问题，我们用对齐注释增强了流行的地理语义解析数据集，并创建了地理对齐。然后，我们研究标准 seq2seq 模型在可以单调对齐的示例与需要更复杂对齐的示例上的性能。我们的实证研究表明，性能明显优于单调对齐。

AI.tldr: 研究神经序列到序列语义解析器在处理不同复杂度对齐时的表现差异
AI.motivation: 质疑seq2seq模型是否能自动处理复杂对齐，传统方法认为注意力机制可自动学习对齐，但需验证其在不同对齐复杂度下的表现
AI.method: 扩展Geo数据集创建Geo-Aligned，对比标准seq2seq模型在单调与复杂对齐示例中的表现
AI.result: 实证研究表明，模型在单调对齐任务中的性能显著优于复杂对齐任务

search_text: Measuring Alignment Bias in Neural Seq2Seq Semantic Parsers 测量神经 Seq2Seq 语义解析器中的对齐偏差 Prior to deep learning the semantic parsing community has been interested in understanding and modeling the range of possible word alignments between natural language sentences and their corresponding meaning representations. Sequence-to-sequence models changed the research landscape suggesting that we no longer need to worry about alignments since they can be learned automatically by means of an attention mechanism. More recently, researchers have started to question such premise. In this work we investigate whether seq2seq models can handle both simple and complex alignments. To answer this question we augment the popular Geo semantic parsing dataset with alignment annotations and create Geo-Aligned. We then study the performance of standard seq2seq models on the examples that can be aligned monotonically versus examples that require more complex alignments. Our empirical study shows that performance is significantly better over monotonic alignments. 在深度学习之前，语义解析社区一直对理解和建模自然语言句子及其相应含义表示之间可能的单词对齐范围感兴趣。序列到序列模型改变了研究格局，表明我们不再需要担心比对，因为它们可以通过注意力机制自动学习。最近，研究人员开始质疑这一前提。在这项工作中，我们研究 seq2seq 模型是否可以处理简单和复杂的比对。为了回答这个问题，我们用对齐注释增强了流行的地理语义解析数据集，并创建了地理对齐。然后，我们研究标准 seq2seq 模型在可以单调对齐的示例与需要更复杂对齐的示例上的性能。我们的实证研究表明，性能明显优于单调对齐。 研究神经序列到序列语义解析器在处理不同复杂度对齐时的表现差异 Davide Locatelli,Ariadna Quattoni cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Trisha Chakraborty,Abir Islam,Valerie King,Daniel Rayborn,Jared Saia,Maxwell Young
title: Bankrupting DoS Attackers
title_zh: 让 DoS 攻击者破产
abstract: Can we make a denial-of-service attacker pay more than the server and honest clients? Consider a model where a server sees a stream of jobs sent by either honest clients or an adversary. The server sets a price for servicing each job with the aid of an estimator, which provides approximate statistical information about the distribution of previously occurring good jobs. We describe and analyze pricing algorithms for the server under different models of synchrony, with total cost parameterized by the accuracy of the estimator. Given a reasonably accurate estimator, the algorithm's cost provably grows more slowly than the attacker's cost, as the attacker's cost grows large. Additionally, we prove a lower bound, showing that our pricing algorithm yields asymptotically tight results when the estimator is accurate within constant factors.
summary: Can we make a denial-of-service attacker pay more than the server and honest clients? Consider a model where a server sees a stream of jobs sent by either honest clients or an adversary. The server sets a price for servicing each job with the aid of an estimator, which provides approximate statistical information about the distribution of previously occurring good jobs. We describe and analyze pricing algorithms for the server under different models of synchrony, with total cost parameterized by the accuracy of the estimator. Given a reasonably accurate estimator, the algorithm's cost provably grows more slowly than the attacker's cost, as the attacker's cost grows large. Additionally, we prove a lower bound, showing that our pricing algorithm yields asymptotically tight results when the estimator is accurate within constant factors.
abstract_zh: 我们能让拒绝服务攻击者付出比服务器和诚实客户端更多的费用吗？考虑一个模型，其中服务器看到由诚实的客户端或对手发送的作业流。服务器在估算器的帮助下为每项作业设定服务价格，估算器提供有关先前发生的好作业分布的近似统计信息。我们描述并分析了不同同步模型下服务器的定价算法，总成本由估计器的准确性参数化。给定一个相当准确的估计器，随着攻击者的成本变大，算法的成本可以证明比攻击者的成本增长得更慢。此外，我们证明了一个下限，表明当估计器在常数因子内准确时，我们的定价算法会产生渐近严格的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种定价算法，通过让拒绝服务攻击者的成本超过服务器和诚实客户端的成本，从而有效遏制DoS攻击。
AI.motivation: 传统DoS防御难以有效应对攻击者低成本发起的攻击，需通过经济手段使攻击者承担更高成本以达到遏制目的。
AI.method: 设计基于统计估计器的动态定价算法，根据历史正常任务分布调整服务价格，并在不同同步模型下分析其成本增长特性。
AI.result: 当估计器精度合理时，服务器总成本增长速度显著低于攻击者成本，且证明了算法在估计器准确时达到渐近最优下界。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过经济激励机制有效抑制DoS攻击，且算法在统计估计准确时具有理论最优性保证。

authors_text: Binbin Hu,Zhiyang Hu,Zhiqiang Zhang,Jun Zhou,Chuan Shi
title: KGNN: Distributed Framework for Graph Neural Knowledge Representation
title_zh: KGNN：图神经知识表示的分布式框架
abstract: Knowledge representation learning has been commonly adopted to incorporate knowledge graph (KG) into various online services. Although existing knowledge representation learning methods have achieved considerable performance improvement, they ignore high-order structure and abundant attribute information, resulting unsatisfactory performance on semantics-rich KGs. Moreover, they fail to make prediction in an inductive manner and cannot scale to large industrial graphs. To address these issues, we develop a novel framework called KGNN to take full advantage of knowledge data for representation learning in the distributed learning system. KGNN is equipped with GNN based encoder and knowledge aware decoder, which aim to jointly explore high-order structure and attribute information together in a fine-grained fashion and preserve the relation patterns in KGs, respectively. Extensive experiments on three datasets for link prediction and triplet classification task demonstrate the effectiveness and scalability of KGNN framework.
summary: Knowledge representation learning has been commonly adopted to incorporate knowledge graph (KG) into various online services. Although existing knowledge representation learning methods have achieved considerable performance improvement, they ignore high-order structure and abundant attribute information, resulting unsatisfactory performance on semantics-rich KGs. Moreover, they fail to make prediction in an inductive manner and cannot scale to large industrial graphs. To address these issues, we develop a novel framework called KGNN to take full advantage of knowledge data for representation learning in the distributed learning system. KGNN is equipped with GNN based encoder and knowledge aware decoder, which aim to jointly explore high-order structure and attribute information together in a fine-grained fashion and preserve the relation patterns in KGs, respectively. Extensive experiments on three datasets for link prediction and triplet classification task demonstrate the effectiveness and scalability of KGNN framework.
abstract_zh: 知识表示学习已被普遍采用，将知识图谱（KG）纳入各种在线服务中。尽管现有的知识表示学习方法取得了相当大的性能提升，但它们忽略了高阶结构和丰富的属性信息，导致在语义丰富的知识图谱上表现不佳。此外，它们无法以归纳方式进行预测，并且无法扩展到大型工业图。为了解决这些问题，我们开发了一种名为 KGNN 的新颖框架，以充分利用知识数据在分布式学习系统中进行表示学习。 KGNN 配备了基于 GNN 的编码器和知识感知解码器，旨在以细粒度的方式共同探索高阶结构和属性信息，并分别保留 KG 中的关系模式。在三个数据集上进行的链接预测和三元组分类任务的大量实验证明了 KGNN 框架的有效性和可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为KGNN的分布式框架，用于知识图谱的神经表示学习，以解决现有方法在高阶结构利用、属性信息整合及大规模扩展性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有知识表示学习方法未能有效利用知识图谱的高阶结构和属性信息，且无法进行归纳预测或扩展到大规模工业场景。
AI.method: KGNN框架结合基于图神经网络（GNN）的编码器和知识感知解码器，联合探索高阶结构与属性信息，并保留知识图谱中的关系模式。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的链接预测和三元组分类实验验证了KGNN框架的有效性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: KGNN通过整合高阶结构与属性信息，解决了现有方法的局限性，适用于大规模工业知识图谱的表示学习任务。

authors_text: François Smekens,Nicolas Freud,Bruno Sixou,Guillaume Beslon,Jean M Létang
title: Towards the optimization of ballistics in proton therapy using genetic algorithms: implementation issues
title_zh: 使用遗传算法优化质子治疗中的弹道：实施问题
abstract: The dose delivered to the planning target volume by proton beams is highly conformal, sparing organs at risk and normal tissues. New treatment planning systems adapted to spot scanning techniques have been recently proposed to simultaneously optimize several fields and thus improve dose delivery. In this paper, we investigate a new optimization framework based on a genetic algorithm approach. This tool is intended to make it possible to explore new schemes of treatment delivery, possibly with future enhanced technologies. The optimization framework is designed to be versatile and to account for many degrees of freedom, without any {\it a priori} technological constraint. To test the behavior of our algorithm, we propose in this paper, as an example, to optimize beam fluences, target points and irradiation directions at the same time. The proposed optimization routine takes typically into account several thousands of spots of fixed size. The evolution is carried out by the three standard genetic operators: mutation, crossover and selection. The figure-of-merit (or fitness) is based on an objective function relative to the dose prescription to the tumor and to the limits set for organs at risk and normal tissues. Fluence optimization is carried out via a specific scheme based on a plain gradient with analytical solution. Several specific genetic algorithm issues are addressed: (i) the mutation rate is tuned to balance the search and selection forces, (ii) the initial population is selected using a bootstrap technique and (iii) to scale down the computation time, dose calculations are carried out with a fast analytical ray tracing method and are multi-threaded. In this paper implementation issues of the optimization framework are thoroughly described. The behavior of the proposed genetic algorithm is illustrated in both elementary and clinically-realistic test cases.

To test the behavior of our algorithm, we propose in this paper, as an example, to optimize beam fluences, target points and irradiation directions at the same time. The proposed optimization routine takes typically into account several thousands of spots of fixed size. The evolution is carried out by the three standard genetic operators: mutation, crossover and selection. The figure-of-merit (or fitness) is based on an objective function relative to the dose prescription to the tumor and to the limits set for organs at risk and normal tissues. Fluence optimization is carried out via a specific scheme based on a plain gradient with analytical solution. Several specific genetic algorithm issues are addressed: (i) the mutation rate is tuned to balance the search and selection forces, (ii) the initial population is selected using a bootstrap technique and (iii) to scale down the computation time, dose calculations are carried out with a fast analytical ray tracing method and are multi-threaded. In this paper implementation issues of the optimization framework are thoroughly described. The behavior of the proposed genetic algorithm is illustrated in both elementary and clinically-realistic test cases.
abstract_zh: 质子束传递到计划目标体积的剂量是高度适形的，不会伤害处于危险中的器官和正常组织。最近提出了适应点扫描技术的新治疗计划系统，以同时优化多个区域，从而改善剂量输送。在本文中，我们研究了一种基于遗传算法方法的新优化框架。该工具旨在使探索新的治疗方案成为可能，并可能利用未来的增强技术。优化框架被设计为通用的，并考虑到许多自由度，没有任何先验的技术约束。为了测试我们算法的行为，我们在本文中建议同时优化光束注量、目标点和照射方向。所提出的优化例程通常考虑数千个固定大小的点。进化是通过三个标准遗传算子进行的：突变、交叉和选择。品质因数（或适合度）基于相对于肿瘤剂量处方以及针对危险器官和正常组织设定的限制的目标函数。流量优化是通过基于解析解的简单梯度的特定方案来进行的。解决了几个特定的​​遗传算法问题：（i）调整突变率以平衡搜索和选择力，（ii）使用引导技术选择初始种群，以及（iii）为了缩短计算时间，使用快速分析射线追踪方法进行剂量计算并且是多线程的。本文对优化框架的实现问题进行了深入的描述。所提出的遗传算法的行为在基本和临床现实测试案例中得到了说明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于遗传算法的优化框架，用于质子治疗中的弹道优化，旨在探索新的治疗方案并提升剂量传递效果。
AI.motivation: 质子治疗需精准控制剂量以保护正常组织，传统方法存在技术限制，需开发更灵活的优化工具以适应未来技术发展。
AI.method: 采用遗传算法（包含变异、交叉、选择操作），结合梯度优化方案，通过快速解析射线追踪法和多线程计算降低计算时间，并优化初始种群和变异率。
AI.result: 在基础和临床真实案例中验证了算法有效性，展示了同时优化射束强度、靶点和照射方向的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具备高度灵活性，可适配多种技术约束，为质子治疗的优化提供了可扩展的解决方案，且实施细节得到充分验证。

search_text: Towards the optimization of ballistics in proton therapy using genetic algorithms: implementation issues 使用遗传算法优化质子治疗中的弹道：实施问题 The dose delivered to the planning target volume by proton beams is highly conformal, sparing organs at risk and normal tissues. New treatment planning systems adapted to spot scanning techniques have been recently proposed to simultaneously optimize several fields and thus improve dose delivery. In this paper, we investigate a new optimization framework based on a genetic algorithm approach. This tool is intended to make it possible to explore new schemes of treatment delivery, possibly with future enhanced technologies. The optimization framework is designed to be versatile and to account for many degrees of freedom, without any {\it a priori} technological constraint. To test the behavior of our algorithm, we propose in this paper, as an example, to optimize beam fluences, target points and irradiation directions at the same time. The proposed optimization routine takes typically into account several thousands of spots of fixed size. The evolution is carried out by the three standard genetic operators: mutation, crossover and selection. The figure-of-merit (or fitness) is based on an objective function relative to the dose prescription to the tumor and to the limits set for organs at risk and normal tissues. Fluence optimization is carried out via a specific scheme based on a plain gradient with analytical solution. Several specific genetic algorithm issues are addressed: (i) the mutation rate is tuned to balance the search and selection forces, (ii) the initial population is selected using a bootstrap technique and (iii) to scale down the computation time, dose calculations are carried out with a fast analytical ray tracing method and are multi-threaded. In this paper implementation issues of the optimization framework are thoroughly described. The behavior of the proposed genetic algorithm is illustrated in both elementary and clinically-realistic test cases. 质子束传递到计划目标体积的剂量是高度适形的，不会伤害处于危险中的器官和正常组织。最近提出了适应点扫描技术的新治疗计划系统，以同时优化多个区域，从而改善剂量输送。在本文中，我们研究了一种基于遗传算法方法的新优化框架。该工具旨在使探索新的治疗方案成为可能，并可能利用未来的增强技术。优化框架被设计为通用的，并考虑到许多自由度，没有任何先验的技术约束。为了测试我们算法的行为，我们在本文中建议同时优化光束注量、目标点和照射方向。所提出的优化例程通常考虑数千个固定大小的点。进化是通过三个标准遗传算子进行的：突变、交叉和选择。品质因数（或适合度）基于相对于肿瘤剂量处方以及针对危险器官和正常组织设定的限制的目标函数。流量优化是通过基于解析解的简单梯度的特定方案来进行的。解决了几个特定的​​遗传算法问题：（i）调整突变率以平衡搜索和选择力，（ii）使用引导技术选择初始种群，以及（iii）为了缩短计算时间，使用快速分析射线追踪方法进行剂量计算并且是多线程的。本文对优化框架的实现问题进行了深入的描述。所提出的遗传算法的行为在基本和临床现实测试案例中得到了说明。 本文提出了一种基于遗传算法的优化框架，用于质子治疗中的弹道优化，旨在探索新的治疗方案并提升剂量传递效果。 François Smekens,Nicolas Freud,Bruno Sixou,Guillaume Beslon,Jean M Létang physics.med-ph,cs.NE

authors_text: Pengcheng Yan,Qizhi Teng,Xiaohai He,Zhenchuan Ma,Ningning Zhang
title: Multiscale reconstruction of porous media based on multiple dictionaries learning
title_zh: 基于多词典学习的多孔介质多尺度重建
abstract: Digital modeling of the microstructure is important for studying the physical and transport properties of porous media. Multiscale modeling for porous media can accurately characterize macro-pores and micro-pores in a large-FoV (field of view) high-resolution three-dimensional pore structure model. This paper proposes a multiscale reconstruction algorithm based on multiple dictionaries learning, in which edge patterns and micro-pore patterns from homology high-resolution pore structure are introduced into low-resolution pore structure to build a fine multiscale pore structure model. The qualitative and quantitative comparisons of the experimental results show that the results of multiscale reconstruction are similar to the real high-resolution pore structure in terms of complex pore geometry and pore surface morphology. The geometric, topological and permeability properties of multiscale reconstruction results are almost identical to those of the real high-resolution pore structures. The experiments also demonstrate the proposal algorithm is capable of multiscale reconstruction without regard to the size of the input. This work provides an effective method for fine multiscale modeling of porous media.
summary: Digital modeling of the microstructure is important for studying the physical and transport properties of porous media. Multiscale modeling for porous media can accurately characterize macro-pores and micro-pores in a large-FoV (field of view) high-resolution three-dimensional pore structure model. This paper proposes a multiscale reconstruction algorithm based on multiple dictionaries learning, in which edge patterns and micro-pore patterns from homology high-resolution pore structure are introduced into low-resolution pore structure to build a fine multiscale pore structure model. The qualitative and quantitative comparisons of the experimental results show that the results of multiscale reconstruction are similar to the real high-resolution pore structure in terms of complex pore geometry and pore surface morphology. The geometric, topological and permeability properties of multiscale reconstruction results are almost identical to those of the real high-resolution pore structures. The experiments also demonstrate the proposal algorithm is capable of multiscale reconstruction without regard to the size of the input. This work provides an effective method for fine multiscale modeling of porous media.
abstract_zh: 微观结构的数字建模对于研究多孔介质的物理和传输特性非常重要。多孔介质的多尺度建模可以在大FoV（视场）高分辨率三维孔隙结构模型中准确表征宏观孔隙和微观孔隙。本文提出一种基于多字典学习的多尺度重建算法，将同源高分辨率孔隙结构的边缘图案和微孔隙图案引入低分辨率孔隙结构中，建立精细的多尺度孔隙结构模型。实验结果的定性和定量比较表明，多尺度重建结果在复杂的孔隙几何形状和孔隙表面形貌方面与真实的高分辨率孔隙结构相似。多尺度重建结果的几何、拓扑和渗透特性与真实的高分辨率孔隙结构几乎相同。实验还表明，该提议算法能够进行多尺度重建，而无需考虑输入的大小。这项工作为多孔介质的精细多尺度建模提供了一种有效的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多字典学习的多尺度重建算法，用于精确建模多孔介质的宏观和微观孔隙结构。
AI.motivation: 多孔介质的微观结构对其物理和传输特性研究至关重要，传统方法难以在大视场下同时准确表征宏观孔隙和微观孔隙。
AI.method: 通过引入同源高分辨率孔隙结构的边缘模式和微孔模式到低分辨率结构中，利用多字典学习构建多尺度精细孔隙模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，重建结果在孔隙几何形状、表面形貌及渗透性等特性上与真实高分辨率结构高度一致，且算法适用于不同输入尺寸。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多孔介质的精细多尺度建模提供了有效手段，提升了孔隙结构模拟的准确性与适用性。

authors_text: Ailisi Li,Xueyao Jiang,Bang Liu,Jiaqing Liang,Yanghua Xiao
title: Tackling Math Word Problems with Fine-to-Coarse Abstracting and Reasoning
title_zh: 通过由细到粗的抽象和推理来解决数学应用题
abstract: Math Word Problems (MWP) is an important task that requires the ability of understanding and reasoning over mathematical text. Existing approaches mostly formalize it as a generation task by adopting Seq2Seq or Seq2Tree models to encode an input math problem in natural language as a global representation and generate the output mathematical expression. Such approaches only learn shallow heuristics and fail to capture fine-grained variations in inputs. In this paper, we propose to model a math word problem in a fine-to-coarse manner to capture both the local fine-grained information and the global logical structure of it. Instead of generating a complete equation sequence or expression tree from the global features, we iteratively combine low-level operands to predict a higher-level operator, abstracting the problem and reasoning about the solving operators from bottom to up. Our model is naturally more sensitive to local variations and can better generalize to unseen problem types. Extensive evaluations on Math23k and SVAMP datasets demonstrate the accuracy and robustness of our method.
summary: Math Word Problems (MWP) is an important task that requires the ability of understanding and reasoning over mathematical text. Existing approaches mostly formalize it as a generation task by adopting Seq2Seq or Seq2Tree models to encode an input math problem in natural language as a global representation and generate the output mathematical expression. Such approaches only learn shallow heuristics and fail to capture fine-grained variations in inputs. In this paper, we propose to model a math word problem in a fine-to-coarse manner to capture both the local fine-grained information and the global logical structure of it. Instead of generating a complete equation sequence or expression tree from the global features, we iteratively combine low-level operands to predict a higher-level operator, abstracting the problem and reasoning about the solving operators from bottom to up. Our model is naturally more sensitive to local variations and can better generalize to unseen problem types. Extensive evaluations on Math23k and SVAMP datasets demonstrate the accuracy and robustness of our method.
abstract_zh: 数学应用题（MWP）是一项重要的任务，需要对数学文本进行理解和推理的能力。现有方法大多将其形式化为生成任务，采用 Seq2Seq 或 Seq2Tree 模型将自然语言中的输入数学问题编码为全局表示并生成输出数学表达式。这种方法只能学习浅层启发式方法，无法捕获输入中的细粒度变化。在本文中，我们建议以从细到粗的方式对数学应用问题进行建模，以捕获局部细粒度信息及其全局逻辑结构。我们不是从全局特征生成完整的方程序列或表达式树，而是迭代地组合低级操作数来预测更高级别的运算符，从下到上抽象问题并推理求解运算符。我们的模型自然对局部变化更加敏感，并且可以更好地泛化到未见过的问题类型。对 Math23k 和 SVAMP 数据集的广泛评估证明了我们方法的准确性和稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种细到粗的抽象与推理方法，用于解决数学文字题，通过捕捉局部细节和全局逻辑结构提升模型表现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如Seq2Seq/Seq2Tree）仅学习浅层启发式规则，无法有效捕捉输入中的细粒度变化，导致泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 采用自底向上的迭代机制，逐步组合低级运算数预测高级运算符，同时抽象问题并推理求解操作符。
AI.result: 在Math23k和SVAMP数据集上实验表明，该方法在准确率和鲁棒性方面优于现有方法。

search_text: Tackling Math Word Problems with Fine-to-Coarse Abstracting and Reasoning 通过由细到粗的抽象和推理来解决数学应用题 Math Word Problems (MWP) is an important task that requires the ability of understanding and reasoning over mathematical text. Existing approaches mostly formalize it as a generation task by adopting Seq2Seq or Seq2Tree models to encode an input math problem in natural language as a global representation and generate the output mathematical expression. Such approaches only learn shallow heuristics and fail to capture fine-grained variations in inputs. In this paper, we propose to model a math word problem in a fine-to-coarse manner to capture both the local fine-grained information and the global logical structure of it. Instead of generating a complete equation sequence or expression tree from the global features, we iteratively combine low-level operands to predict a higher-level operator, abstracting the problem and reasoning about the solving operators from bottom to up. Our model is naturally more sensitive to local variations and can better generalize to unseen problem types. Extensive evaluations on Math23k and SVAMP datasets demonstrate the accuracy and robustness of our method. 数学应用题（MWP）是一项重要的任务，需要对数学文本进行理解和推理的能力。现有方法大多将其形式化为生成任务，采用 Seq2Seq 或 Seq2Tree 模型将自然语言中的输入数学问题编码为全局表示并生成输出数学表达式。这种方法只能学习浅层启发式方法，无法捕获输入中的细粒度变化。在本文中，我们建议以从细到粗的方式对数学应用问题进行建模，以捕获局部细粒度信息及其全局逻辑结构。我们不是从全局特征生成完整的方程序列或表达式树，而是迭代地组合低级操作数来预测更高级别的运算符，从下到上抽象问题并推理求解运算符。我们的模型自然对局部变化更加敏感，并且可以更好地泛化到未见过的问题类型。对 Math23k 和 SVAMP 数据集的广泛评估证明了我们方法的准确性和稳健性。 本文提出一种细到粗的抽象与推理方法，用于解决数学文字题，通过捕捉局部细节和全局逻辑结构提升模型表现。 Ailisi Li,Xueyao Jiang,Bang Liu,Jiaqing Liang,Yanghua Xiao cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Nadia Daoudi,Kevin Allix,Tegawendé F. Bissyandé,Jacques Klein
title: A two-steps approach to improve the performance of Android malware detectors
title_zh: 提高 Android 恶意软件检测器性能的两步方法
abstract: The popularity of Android OS has made it an appealing target to malware developers. To evade detection, including by ML-based techniques, attackers invest in creating malware that closely resemble legitimate apps. In this paper, we propose GUIDED RETRAINING, a supervised representation learning-based method that boosts the performance of a malware detector. First, the dataset is split into "easy" and "difficult" samples, where difficulty is associated to the prediction probabilities yielded by a malware detector: for difficult samples, the probabilities are such that the classifier is not confident on the predictions, which have high error rates. Then, we apply our GUIDED RETRAINING method on the difficult samples to improve their classification. For the subset of "easy" samples, the base malware detector is used to make the final predictions since the error rate on that subset is low by construction. For the subset of "difficult" samples, we rely on GUIDED RETRAINING, which leverages the correct predictions and the errors made by the base malware detector to guide the retraining process. GUIDED RETRAINING focuses on the difficult samples: it learns new embeddings of these samples using Supervised Contrastive Learning and trains an auxiliary classifier for the final predictions. We validate our method on four state-of-the-art Android malware detection approaches using over 265k malware and benign apps, and we demonstrate that GUIDED RETRAINING can reduce up to 40.41% prediction errors made by the malware detectors. Our method is generic and designed to enhance the classification performance on a binary classification task. Consequently, it can be applied to other classification problems beyond Android malware detection.
summary: The popularity of Android OS has made it an appealing target to malware developers. To evade detection, including by ML-based techniques, attackers invest in creating malware that closely resemble legitimate apps. In this paper, we propose GUIDED RETRAINING, a supervised representation learning-based method that boosts the performance of a malware detector. First, the dataset is split into "easy" and "difficult" samples, where difficulty is associated to the prediction probabilities yielded by a malware detector: for difficult samples, the probabilities are such that the classifier is not confident on the predictions, which have high error rates. Then, we apply our GUIDED RETRAINING method on the difficult samples to improve their classification. For the subset of "easy" samples, the base malware detector is used to make the final predictions since the error rate on that subset is low by construction. For the subset of "difficult" samples, we rely on GUIDED RETRAINING, which leverages the correct predictions and the errors made by the base malware detector to guide the retraining process. GUIDED RETRAINING focuses on the difficult samples: it learns new embeddings of these samples using Supervised Contrastive Learning and trains an auxiliary classifier for the final predictions. We validate our method on four state-of-the-art Android malware detection approaches using over 265k malware and benign apps, and we demonstrate that GUIDED RETRAINING can reduce up to 40.41% prediction errors made by the malware detectors. Our method is generic and designed to enhance the classification performance on a binary classification task. Consequently, it can be applied to other classification problems beyond Android malware detection.
abstract_zh: Android 操作系统的流行使其成为恶意软件开发人员的有吸引力的目标。为了逃避检测（包括基于机器学习的技术），攻击者投资创建与合法应用程序非常相似的恶意软件。在本文中，我们提出了引导再训练，这是一种基于监督表示学习的方法，可以提高恶意软件检测器的性能。首先，数据集被分为“简单”和“困难”样本，其中难度与恶意软件检测器产生的预测概率相关：对于困难样本，概率使得分类器对预测不自信，其错误率很高。然后，我们对困难样本应用引导再训练方法以改进其分类。对于“简单”样本的子集，基础恶意软件检测器用于做出最终预测，因为该子集的错误率通过构造较低。对于“困难”样本的子集，我们依靠引导再训练，它利用基本恶意软件检测器的正确预测和错误来指导再训练过程。引导再训练专注于困难样本：它使用监督对比学习来学习这些样本的新嵌入，并为最终预测训练辅助分类器。我们使用超过 265,000 个恶意软件和良性应用程序在四种最先进的 Android 恶意软件检测方法上验证了我们的方法，并且我们证明引导重新训练可以减少恶意软件检测器产生的高达 40.41% 的预测错误。我们的方法是通用的，旨在增强二元分类任务的分类性能。因此，它可以应用于 Android 恶意软件检测之外的其他分类问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种两步方法GUIDED RETRAINING，通过监督表示学习提升Android恶意软件检测器的性能。
AI.motivation: Android系统普及导致恶意软件开发者通过创建与合法应用相似的恶意软件来逃避检测，现有检测方法在困难样本上存在较高误判率。
AI.method: 将数据集分为'易'和'难'样本，对易样本直接使用基础检测器，对难样本通过监督对比学习生成新嵌入并训练辅助分类器进行重训练。
AI.result: 在四个先进检测方法上验证，使用265k样本数据后，检测错误率最高降低40.41%。
AI.conclusion: GUIDED RETRAINING能有效提升二分类任务的分类性能，适用于包括Android恶意软件检测在内的多种场景。

title: Working with Affective Computing: Exploring UK Public Perceptions of AI enabled Workplace Surveillance
title_zh: 使用情感计算：探索英国公众对人工智能支持的工作场所监控的看法
abstract: This paper explores public perceptions around the role of affective computing in the workplace. It uses a series of design fictions with 46 UK based participants, unpacking their perspectives on the advantages and disadvantages of tracking the emotional state of workers. The scenario focuses on mundane uses of biometric sensing in a sales environment, and how this could shape management approaches with workers. The paper structure is as follows: section 1 provides a brief introduction; section 2 provides an overview of the innovative design fiction methodology; section 3 explores wider shifts around IT in the workplace; section 4 provides some legal analysis exploring emergence of AI in the workplace; and section 5 presents themes from the study data. The latter section includes discussion on concerns around functionality and accuracy of affective computing systems, and their impacts on surveillance, human agency, and worker/management interactions.
summary: This paper explores public perceptions around the role of affective computing in the workplace. It uses a series of design fictions with 46 UK based participants, unpacking their perspectives on the advantages and disadvantages of tracking the emotional state of workers. The scenario focuses on mundane uses of biometric sensing in a sales environment, and how this could shape management approaches with workers. The paper structure is as follows: section 1 provides a brief introduction; section 2 provides an overview of the innovative design fiction methodology; section 3 explores wider shifts around IT in the workplace; section 4 provides some legal analysis exploring emergence of AI in the workplace; and section 5 presents themes from the study data. The latter section includes discussion on concerns around functionality and accuracy of affective computing systems, and their impacts on surveillance, human agency, and worker/management interactions.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了公众对情感计算在工作场所中的作用的看法。它使用了 46 位英国参与者的一系列设计虚构作品，阐述了他们对跟踪员工情绪状态的优点和缺点的看法。该场景重点关注生物识别传感在销售环境中的日常使用，以及这如何影响员工的管理方法。论文结构如下：第1节简要介绍；第 2 节概述了创新设计虚构方法；第 3 部分探讨了工作场所 IT 的更广泛转变；第 4 节提供了一些探讨人工智能在工作场所出现的法律分析；第 5 节介绍了研究数据的主题。后一部分讨论了情感计算系统的功能和准确性及其对监视、人类代理和工人/管理层互动的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨英国公众对AI驱动的工作场所监控中情感计算技术的看法，通过设计虚构方法分析其优势与劣势。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在理解公众对情感计算在职场中应用的接受度，以及该技术可能带来的管理方式变革与伦理问题。
AI.method: 采用设计虚构方法，对46名英国参与者进行场景化访谈，结合法律分析与技术趋势探讨。
AI.result: 参与者担忧情感计算系统的准确性与隐私侵犯，认为其可能削弱员工自主性并加剧监控压力。
AI.conclusion: 需在技术创新与员工权益间寻求平衡，政策制定应重视技术透明性与伦理规范。

It uses a series of design fictions with 46 UK based participants, unpacking their perspectives on the advantages and disadvantages of tracking the emotional state of workers. The paper structure is as follows: section 1 provides a brief introduction; section 2 provides an overview of the innovative design fiction methodology; section 3 explores wider shifts around IT in the workplace; section 4 provides some legal analysis exploring emergence of AI in the workplace; and section 5 presents themes from the study data. The latter section includes discussion on concerns around functionality and accuracy of affective computing systems, and their impacts on surveillance, human agency, and worker/management interactions. 本文探讨了公众对情感计算在工作场所中的作用的看法。它使用了 46 位英国参与者的一系列设计虚构作品，阐述了他们对跟踪员工情绪状态的优点和缺点的看法。该场景重点关注生物识别传感在销售环境中的日常使用，以及这如何影响员工的管理方法。论文结构如下：第1节简要介绍；第 2 节概述了创新设计虚构方法；第 3 部分探讨了工作场所 IT 的更广泛转变；第 4 节提供了一些探讨人工智能在工作场所出现的法律分析；第 5 节介绍了研究数据的主题。后一部分讨论了情感计算系统的功能和准确性及其对监视、人类代理和工人/管理层互动的影响。 本文探讨英国公众对AI驱动的工作场所监控中情感计算技术的看法，通过设计虚构方法分析其优势与劣势。 Lachlan Urquhart,Alex Laffer,Diana Miranda cs.HC,cs.CY

title: LabVIEW is faster and C is economical interfacing tool for UCT automation
title_zh: LabVIEW 速度更快，C 是 UCT 自动化的经济型接口工具
abstract: An in-house developed 2D ultrasound computerized Tomography system is fully automated. Performance analysis of instrument and software interfacing soft tools, namely the LabVIEW, MATLAB, C, and Python, is presented. The instrument interfacing algorithms, hardware control algorithms, signal processing, and analysis codes are written using above mentioned soft tool platforms. Total of eight performance indices are used to compare the ease of (a) realtime control of electromechanical assembly, (b) sensors, instruments integration, (c) synchronized data acquisition, and (d) simultaneous raw data processing. It is found that C utilizes the least processing power and performs a lower number of processes to perform the same task. In runtime analysis (data acquisition and realtime control), LabVIEW performs best, taking 365.69s in comparison to MATLAB (623.83s), Python ( 1505.54s), and C (1252.03s) to complete the experiment. Python performs better in establishing faster interfacing and minimum RAM usage. LabVIEW is recommended for its fast process execution. C is recommended for the most economical implementation. Python is recommended for complex system automation having a very large number of components involved. This article provides a methodology to select optimal soft tools for instrument automation-related aspects.
summary: An in-house developed 2D ultrasound computerized Tomography system is fully automated. Performance analysis of instrument and software interfacing soft tools, namely the LabVIEW, MATLAB, C, and Python, is presented. The instrument interfacing algorithms, hardware control algorithms, signal processing, and analysis codes are written using above mentioned soft tool platforms. Total of eight performance indices are used to compare the ease of (a) realtime control of electromechanical assembly, (b) sensors, instruments integration, (c) synchronized data acquisition, and (d) simultaneous raw data processing. It is found that C utilizes the least processing power and performs a lower number of processes to perform the same task. In runtime analysis (data acquisition and realtime control), LabVIEW performs best, taking 365.69s in comparison to MATLAB (623.83s), Python ( 1505.54s), and C (1252.03s) to complete the experiment. Python performs better in establishing faster interfacing and minimum RAM usage. LabVIEW is recommended for its fast process execution. C is recommended for the most economical implementation. Python is recommended for complex system automation having a very large number of components involved. This article provides a methodology to select optimal soft tools for instrument automation-related aspects.
abstract_zh: 内部开发的二维超声计算机断层扫描系统是完全自动化的。介绍了仪器和软件接口软件工具（即 LabVIEW、MATLAB、C 和 Python）的性能分析。仪器接口算法、硬件控制算法、信号处理和分析代码都是使用上述软工具平台编写的。总共使用八个性能指标来比较（a）机电组件的实时控制，（b）传感器、仪器集成，（c）同​​步数据采集和（d）同步原始数据处理的难易程度。结果发现，C 使用最少的处理能力并执行较少数量的进程来执行相同的任务。在运行时分析（数据采集和实时控制）中，LabVIEW 表现最好，与 MATLAB（623.83s）、Python（1505.54s）和 C（1252.03s）相比，花了 365.69s 完成实验。 Python 在建立更快的接口和最小的 RAM 使用方面表现更好。推荐使用 LabVIEW，因为它可以快速执行流程。建议使用 C 以获得最经济的实施方式。建议将 Python 用于涉及大量组件的复杂系统自动化。本文提供了一种为仪器自动化相关方面选择最佳软件工具的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了LabVIEW、MATLAB、C和Python在超声计算机断层扫描系统自动化中的性能，以确定最佳软件工具。
AI.motivation: 选择适合实时控制、传感器集成和数据处理的软件工具对自动化系统至关重要，需评估不同工具的效率和经济性。
AI.method: 通过八个性能指标（实时控制、传感器集成、同步数据采集等）对比四种工具的运行时间、资源消耗和实现复杂度。
AI.result: LabVIEW在运行时间最短（365.69秒），C语言最省资源，Python接口建立最快且内存占用低，MATLAB表现最差。
AI.conclusion: LabVIEW适合快速执行，C适合经济实现，Python适合复杂系统，需根据具体需求选择工具。

authors_text: Daniel Rotman,Ophir Azulai,Inbar Shapira,Yevgeny Burshtein,Udi Barzelay
title: Detection Masking for Improved OCR on Noisy Documents
title_zh: 用于改进噪声文档 OCR 的检测屏蔽
abstract: Optical Character Recognition (OCR), the task of extracting textual information from scanned documents is a vital and broadly used technology for digitizing and indexing physical documents. Existing technologies perform well for clean documents, but when the document is visually degraded, or when there are non-textual elements, OCR quality can be greatly impacted, specifically due to erroneous detections. In this paper we present an improved detection network with a masking system to improve the quality of OCR performed on documents. By filtering non-textual elements from the image we can utilize document-level OCR to incorporate contextual information to improve OCR results. We perform a unified evaluation on a publicly available dataset demonstrating the usefulness and broad applicability of our method. Additionally, we present and make publicly available our synthetic dataset with a unique hard-negative component specifically tuned to improve detection results, and evaluate the benefits that can be gained from its usage
summary: Optical Character Recognition (OCR), the task of extracting textual information from scanned documents is a vital and broadly used technology for digitizing and indexing physical documents. Existing technologies perform well for clean documents, but when the document is visually degraded, or when there are non-textual elements, OCR quality can be greatly impacted, specifically due to erroneous detections. In this paper we present an improved detection network with a masking system to improve the quality of OCR performed on documents. By filtering non-textual elements from the image we can utilize document-level OCR to incorporate contextual information to improve OCR results. We perform a unified evaluation on a publicly available dataset demonstrating the usefulness and broad applicability of our method. Additionally, we present and make publicly available our synthetic dataset with a unique hard-negative component specifically tuned to improve detection results, and evaluate the benefits that can be gained from its usage
abstract_zh: 光学字符识别 (OCR) 是从扫描文档中提取文本信息的任务，是用于数字化和索引物理文档的重要且广泛使用的技术。现有技术对于干净的文档表现良好，但当文档在视觉上退化或存在非文本元素时，OCR 质量可能会受到很大影响，特别是由于错误检测。在本文中，我们提出了一种带有屏蔽系统的改进检测网络，以提高文档 OCR 的质量。通过过滤图像中的非文本元素，我们可以利用文档级 OCR 来合并上下文信息，以改进 OCR 结果。我们对公开可用的数据集进行统一评估，证明我们的方法的有用性和广泛的适用性。此外，我们还展示并公开了我们的合成数据集，其中包含专门调整的独特的硬阴性组件，以改善检测结果，并评估从其使用中可以获得的好处

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的OCR方法，通过检测掩码技术过滤噪声文档中的非文本元素以提升识别质量。
AI.motivation: 现有OCR技术在处理视觉退化或含非文本元素的文档时效果显著下降，需解决错误检测导致的识别问题。
AI.method: 设计带掩码系统的检测网络过滤非文本元素，结合文档级OCR利用上下文信息，并构建含硬负样本的合成数据集进行训练评估。
AI.result: 在公开数据集验证中方法有效性得到证明，合成数据集的使用显著提升了检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 检测掩码技术有效改善噪声文档OCR效果，合成数据集为检测优化提供了重要支持。

authors_text: Saber Salehkaleybar,Sadegh Khorasani,Negar Kiyavash,Niao He,Patrick Thiran
title: Momentum-Based Policy Gradient with Second-Order Information
title_zh: 具有二阶信息的基于动量的策略梯度
abstract: Variance-reduced gradient estimators for policy gradient methods have been one of the main focus of research in the reinforcement learning in recent years as they allow acceleration of the estimation process. We propose a variance-reduced policy-gradient method, called SHARP, which incorporates second-order information into stochastic gradient descent (SGD) using momentum with a time-varying learning rate. SHARP algorithm is parameter-free, achieving $ε$-approximate first-order stationary point with $O(ε^{-3})$ number of trajectories, while using a batch size of $O(1)$ at each iteration. Unlike most previous work, our proposed algorithm does not require importance sampling which can compromise the advantage of variance reduction process. Moreover, the variance of estimation error decays with the fast rate of $O(1/t^{2/3})$ where $t$ is the number of iterations. Our extensive experimental evaluations show the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm on various control tasks and its advantage over the state of the art in practice.
summary: Variance-reduced gradient estimators for policy gradient methods have been one of the main focus of research in the reinforcement learning in recent years as they allow acceleration of the estimation process. We propose a variance-reduced policy-gradient method, called SHARP, which incorporates second-order information into stochastic gradient descent (SGD) using momentum with a time-varying learning rate. SHARP algorithm is parameter-free, achieving $ε$-approximate first-order stationary point with $O(ε^{-3})$ number of trajectories, while using a batch size of $O(1)$ at each iteration. Unlike most previous work, our proposed algorithm does not require importance sampling which can compromise the advantage of variance reduction process. Moreover, the variance of estimation error decays with the fast rate of $O(1/t^{2/3})$ where $t$ is the number of iterations. Our extensive experimental evaluations show the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm on various control tasks and its advantage over the state of the art in practice.
abstract_zh: 策略梯度方法的方差减少梯度估计器近年来一直是强化学习研究的主要焦点之一，因为它们可以加速估计过程。我们提出了一种称为 SHARP 的方差减少策略梯度方法，该方法使用具有时变学习率的动量将二阶信息合并到随机梯度下降（SGD）中。 SHARP 算法是无参数的，通过 $O(ε^{-3})$ 数量的轨迹实现 $ε$ 近似一阶驻点，同时在每次迭代时使用 $O(1)$ 的批量大小。与大多数以前的工作不同，我们提出的算法不需要重要性采样，这可能会损害方差减少过程的优势。此外，估计误差的方差以 $O(1/t^{2/3})$ 的速度衰减，其中 $t$ 是迭代次数。我们广泛的实验评估表明了所提出的算法在各种控制任务上的有效性及其在实践中相对于现有技术的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合动量和二阶信息的策略梯度方法SHARP，用于加速强化学习中的策略优化过程。
AI.motivation: 现有策略梯度方法的方差较大，且依赖重要性抽样可能影响方差缩减效果，需设计更高效的优化算法。
AI.method: 通过引入动量机制和时变学习率，在随机梯度下降中融合二阶信息，无需重要性抽样即可实现方差缩减。
AI.result: 实验表明SHARP在多个控制任务中优于现有方法，理论分析显示其样本复杂度为O(ε⁻³)，估计误差方差以O(1/t²/³)速度衰减。
AI.conclusion: SHARP算法在理论保证和实践效果上均优于现有方法，为无参数的高效策略优化提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合动量和二阶信息的策略梯度方法SHARP，用于加速强化学习中的策略优化过程。

search_text: Momentum-Based Policy Gradient with Second-Order Information 具有二阶信息的基于动量的策略梯度 Variance-reduced gradient estimators for policy gradient methods have been one of the main focus of research in the reinforcement learning in recent years as they allow acceleration of the estimation process. We propose a variance-reduced policy-gradient method, called SHARP, which incorporates second-order information into stochastic gradient descent (SGD) using momentum with a time-varying learning rate. SHARP algorithm is parameter-free, achieving $ε$-approximate first-order stationary point with $O(ε^{-3})$ number of trajectories, while using a batch size of $O(1)$ at each iteration. Unlike most previous work, our proposed algorithm does not require importance sampling which can compromise the advantage of variance reduction process. Moreover, the variance of estimation error decays with the fast rate of $O(1/t^{2/3})$ where $t$ is the number of iterations. Our extensive experimental evaluations show the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm on various control tasks and its advantage over the state of the art in practice. 策略梯度方法的方差减少梯度估计器近年来一直是强化学习研究的主要焦点之一，因为它们可以加速估计过程。我们提出了一种称为 SHARP 的方差减少策略梯度方法，该方法使用具有时变学习率的动量将二阶信息合并到随机梯度下降（SGD）中。 SHARP 算法是无参数的，通过 $O(ε^{-3})$ 数量的轨迹实现 $ε$ 近似一阶驻点，同时在每次迭代时使用 $O(1)$ 的批量大小。与大多数以前的工作不同，我们提出的算法不需要重要性采样，这可能会损害方差减少过程的优势。此外，估计误差的方差以 $O(1/t^{2/3})$ 的速度衰减，其中 $t$ 是迭代次数。我们广泛的实验评估表明了所提出的算法在各种控制任务上的有效性及其在实践中相对于现有技术的优势。 本文提出了一种结合动量和二阶信息的策略梯度方法SHARP，用于加速强化学习中的策略优化过程。 Saber Salehkaleybar,Sadegh Khorasani,Negar Kiyavash,Niao He,Patrick Thiran cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Daniel Rotman,Yevgeny Yaroker,Elad Amrani,Udi Barzelay,Rami Ben-Ari
title: Learnable Optimal Sequential Grouping for Video Scene Detection
title_zh: 用于视频场景检测的可学习最优顺序分组
comment: ef:In Proceedings of the 28th ACM International Conference on Multimedia, pp. 1958-1966. 2020
comments: ef:In Proceedings of the 28th ACM International Conference on Multimedia, pp. 1958-1966. 2020
abstract: Video scene detection is the task of dividing videos into temporal semantic chapters. This is an important preliminary step before attempting to analyze heterogeneous video content. Recently, Optimal Sequential Grouping (OSG) was proposed as a powerful unsupervised solution to solve a formulation of the video scene detection problem. In this work, we extend the capabilities of OSG to the learning regime. By giving the capability to both learn from examples and leverage a robust optimization formulation, we can boost performance and enhance the versatility of the technology. We present a comprehensive analysis of incorporating OSG into deep learning neural networks under various configurations. These configurations include learning an embedding in a straight-forward manner, a tailored loss designed to guide the solution of OSG, and an integrated model where the learning is performed through the OSG pipeline. With thorough evaluation and analysis, we assess the benefits and behavior of the various configurations, and show that our learnable OSG approach exhibits desirable behavior and enhanced performance compared to the state of the art.
summary: Video scene detection is the task of dividing videos into temporal semantic chapters. This is an important preliminary step before attempting to analyze heterogeneous video content. Recently, Optimal Sequential Grouping (OSG) was proposed as a powerful unsupervised solution to solve a formulation of the video scene detection problem. In this work, we extend the capabilities of OSG to the learning regime. By giving the capability to both learn from examples and leverage a robust optimization formulation, we can boost performance and enhance the versatility of the technology. We present a comprehensive analysis of incorporating OSG into deep learning neural networks under various configurations. These configurations include learning an embedding in a straight-forward manner, a tailored loss designed to guide the solution of OSG, and an integrated model where the learning is performed through the OSG pipeline. With thorough evaluation and analysis, we assess the benefits and behavior of the various configurations, and show that our learnable OSG approach exhibits desirable behavior and enhanced performance compared to the state of the art.
abstract_zh: 视频场景检测是将视频划分为时间语义章节的任务。这是尝试分析异构视频内容之前重要的预备步骤。最近，最优顺序分组（OSG）被提出作为一种强大的无监督解决方案来解决视频场景检测问题的表述。在这项工作中，我们将 OSG 的功能扩展到学习机制。通过提供从示例中学习并利用强大的优化公式的能力，我们可以提高性能并增强技术的多功能性。我们对各种配置下将 OSG 融入深度学习神经网络进行了全面分析。这些配置包括以直接的方式学习嵌入、旨在指导 OSG 解决方案的定制损失，以及通过 OSG 管道执行学习的集成模型。通过彻底的评估和分析，我们评估了各种配置的好处和行为，并表明我们的可学习 OSG 方法与现有技术相比表现出理想的行为和增强的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可学习的最优序列分组方法，用于视频场景检测，旨在将视频分割为具有时间语义的章节。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如OSG虽有效，但缺乏学习能力，限制了其性能和适用性，需结合深度学习提升效果。
AI.method: 通过将OSG纳入深度学习框架，采用嵌入学习、定制损失函数及集成模型，结合学习与优化方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个指标上优于现有技术，表现出更好的性能和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 可学习的OSG方法有效结合了深度学习和优化，提升了视频场景检测的性能和通用性，为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Joao Monteiro,Mohamed Osama Ahmed,Hossein Hajimirsadeghi,Greg Mori
title: Monotonicity Regularization: Improved Penalties and Novel Applications to Disentangled Representation Learning and Robust Classification
title_zh: 单调性正则化：改进的惩罚和解纠缠表示学习和鲁棒分类的新颖应用
abstract: We study settings where gradient penalties are used alongside risk minimization with the goal of obtaining predictors satisfying different notions of monotonicity. Specifically, we present two sets of contributions. In the first part of the paper, we show that different choices of penalties define the regions of the input space where the property is observed. As such, previous methods result in models that are monotonic only in a small volume of the input space. We thus propose an approach that uses mixtures of training instances and random points to populate the space and enforce the penalty in a much larger region. As a second set of contributions, we introduce regularization strategies that enforce other notions of monotonicity in different settings. In this case, we consider applications, such as image classification and generative modeling, where monotonicity is not a hard constraint but can help improve some aspects of the model. Namely, we show that inducing monotonicity can be beneficial in applications such as: (1) allowing for controllable data generation, (2) defining strategies to detect anomalous data, and (3) generating explanations for predictions. Our proposed approaches do not introduce relevant computational overhead while leading to efficient procedures that provide extra benefits over baseline models.
summary: We study settings where gradient penalties are used alongside risk minimization with the goal of obtaining predictors satisfying different notions of monotonicity. Specifically, we present two sets of contributions. In the first part of the paper, we show that different choices of penalties define the regions of the input space where the property is observed. As such, previous methods result in models that are monotonic only in a small volume of the input space. We thus propose an approach that uses mixtures of training instances and random points to populate the space and enforce the penalty in a much larger region. As a second set of contributions, we introduce regularization strategies that enforce other notions of monotonicity in different settings. In this case, we consider applications, such as image classification and generative modeling, where monotonicity is not a hard constraint but can help improve some aspects of the model. Namely, we show that inducing monotonicity can be beneficial in applications such as: (1) allowing for controllable data generation, (2) defining strategies to detect anomalous data, and (3) generating explanations for predictions. Our proposed approaches do not introduce relevant computational overhead while leading to efficient procedures that provide extra benefits over baseline models.
abstract_zh: 我们研究使用梯度惩罚和风险最小化的设置，目的是获得满足不同单调性概念的预测变量。具体来说，我们提出了两组贡献。在本文的第一部分中，我们展示了不同的惩罚选择定义了观察到属性的输入空间区域。因此，以前的方法导致模型仅在小体积的输入空间中是单调的。因此，我们提出了一种方法，使用训练实例和随机点的混合来填充空间并在更大的区域中执行惩罚。作为第二组贡献，我们引入了正则化策略，该策略在不同的设置中强制执行其他单调性概念。在这种情况下，我们考虑图像分类和生成建模等应用，其中单调性不是硬约束，但可以帮助改进模型的某些方面。也就是说，我们表明，引入单调性在以下应用中可能是有益的：（1）允许可控数据生成，（2）定义检测异常数据的策略，以及（3）生成预测解释。我们提出的方法不会引入相关的计算开销，同时导致高效的过程，比基线模型提供额外的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在风险最小化中结合梯度惩罚以获得满足不同单调性要求的预测器，并提出了改进的惩罚方法及新型应用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅在输入空间的小区域实现单调性，且单调性在某些场景下可作为软约束提升模型表现，需扩展其应用范围。
AI.method: 提出混合训练实例与随机点的策略以扩大单调性约束区域，并设计针对图像分类等任务的新型正则化策略。
AI.result: 方法计算开销低，有效提升可控数据生成、异常检测及模型解释性，优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 改进的单调性正则化方法在解耦表示学习和鲁棒分类中具有广泛适用性与实际价值。

authors_text: Liu Li,Qiang Ma,Matthew Sinclair,Antonios Makropoulos,Joseph Hajnal,A. David Edwards,Bernhard Kainz,Daniel Rueckert,Amir Alansary
title: CAS-Net: Conditional Atlas Generation and Brain Segmentation for Fetal MRI
title_zh: CAS-Net：胎儿 MRI 的条件图谱生成和脑分割
abstract: Fetal Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is used in prenatal diagnosis and to assess early brain development. Accurate segmentation of the different brain tissues is a vital step in several brain analysis tasks, such as cortical surface reconstruction and tissue thickness measurements. Fetal MRI scans, however, are prone to motion artifacts that can affect the correctness of both manual and automatic segmentation techniques. In this paper, we propose a novel network structure that can simultaneously generate conditional atlases and predict brain tissue segmentation, called CAS-Net. The conditional atlases provide anatomical priors that can constrain the segmentation connectivity, despite the heterogeneity of intensity values caused by motion or partial volume effects. The proposed method is trained and evaluated on 253 subjects from the developing Human Connectome Project (dHCP). The results demonstrate that the proposed method can generate conditional age-specific atlas with sharp boundary and shape variance. It also segment multi-category brain tissues for fetal MRI with a high overall Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) of $85.2\%$ for the selected 9 tissue labels.
summary: Fetal Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is used in prenatal diagnosis and to assess early brain development. Accurate segmentation of the different brain tissues is a vital step in several brain analysis tasks, such as cortical surface reconstruction and tissue thickness measurements. Fetal MRI scans, however, are prone to motion artifacts that can affect the correctness of both manual and automatic segmentation techniques. In this paper, we propose a novel network structure that can simultaneously generate conditional atlases and predict brain tissue segmentation, called CAS-Net. The conditional atlases provide anatomical priors that can constrain the segmentation connectivity, despite the heterogeneity of intensity values caused by motion or partial volume effects. The proposed method is trained and evaluated on 253 subjects from the developing Human Connectome Project (dHCP). The results demonstrate that the proposed method can generate conditional age-specific atlas with sharp boundary and shape variance. It also segment multi-category brain tissues for fetal MRI with a high overall Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) of $85.2\%$ for the selected 9 tissue labels.
abstract_zh: 胎儿磁共振成像 (MRI) 用于产前诊断和评估早期大脑发育。不同脑组织的准确分割是皮质表面重建和组织厚度测量等多项大脑分析任务的重要步骤。然而，胎儿 MRI 扫描很容易出现运动伪影，从而影响手动和自动分割技术的正确性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的网络结构，可以同时生成条件图集并预测脑组织分割，称为 CAS-Net。尽管运动或部分体积效应导致强度值存在异质性，但条件图集提供了可以约束分割连接性的解剖先验。所提出的方法在来自正在开发的人类连接组项目 (dHCP) 的 253 名受试者上进行了训练和评估。结果表明，所提出的方法可以生成具有清晰边界和形状方差的条件特定年龄图集。它还对胎儿 MRI 的多类别脑组织进行分割，所选 9 个组织标签的总体 Dice 相似系数 (DSC) 高达 85.2\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CAS-Net的新网络结构，用于生成条件性脑图谱并分割胎儿MRI中的多类别脑组织。
AI.motivation: 胎儿MRI受运动伪影影响严重，导致手动和自动分割技术准确性下降，亟需一种能利用解剖先验信息提升分割鲁棒性的方法。
AI.method: 设计CAS-Net网络同时生成条件性图谱和预测分割结果，利用图谱提供的解剖先验约束分割连通性，缓解运动伪影和部分容积效应引起的强度值异质性问题。
AI.result: 在253例dHCP数据集上实现9类脑组织分割Dice相似系数达85.2%，生成的年龄特异性图谱具有清晰边界和形状可变性。
AI.conclusion: CAS-Net通过联合生成条件图谱与分割，有效提升了胎儿MRI脑组织分割精度，为产前诊断和脑发育研究提供了可靠工具。

title: Delaytron: Efficient Learning of Multiclass Classifiers with Delayed Bandit Feedbacks
title_zh: Delaytron：具有延迟 Bandit 反馈的多类分类器的高效学习
abstract: In this paper, we present online algorithm called {\it Delaytron} for learning multi class classifiers using delayed bandit feedbacks. The sequence of feedback delays $\{d_t\}_{t=1}^T$ is unknown to the algorithm. At the $t$-th round, the algorithm observes an example $\mathbf{x}_t$ and predicts a label $\tilde{y}_t$ and receives the bandit feedback $\mathbb{I}[\tilde{y}_t=y_t]$ only $d_t$ rounds later. When $t+d_t>T$, we consider that the feedback for the $t$-th round is missing. We show that the proposed algorithm achieves regret of $\mathcal{O}\left(\sqrt{\frac{2 K}γ\left[\frac{T}{2}+\left(2+\frac{L^2}{R^2\Vert \W\Vert_F^2}\right)\sum_{t=1}^Td_t\right]}\right)$ when the loss for each missing sample is upper bounded by $L$. In the case when the loss for missing samples is not upper bounded, the regret achieved by Delaytron is $\mathcal{O}\left(\sqrt{\frac{2 K}γ\left[\frac{T}{2}+2\sum_{t=1}^Td_t+\vert \mathcal{M}\vert T\right]}\right)$ where $\mathcal{M}$ is the set of missing samples in $T$ rounds. These bounds were achieved with a constant step size which requires the knowledge of $T$ and $\sum_{t=1}^Td_t$. For the case when $T$ and $\sum_{t=1}^Td_t$ are unknown, we use a doubling trick for online learning and proposed Adaptive Delaytron. We show that Adaptive Delaytron achieves a regret bound of $\mathcal{O}\left(\sqrt{T+\sum_{t=1}^Td_t}\right)$. We show the effectiveness of our approach by experimenting on various datasets and comparing with state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: In this paper, we present online algorithm called {\it Delaytron} for learning multi class classifiers using delayed bandit feedbacks. The sequence of feedback delays $\{d_t\}_{t=1}^T$ is unknown to the algorithm. At the $t$-th round, the algorithm observes an example $\mathbf{x}_t$ and predicts a label $\tilde{y}_t$ and receives the bandit feedback $\mathbb{I}[\tilde{y}_t=y_t]$ only $d_t$ rounds later. When $t+d_t>T$, we consider that the feedback for the $t$-th round is missing. We show that the proposed algorithm achieves regret of $\mathcal{O}\left(\sqrt{\frac{2 K}γ\left[\frac{T}{2}+\left(2+\frac{L^2}{R^2\Vert \W\Vert_F^2}\right)\sum_{t=1}^Td_t\right]}\right)$ when the loss for each missing sample is upper bounded by $L$. In the case when the loss for missing samples is not upper bounded, the regret achieved by Delaytron is $\mathcal{O}\left(\sqrt{\frac{2 K}γ\left[\frac{T}{2}+2\sum_{t=1}^Td_t+\vert \mathcal{M}\vert T\right]}\right)$ where $\mathcal{M}$ is the set of missing samples in $T$ rounds. These bounds were achieved with a constant step size which requires the knowledge of $T$ and $\sum_{t=1}^Td_t$. For the case when $T$ and $\sum_{t=1}^Td_t$ are unknown, we use a doubling trick for online learning and proposed Adaptive Delaytron. We show that Adaptive Delaytron achieves a regret bound of $\mathcal{O}\left(\sqrt{T+\sum_{t=1}^Td_t}\right)$. We show the effectiveness of our approach by experimenting on various datasets and comparing with state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了名为 {\it Delaytron} 的在线算法，用于使用延迟老虎机反馈来学习多类分类器。反馈延迟的顺序 $\{d_t\}_{t=1}^T$ 对于算法来说是未知的。在第 $t$ 轮，算法观察示例 $\mathbf{x}_t$ 并预测标签 $\tilde{y}_t$，并仅在 $d_t$ 轮后接收老虎机反馈 $\mathbb{I}[\tilde{y}_t=y_t]$。当$t+d_t>T$时，我们认为第$t$轮的反馈缺失。我们表明，当每个缺失样本的损失上限为 $L$ 时，所提出的算法实现了 $\mathcal{O}\left(\sqrt{\frac{2 K}γ\left[\frac{T}{2}+\left(2+\frac{L^2}{R^2\Vert \W\Vert_F^2}\right)\sum_{t=1}^Td_t\right]}\right)$ 的遗憾。当缺失样本的损失不上界时，Delaytron 实现的遗憾为 $\mathcal{O}\left(\sqrt{\frac{2 K}γ\left[\frac{T}{2}+2\sum_{t=1}^Td_t+\vert \mathcal{M}\vert T\right]}\right)$，其中 $\mathcal{M}$ 是 $T$ 轮中缺失样本的集合。这些界限是通过恒定步长实现的，这需要了解 $T$ 和 $\sum_{t=1}^Td_t$。对于$T$和$\sum_{t=1}^Td_t$未知的情况，我们使用加倍技巧进行在线学习并提出自适应延迟器。我们证明自适应延迟器达到了 $\mathcal{O}\left(\sqrt{T+\sum_{t=1}^Td_t}\right)$ 的遗憾界限。我们通过对各种数据集进行实验并与最先进的方法进行比较来展示我们的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Delaytron的在线算法，用于在延迟的带反馈下高效学习多类分类器。
AI.motivation: 在实际应用中，反馈延迟和缺失是常见问题，传统方法难以有效处理此类场景下的多类分类任务。
AI.method: 设计了Delaytron算法，采用固定步长并结合延迟信息的处理机制，同时提出自适应版本Adaptive Delaytron以应对未知参数。
AI.result: 理论分析显示，Delaytron在不同缺失反馈场景下均取得亚线性遗憾界，并通过实验验证了其优于现有方法的效果。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决了延迟带反馈下的多类分类问题，且自适应版本能处理未知参数，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Zhicheng Yang,Jinghui Qin,Jiaqi Chen,Liang Lin,Xiaodan Liang
title: LogicSolver: Towards Interpretable Math Word Problem Solving with Logical Prompt-enhanced Learning
title_zh: LogicSolver：通过逻辑提示增强学习解决可解释的数学应用问题
abstract: Recently, deep learning models have made great progress in MWP solving on answer accuracy. However, they are uninterpretable since they mainly rely on shallow heuristics to achieve high performance without understanding and reasoning the grounded math logic. To address this issue and make a step towards interpretable MWP solving, we first construct a high-quality MWP dataset named InterMWP which consists of 11,495 MWPs and annotates interpretable logical formulas based on algebraic knowledge as the grounded linguistic logic of each solution equation. Different from existing MWP datasets, our InterMWP benchmark asks for a solver to not only output the solution expressions but also predict the corresponding logical formulas. We further propose a novel approach with logical prompt and interpretation generation, called LogicSolver. For each MWP, our LogicSolver first retrieves some highly-correlated algebraic knowledge and then passes them to the backbone model as prompts to improve the semantic representations of MWPs. With these improved semantic representations, our LogicSolver generates corresponding solution expressions and interpretable knowledge formulas in accord with the generated solution expressions, simultaneously. Experimental results show that our LogicSolver has stronger logical formula-based interpretability than baselines while achieving higher answer accuracy with the help of logical prompts, simultaneously. The source code and dataset is available at https://github.com/yangzhch6/InterMWP.
summary: Recently, deep learning models have made great progress in MWP solving on answer accuracy. However, they are uninterpretable since they mainly rely on shallow heuristics to achieve high performance without understanding and reasoning the grounded math logic. To address this issue and make a step towards interpretable MWP solving, we first construct a high-quality MWP dataset named InterMWP which consists of 11,495 MWPs and annotates interpretable logical formulas based on algebraic knowledge as the grounded linguistic logic of each solution equation. Different from existing MWP datasets, our InterMWP benchmark asks for a solver to not only output the solution expressions but also predict the corresponding logical formulas. We further propose a novel approach with logical prompt and interpretation generation, called LogicSolver. For each MWP, our LogicSolver first retrieves some highly-correlated algebraic knowledge and then passes them to the backbone model as prompts to improve the semantic representations of MWPs. With these improved semantic representations, our LogicSolver generates corresponding solution expressions and interpretable knowledge formulas in accord with the generated solution expressions, simultaneously. Experimental results show that our LogicSolver has stronger logical formula-based interpretability than baselines while achieving higher answer accuracy with the help of logical prompts, simultaneously. The source code and dataset is available at https://github.com/yangzhch6/InterMWP.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度学习模型在 MWP 解决答案准确性方面取得了长足进步。然而，它们是不可解释的，因为它们主要依靠浅层启发法来实现高性能，而不理解和推理基础的数学逻辑。为了解决这个问题并向可解释的 MWP 求解迈出一步，我们首先构建了一个名为 InterMWP 的高质量 MWP 数据集，该数据集由 11,495 个 MWP 组成，并注释基于代数知识的可解释逻辑公式作为每个解方程的基础语言逻辑。与现有的 MWP 数据集不同，我们的 InterMWP 基准测试要求求解器不仅要输出解表达式，还要预测相应的逻辑公式。我们进一步提出了一种具有逻辑提示和解释生成的新颖方法，称为 LogicSolver。对于每个 MWP，我们的 LogicSolver 首先检索一些高度相关的代数知识，然后将它们传递到骨干模型作为提示，以改进 MWP 的语义表示。通过这些改进的语义表示，我们的 LogicSolver 可以同时生成相应的解表达式，并根据生成的解表达式同时生成可解释的知识公式。实验结果表明，我们的 LogicSolver 具有比基线更强的基于逻辑公式的可解释性，同时在逻辑提示的帮助下实现了更高的答案准确性。源代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/yangzhch6/InterMWP 获取。

AI.tldr: 开发可解释的数学应用题求解系统LogicSolver，通过逻辑提示增强学习提升准确率与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型虽在数学应用题求解准确率上表现优异，但缺乏对数学逻辑的可解释性与理解能力。
AI.method: 构建包含11,495题的InterMWP数据集并标注逻辑公式，提出结合逻辑提示与解释生成的LogicSolver方法，利用代数知识增强语义表示。
AI.result: LogicSolver在逻辑公式解释性上优于基线模型，同时借助逻辑提示提升了解题准确率。
AI.conclusion: LogicSolver通过逻辑提示与解释生成有效平衡了数学应用题求解的准确性与可解释性，为该领域提供新方向。

search_text: LogicSolver: Towards Interpretable Math Word Problem Solving with Logical Prompt-enhanced Learning LogicSolver：通过逻辑提示增强学习解决可解释的数学应用问题 Recently, deep learning models have made great progress in MWP solving on answer accuracy. However, they are uninterpretable since they mainly rely on shallow heuristics to achieve high performance without understanding and reasoning the grounded math logic. To address this issue and make a step towards interpretable MWP solving, we first construct a high-quality MWP dataset named InterMWP which consists of 11,495 MWPs and annotates interpretable logical formulas based on algebraic knowledge as the grounded linguistic logic of each solution equation. Different from existing MWP datasets, our InterMWP benchmark asks for a solver to not only output the solution expressions but also predict the corresponding logical formulas. We further propose a novel approach with logical prompt and interpretation generation, called LogicSolver. For each MWP, our LogicSolver first retrieves some highly-correlated algebraic knowledge and then passes them to the backbone model as prompts to improve the semantic representations of MWPs. With these improved semantic representations, our LogicSolver generates corresponding solution expressions and interpretable knowledge formulas in accord with the generated solution expressions, simultaneously. Experimental results show that our LogicSolver has stronger logical formula-based interpretability than baselines while achieving higher answer accuracy with the help of logical prompts, simultaneously. The source code and dataset is available at https://github.com/yangzhch6/InterMWP. 最近，深度学习模型在 MWP 解决答案准确性方面取得了长足进步。然而，它们是不可解释的，因为它们主要依靠浅层启发法来实现高性能，而不理解和推理基础的数学逻辑。为了解决这个问题并向可解释的 MWP 求解迈出一步，我们首先构建了一个名为 InterMWP 的高质量 MWP 数据集，该数据集由 11,495 个 MWP 组成，并注释基于代数知识的可解释逻辑公式作为每个解方程的基础语言逻辑。与现有的 MWP 数据集不同，我们的 InterMWP 基准测试要求求解器不仅要输出解表达式，还要预测相应的逻辑公式。我们进一步提出了一种具有逻辑提示和解释生成的新颖方法，称为 LogicSolver。对于每个 MWP，我们的 LogicSolver 首先检索一些高度相关的代数知识，然后将它们传递到骨干模型作为提示，以改进 MWP 的语义表示。通过这些改进的语义表示，我们的 LogicSolver 可以同时生成相应的解表达式，并根据生成的解表达式同时生成可解释的知识公式。实验结果表明，我们的 LogicSolver 具有比基线更强的基于逻辑公式的可解释性，同时在逻辑提示的帮助下实现了更高的答案准确性。源代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/yangzhch6/InterMWP 获取。 开发可解释的数学应用题求解系统LogicSolver，通过逻辑提示增强学习提升准确率与可解释性。 Zhicheng Yang,Jinghui Qin,Jiaqi Chen,Liang Lin,Xiaodan Liang cs.AI,cs.CL

title: Towards Robotic Laboratory Automation Plug & Play: Survey and Concept Proposal on Teaching-free Robot Integration with the LAPP Digital Twin
title_zh: 迈向机器人实验室自动化即插即用：免教学机器人与缆普数字孪生集成的调查和概念提案
abstract: The Laboratory Automation Plug & Play (LAPP) framework is an over-arching reference architecture concept for the integration of robots in life science laboratories. The plug & play nature lies in the fact that manual configuration is not required, including the teaching of the robots. In this paper a digital twin (DT) based concept is proposed that outlines the types of information that have to be provided for each relevant component of the system. In particular, for the devices interfacing with the robot, the robot positions have to be defined beforehand in a device-attached coordinate system (CS) by the vendor. This CS has to be detectable by the vision system of the robot by means of optical markers placed on the front side of the device. With that, the robot is capable of tending the machine by performing the pick-and-place type transportation of standard sample carriers. This basic use case is the primary scope of the LAPP-DT framework. The hardware scope is limited to simple benchtop and mobile manipulators with parallel grippers at this stage. This paper first provides an overview of relevant literature and state-of-the-art solutions, after which it outlines the framework on the conceptual level, followed by the specification of the relevant DT parameters for the robot, for the devices and for the facility. Finally, appropriate technologies and strategies are identified for the implementation.
summary: The Laboratory Automation Plug & Play (LAPP) framework is an over-arching reference architecture concept for the integration of robots in life science laboratories. The plug & play nature lies in the fact that manual configuration is not required, including the teaching of the robots. In this paper a digital twin (DT) based concept is proposed that outlines the types of information that have to be provided for each relevant component of the system. In particular, for the devices interfacing with the robot, the robot positions have to be defined beforehand in a device-attached coordinate system (CS) by the vendor. This CS has to be detectable by the vision system of the robot by means of optical markers placed on the front side of the device. With that, the robot is capable of tending the machine by performing the pick-and-place type transportation of standard sample carriers. This basic use case is the primary scope of the LAPP-DT framework. The hardware scope is limited to simple benchtop and mobile manipulators with parallel grippers at this stage. This paper first provides an overview of relevant literature and state-of-the-art solutions, after which it outlines the framework on the conceptual level, followed by the specification of the relevant DT parameters for the robot, for the devices and for the facility. Finally, appropriate technologies and strategies are identified for the implementation.
abstract_zh: 实验室自动化即插即用 (LAPP) 框架是生命科学实验室中机器人集成的总体参考架构概念。即插即用的本质在于不需要手动配置，包括机器人的示教。本文提出了基于数字孪生 (DT) 的概念，概述了必须为系统的每个相关组件提供的信息类型。特别是，对于与机器人连接的设备，供应商必须事先在设备附加坐标系 (CS) 中定义机器人位置。机器人的视觉系统必须通过放置在设备正面的光学标记来检测该 CS。这样，机器人就能够通过执行标准样品载体的拾放式运输来管理机器。此基本用例是 LAPP-DT 框架的主要范围。现阶段的硬件范围仅限于简单的台式和带有平行夹具的移动机械手。本文首先概述了相关文献和最先进的解决方案，然后概述了概念层面的框架，然后详细说明了机器人、设备和设施的相关 DT 参数。最后，确定适当的技术和策略以供实施。

AI.tldr: 提出基于数字孪生的LAPP-DT框架，实现生命科学实验室中无需手动配置的机器人集成。
AI.motivation: 传统实验室机器人集成依赖手动配置和教学，流程复杂且耗时，需一种无需人工干预的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 基于数字孪生框架，通过设备附带坐标系与光学标记检测，使机器人自主完成样品载体搬运任务。
AI.result: 提出LAPP-DT概念框架，明确机器人、设备及设施的数字孪生参数，识别出实现该框架的关键技术和策略。
AI.conclusion: LAPP-DT框架为实验室自动化提供即插即用解决方案，但目前硬件范围有限，需进一步研究扩展。
