authors_text: Florian Kofler,Suprosanna Shit,Ivan Ezhov,Lucas Fidon,Izabela Horvath,Rami Al-Maskari,Hongwei Li,Harsharan Bhatia,Timo Loehr,Marie Piraud,Ali Erturk,Jan Kirschke,Jan C. Peeken,Tom Vercauteren,Claus Zimmer,Benedikt Wiestler,Bjoern Menze
title: blob loss: instance imbalance aware loss functions for semantic segmentation
title_zh: blob loss：用于语义分割的实例不平衡感知损失函数
comment: 23 pages, 7 figures // corrected one mistake where it said beta instead of alpha in the text
comments: 23 pages, 7 figures // corrected one mistake where it said beta instead of alpha in the text
abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) have proven to be remarkably effective in semantic segmentation tasks. Most popular loss functions were introduced targeting improved volumetric scores, such as the Dice coefficient (DSC). By design, DSC can tackle class imbalance, however, it does not recognize instance imbalance within a class. As a result, a large foreground instance can dominate minor instances and still produce a satisfactory DSC. Nevertheless, detecting tiny instances is crucial for many applications, such as disease monitoring. For example, it is imperative to locate and surveil small-scale lesions in the follow-up of multiple sclerosis patients. We propose a novel family of loss functions, \emph{blob loss}, primarily aimed at maximizing instance-level detection metrics, such as F1 score and sensitivity. \emph{Blob loss} is designed for semantic segmentation problems where detecting multiple instances matters. We extensively evaluate a DSC-based \emph{blob loss} in five complex 3D semantic segmentation tasks featuring pronounced instance heterogeneity in terms of texture and morphology. Compared to soft Dice loss, we achieve 5% improvement for MS lesions, 3% improvement for liver tumor, and an average 2% improvement for microscopy segmentation tasks considering F1 score.
summary: Deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) have proven to be remarkably effective in semantic segmentation tasks. Most popular loss functions were introduced targeting improved volumetric scores, such as the Dice coefficient (DSC). By design, DSC can tackle class imbalance, however, it does not recognize instance imbalance within a class. As a result, a large foreground instance can dominate minor instances and still produce a satisfactory DSC. Nevertheless, detecting tiny instances is crucial for many applications, such as disease monitoring. For example, it is imperative to locate and surveil small-scale lesions in the follow-up of multiple sclerosis patients. We propose a novel family of loss functions, \emph{blob loss}, primarily aimed at maximizing instance-level detection metrics, such as F1 score and sensitivity. \emph{Blob loss} is designed for semantic segmentation problems where detecting multiple instances matters. We extensively evaluate a DSC-based \emph{blob loss} in five complex 3D semantic segmentation tasks featuring pronounced instance heterogeneity in terms of texture and morphology. Compared to soft Dice loss, we achieve 5% improvement for MS lesions, 3% improvement for liver tumor, and an average 2% improvement for microscopy segmentation tasks considering F1 score.
abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络（CNN）已被证明在语义分割任务中非常有效。最流行的损失函数是为了提高体积分数而引入的，例如 Dice 系数 (DSC)。按照设计，DSC 可以解决类不平衡问题，但是，它无法识别类内的实例不平衡问题。因此，大型前景实例可以主导小型实例，并且仍然产生令人满意的 DSC。然而，检测微小实例对于许多应用来说至关重要，例如疾病监测。例如，在多发性硬化症患者的随访中必须定位和监测小范围病变。我们提出了一系列新颖的损失函数，\emph{blob loss}，主要旨在最大化实例级检测指标，例如 F1 分数和灵敏度。 \emph{Blob loss} 专为检测多个实例很重要的语义分割问题而设计。我们在五个复杂的 3D 语义分割任务中广泛评估了基于 DSC 的 \emph{blob loss}，这些任务在纹理和形态方面具有明显的实例异质性。与 Soft Dice 损失相比，我们在 MS 病变方面实现了 5% 的改善，在肝脏肿瘤方面实现了 3% 的改善，在考虑 F1 评分的显微镜分割任务中平均改善了 2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为blob loss的新损失函数家族，旨在解决语义分割任务中实例不平衡问题，提升小实例的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有损失函数（如Dice系数）虽能处理类别不平衡，但无法识别同一类别内的实例不平衡问题，导致大实例主导小实例检测，影响医疗等关键应用中的微小病灶识别。
AI.method: 设计blob loss损失函数家族，通过优化实例级指标（如F1分数和灵敏度）来增强对多实例的检测能力，并在五种复杂3D语义分割任务中验证其有效性。
AI.result: 在MS病变检测中提升5%，肝肿瘤检测中提升3%，显微镜分割任务平均提升2%的F1分数，优于软Dice损失。
AI.conclusion: blob loss通过关注实例级不平衡，显著提升了语义分割中小目标的检测性能，为医疗影像分析等场景提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为blob loss的新损失函数家族，旨在解决语义分割任务中实例不平衡问题，提升小实例的检测性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有损失函数（如Dice系数）虽能处理类别不平衡，但无法识别同一类别内的实例不平衡问题，导致大实例主导小实例检测，影响医疗等关键应用中的微小病灶识别。
ai_content.method: 设计blob loss损失函数家族，通过优化实例级指标（如F1分数和灵敏度）来增强对多实例的检测能力，并在五种复杂3D语义分割任务中验证其有效性。
ai_content.result: 在MS病变检测中提升5%，肝肿瘤检测中提升3%，显微镜分割任务平均提升2%的F1分数，优于软Dice损失。
ai_content.conclusion: blob loss通过关注实例级不平衡，显著提升了语义分割中小目标的检测性能，为医疗影像分析等场景提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: blob loss: instance imbalance aware loss functions for semantic segmentation blob loss：用于语义分割的实例不平衡感知损失函数 Deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) have proven to be remarkably effective in semantic segmentation tasks. Most popular loss functions were introduced targeting improved volumetric scores, such as the Dice coefficient (DSC). By design, DSC can tackle class imbalance, however, it does not recognize instance imbalance within a class. As a result, a large foreground instance can dominate minor instances and still produce a satisfactory DSC. Nevertheless, detecting tiny instances is crucial for many applications, such as disease monitoring. For example, it is imperative to locate and surveil small-scale lesions in the follow-up of multiple sclerosis patients. We propose a novel family of loss functions, \emph{blob loss}, primarily aimed at maximizing instance-level detection metrics, such as F1 score and sensitivity. \emph{Blob loss} is designed for semantic segmentation problems where detecting multiple instances matters. We extensively evaluate a DSC-based \emph{blob loss} in five complex 3D semantic segmentation tasks featuring pronounced instance heterogeneity in terms of texture and morphology. Compared to soft Dice loss, we achieve 5% improvement for MS lesions, 3% improvement for liver tumor, and an average 2% improvement for microscopy segmentation tasks considering F1 score. 深度卷积神经网络（CNN）已被证明在语义分割任务中非常有效。最流行的损失函数是为了提高体积分数而引入的，例如 Dice 系数 (DSC)。按照设计，DSC 可以解决类不平衡问题，但是，它无法识别类内的实例不平衡问题。因此，大型前景实例可以主导小型实例，并且仍然产生令人满意的 DSC。然而，检测微小实例对于许多应用来说至关重要，例如疾病监测。例如，在多发性硬化症患者的随访中必须定位和监测小范围病变。我们提出了一系列新颖的损失函数，\emph{blob loss}，主要旨在最大化实例级检测指标，例如 F1 分数和灵敏度。 \emph{Blob loss} 专为检测多个实例很重要的语义分割问题而设计。我们在五个复杂的 3D 语义分割任务中广泛评估了基于 DSC 的 \emph{blob loss}，这些任务在纹理和形态方面具有明显的实例异质性。与 Soft Dice 损失相比，我们在 MS 病变方面实现了 5% 的改善，在肝脏肿瘤方面实现了 3% 的改善，在考虑 F1 评分的显微镜分割任务中平均改善了 2%。 本文提出了一种名为blob loss的新损失函数家族，旨在解决语义分割任务中实例不平衡问题，提升小实例的检测性能。 Florian Kofler,Suprosanna Shit,Ivan Ezhov,Lucas Fidon,Izabela Horvath,Rami Al-Maskari,Hongwei Li,Harsharan Bhatia,Timo Loehr,Marie Piraud,Ali Erturk,Jan Kirschke,Jan C. Peeken,Tom Vercauteren,Claus Zimmer,Benedikt Wiestler,Bjoern Menze cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: DynPL-SVO: A Robust Stereo Visual Odometry for Dynamic Scenes
title_zh: DynPL-SVO：适用于动态场景的稳健立体视觉里程计
abstract: Most feature-based stereo visual odometry (SVO) approaches estimate the motion of mobile robots by matching and tracking point features along a sequence of stereo images. However, in dynamic scenes mainly comprising moving pedestrians, vehicles, etc., there are insufficient robust static point features to enable accurate motion estimation, causing failures when reconstructing robotic motion. In this paper, we proposed DynPL-SVO, a complete dynamic SVO method that integrated united cost functions containing information between matched point features and re-projection errors perpendicular and parallel to the direction of the line features. Additionally, we introduced a \textit{dynamic} \textit{grid} algorithm to enhance its performance in dynamic scenes. The stereo camera motion was estimated through Levenberg-Marquard minimization of the re-projection errors of both point and line features. Comprehensive experimental results on KITTI and EuRoC MAV datasets showed that accuracy of the DynPL-SVO was improved by over 20\% on average compared to other state-of-the-art SVO systems, especially in dynamic scenes.
summary: Most feature-based stereo visual odometry (SVO) approaches estimate the motion of mobile robots by matching and tracking point features along a sequence of stereo images. However, in dynamic scenes mainly comprising moving pedestrians, vehicles, etc., there are insufficient robust static point features to enable accurate motion estimation, causing failures when reconstructing robotic motion. In this paper, we proposed DynPL-SVO, a complete dynamic SVO method that integrated united cost functions containing information between matched point features and re-projection errors perpendicular and parallel to the direction of the line features. Additionally, we introduced a \textit{dynamic} \textit{grid} algorithm to enhance its performance in dynamic scenes. The stereo camera motion was estimated through Levenberg-Marquard minimization of the re-projection errors of both point and line features. Comprehensive experimental results on KITTI and EuRoC MAV datasets showed that accuracy of the DynPL-SVO was improved by over 20\% on average compared to other state-of-the-art SVO systems, especially in dynamic scenes.
abstract_zh: 大多数基于特征的立体视觉里程计（SVO）方法通过沿着立体图像序列匹配和跟踪点特征来估计移动机器人的运动。然而，在主要由移动的行人、车辆等组成的动态场景中，鲁棒的静态点特征不足以实现精确的运动估计，从而导致重建机器人运动时失败。在本文中，我们提出了 DynPL-SVO，一种完整的动态 SVO 方法，它集成了包含匹配点特征和垂直和平行于线特征方向的重投影误差之间的信息的联合成本函数。此外，我们引入了 \textit{dynamic} \textit{grid} 算法来增强其在动态场景中的性能。立体相机运动是通过点和线特征的重投影误差的 Levenberg-Marquard 最小化来估计的。 KITTI 和 EuRoC MAV 数据集上的综合实验结果表明，与其他最先进的 SVO 系统相比，DynPL-SVO 的准确性平均提高了 20% 以上，特别是在动态场景中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DynPL-SVO的动态场景立体视觉里程计方法，以提高在动态环境中的运动估计准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于特征的立体视觉里程计在动态场景中因缺乏足够的静态点特征而难以准确估计运动，导致重建机器人运动时失败。
AI.method: 通过结合点特征与线特征的重投影误差（包括垂直和平行方向），设计统一代价函数，并引入动态网格算法，利用Levenberg-Marquardt优化估计立体相机运动。
AI.result: 在KITTI和EuRoC MAV数据集上的实验表明，DynPL-SVO的平均精度较其他先进SVO系统提升了20%以上，尤其在动态场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: DynPL-SVO通过整合线特征信息和动态网格算法，有效提升了动态场景下的立体视觉里程计性能，优于现有方法。

authors_text: Barbara Schütt,Marc Heinrich,Sonja Marahrens,J. Marius Zöllner,Eric Sax
title: An Application of Scenario Exploration to Find New Scenarios for the Development and Testing of Automated Driving Systems in Urban Scenarios
title_zh: 应用场景探索寻找城市场景自动驾驶系统开发和测试新场景
comment: Proceedings of the 8th International Conference on Vehicle Technology and Intelligent Transport Systems (VEHITS 2022)
comments: Proceedings of the 8th International Conference on Vehicle Technology and Intelligent Transport Systems (VEHITS 2022)
abstract: Verification and validation are major challenges for developing automated driving systems. A concept that gets more and more recognized for testing in automated driving is scenario-based testing. However, it introduces the problem of what scenarios are relevant for testing and which are not. This work aims to find relevant, interesting, or critical parameter sets within logical scenarios by utilizing Bayes optimization and Gaussian processes. The parameter optimization is done by comparing and evaluating six different metrics in two urban intersection scenarios. Finally, a list of ideas this work leads to and should be investigated further is presented.
summary: Verification and validation are major challenges for developing automated driving systems. A concept that gets more and more recognized for testing in automated driving is scenario-based testing. However, it introduces the problem of what scenarios are relevant for testing and which are not. This work aims to find relevant, interesting, or critical parameter sets within logical scenarios by utilizing Bayes optimization and Gaussian processes. The parameter optimization is done by comparing and evaluating six different metrics in two urban intersection scenarios. Finally, a list of ideas this work leads to and should be investigated further is presented.
abstract_zh: 验证和确认是开发自动驾驶系统的主要挑战。自动驾驶测试中越来越被认可的一个概念是基于场景的测试。然而，它引入了哪些场景与测试相关、哪些场景不相关的问题。这项工作旨在利用贝叶斯优化和高斯过程在逻辑场景中找到相关的、有趣的或关键的参数集。通过比较和评估两个城市交叉口场景中的六个不同指标来完成参数优化。最后，列出了这项工作产生的、应该进一步研究的想法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过贝叶斯优化和高斯过程，识别城市驾驶场景中与自动驾驶系统开发和测试相关的关键参数集。
AI.motivation: 基于场景的测试虽被广泛认可，但如何筛选出具有代表性的测试场景仍是挑战，需更高效的方法确定关键参数。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯优化与高斯过程，结合六种评估指标，在两个城市交叉口场景中进行参数优化与比较。
AI.result: 识别出潜在关键参数组合，并提出需进一步验证的场景优化方向。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动驾驶测试提供了新思路，但需更多实证研究验证其有效性。

title: Moral reinforcement learning using actual causation
title_zh: 使用实际因果关系的道德强化学习
abstract: Reinforcement learning systems will to a greater and greater extent make decisions that significantly impact the well-being of humans, and it is therefore essential that these systems make decisions that conform to our expectations of morally good behavior. The morally good is often defined in causal terms, as in whether one's actions have in fact caused a particular outcome, and whether the outcome could have been anticipated. We propose an online reinforcement learning method that learns a policy under the constraint that the agent should not be the cause of harm. This is accomplished by defining cause using the theory of actual causation and assigning blame to the agent when its actions are the actual cause of an undesirable outcome. We conduct experiments on a toy ethical dilemma in which a natural choice of reward function leads to clearly undesirable behavior, but our method learns a policy that avoids being the cause of harmful behavior, demonstrating the soundness of our approach. Allowing an agent to learn while observing causal moral distinctions such as blame, opens the possibility to learning policies that better conform to our moral judgments.
summary: Reinforcement learning systems will to a greater and greater extent make decisions that significantly impact the well-being of humans, and it is therefore essential that these systems make decisions that conform to our expectations of morally good behavior. The morally good is often defined in causal terms, as in whether one's actions have in fact caused a particular outcome, and whether the outcome could have been anticipated. We propose an online reinforcement learning method that learns a policy under the constraint that the agent should not be the cause of harm. This is accomplished by defining cause using the theory of actual causation and assigning blame to the agent when its actions are the actual cause of an undesirable outcome. We conduct experiments on a toy ethical dilemma in which a natural choice of reward function leads to clearly undesirable behavior, but our method learns a policy that avoids being the cause of harmful behavior, demonstrating the soundness of our approach. Allowing an agent to learn while observing causal moral distinctions such as blame, opens the possibility to learning policies that better conform to our moral judgments.
abstract_zh: 强化学习系统将在越来越大的程度上做出对人类福祉产生重大影响的决策，因此这些系统做出的决策必须符合我们对道德良好行为的期望。道德上的善通常是用因果术语来定义的，比如一个人的行为是否确实导致了特定的结果，以及该结果是否是可以预见的。我们提出了一种在线强化学习方法，该方法在代理不应该成为伤害原因的约束下学习策略。这是通过使用实际因果关系理论定义原因并在代理的行为是不良结果的实际原因时将责任归咎于代理来实现的。我们对玩具道德困境进行了实验，其中奖励函数的自然选择会导致明显不良行为，但我们的方法学习了一种避免成为有害行为原因的策略，这证明了我们方法的合理性。让代理人在观察因果道德差异（例如责备）的同时进行学习，为学习更符合我们道德判断的政策提供了可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于实际因果关系的道德强化学习方法，使智能体在决策时避免成为有害行为的原因。
AI.motivation: 随着强化学习系统对人类福祉影响增大，需确保其决策符合道德标准。传统方法可能因奖励函数设计导致不道德行为，需新约束机制。
AI.method: 通过实际因果关系理论界定智能体行为是否为不良结果的直接原因，并在学习中归责以调整策略。
AI.result: 在玩具伦理困境实验中，传统方法产生有害行为，而新方法成功避免成为有害行为原因，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 让智能体学习因果道德区分（如责备）可使其策略更符合人类道德判断，为道德强化学习提供新途径。

title: Automatic Acquisition of a Repertoire of Diverse Grasping Trajectories through Behavior Shaping and Novelty Search
title_zh: 通过行为塑造和新颖性搜索自动获取多种抓取轨迹
comment: 7 pages, 9 figures, accepted at ICRA 2022. Annex video available at https://youtu.be/bqqQepJAOKQ
comments: 7 pages, 9 figures, accepted at ICRA 2022. Annex video available at https://youtu.be/bqqQepJAOKQ
abstract: Grasping a particular object may require a dedicated grasping movement that may also be specific to the robot end-effector. No generic and autonomous method does exist to generate these movements without making hypotheses on the robot or on the object. Learning methods could help to autonomously discover relevant grasping movements, but they face an important issue: grasping movements are so rare that a learning method based on exploration has little chance to ever observe an interesting movement, thus creating a bootstrap issue. We introduce an approach to generate diverse grasping movements in order to solve this problem. The movements are generated in simulation, for particular object positions. We test it on several simulated robots: Baxter, Pepper and a Kuka Iiwa arm. Although we show that generated movements actually work on a real Baxter robot, the aim is to use this method to create a large dataset to bootstrap deep learning methods.
summary: Grasping a particular object may require a dedicated grasping movement that may also be specific to the robot end-effector. No generic and autonomous method does exist to generate these movements without making hypotheses on the robot or on the object. Learning methods could help to autonomously discover relevant grasping movements, but they face an important issue: grasping movements are so rare that a learning method based on exploration has little chance to ever observe an interesting movement, thus creating a bootstrap issue. We introduce an approach to generate diverse grasping movements in order to solve this problem. The movements are generated in simulation, for particular object positions. We test it on several simulated robots: Baxter, Pepper and a Kuka Iiwa arm. Although we show that generated movements actually work on a real Baxter robot, the aim is to use this method to create a large dataset to bootstrap deep learning methods.
abstract_zh: 抓取特定物体可能需要专用的抓取运动，该运动也可能特定于机器人末端执行器。如果不对机器人或物体做出假设，则不存在通用且自主的方法来生成这些运动。学习方法可以帮助自主发现相关的抓取动作，但它们面临一个重要的问题：抓取动作非常罕见，基于探索的学习方法几乎没有机会观察到有趣的动作，从而产生了引导问题。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种产生不同抓取动作的方法。对于特定的物体位置，运动是在模拟中生成的。我们在几个模拟机器人上进行了测试：Baxter、Pepper 和 Kuka Iiwa 手臂。尽管我们证明生成的运动实际上适用于真正的 Baxter 机器人，但目的是使用此方法创建大型数据集来引导深度学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过行为塑造和新颖性搜索自动生成多样化抓取轨迹的方法，以解决学习方法在抓取动作稀疏性下的引导问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法在不假设机器人或物体的情况下生成通用抓取动作，且基于探索的学习方法因抓取动作稀疏难以有效观察，导致引导问题。
AI.method: 在仿真环境中针对特定物体位置生成抓取轨迹，结合行为塑造与新颖性搜索策略，并在Baxter、Pepper和Kuka Iiwa等模拟机器人上验证。
AI.result: 生成的轨迹在真实Baxter机器人上有效，方法成功创建了用于引导深度学习的大型数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效生成多样化抓取动作，为深度学习提供数据支持，展示了自主抓取的潜力。

title: SKILL: Structured Knowledge Infusion for Large Language Models
title_zh: 技能：大型语言模型的结构化知识注入
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated human-level performance on a vast spectrum of natural language tasks. However, it is largely unexplored whether they can better internalize knowledge from a structured data, such as a knowledge graph, or from text. In this work, we propose a method to infuse structured knowledge into LLMs, by directly training T5 models on factual triples of knowledge graphs (KGs). We show that models pre-trained on Wikidata KG with our method outperform the T5 baselines on FreebaseQA and WikiHop, as well as the Wikidata-answerable subset of TriviaQA and NaturalQuestions. The models pre-trained on factual triples compare competitively with the ones on natural language sentences that contain the same knowledge. Trained on a smaller size KG, WikiMovies, we saw 3x improvement of exact match score on MetaQA task compared to T5 baseline. The proposed method has an advantage that no alignment between the knowledge graph and text corpus is required in curating training data. This makes our method particularly useful when working with industry-scale knowledge graphs.
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated human-level performance on a vast spectrum of natural language tasks. However, it is largely unexplored whether they can better internalize knowledge from a structured data, such as a knowledge graph, or from text. In this work, we propose a method to infuse structured knowledge into LLMs, by directly training T5 models on factual triples of knowledge graphs (KGs). We show that models pre-trained on Wikidata KG with our method outperform the T5 baselines on FreebaseQA and WikiHop, as well as the Wikidata-answerable subset of TriviaQA and NaturalQuestions. The models pre-trained on factual triples compare competitively with the ones on natural language sentences that contain the same knowledge. Trained on a smaller size KG, WikiMovies, we saw 3x improvement of exact match score on MetaQA task compared to T5 baseline. The proposed method has an advantage that no alignment between the knowledge graph and text corpus is required in curating training data. This makes our method particularly useful when working with industry-scale knowledge graphs.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在大量自然语言任务中展示了人类水平的性能。然而，它们是否可以更好地从结构化数据（例如知识图）或文本中内化知识，在很大程度上尚未被探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过直接在知识图谱（KG）的事实三元组上训练 T5 模型来将结构化知识注入法学硕士的方法。我们表明，使用我们的方法在 Wikidata KG 上预训练的模型优于 FreebaseQA 和 WikiHop 上的 T5 基线，以及 TriviaQA 和 NaturalQuestions 的 Wikidata 可回答子集。在事实三元组上预训练的模型与包含相同知识的自然语言句子的模型相比具有竞争力。在较小尺寸的 KG、WikiMovies 上进行训练后，我们发现与 T5 基线相比，MetaQA 任务的精确匹配分数提高了 3 倍。所提出的方法的优点是在管理训练数据时不需要知识图和文本语料库之间的对齐。这使得我们的方法在处理行业规模的知识图时特别有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将结构化知识（如知识图谱）注入大语言模型的方法，通过直接训练T5模型学习知识图谱中的事实三元组，以提升模型在事实性任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在自然语言任务中表现优异，但其是否能更有效地从结构化数据（如知识图谱）中学习知识仍不明确。传统方法依赖文本数据，而结构化数据的利用方式尚需探索。
AI.method: 直接使用知识图谱中的事实三元组训练T5模型，无需将知识图谱与文本语料对齐，通过预训练和微调结合的方式注入结构化知识。
AI.result: 在FreebaseQA、WikiHop等数据集上，基于Wikidata训练的模型显著优于基线模型；在WikiMovies数据集上，MetaQA任务的精确匹配得分提升3倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需知识图谱与文本的对齐，能有效提升模型对结构化知识的利用能力，适用于工业级知识图谱场景。

ai_content_json.result: 在FreebaseQA、WikiHop等数据集上，基于Wikidata训练的模型显著优于基线模型；在WikiMovies数据集上，MetaQA任务的精确匹配得分提升3倍。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法无需知识图谱与文本的对齐，能有效提升模型对结构化知识的利用能力，适用于工业级知识图谱场景。

tldr: 本文提出一种将结构化知识（如知识图谱）注入大语言模型的方法，通过直接训练T5模型学习知识图谱中的事实三元组，以提升模型在事实性任务中的表现。
motivation: 尽管大语言模型在自然语言任务中表现优异，但其是否能更有效地从结构化数据（如知识图谱）中学习知识仍不明确。传统方法依赖文本数据，而结构化数据的利用方式尚需探索。
method: 直接使用知识图谱中的事实三元组训练T5模型，无需将知识图谱与文本语料对齐，通过预训练和微调结合的方式注入结构化知识。
result: 在FreebaseQA、WikiHop等数据集上，基于Wikidata训练的模型显著优于基线模型；在WikiMovies数据集上，MetaQA任务的精确匹配得分提升3倍。

search_text: SKILL: Structured Knowledge Infusion for Large Language Models 技能：大型语言模型的结构化知识注入 Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated human-level performance on a vast spectrum of natural language tasks. However, it is largely unexplored whether they can better internalize knowledge from a structured data, such as a knowledge graph, or from text. In this work, we propose a method to infuse structured knowledge into LLMs, by directly training T5 models on factual triples of knowledge graphs (KGs). We show that models pre-trained on Wikidata KG with our method outperform the T5 baselines on FreebaseQA and WikiHop, as well as the Wikidata-answerable subset of TriviaQA and NaturalQuestions. The models pre-trained on factual triples compare competitively with the ones on natural language sentences that contain the same knowledge. Trained on a smaller size KG, WikiMovies, we saw 3x improvement of exact match score on MetaQA task compared to T5 baseline. The proposed method has an advantage that no alignment between the knowledge graph and text corpus is required in curating training data. This makes our method particularly useful when working with industry-scale knowledge graphs. 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在大量自然语言任务中展示了人类水平的性能。然而，它们是否可以更好地从结构化数据（例如知识图）或文本中内化知识，在很大程度上尚未被探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过直接在知识图谱（KG）的事实三元组上训练 T5 模型来将结构化知识注入法学硕士的方法。我们表明，使用我们的方法在 Wikidata KG 上预训练的模型优于 FreebaseQA 和 WikiHop 上的 T5 基线，以及 TriviaQA 和 NaturalQuestions 的 Wikidata 可回答子集。在事实三元组上预训练的模型与包含相同知识的自然语言句子的模型相比具有竞争力。在较小尺寸的 KG、WikiMovies 上进行训练后，我们发现与 T5 基线相比，MetaQA 任务的精确匹配分数提高了 3 倍。所提出的方法的优点是在管理训练数据时不需要知识图和文本语料库之间的对齐。这使得我们的方法在处理行业规模的知识图时特别有用。 本文提出一种将结构化知识（如知识图谱）注入大语言模型的方法，通过直接训练T5模型学习知识图谱中的事实三元组，以提升模型在事实性任务中的表现。 Fedor Moiseev,Zhe Dong,Enrique Alfonseca,Martin Jaggi cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: SAMU-XLSR: Semantically-Aligned Multimodal Utterance-level Cross-Lingual Speech Representation
title_zh: SAMU-XLSR：语义对齐的多模态话语级跨语言语音表示
abstract: We propose the SAMU-XLSR: Semantically-Aligned Multimodal Utterance-level Cross-Lingual Speech Representation learning framework. Unlike previous works on speech representation learning, which learns multilingual contextual speech embedding at the resolution of an acoustic frame (10-20ms), this work focuses on learning multimodal (speech-text) multilingual speech embedding at the resolution of a sentence (5-10s) such that the embedding vector space is semantically aligned across different languages. We combine state-of-the-art multilingual acoustic frame-level speech representation learning model XLS-R with the Language Agnostic BERT Sentence Embedding (LaBSE) model to create an utterance-level multimodal multilingual speech encoder SAMU-XLSR. Although we train SAMU-XLSR with only multilingual transcribed speech data, cross-lingual speech-text and speech-speech associations emerge in its learned representation space. To substantiate our claims, we use SAMU-XLSR speech encoder in combination with a pre-trained LaBSE text sentence encoder for cross-lingual speech-to-text translation retrieval, and SAMU-XLSR alone for cross-lingual speech-to-speech translation retrieval. We highlight these applications by performing several cross-lingual text and speech translation retrieval tasks across several datasets.
summary: We propose the SAMU-XLSR: Semantically-Aligned Multimodal Utterance-level Cross-Lingual Speech Representation learning framework. Unlike previous works on speech representation learning, which learns multilingual contextual speech embedding at the resolution of an acoustic frame (10-20ms), this work focuses on learning multimodal (speech-text) multilingual speech embedding at the resolution of a sentence (5-10s) such that the embedding vector space is semantically aligned across different languages. We combine state-of-the-art multilingual acoustic frame-level speech representation learning model XLS-R with the Language Agnostic BERT Sentence Embedding (LaBSE) model to create an utterance-level multimodal multilingual speech encoder SAMU-XLSR. Although we train SAMU-XLSR with only multilingual transcribed speech data, cross-lingual speech-text and speech-speech associations emerge in its learned representation space. To substantiate our claims, we use SAMU-XLSR speech encoder in combination with a pre-trained LaBSE text sentence encoder for cross-lingual speech-to-text translation retrieval, and SAMU-XLSR alone for cross-lingual speech-to-speech translation retrieval. We highlight these applications by performing several cross-lingual text and speech translation retrieval tasks across several datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 SAMU-XLSR：语义对齐的多模态话语级跨语言语音表示学习框架。与之前的语音表示学习研究不同，该研究以声学帧（10-20ms）的分辨率学习多语言上下文语音嵌入，而这项工作侧重于以句子（5-10s）的分辨率学习多模态（语音-文本）多语言语音嵌入，以便嵌入向量空间在不同语言之间语义对齐。我们将最先进的多语言声学帧级语音表示学习模型 XLS-R 与语言无关的 BERT 句子嵌入 (LaBSE) 模型相结合，创建话语级多模态多语言语音编码器 SAMU-XLSR。尽管我们仅使用多语言转录语音数据来训练 SAMU-XLSR，但跨语言语音-文本和语音-语音关联出现在其学习的表示空间中。为了证实我们的主张，我们使用 SAMU-XLSR 语音编码器与预训练的 LaBSE 文本句子编码器结合进行跨语言语音到文本翻译检索，并单独使用 SAMU-XLSR 进行跨语言语音到语音翻译检索。我们通过在多个数据集上执行多个跨语言文本和语音翻译检索任务来突出这些应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAMU-XLSR框架，通过结合语音和文本模态，在句子级别学习跨语言语义对齐的多语言语音表示。
AI.motivation: 现有语音表示学习方法在声学帧级别（10-20ms）进行多语言建模，难以实现跨语言语义对齐；需在更长的句子级别（5-10s）建立语音-文本联合表示以提升跨语言任务性能。
AI.method: 融合XLS-R（多语言帧级语音表示模型）与LaBSE（语言无关文本句向量模型），构建句级多模态编码器SAMU-XLSR，仅使用多语言转录语音数据训练，通过语音-文本和语音-语音关联实现跨语言表示学习。
AI.result: SAMU-XLSR在跨语言语音-文本检索和语音-语音翻译检索任务中均取得优异效果，验证了其学习到的跨语言语义对齐表示的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过句级多模态联合建模，SAMU-XLSR实现了跨语言语音表示的语义对齐，为复杂跨语言任务提供了更高效的表示学习方案。

authors_text: Lorenzo Cerrone,Athul Vijayan,Tejasvinee Mody,Kay Schneitz,Fred A. Hamprecht
title: CellTypeGraph: A New Geometric Computer Vision Benchmark
title_zh: CellTypeGraph：新的几何计算机视觉基准
abstract: Classifying all cells in an organ is a relevant and difficult problem from plant developmental biology. We here abstract the problem into a new benchmark for node classification in a geo-referenced graph. Solving it requires learning the spatial layout of the organ including symmetries. To allow the convenient testing of new geometrical learning methods, the benchmark of Arabidopsis thaliana ovules is made available as a PyTorch data loader, along with a large number of precomputed features. Finally, we benchmark eight recent graph neural network architectures, finding that DeeperGCN currently works best on this problem.
summary: Classifying all cells in an organ is a relevant and difficult problem from plant developmental biology. We here abstract the problem into a new benchmark for node classification in a geo-referenced graph. Solving it requires learning the spatial layout of the organ including symmetries. To allow the convenient testing of new geometrical learning methods, the benchmark of Arabidopsis thaliana ovules is made available as a PyTorch data loader, along with a large number of precomputed features. Finally, we benchmark eight recent graph neural network architectures, finding that DeeperGCN currently works best on this problem.
abstract_zh: 对器官中的所有细胞进行分类是植物发育生物学中的一个相关且困难的问题。我们在这里将问题抽象为地理参考图中节点分类的新基准。解决这个问题需要学习器官的空间布局，包括对称性。为了方便测试新的几何学习方法，拟南芥胚珠的基准作为 PyTorch 数据加载器以及大量预先计算的特征提供。最后，我们对最近的八种图神经网络架构进行了基准测试，发现 DeeperGCN 目前在这个问题上效果最好。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一个新的几何计算机视觉基准CellTypeGraph，用于解决植物器官中细胞类型的节点分类问题。
AI.motivation: 植物发育生物学中器官细胞分类具有挑战性，需要考虑空间布局和对称性，现有方法缺乏专门的基准测试。
AI.method: 将细胞分类问题抽象为地理参考图的节点分类任务，构建拟南芥胚珠的PyTorch数据加载器，并预计算多种特征以测试八种图神经网络架构。
AI.result: 在基准测试中，DeeperGCN架构在细胞分类任务中表现最优。
AI.conclusion: DeeperGCN在处理具有几何结构的生物数据时具有优势，CellTypeGraph基准可推动几何学习方法的发展。

authors_text: Prabhav Singh,Ridam Srivastava,K. P. S. Rana,Vineet Kumar
title: SEMI-FND: Stacked Ensemble Based Multimodal Inference For Faster Fake News Detection
title_zh: SEMI-FND：基于堆叠集成的多模态推理，可更快地检测假新闻
abstract: Fake News Detection (FND) is an essential field in natural language processing that aims to identify and check the truthfulness of major claims in a news article to decide the news veracity. FND finds its uses in preventing social, political and national damage caused due to misrepresentation of facts which may harm a certain section of society. Further, with the explosive rise in fake news dissemination over social media, including images and text, it has become imperative to identify fake news faster and more accurately. To solve this problem, this work investigates a novel multimodal stacked ensemble-based approach (SEMIFND) to fake news detection. Focus is also kept on ensuring faster performance with fewer parameters. Moreover, to improve multimodal performance, a deep unimodal analysis is done on the image modality to identify NasNet Mobile as the most appropriate model for the task. For text, an ensemble of BERT and ELECTRA is used. The approach was evaluated on two datasets: Twitter MediaEval and Weibo Corpus. The suggested framework offered accuracies of 85.80% and 86.83% on the Twitter and Weibo datasets respectively. These reported metrics are found to be superior when compared to similar recent works. Further, we also report a reduction in the number of parameters used in training when compared to recent relevant works. SEMI-FND offers an overall parameter reduction of at least 20% with unimodal parametric reduction on text being 60%. Therefore, based on the investigations presented, it is concluded that the application of a stacked ensembling significantly improves FND over other approaches while also improving speed.
summary: Fake News Detection (FND) is an essential field in natural language processing that aims to identify and check the truthfulness of major claims in a news article to decide the news veracity. FND finds its uses in preventing social, political and national damage caused due to misrepresentation of facts which may harm a certain section of society. Further, with the explosive rise in fake news dissemination over social media, including images and text, it has become imperative to identify fake news faster and more accurately. To solve this problem, this work investigates a novel multimodal stacked ensemble-based approach (SEMIFND) to fake news detection. Focus is also kept on ensuring faster performance with fewer parameters. Moreover, to improve multimodal performance, a deep unimodal analysis is done on the image modality to identify NasNet Mobile as the most appropriate model for the task. For text, an ensemble of BERT and ELECTRA is used. The approach was evaluated on two datasets: Twitter MediaEval and Weibo Corpus. The suggested framework offered accuracies of 85.80% and 86.83% on the Twitter and Weibo datasets respectively. These reported metrics are found to be superior when compared to similar recent works. Further, we also report a reduction in the number of parameters used in training when compared to recent relevant works. SEMI-FND offers an overall parameter reduction of at least 20% with unimodal parametric reduction on text being 60%. Therefore, based on the investigations presented, it is concluded that the application of a stacked ensembling significantly improves FND over other approaches while also improving speed.
abstract_zh: 假新闻检测（FND）是自然语言处理的一个重要领域，旨在识别和检查新闻文章中主要主张的真实性，以判定新闻的真实性。 FND 的用途是防止因歪曲事实而造成社会、政治和国家损害，从而损害社会的某一部分。此外，随着社交媒体上假新闻传播（包括图像和文本）的爆炸式增长，更快、更准确地识别假新闻变得势在必行。为了解决这个问题，这项工作研究了一种新颖的基于多模态堆叠集成的方法（SEMIFND）来检测假新闻。重点还在于确保以更少的参数获得更快的性能。此外，为了提高多模态性能，对图像模态进行了深入的单模态分析，以确定 NasNet Mobile 是最适合该任务的模型。对于文本，使用 BERT 和 ELECTRA 的组合。该方法在两个数据集上进行了评估：Twitter MediaEval 和 Weibo Corpus。建议的框架在 Twitter 和微博数据集上的准确率分别为 85.80% 和 86.83%。与最近的类似作品相比，这些报告的指标被发现更为优越。此外，与最近的相关工作相比，我们还报告了训练中使用的参数数量的减少。 SEMI-FND 整体参数减少至少 20%，文本单峰参数减少 60%。因此，根据所提出的研究，得出的结论是，与其他方法相比，堆叠集成的应用显着提高了 FND，同时还提高了速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于堆叠集成的多模态方法（SEMI-FND），用于更快更准确地检测虚假新闻。
AI.motivation: 虚假新闻通过社交媒体传播可能造成社会危害，需提升检测速度与准确性，同时减少模型参数以提高效率。
AI.method: 采用堆叠集成框架，结合图像模态的NasNet Mobile模型与文本模态的BERT-ELECTRA集成模型，通过多模态分析实现虚假新闻检测。
AI.result: 在Twitter MediaEval和Weibo Corpus数据集上分别达到85.80%和86.83%的准确率，参数量较现有方法减少至少20%。
AI.conclusion: 堆叠集成方法显著提升虚假新闻检测性能与速度，且有效降低模型复杂度。

authors_text: Minglei Yuan,Qian Xu,Chunhao Cai,Yin-Dong Zheng,Tao Wang,Tong Lu
title: Uncertainty-based Network for Few-shot Image Classification
title_zh: 基于不确定性的小样本图像分类网络
abstract: The transductive inference is an effective technique in the few-shot learning task, where query sets update prototypes to improve themselves. However, these methods optimize the model by considering only the classification scores of the query instances as confidence while ignoring the uncertainty of these classification scores. In this paper, we propose a novel method called Uncertainty-Based Network, which models the uncertainty of classification results with the help of mutual information. Specifically, we first data augment and classify the query instance and calculate the mutual information of these classification scores. Then, mutual information is used as uncertainty to assign weights to classification scores, and the iterative update strategy based on classification scores and uncertainties assigns the optimal weights to query instances in prototype optimization. Extensive results on four benchmarks show that Uncertainty-Based Network achieves comparable performance in classification accuracy compared to state-of-the-art method.
summary: The transductive inference is an effective technique in the few-shot learning task, where query sets update prototypes to improve themselves. However, these methods optimize the model by considering only the classification scores of the query instances as confidence while ignoring the uncertainty of these classification scores. In this paper, we propose a novel method called Uncertainty-Based Network, which models the uncertainty of classification results with the help of mutual information. Specifically, we first data augment and classify the query instance and calculate the mutual information of these classification scores. Then, mutual information is used as uncertainty to assign weights to classification scores, and the iterative update strategy based on classification scores and uncertainties assigns the optimal weights to query instances in prototype optimization. Extensive results on four benchmarks show that Uncertainty-Based Network achieves comparable performance in classification accuracy compared to state-of-the-art method.
abstract_zh: 转导推理是少样本学习任务中的一种有效技术，其中查询集更新原型以改进自身。然而，这些方法通过仅将查询实例的分类分数视为置信度而忽略这些分类分数的不确定性来优化模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为基于不确定性的网络的新方法，该方法借助互信息对分类结果的不确定性进行建模。具体来说，我们首先对查询实例进行数据增强和分类，并计算这些分类分数的互信息。然后，利用互信息作为不确定性为分类分数分配权重，基于分类分数和不确定性的迭代更新策略为原型优化中的查询实例分配最佳权重。四个基准的广泛结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，基于不确定性的网络在分类精度方面实现了可比的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不确定性的网络，用于解决少样本图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的少样本学习方法仅依赖查询实例的分类分数作为置信度，忽略了分类分数的不确定性，这可能导致模型优化效果不佳。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于不确定性的网络，通过互信息建模分类结果的不确定性，利用互信息作为不确定性来分配分类分数的权重，并采用基于分类分数和不确定性的迭代更新策略优化原型。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法在分类准确率方面与最先进的方法具有可比性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入不确定性建模，本文提出的方法在少样本图像分类任务中表现出良好的性能。

title: Dual-mode robust MPC for the tracking control of non-holonomoic mobile robots
title_zh: 用于非完整移动机器人跟踪控制的双模式稳健 MPC
comment: This paper exists a lot of mistakes. Therefore, I want to withdraw it
comments: This paper exists a lot of mistakes. Therefore, I want to withdraw it
abstract: In this paper, a novel dual-mode robust model predictive control (MPC) approach is proposed for solving the tracking control problem of non-holonomoic mobile robots with additive bounded disturbance. To reduce the negative effect of disturbance and drive the state of real system closer to the one of nominal system , a robust reference signal is introduced into the cost function of MPC. In order to reduced the computation burden caused by online optimization of MPC and further improve the tracking accuracy, a dual-mode control strucuture consisting of the robust MPC and the local nonlinear robust control is developed, in which the local nonlinear robust control law is applied within a specified terminal region. Finally, simulation results on the non-holonomic mobile robot are presented to show the validity of the proposed control approach.
summary: In this paper, a novel dual-mode robust model predictive control (MPC) approach is proposed for solving the tracking control problem of non-holonomoic mobile robots with additive bounded disturbance. To reduce the negative effect of disturbance and drive the state of real system closer to the one of nominal system , a robust reference signal is introduced into the cost function of MPC. In order to reduced the computation burden caused by online optimization of MPC and further improve the tracking accuracy, a dual-mode control strucuture consisting of the robust MPC and the local nonlinear robust control is developed, in which the local nonlinear robust control law is applied within a specified terminal region. Finally, simulation results on the non-holonomic mobile robot are presented to show the validity of the proposed control approach.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的双模式鲁棒模型预测控制（MPC）方法来解决具有加性有界扰动的非完整移动机器人的跟踪控制问题。为了减少扰动的负面影响，使实际系统的状态更接近标称系统的状态，在MPC的成本函数中引入鲁棒参考信号。为了减少MPC在线优化带来的计算负担，进一步提高跟踪精度，提出了一种由鲁棒MPC和局部非线性鲁棒控制组成的双模式控制结构，其中局部非线性鲁棒控制律应用于指定的终端区域。最后，给出了非完整移动机器人的仿真结果，证明了所提出的控制方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双模式鲁棒模型预测控制（MPC）方法，用于解决非完整移动机器人的轨迹跟踪控制问题，以应对加性有界干扰。
AI.motivation: 现有MPC方法在处理非完整移动机器人轨迹跟踪时，存在干扰抑制效果不足、在线优化计算负担重及跟踪精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 在MPC成本函数中引入鲁棒参考信号以减小干扰影响，并设计包含鲁棒MPC与局部非线性鲁棒控制的双模式结构，在指定终端区域应用局部控制律。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了所提控制方法在非完整移动机器人上的有效性，展示了其对干扰的鲁棒性及跟踪精度的提升。
AI.conclusion: 双模式鲁棒MPC方法通过结合全局优化与局部控制，在降低计算负担的同时增强了系统鲁棒性，为非完整机器人控制提供了新思路。

search_text: Dual-mode robust MPC for the tracking control of non-holonomoic mobile robots 用于非完整移动机器人跟踪控制的双模式稳健 MPC In this paper, a novel dual-mode robust model predictive control (MPC) approach is proposed for solving the tracking control problem of non-holonomoic mobile robots with additive bounded disturbance. To reduce the negative effect of disturbance and drive the state of real system closer to the one of nominal system , a robust reference signal is introduced into the cost function of MPC. In order to reduced the computation burden caused by online optimization of MPC and further improve the tracking accuracy, a dual-mode control strucuture consisting of the robust MPC and the local nonlinear robust control is developed, in which the local nonlinear robust control law is applied within a specified terminal region. Finally, simulation results on the non-holonomic mobile robot are presented to show the validity of the proposed control approach. 本文提出了一种新颖的双模式鲁棒模型预测控制（MPC）方法来解决具有加性有界扰动的非完整移动机器人的跟踪控制问题。为了减少扰动的负面影响，使实际系统的状态更接近标称系统的状态，在MPC的成本函数中引入鲁棒参考信号。为了减少MPC在线优化带来的计算负担，进一步提高跟踪精度，提出了一种由鲁棒MPC和局部非线性鲁棒控制组成的双模式控制结构，其中局部非线性鲁棒控制律应用于指定的终端区域。最后，给出了非完整移动机器人的仿真结果，证明了所提出的控制方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种双模式鲁棒模型预测控制（MPC）方法，用于解决非完整移动机器人的轨迹跟踪控制问题，以应对加性有界干扰。 Huan Meng cs.RO

title: Cluster on Wheels
title_zh: 轮子上的集群
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, 2022 International Conference for Advancement in Technology(ICONAT). It is about the work of the mapping robot cluster computer platform
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures, 2022 International Conference for Advancement in Technology(ICONAT). It is about the work of the mapping robot cluster computer platform
abstract: This paper presents a very compact 16-node cluster that is the core of a future robot for collecting and storing massive amounts of sensor data for research on Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that such a cluster is used in robotics. We first present the requirements and different options for computing of such a robot and then show the hardware and software of our solution in detail. The cluster consists of 16 nodes of AMD Ryzen 7 5700U CPUs with a total of 128 cores. As a system that is to be used on a Clearpath Husky robot, it is very small in size, can be operated from battery power and has all required power and networking components integrated. Stress tests on the completed cluster show that it performs well.
summary: This paper presents a very compact 16-node cluster that is the core of a future robot for collecting and storing massive amounts of sensor data for research on Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that such a cluster is used in robotics. We first present the requirements and different options for computing of such a robot and then show the hardware and software of our solution in detail. The cluster consists of 16 nodes of AMD Ryzen 7 5700U CPUs with a total of 128 cores. As a system that is to be used on a Clearpath Husky robot, it is very small in size, can be operated from battery power and has all required power and networking components integrated. Stress tests on the completed cluster show that it performs well.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个非常紧凑的 16 节点集群，它是未来机器人的核心，用于收集和存储大量传感器数据，用于同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 研究。据我们所知，这是第一次在机器人技术中使用这样的集群。我们首先介绍此类机器人的计算要求和不同选项，然后详细展示我们解决方案的硬件和软件。该集群由16个AMD Ryzen 7 5700U CPU节点组成，总共128个核心。作为用于 Clearpath Husky 机器人的系统，它的尺寸非常小，可以通过电池供电运行，并且集成了所有必需的电源和网络组件。对已完成集群的压力测试表明其性能良好。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种用于机器人SLAM研究的紧凑型16节点计算集群，作为未来机器人收集和存储大量传感器数据的核心。
AI.motivation: 为满足SLAM研究对实时处理大量传感器数据的计算需求，首次尝试将高性能计算集群集成至机器人平台中。
AI.method: 采用16个AMD Ryzen 7 5700U CPU节点（共128核），集成至Clearpath Husky机器人中，包含电池供电系统和网络组件，并进行压力测试验证性能。
AI.result: 压力测试表明该集群在紧凑尺寸和电池供电条件下仍能保持良好计算性能。
AI.conclusion: 该集群验证了高性能计算模块在移动机器人中的可行性，为SLAM研究提供了新型硬件平台。

title: UnPWC-SVDLO: Multi-SVD on PointPWC for Unsupervised Lidar Odometry
title_zh: UnPWC-SVDLO：PointPWC 上的多重 SVD，用于无监督激光雷达里程计
abstract: High-precision lidar odomety is an essential part of autonomous driving. In recent years, deep learning methods have been widely used in lidar odomety tasks, but most of the current methods only extract the global features of the point clouds. It is impossible to obtain more detailed point-level features in this way. In addition, only the fully connected layer is used to estimate the pose. The fully connected layer has achieved obvious results in the classification task, but the changes in pose are a continuous rather than discrete process, high-precision pose estimation can not be obtained only by using the fully connected layer. Our method avoids problems mentioned above. We use PointPWC as our backbone network. PointPWC is originally used for scene flow estimation. The scene flow estimation task has a strong correlation with lidar odomety. Traget point clouds can be obtained by adding the scene flow and source point clouds. We can achieve the pose directly through ICP algorithm solved by SVD, and the fully connected layer is no longer used. PointPWC extracts point-level features from point clouds with different sampling levels, which solves the problem of too rough feature extraction. We conduct experiments on KITTI, Ford Campus Vision and Lidar DataSe and Apollo-SouthBay Dataset. Our result is comparable with the state-of-the-art unsupervised deep learing method SelfVoxeLO.
summary: High-precision lidar odomety is an essential part of autonomous driving. In recent years, deep learning methods have been widely used in lidar odomety tasks, but most of the current methods only extract the global features of the point clouds. It is impossible to obtain more detailed point-level features in this way. In addition, only the fully connected layer is used to estimate the pose. The fully connected layer has achieved obvious results in the classification task, but the changes in pose are a continuous rather than discrete process, high-precision pose estimation can not be obtained only by using the fully connected layer. Our method avoids problems mentioned above. We use PointPWC as our backbone network. PointPWC is originally used for scene flow estimation. The scene flow estimation task has a strong correlation with lidar odomety. Traget point clouds can be obtained by adding the scene flow and source point clouds. We can achieve the pose directly through ICP algorithm solved by SVD, and the fully connected layer is no longer used. PointPWC extracts point-level features from point clouds with different sampling levels, which solves the problem of too rough feature extraction. We conduct experiments on KITTI, Ford Campus Vision and Lidar DataSe and Apollo-SouthBay Dataset. Our result is comparable with the state-of-the-art unsupervised deep learing method SelfVoxeLO.
abstract_zh: 高精度激光雷达里程测量是自动驾驶的重要组成部分。近年来，深度学习方法已广泛应用于激光雷达里程测量任务中，但目前大多数方法仅提取点云的全局特征。通过这种方式无法获得更详细的点级特征。此外，仅使用全连接层来估计姿态。全连接层在分类任务中取得了明显的效果，但姿态的变化是一个连续而不是离散的过程，仅利用全连接层无法获得高精度的姿态估计。我们的方法避免了上述问题。我们使用 PointPWC 作为我们的骨干网络。 PointPWC最初用于场景流量估计。场景流估计任务与激光雷达里程计有很强的相关性。将场景流与源点云相加即可得到目标点云。我们可以直接通过SVD求解的ICP算法来实现位姿，不再使用全连接层。 PointPWC从不同采样级别的点云中提取点级特征，解决了特征提取过于粗糙的问题。我们在 KITTI、Ford Campus Vision 和 Lidar DataSe 以及 Apollo-SouthBay Dataset 上进行了实验。我们的结果与最先进的无监督深度学习方法 SelfVoxeLO 相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于PointPWC网络和SVD的无监督激光雷达里程计方法UnPWC-SVDLO，通过点级特征提取和改进的姿态估计策略提升定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在激光雷达里程计任务中仅提取全局特征且依赖全连接层进行姿态估计，导致特征粗糙且无法精确捕捉连续姿态变化。
AI.method: 以PointPWC为骨干网络提取多尺度点级特征，通过场景流估计与源点云相加获得目标点云，采用SVD求解ICP算法直接计算姿态，替代传统全连接层估计方式。
AI.result: 在KITTI、Ford Campus、Apollo-SouthBay等数据集上实验表明，该方法性能与最新无监督方法SelfVoxeLO相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过点级特征提取与SVD姿态估计相结合，有效解决了传统方法特征粗糙和姿态估计不连续的问题，实现了具有竞争力的无监督激光雷达里程计方案。

PointPWC extracts point-level features from point clouds with different sampling levels, which solves the problem of too rough feature extraction. We conduct experiments on KITTI, Ford Campus Vision and Lidar DataSe and Apollo-SouthBay Dataset. Our result is comparable with the state-of-the-art unsupervised deep learing method SelfVoxeLO. 高精度激光雷达里程测量是自动驾驶的重要组成部分。近年来，深度学习方法已广泛应用于激光雷达里程测量任务中，但目前大多数方法仅提取点云的全局特征。通过这种方式无法获得更详细的点级特征。此外，仅使用全连接层来估计姿态。全连接层在分类任务中取得了明显的效果，但姿态的变化是一个连续而不是离散的过程，仅利用全连接层无法获得高精度的姿态估计。我们的方法避免了上述问题。我们使用 PointPWC 作为我们的骨干网络。 PointPWC最初用于场景流量估计。场景流估计任务与激光雷达里程计有很强的相关性。将场景流与源点云相加即可得到目标点云。我们可以直接通过SVD求解的ICP算法来实现位姿，不再使用全连接层。 PointPWC从不同采样级别的点云中提取点级特征，解决了特征提取过于粗糙的问题。我们在 KITTI、Ford Campus Vision 和 Lidar DataSe 以及 Apollo-SouthBay Dataset 上进行了实验。我们的结果与最先进的无监督深度学习方法 SelfVoxeLO 相当。 本文提出一种基于PointPWC网络和SVD的无监督激光雷达里程计方法UnPWC-SVDLO，通过点级特征提取和改进的姿态估计策略提升定位精度。 Yiming Tu cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Gender and Racial Bias in Visual Question Answering Datasets
title_zh: 视觉问答数据集中的性别和种族偏见
comment: ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT 2022)
comments: ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT 2022)
abstract: Vision-and-language tasks have increasingly drawn more attention as a means to evaluate human-like reasoning in machine learning models. A popular task in the field is visual question answering (VQA), which aims to answer questions about images. However, VQA models have been shown to exploit language bias by learning the statistical correlations between questions and answers without looking into the image content: e.g., questions about the color of a banana are answered with yellow, even if the banana in the image is green. If societal bias (e.g., sexism, racism, ableism, etc.) is present in the training data, this problem may be causing VQA models to learn harmful stereotypes. For this reason, we investigate gender and racial bias in five VQA datasets. In our analysis, we find that the distribution of answers is highly different between questions about women and men, as well as the existence of detrimental gender-stereotypical samples. Likewise, we identify that specific race-related attributes are underrepresented, whereas potentially discriminatory samples appear in the analyzed datasets. Our findings suggest that there are dangers associated to using VQA datasets without considering and dealing with the potentially harmful stereotypes. We conclude the paper by proposing solutions to alleviate the problem before, during, and after the dataset collection process.

If societal bias (e.g., sexism, racism, ableism, etc.) is present in the training data, this problem may be causing VQA models to learn harmful stereotypes. For this reason, we investigate gender and racial bias in five VQA datasets. In our analysis, we find that the distribution of answers is highly different between questions about women and men, as well as the existence of detrimental gender-stereotypical samples. Likewise, we identify that specific race-related attributes are underrepresented, whereas potentially discriminatory samples appear in the analyzed datasets. Our findings suggest that there are dangers associated to using VQA datasets without considering and dealing with the potentially harmful stereotypes. We conclude the paper by proposing solutions to alleviate the problem before, during, and after the dataset collection process.
abstract_zh: 视觉和语言任务作为评估机器学习模型中类人推理的一种手段越来越受到人们的关注。该领域的一个流行任务是视觉问答（VQA），旨在回答有关图像的问题。然而，VQA 模型已被证明可以通过学习问题和答案之间的统计相关性来利用语言偏差，而无需查看图像内容：例如，即使图像中的香蕉是绿色的，有关香蕉颜色的问题也会以黄色回答。如果训练数据中存在社会偏见（例如性别歧视、种族主义、体能歧视等），这个问题可能会导致 VQA 模型学习有害的刻板印象。因此，我们在五个 VQA 数据集中调查了性别和种族偏见。在我们的分析中，我们发现有关女性和男性的问题的答案分布存在很大差异，并且存在有害的性别刻板印象样本。同样，我们发现特定的种族相关属性代表性不足，而潜在的歧视性样本出现在分析的数据集中。我们的研究结果表明，在不考虑和处理潜在有害的刻板印象的情况下使用 VQA 数据集存在危险。我们通过提出解决方案来缓解数据集收集过程之前、期间和之后的问题来总结本文。

AI.tldr: 本文调查了五个视觉问答（VQA）数据集中的性别和种族偏见问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA模型可能通过学习语言中的统计关联而非图像内容来回答问题，从而导致模型学习有害的刻板印象。
AI.method: 分析五个VQA数据集中与性别和种族相关问题的答案分布，识别刻板印象样本和代表性不足的属性。
AI.result: 发现针对女性和男性的答案分布存在显著差异，存在有害的性别刻板印象样本，特定种族属性代表性不足且包含歧视性样本。
AI.conclusion: 建议在数据集收集前、中、后各阶段采取措施缓解偏见问题，以减少有害刻板印象的影响。

title: Pairwise Comparison Network for Remote Sensing Scene Classification
title_zh: 用于遥感场景分类的成对比较网络
abstract: Remote sensing scene classification aims to assign a specific semantic label to a remote sensing image. Recently, convolutional neural networks have greatly improved the performance of remote sensing scene classification. However, some confused images may be easily recognized as the incorrect category, which generally degrade the performance. The differences between image pairs can be used to distinguish image categories. This paper proposed a pairwise comparison network, which contains two main steps: pairwise selection and pairwise representation. The proposed network first selects similar image pairs, and then represents the image pairs with pairwise representations. The self-representation is introduced to highlight the informative parts of each image itself, while the mutual-representation is proposed to capture the subtle differences between image pairs. Comprehensive experimental results on two challenging datasets (AID, NWPU-RESISC45) demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed network. The codes are provided in https://github.com/spectralpublic/PCNet.git.
summary: Remote sensing scene classification aims to assign a specific semantic label to a remote sensing image. Recently, convolutional neural networks have greatly improved the performance of remote sensing scene classification. However, some confused images may be easily recognized as the incorrect category, which generally degrade the performance. The differences between image pairs can be used to distinguish image categories. This paper proposed a pairwise comparison network, which contains two main steps: pairwise selection and pairwise representation. The proposed network first selects similar image pairs, and then represents the image pairs with pairwise representations. The self-representation is introduced to highlight the informative parts of each image itself, while the mutual-representation is proposed to capture the subtle differences between image pairs. Comprehensive experimental results on two challenging datasets (AID, NWPU-RESISC45) demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed network. The codes are provided in https://github.com/spectralpublic/PCNet.git.
abstract_zh: 遥感场景分类旨在为遥感图像分配特定的语义标签。近年来，卷积神经网络极大地提高了遥感场景分类的性能。然而，一些混淆的图像可能很容易被识别为不正确的类别，这通常会降低性能。图像对之间的差异可以用来区分图像类别。本文提出了一种成对比较网络，其包含两个主要步骤：成对选择和成对表示。所提出的网络首先选择相似的图像对，然后用成对表示来表示图像对。引入自表示是为了突出每个图像本身的信息部分，而相互表示是为了捕捉图像对之间的细微差异。两个具有挑战性的数据集（AID、NWPU-RESISC45）的综合实验结果证明了所提出网络的有效性。这些代码在 https://github.com/spectralpublic/PCNet.git 中提供。

AI.tldr: 提出一种成对比较网络，用于提升遥感场景分类的准确率，解决混淆图像误分类问题。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN在遥感场景分类中存在混淆图像误分类问题，需通过比较图像对差异来提升分类准确性。
AI.method: 提出包含成对选择与成对表示的网络，自表示提取图像关键信息，互表示捕捉图像对细微差异。
AI.result: 在AID和NWPU-RESISC45数据集上实验验证了方法的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 成对比较网络通过自/互表示机制有效提升遥感场景分类性能，尤其在处理混淆图像时表现优异。

authors_text: Yu Wang,Binbin Zhu,Lingsi Kong,Jianlin Wang,Bin Gao,Jianhua Wang,Dingcheng Tian,Yudong Yao
title: Brachial Plexus Nerve Trunk Segmentation Using Deep Learning: A Comparative Study with Doctors' Manual Segmentation
title_zh: 使用深度学习进行臂丛神经干分割：与医生手动分割的比较研究
abstract: Ultrasound-guided nerve block anesthesia (UGNB) is a high-tech visual nerve block anesthesia method that can observe the target nerve and its surrounding structures, the puncture needle's advancement, and local anesthetics spread in real-time. The key in UGNB is nerve identification. With the help of deep learning methods, the automatic identification or segmentation of nerves can be realized, assisting doctors in completing nerve block anesthesia accurately and efficiently. Here, we establish a public dataset containing 320 ultrasound images of brachial plexus (BP). Three experienced doctors jointly produce the BP segmentation ground truth and label brachial plexus trunks. We design a brachial plexus segmentation system (BPSegSys) based on deep learning. BPSegSys achieves experienced-doctor-level nerve identification performance in various experiments. We evaluate BPSegSys' performance in terms of intersection-over-union (IoU), a commonly used performance measure for segmentation experiments. Considering three dataset groups in our established public dataset, the IoU of BPSegSys are 0.5238, 0.4715, and 0.5029, respectively, which exceed the IoU 0.5205, 0.4704, and 0.4979 of experienced doctors. In addition, we show that BPSegSys can help doctors identify brachial plexus trunks more accurately, with IoU improvement up to 27%, which has significant clinical application value.
summary: Ultrasound-guided nerve block anesthesia (UGNB) is a high-tech visual nerve block anesthesia method that can observe the target nerve and its surrounding structures, the puncture needle's advancement, and local anesthetics spread in real-time. The key in UGNB is nerve identification. With the help of deep learning methods, the automatic identification or segmentation of nerves can be realized, assisting doctors in completing nerve block anesthesia accurately and efficiently. Here, we establish a public dataset containing 320 ultrasound images of brachial plexus (BP). Three experienced doctors jointly produce the BP segmentation ground truth and label brachial plexus trunks. We design a brachial plexus segmentation system (BPSegSys) based on deep learning. BPSegSys achieves experienced-doctor-level nerve identification performance in various experiments. We evaluate BPSegSys' performance in terms of intersection-over-union (IoU), a commonly used performance measure for segmentation experiments. Considering three dataset groups in our established public dataset, the IoU of BPSegSys are 0.5238, 0.4715, and 0.5029, respectively, which exceed the IoU 0.5205, 0.4704, and 0.4979 of experienced doctors. In addition, we show that BPSegSys can help doctors identify brachial plexus trunks more accurately, with IoU improvement up to 27%, which has significant clinical application value.
abstract_zh: 超声引导神经阻滞麻醉（UGNB）是一种高科技视觉神经阻滞麻醉方法，可以实时观察目标神经及其周围结构、穿刺针的推进情况以及局麻药的扩散情况。 UGNB的关键是神经识别。借助深度学习方法，可以实现神经的自动识别或分割，辅助医生准确高效地完成神经阻滞麻醉。在这里，我们建立了一个包含 320 张臂丛神经 (BP) 超声图像的公共数据集。三位经验丰富的医生共同制作BP分割真实值并标记臂丛神经干。我们设计了一个基于深度学习的臂丛神经分割系统（BPSegSys）。 BPSegSys 在各种实验中实现了经验丰富的医生级别的神经识别性能。我们根据交并并集 (IoU) 来评估 BPSegSys 的性能，IoU 是分割实验的常用性能衡量标准。考虑到我们建立的公共数据集中的三个数据集组，BPSegSys 的 IoU 分别为 0.5238、0.4715 和 0.5029，超过了经验丰富的医生的 IoU 0.5205、0.4704 和 0.4979。此外，我们表明BPSegSys可以帮助医生更准确地识别臂丛神经干，IoU改善高达27%，具有显着的临床应用价值。

AI.tldr: 开发基于深度学习的臂丛神经分割系统，并与医生手动分割进行比较
AI.motivation: 提高神经阻滞麻醉的准确性与效率，减少人工分割的依赖
AI.method: 构建包含320张图像的公共数据集，由医生标注，设计基于深度学习的BPSegSys系统进行分割

search_text: Brachial Plexus Nerve Trunk Segmentation Using Deep Learning: A Comparative Study with Doctors' Manual Segmentation 使用深度学习进行臂丛神经干分割：与医生手动分割的比较研究 Ultrasound-guided nerve block anesthesia (UGNB) is a high-tech visual nerve block anesthesia method that can observe the target nerve and its surrounding structures, the puncture needle's advancement, and local anesthetics spread in real-time. The key in UGNB is nerve identification. With the help of deep learning methods, the automatic identification or segmentation of nerves can be realized, assisting doctors in completing nerve block anesthesia accurately and efficiently. Here, we establish a public dataset containing 320 ultrasound images of brachial plexus (BP). Three experienced doctors jointly produce the BP segmentation ground truth and label brachial plexus trunks. We design a brachial plexus segmentation system (BPSegSys) based on deep learning. BPSegSys achieves experienced-doctor-level nerve identification performance in various experiments. We evaluate BPSegSys' performance in terms of intersection-over-union (IoU), a commonly used performance measure for segmentation experiments. Considering three dataset groups in our established public dataset, the IoU of BPSegSys are 0.5238, 0.4715, and 0.5029, respectively, which exceed the IoU 0.5205, 0.4704, and 0.4979 of experienced doctors. In addition, we show that BPSegSys can help doctors identify brachial plexus trunks more accurately, with IoU improvement up to 27%, which has significant clinical application value. 超声引导神经阻滞麻醉（UGNB）是一种高科技视觉神经阻滞麻醉方法，可以实时观察目标神经及其周围结构、穿刺针的推进情况以及局麻药的扩散情况。 UGNB的关键是神经识别。借助深度学习方法，可以实现神经的自动识别或分割，辅助医生准确高效地完成神经阻滞麻醉。在这里，我们建立了一个包含 320 张臂丛神经 (BP) 超声图像的公共数据集。三位经验丰富的医生共同制作BP分割真实值并标记臂丛神经干。我们设计了一个基于深度学习的臂丛神经分割系统（BPSegSys）。 BPSegSys 在各种实验中实现了经验丰富的医生级别的神经识别性能。我们根据交并并集 (IoU) 来评估 BPSegSys 的性能，IoU 是分割实验的常用性能衡量标准。考虑到我们建立的公共数据集中的三个数据集组，BPSegSys 的 IoU 分别为 0.5238、0.4715 和 0.5029，超过了经验丰富的医生的 IoU 0.5205、0.4704 和 0.4979。此外，我们表明BPSegSys可以帮助医生更准确地识别臂丛神经干，IoU改善高达27%，具有显着的临床应用价值。 开发基于深度学习的臂丛神经分割系统，并与医生手动分割进行比较 Yu Wang,Binbin Zhu,Lingsi Kong,Jianlin Wang,Bin Gao,Jianhua Wang,Dingcheng Tian,Yudong Yao eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Daisuke Niizumi,Daiki Takeuchi,Yasunori Ohishi,Noboru Harada,Kunio Kashino
title: Composing General Audio Representation by Fusing Multilayer Features of a Pre-trained Model
title_zh: 通过融合预训练模型的多层特征来组成通用音频表示
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures and 4 tables. Accepted by EUSIPCO 2022
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures and 4 tables. Accepted by EUSIPCO 2022
abstract: Many application studies rely on audio DNN models pre-trained on a large-scale dataset as essential feature extractors, and they extract features from the last layers. In this study, we focus on our finding that the middle layer features of existing supervised pre-trained models are more effective than the late layer features for some tasks. We propose a simple approach to compose features effective for general-purpose applications, consisting of two steps: (1) calculating feature vectors along the time frame from middle/late layer outputs, and (2) fusing them. This approach improves the utility of frequency and channel information in downstream processes, and combines the effectiveness of middle and late layer features for different tasks. As a result, the feature vectors become effective for general purposes. In the experiments using VGGish, PANNs' CNN14, and AST on nine downstream tasks, we first show that each layer output of these models serves different tasks. Then, we demonstrate that the proposed approach significantly improves their performance and brings it to a level comparable to that of the state-of-the-art. In particular, the performance of the non-semantic speech (NOSS) tasks greatly improves, especially on Speech commands V2 with VGGish of +77.1 (14.3% to 91.4%).
summary: Many application studies rely on audio DNN models pre-trained on a large-scale dataset as essential feature extractors, and they extract features from the last layers. In this study, we focus on our finding that the middle layer features of existing supervised pre-trained models are more effective than the late layer features for some tasks. We propose a simple approach to compose features effective for general-purpose applications, consisting of two steps: (1) calculating feature vectors along the time frame from middle/late layer outputs, and (2) fusing them. This approach improves the utility of frequency and channel information in downstream processes, and combines the effectiveness of middle and late layer features for different tasks. As a result, the feature vectors become effective for general purposes. In the experiments using VGGish, PANNs' CNN14, and AST on nine downstream tasks, we first show that each layer output of these models serves different tasks. Then, we demonstrate that the proposed approach significantly improves their performance and brings it to a level comparable to that of the state-of-the-art. In particular, the performance of the non-semantic speech (NOSS) tasks greatly improves, especially on Speech commands V2 with VGGish of +77.1 (14.3% to 91.4%).
abstract_zh: 许多应用研究依赖于在大规模数据集上预训练的音频 DNN 模型作为基本特征提取器，并从最后一层提取特征。在本研究中，我们重点关注我们的发现，即对于某些任务，现有监督预训练模型的中间层特征比后期层特征更有效。我们提出了一种简单的方法来组合对通用应用程序有效的特征，包括两个步骤：（1）从中/后期层输出沿时间范围计算特征向量，以及（2）融合它们。这种方法提高了下游过程中频率和信道信息的利用率，并结合了中后期层特征对不同任务的有效性。结果，特征向量对于通用目的变得有效。在使用 VGGish、PANN 的 CNN14 和 AST 进行九个下游任务的实验中，我们首先表明这些模型的每一层输出服务于不同的任务。然后，我们证明所提出的方法显着提高了它们的性能，并将其达到与最先进的水平相当的水平。特别是，非语义语音 (NOSS) 任务的性能大大提高，尤其是在语音命令 V2 上，VGGish 为 +77.1（14.3% 至 91.4%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过融合预训练音频模型中间层与后期层特征的方法，构建更通用的音频表示以提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖预训练模型最后层特征，但发现中间层特征在特定任务中更有效，需探索融合多层特征以提升通用性。
AI.method: 分两步融合特征：1）沿时间轴计算中间/后期层特征向量；2）通过融合操作整合频率与通道信息，结合不同层特征优势。
AI.result: 在VGGish、PANNs-CNN14和AST上九个任务实验显示，该方法显著提升性能，尤其在非语义语音任务中，VGGish于Speech commands V2提升77.1个百分点至91.4%。
AI.conclusion: 融合多层特征可增强预训练模型通用性，为不同任务提供更有效的特征表示，效果接近当前最优水平。

search_text: Composing General Audio Representation by Fusing Multilayer Features of a Pre-trained Model 通过融合预训练模型的多层特征来组成通用音频表示 Many application studies rely on audio DNN models pre-trained on a large-scale dataset as essential feature extractors, and they extract features from the last layers. In this study, we focus on our finding that the middle layer features of existing supervised pre-trained models are more effective than the late layer features for some tasks. We propose a simple approach to compose features effective for general-purpose applications, consisting of two steps: (1) calculating feature vectors along the time frame from middle/late layer outputs, and (2) fusing them. This approach improves the utility of frequency and channel information in downstream processes, and combines the effectiveness of middle and late layer features for different tasks. As a result, the feature vectors become effective for general purposes. In the experiments using VGGish, PANNs' CNN14, and AST on nine downstream tasks, we first show that each layer output of these models serves different tasks. Then, we demonstrate that the proposed approach significantly improves their performance and brings it to a level comparable to that of the state-of-the-art. In particular, the performance of the non-semantic speech (NOSS) tasks greatly improves, especially on Speech commands V2 with VGGish of +77.1 (14.3% to 91.4%). 许多应用研究依赖于在大规模数据集上预训练的音频 DNN 模型作为基本特征提取器，并从最后一层提取特征。在本研究中，我们重点关注我们的发现，即对于某些任务，现有监督预训练模型的中间层特征比后期层特征更有效。我们提出了一种简单的方法来组合对通用应用程序有效的特征，包括两个步骤：（1）从中/后期层输出沿时间范围计算特征向量，以及（2）融合它们。这种方法提高了下游过程中频率和信道信息的利用率，并结合了中后期层特征对不同任务的有效性。结果，特征向量对于通用目的变得有效。在使用 VGGish、PANN 的 CNN14 和 AST 进行九个下游任务的实验中，我们首先表明这些模型的每一层输出服务于不同的任务。然后，我们证明所提出的方法显着提高了它们的性能，并将其达到与最先进的水平相当的水平。特别是，非语义语音 (NOSS) 任务的性能大大提高，尤其是在语音命令 V2 上，VGGish 为 +77.1（14.3% 至 91.4%）。 本文提出一种通过融合预训练音频模型中间层与后期层特征的方法，构建更通用的音频表示以提升下游任务性能。 Daisuke Niizumi,Daiki Takeuchi,Yasunori Ohishi,Noboru Harada,Kunio Kashino eess.AS,cs.SD

title: Planning to Practice: Efficient Online Fine-Tuning by Composing Goals in Latent Space
title_zh: 规划实践：通过在潜在空间中构建目标进行高效在线微调
abstract: General-purpose robots require diverse repertoires of behaviors to complete challenging tasks in real-world unstructured environments. To address this issue, goal-conditioned reinforcement learning aims to acquire policies that can reach configurable goals for a wide range of tasks on command. However, such goal-conditioned policies are notoriously difficult and time-consuming to train from scratch. In this paper, we propose Planning to Practice (PTP), a method that makes it practical to train goal-conditioned policies for long-horizon tasks that require multiple distinct types of interactions to solve. Our approach is based on two key ideas. First, we decompose the goal-reaching problem hierarchically, with a high-level planner that sets intermediate subgoals using conditional subgoal generators in the latent space for a low-level model-free policy. Second, we propose a hybrid approach which first pre-trains both the conditional subgoal generator and the policy on previously collected data through offline reinforcement learning, and then fine-tunes the policy via online exploration. This fine-tuning process is itself facilitated by the planned subgoals, which breaks down the original target task into short-horizon goal-reaching tasks that are significantly easier to learn. We conduct experiments in both the simulation and real world, in which the policy is pre-trained on demonstrations of short primitive behaviors and fine-tuned for temporally extended tasks that are unseen in the offline data. Our experimental results show that PTP can generate feasible sequences of subgoals that enable the policy to efficiently solve the target tasks.
summary: General-purpose robots require diverse repertoires of behaviors to complete challenging tasks in real-world unstructured environments. To address this issue, goal-conditioned reinforcement learning aims to acquire policies that can reach configurable goals for a wide range of tasks on command. However, such goal-conditioned policies are notoriously difficult and time-consuming to train from scratch. In this paper, we propose Planning to Practice (PTP), a method that makes it practical to train goal-conditioned policies for long-horizon tasks that require multiple distinct types of interactions to solve. Our approach is based on two key ideas. First, we decompose the goal-reaching problem hierarchically, with a high-level planner that sets intermediate subgoals using conditional subgoal generators in the latent space for a low-level model-free policy. Second, we propose a hybrid approach which first pre-trains both the conditional subgoal generator and the policy on previously collected data through offline reinforcement learning, and then fine-tunes the policy via online exploration. This fine-tuning process is itself facilitated by the planned subgoals, which breaks down the original target task into short-horizon goal-reaching tasks that are significantly easier to learn. We conduct experiments in both the simulation and real world, in which the policy is pre-trained on demonstrations of short primitive behaviors and fine-tuned for temporally extended tasks that are unseen in the offline data. Our experimental results show that PTP can generate feasible sequences of subgoals that enable the policy to efficiently solve the target tasks.
abstract_zh: 通用机器人需要多种行为才能在现实世界的非结构化环境中完成具有挑战性的任务。为了解决这个问题，目标条件强化学习旨在获取能够实现各种命令任务的可配置目标的策略。然而，众所周知，这种以目标为条件的策略从头开始训练非常困难且耗时。在本文中，我们提出了从规划到实践（PTP）的方法，该方法使得针对需要多种不同类型的交互来解决的长期任务训练目标条件策略变得可行。我们的方法基于两个关键思想。首先，我们使用高级规划器分层分解目标达成问题，该规划器使用潜在空间中的条件子目标生成器设置中间子目标，以实现低级无模型策略。其次，我们提出了一种混合方法，首先通过离线强化学习对条件子目标生成器和先前收集的数据进行预训练，然后通过在线探索对策略进行微调。这种微调过程本身是由计划的子目标促进的，它将原始目标任务分解为短期目标实现任务，这些任务明显更容易学习。我们在模拟和现实世界中进行了实验，其中策略针对短原始行为的演示进行了预训练，并针对离线数据中看不到的临时扩展任务进行了微调。我们的实验结果表明，PTP 可以生成可行的子目标序列，使策略能够有效地解决目标任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Planning to Practice (PTP)方法，通过潜在空间中的子目标组合与分层规划，解决长期复杂任务中目标条件策略的高效在线微调问题。
AI.motivation: 通用机器人需应对复杂多变的现实环境，但传统目标条件强化学习训练耗时且难以处理长期任务，亟需更高效的学习框架。
AI.method: PTP采用分层架构：高层规划器在潜在空间生成条件子目标，分解任务为短期子任务；结合离线预训练与在线微调，利用子目标引导策略学习。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实环境实验中，PTP生成的子目标序列显著提升策略学习效率，成功解决预训练数据中未出现的长期任务。
AI.conclusion: PTP通过目标分解与混合训练策略，有效解决了长期任务的在线微调难题，为通用机器人行为学习提供新思路。

tldr: 本文提出Planning to Practice (PTP)方法，通过潜在空间中的子目标组合与分层规划，解决长期复杂任务中目标条件策略的高效在线微调问题。

search_text: Planning to Practice: Efficient Online Fine-Tuning by Composing Goals in Latent Space 规划实践：通过在潜在空间中构建目标进行高效在线微调 General-purpose robots require diverse repertoires of behaviors to complete challenging tasks in real-world unstructured environments. To address this issue, goal-conditioned reinforcement learning aims to acquire policies that can reach configurable goals for a wide range of tasks on command. However, such goal-conditioned policies are notoriously difficult and time-consuming to train from scratch. In this paper, we propose Planning to Practice (PTP), a method that makes it practical to train goal-conditioned policies for long-horizon tasks that require multiple distinct types of interactions to solve. Our approach is based on two key ideas. First, we decompose the goal-reaching problem hierarchically, with a high-level planner that sets intermediate subgoals using conditional subgoal generators in the latent space for a low-level model-free policy. Second, we propose a hybrid approach which first pre-trains both the conditional subgoal generator and the policy on previously collected data through offline reinforcement learning, and then fine-tunes the policy via online exploration. This fine-tuning process is itself facilitated by the planned subgoals, which breaks down the original target task into short-horizon goal-reaching tasks that are significantly easier to learn. We conduct experiments in both the simulation and real world, in which the policy is pre-trained on demonstrations of short primitive behaviors and fine-tuned for temporally extended tasks that are unseen in the offline data. Our experimental results show that PTP can generate feasible sequences of subgoals that enable the policy to efficiently solve the target tasks. 通用机器人需要多种行为才能在现实世界的非结构化环境中完成具有挑战性的任务。为了解决这个问题，目标条件强化学习旨在获取能够实现各种命令任务的可配置目标的策略。然而，众所周知，这种以目标为条件的策略从头开始训练非常困难且耗时。在本文中，我们提出了从规划到实践（PTP）的方法，该方法使得针对需要多种不同类型的交互来解决的长期任务训练目标条件策略变得可行。我们的方法基于两个关键思想。首先，我们使用高级规划器分层分解目标达成问题，该规划器使用潜在空间中的条件子目标生成器设置中间子目标，以实现低级无模型策略。其次，我们提出了一种混合方法，首先通过离线强化学习对条件子目标生成器和先前收集的数据进行预训练，然后通过在线探索对策略进行微调。这种微调过程本身是由计划的子目标促进的，它将原始目标任务分解为短期目标实现任务，这些任务明显更容易学习。我们在模拟和现实世界中进行了实验，其中策略针对短原始行为的演示进行了预训练，并针对离线数据中看不到的临时扩展任务进行了微调。我们的实验结果表明，PTP 可以生成可行的子目标序列，使策略能够有效地解决目标任务。 本文提出Planning to Practice (PTP)方法，通过潜在空间中的子目标组合与分层规划，解决长期复杂任务中目标条件策略的高效在线微调问题。 Kuan Fang,Patrick Yin,Ashvin Nair,Sergey Levine cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tommi Keski-Filppula,Marko Nikki,Marianne Haapea,Naglis Ramanauskas,Osmo Tervonen
title: Using artificial intelligence to detect chest X-rays with no significant findings in a primary health care setting in Oulu, Finland
title_zh: 在芬兰奥卢的初级卫生保健机构中使用人工智能检测胸部 X 光检查但没有发现任何重大发现
abstract: Objectives: To assess the use of artificial intelligence-based software in ruling out chest X-ray cases, with no significant findings in a primary health care setting. Methods: In this retrospective study, a commercially available artificial intelligence (AI) software was used to analyse 10 000 chest X-rays of Finnish primary health care patients. In studies with a mismatch between an AI normal report and the original radiologist report, a consensus read by two board-certified radiologists was conducted to make the final diagnosis. Results: After the exclusion of cases not meeting the study criteria, 9579 cases were analysed by AI. Of these cases, 4451 were considered normal in the original radiologist report and 4644 after the consensus reading. The number of cases correctly found nonsignificant by AI was 1692 (17.7% of all studies and 36.4% of studies with no significant findings). After the consensus read, there were nine confirmed false-negative studies. These studies included four cases of slightly enlarged heart size, four cases of slightly increased pulmonary opacification and one case with a small unilateral pleural effusion. This gives the AI a sensitivity of 99.8% (95% CI= 99.65-99.92) and specificity of 36.4 % (95% CI= 35.05-37.84) for recognising significant pathology on a chest X-ray. Conclusions: AI was able to correctly rule out 36.4% of chest X-rays with no significant findings of primary health care patients, with a minimal number of false negatives that would lead to effectively no compromise on patient safety. No critical findings were missed by the software.

abstract_zh: 目标：评估基于人工智能的软件在排除初级卫生保健机构中没有重大发现的情况下胸部 X 光检查病例的使用情况。方法：在这项回顾性研究中，使用商用人工智能 (AI) 软件分析了芬兰初级卫生保健患者的 10 000 张胸部 X 光片。在人工智能正常报告与原始放射科医生报告不匹配的研究中，由两名经过委员会认证的放射科医生阅读共识来做出最终诊断。结果：排除不符合研究标准的病例后，对9579例病例进行AI分析。其中，4451 例在最初的放射科医生报告中被认为是正常的，4644 例在共识解读后被认为是正常的。 AI 正确发现不显着的病例数量为 1692 个（占所有研究的 17.7%，以及没有显着发现的研究的 36.4%）。共识宣读后，有九项经证实的假阴性研究。这些研究包括四例心脏尺寸轻微增大的病例、四例肺部混浊轻微增加的病例和一例少量单侧胸腔积液的病例。这使得 AI 在识别胸部 X 射线上的显着病理时具有 99.8% (95% CI= 99.65-99.92) 的敏感性和 36.4% (95% CI= 35.05-37.84) 的特异性。结论：AI 能够正确排除 36.4% 的初级卫生保健患者胸部 X 光检查无明显发现的患者，假阴性数量极少，不会对患者安全造成影响。该软件没有遗漏任何重要发现。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了人工智能在芬兰奥卢地区初级卫生保健环境中通过胸部X光片排除无显著发现病例的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 旨在验证人工智能软件在初级医疗场景中准确识别无显著胸部X光片的能力，以减少不必要的进一步检查并提高诊断效率。
AI.method: 采用回顾性研究，使用商业AI软件分析10,000张芬兰初级医疗患者的胸部X光片，对AI与放射科医生报告不一致的病例进行两位认证放射科医生的共识复核。
AI.result: AI正确识别出1692例无显著发现病例（占总研究的17.7%，无显著发现病例的36.4%），共识复核后AI的敏感度为99.8%，特异度为36.4%，仅出现9例假阴性。
AI.conclusion: AI能够安全排除36.4%的无显著发现胸部X光片，假阴性极少且未遗漏关键病变，适用于初级医疗场景的初步筛查。
