authors_text: Haoran You,Baopu Li,Huihong Shi,Yonggan Fu,Yingyan Celine Lin
title: ShiftAddNAS: Hardware-Inspired Search for More Accurate and Efficient Neural Networks
title_zh: ShiftAddNAS：受硬件启发搜索更准确、更高效的神经网络
abstract: Neural networks (NNs) with intensive multiplications (e.g., convolutions and transformers) are capable yet power hungry, impeding their more extensive deployment into resource-constrained devices. As such, multiplication-free networks, which follow a common practice in energy-efficient hardware implementation to parameterize NNs with more efficient operators (e.g., bitwise shifts and additions), have gained growing attention. However, multiplication-free networks usually under-perform their vanilla counterparts in terms of the achieved accuracy. To this end, this work advocates hybrid NNs that consist of both powerful yet costly multiplications and efficient yet less powerful operators for marrying the best of both worlds, and proposes ShiftAddNAS, which can automatically search for more accurate and more efficient NNs. Our ShiftAddNAS highlights two enablers. Specifically, it integrates (1) the first hybrid search space that incorporates both multiplication-based and multiplication-free operators for facilitating the development of both accurate and efficient hybrid NNs; and (2) a novel weight sharing strategy that enables effective weight sharing among different operators that follow heterogeneous distributions (e.g., Gaussian for convolutions vs. Laplacian for add operators) and simultaneously leads to a largely reduced supernet size and much better searched networks. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on various models, datasets, and tasks consistently validate the efficacy of ShiftAddNAS, e.g., achieving up to a +7.7% higher accuracy or a +4.9 better BLEU score compared to state-of-the-art NN, while leading to up to 93% or 69% energy and latency savings, respectively. Codes and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/RICE-EIC/ShiftAddNAS.
summary: Neural networks (NNs) with intensive multiplications (e.g., convolutions and transformers) are capable yet power hungry, impeding their more extensive deployment into resource-constrained devices. As such, multiplication-free networks, which follow a common practice in energy-efficient hardware implementation to parameterize NNs with more efficient operators (e.g., bitwise shifts and additions), have gained growing attention. However, multiplication-free networks usually under-perform their vanilla counterparts in terms of the achieved accuracy. To this end, this work advocates hybrid NNs that consist of both powerful yet costly multiplications and efficient yet less powerful operators for marrying the best of both worlds, and proposes ShiftAddNAS, which can automatically search for more accurate and more efficient NNs. Our ShiftAddNAS highlights two enablers. Specifically, it integrates (1) the first hybrid search space that incorporates both multiplication-based and multiplication-free operators for facilitating the development of both accurate and efficient hybrid NNs; and (2) a novel weight sharing strategy that enables effective weight sharing among different operators that follow heterogeneous distributions (e.g., Gaussian for convolutions vs. Laplacian for add operators) and simultaneously leads to a largely reduced supernet size and much better searched networks. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on various models, datasets, and tasks consistently validate the efficacy of ShiftAddNAS, e.g., achieving up to a +7.7% higher accuracy or a +4.9 better BLEU score compared to state-of-the-art NN, while leading to up to 93% or 69% energy and latency savings, respectively. Codes and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/RICE-EIC/ShiftAddNAS.
abstract_zh: 具有密集乘法（例如卷积和变换器）的神经网络（NN）功能强大，但耗电量大，这阻碍了它们在资源有限的设备中更广泛的部署。因此，无乘法网络遵循节能硬件实现中的常见做法，用更高效的运算符（例如按位移位和加法）对神经网络进行参数化，已获得越来越多的关注。然而，无乘法网络在所达到的精度方面通常表现不佳。为此，这项工作提倡混合神经网络，其中包含强大但昂贵的乘法和高效但功能较弱的算子，以结合两者的优点，并提出 ShiftAddNAS，它可以自动搜索更准确和更高效的神经网络。我们的 ShiftAddNAS 突出了两个推动因素。具体来说，它集成了（1）第一个混合搜索空间，其中包含基于乘法和无乘法运算符，以促进准确且高效的混合神经网络的开发； （2）一种新颖的权重共享策略，可以在遵循异构分布的不同算子之间实现有效的权重共享（例如，卷积的高斯与加法算子的拉普拉斯算子），同时导致超网大小大大减小和搜索效果更好。对各种模型、数据集和任务的广泛实验和消融研究一致验证了 ShiftAddNAS 的功效，例如，与最先进的 NN 相比，准确率提高了 7.7%，BLEU 分数提高了 4.9%，同时分别节省了 93% 或 69% 的能量和延迟。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/RICE-EIC/ShiftAddNAS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ShiftAddNAS的硬件启发式网络搜索方法，用于设计更准确且更高效的神经网络。
AI.motivation: 现有的神经网络通常依赖乘法操作，这些操作虽然强大但耗能高，限制了其在资源受限设备上的部署。而乘法无关网络虽然更节能，但精度通常较低，因此需要一种混合方法来平衡精度与效率。
AI.method: 本文提出了ShiftAddNAS，通过引入混合搜索空间和新颖的权重共享策略，自动搜索更准确且更高效的神经网络。混合搜索空间结合了基于乘法和无乘法的操作符，权重共享策略则优化了不同操作符之间的权重共享。
AI.result: 实验表明，ShiftAddNAS在多个模型、数据集和任务上均表现出色，例如在精度上比现有方法提高了7.7%，BLEU分数提高了4.9，同时在能耗和延迟上分别节省了93%和69%。
AI.conclusion: ShiftAddNAS通过混合搜索空间和权重共享策略，成功实现了更准确且更高效的神经网络，为资源受限设备上的部署提供了新思路。

search_text: ShiftAddNAS: Hardware-Inspired Search for More Accurate and Efficient Neural Networks ShiftAddNAS：受硬件启发搜索更准确、更高效的神经网络 Neural networks (NNs) with intensive multiplications (e.g., convolutions and transformers) are capable yet power hungry, impeding their more extensive deployment into resource-constrained devices. As such, multiplication-free networks, which follow a common practice in energy-efficient hardware implementation to parameterize NNs with more efficient operators (e.g., bitwise shifts and additions), have gained growing attention. However, multiplication-free networks usually under-perform their vanilla counterparts in terms of the achieved accuracy. To this end, this work advocates hybrid NNs that consist of both powerful yet costly multiplications and efficient yet less powerful operators for marrying the best of both worlds, and proposes ShiftAddNAS, which can automatically search for more accurate and more efficient NNs. Our ShiftAddNAS highlights two enablers. Specifically, it integrates (1) the first hybrid search space that incorporates both multiplication-based and multiplication-free operators for facilitating the development of both accurate and efficient hybrid NNs; and (2) a novel weight sharing strategy that enables effective weight sharing among different operators that follow heterogeneous distributions (e.g., Gaussian for convolutions vs. Laplacian for add operators) and simultaneously leads to a largely reduced supernet size and much better searched networks. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on various models, datasets, and tasks consistently validate the efficacy of ShiftAddNAS, e.g., achieving up to a +7.7% higher accuracy or a +4.9 better BLEU score compared to state-of-the-art NN, while leading to up to 93% or 69% energy and latency savings, respectively. Codes and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/RICE-EIC/ShiftAddNAS. 具有密集乘法（例如卷积和变换器）的神经网络（NN）功能强大，但耗电量大，这阻碍了它们在资源有限的设备中更广泛的部署。因此，无乘法网络遵循节能硬件实现中的常见做法，用更高效的运算符（例如按位移位和加法）对神经网络进行参数化，已获得越来越多的关注。然而，无乘法网络在所达到的精度方面通常表现不佳。为此，这项工作提倡混合神经网络，其中包含强大但昂贵的乘法和高效但功能较弱的算子，以结合两者的优点，并提出 ShiftAddNAS，它可以自动搜索更准确和更高效的神经网络。我们的 ShiftAddNAS 突出了两个推动因素。具体来说，它集成了（1）第一个混合搜索空间，其中包含基于乘法和无乘法运算符，以促进准确且高效的混合神经网络的开发； （2）一种新颖的权重共享策略，可以在遵循异构分布的不同算子之间实现有效的权重共享（例如，卷积的高斯与加法算子的拉普拉斯算子），同时导致超网大小大大减小和搜索效果更好。对各种模型、数据集和任务的广泛实验和消融研究一致验证了 ShiftAddNAS 的功效，例如，与最先进的 NN 相比，准确率提高了 7.7%，BLEU 分数提高了 4.9%，同时分别节省了 93% 或 69% 的能量和延迟。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/RICE-EIC/ShiftAddNAS 获取。 本文提出了一种名为ShiftAddNAS的硬件启发式网络搜索方法，用于设计更准确且更高效的神经网络。 Haoran You,Baopu Li,Huihong Shi,Yonggan Fu,Yingyan Celine Lin cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Soham Vyas,Yuvraj Goyal,Neel Bhatt,Sanskar Bhuwania,Hardik Patel,Shakti Mishra,Brijesh Tripathi
title: Forecasting Solar Power Generation on the basis of Predictive and Corrective Maintenance Activities
title_zh: 根据预测性和纠正性维护活动预测太阳能发电量
abstract: Solar energy forecasting has seen tremendous growth in the last decade using historical time series collected from a weather station, such as weather variables wind speed and direction, solar radiance, and temperature. It helps in the overall management of solar power plants. However, the solar power plant regularly requires preventive and corrective maintenance activities that further impact energy production. This paper presents a novel work for forecasting solar power energy production based on maintenance activities, problems observed at a power plant, and weather data. The results accomplished on the datasets obtained from the 1MW solar power plant of PDEU (our university) that has generated data set with 13 columns as daily entries from 2012 to 2020. There are 12 structured columns and one unstructured column with manual text entries about different maintenance activities, problems observed, and weather conditions daily. The unstructured column is used to create a new feature column vector using Hash Map, flag words, and stop words. The final dataset comprises five important feature vector columns based on correlation and causality analysis.
summary: Solar energy forecasting has seen tremendous growth in the last decade using historical time series collected from a weather station, such as weather variables wind speed and direction, solar radiance, and temperature. It helps in the overall management of solar power plants. However, the solar power plant regularly requires preventive and corrective maintenance activities that further impact energy production. This paper presents a novel work for forecasting solar power energy production based on maintenance activities, problems observed at a power plant, and weather data. The results accomplished on the datasets obtained from the 1MW solar power plant of PDEU (our university) that has generated data set with 13 columns as daily entries from 2012 to 2020. There are 12 structured columns and one unstructured column with manual text entries about different maintenance activities, problems observed, and weather conditions daily. The unstructured column is used to create a new feature column vector using Hash Map, flag words, and stop words. The final dataset comprises five important feature vector columns based on correlation and causality analysis.
abstract_zh: 使用从气象站收集的历史时间序列（例如天气变量风速和风向、太阳辐射率和温度），太阳能预测在过去十年中取得了巨大的发展。它有助于太阳能发电厂的整体管理。然而，太阳能发电厂定期需要预防性和纠正性维护活动，这会进一步影响能源生产。本文提出了一项基于维护活动、发电厂观察到的问题和天气数据来预测太阳能发电量的新颖工作。结果是在 PDEU（我们大学）的 1MW 太阳能发电厂获得的数据集上完成的，该数据集生成了 2012 年至 2020 年期间包含 13 列作为每日条目的数据集。其中有 12 个结构化列和 1 个非结构化列，其中包含有关不同维护活动、观察到的问题和每日天气状况的手动文本条目。非结构化列用于使用哈希图、标志词和停用词创建新的特征列向量。最终数据集包含基于相关性和因果关系分析的五个重要特征向量列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合维护活动、问题观察和天气数据的太阳能发电预测方法。
AI.motivation: 传统太阳能预测仅依赖天气数据，但维护活动对发电量有显著影响，需纳入预测模型以提高准确性。
AI.method: 利用非结构化文本数据通过哈希表、标志词和停用词处理生成特征向量，结合相关性与因果分析提取五个关键特征列。
AI.result: 基于PDEU 1MW电站2012-2020年数据集，构建包含五个重要特征向量的预测模型。
AI.conclusion: 整合维护活动数据与天气信息可提升太阳能发电预测精度，为电站运维管理提供支持。

title: Unbiased Math Word Problems Benchmark for Mitigating Solving Bias
title_zh: 减少解决偏差的无偏见数学应用题基准
abstract: In this paper, we revisit the solving bias when evaluating models on current Math Word Problem (MWP) benchmarks. However, current solvers exist solving bias which consists of data bias and learning bias due to biased dataset and improper training strategy. Our experiments verify MWP solvers are easy to be biased by the biased training datasets which do not cover diverse questions for each problem narrative of all MWPs, thus a solver can only learn shallow heuristics rather than deep semantics for understanding problems. Besides, an MWP can be naturally solved by multiple equivalent equations while current datasets take only one of the equivalent equations as ground truth, forcing the model to match the labeled ground truth and ignoring other equivalent equations. Here, we first introduce a novel MWP dataset named UnbiasedMWP which is constructed by varying the grounded expressions in our collected data and annotating them with corresponding multiple new questions manually. Then, to further mitigate learning bias, we propose a Dynamic Target Selection (DTS) Strategy to dynamically select more suitable target expressions according to the longest prefix match between the current model output and candidate equivalent equations which are obtained by applying commutative law during training. The results show that our UnbiasedMWP has significantly fewer biases than its original data and other datasets, posing a promising benchmark for fairly evaluating the solvers' reasoning skills rather than matching nearest neighbors. And the solvers trained with our DTS achieve higher accuracies on multiple MWP benchmarks. The source code is available at https://github.com/yangzhch6/UnbiasedMWP.
summary: In this paper, we revisit the solving bias when evaluating models on current Math Word Problem (MWP) benchmarks. However, current solvers exist solving bias which consists of data bias and learning bias due to biased dataset and improper training strategy. Our experiments verify MWP solvers are easy to be biased by the biased training datasets which do not cover diverse questions for each problem narrative of all MWPs, thus a solver can only learn shallow heuristics rather than deep semantics for understanding problems. Besides, an MWP can be naturally solved by multiple equivalent equations while current datasets take only one of the equivalent equations as ground truth, forcing the model to match the labeled ground truth and ignoring other equivalent equations. Here, we first introduce a novel MWP dataset named UnbiasedMWP which is constructed by varying the grounded expressions in our collected data and annotating them with corresponding multiple new questions manually. Then, to further mitigate learning bias, we propose a Dynamic Target Selection (DTS) Strategy to dynamically select more suitable target expressions according to the longest prefix match between the current model output and candidate equivalent equations which are obtained by applying commutative law during training. The results show that our UnbiasedMWP has significantly fewer biases than its original data and other datasets, posing a promising benchmark for fairly evaluating the solvers' reasoning skills rather than matching nearest neighbors. And the solvers trained with our DTS achieve higher accuracies on multiple MWP benchmarks. The source code is available at https://github.com/yangzhch6/UnbiasedMWP.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们重新审视了在当前数学应用题（MWP）基准上评估模型时的求解偏差。然而，当前的求解器存在求解偏差，其中包括由于数据集偏差和训练策略不当而导致的数据偏差和学习偏差。我们的实验验证了 MWP 求解器很容易受到有偏差的训练数据集的影响，这些数据集并未涵盖所有 MWP 的每个问题叙述的不同问题，因此求解器只能学习浅层启发式方法，而无法学习深层语义来理解问题。此外，MWP 可以自然地通过多个等效方程求解，而当前数据集仅采用一个等效方程作为基本事实，迫使模型匹配标记的基本事实并忽略其他等效方程。在这里，我们首先介绍一个名为 UnbiasedMWP 的新型 MWP 数据集，该数据集是通过改变收集的数据中的基础表达式并手动用相应的多个新问题对其进行注释来构建的。然后，为了进一步减轻学习偏差，我们提出了动态目标选择（DTS）策略，根据当前模型输出与训练期间应用交换律获得的候选等价方程之间的最长前缀匹配，动态选择更合适的目标表达式。结果表明，我们的 UnbiasedMWP 的偏差明显少于原始数据和其他数据集，为公平评估求解器的推理技能而不是匹配最近邻居提供了一个有希望的基准。使用我们的 DTS 训练的求解器在多个 MWP 基准上实现了更高的精度。源代码可在 https://github.com/yangzhch6/UnbiasedMWP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为UnbiasedMWP的新数学习题基准数据集及动态目标选择策略（DTS），以减少解题模型中的偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数学习题基准数据集存在数据偏差和训练策略偏差，导致模型依赖浅层启发式方法而非深层语义理解，且忽略等价方程的多样性。
AI.method: 构建UnbiasedMWP数据集（通过多样化表达式和人工标注多问题），并提出DTS策略（基于最长前缀匹配动态选择目标表达式）以缓解学习偏差。
AI.result: UnbiasedMWP显著减少偏差，模型在该数据集上训练后，在多个基准测试中准确率提升，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集和DTS策略为公平评估模型推理能力提供了更优基准，推动数学问题求解模型向深度语义理解发展。

search_text: Unbiased Math Word Problems Benchmark for Mitigating Solving Bias 减少解决偏差的无偏见数学应用题基准 In this paper, we revisit the solving bias when evaluating models on current Math Word Problem (MWP) benchmarks. However, current solvers exist solving bias which consists of data bias and learning bias due to biased dataset and improper training strategy. Our experiments verify MWP solvers are easy to be biased by the biased training datasets which do not cover diverse questions for each problem narrative of all MWPs, thus a solver can only learn shallow heuristics rather than deep semantics for understanding problems. Besides, an MWP can be naturally solved by multiple equivalent equations while current datasets take only one of the equivalent equations as ground truth, forcing the model to match the labeled ground truth and ignoring other equivalent equations. Here, we first introduce a novel MWP dataset named UnbiasedMWP which is constructed by varying the grounded expressions in our collected data and annotating them with corresponding multiple new questions manually. Then, to further mitigate learning bias, we propose a Dynamic Target Selection (DTS) Strategy to dynamically select more suitable target expressions according to the longest prefix match between the current model output and candidate equivalent equations which are obtained by applying commutative law during training. The results show that our UnbiasedMWP has significantly fewer biases than its original data and other datasets, posing a promising benchmark for fairly evaluating the solvers' reasoning skills rather than matching nearest neighbors. And the solvers trained with our DTS achieve higher accuracies on multiple MWP benchmarks. The source code is available at https://github.com/yangzhch6/UnbiasedMWP. 在本文中，我们重新审视了在当前数学应用题（MWP）基准上评估模型时的求解偏差。然而，当前的求解器存在求解偏差，其中包括由于数据集偏差和训练策略不当而导致的数据偏差和学习偏差。我们的实验验证了 MWP 求解器很容易受到有偏差的训练数据集的影响，这些数据集并未涵盖所有 MWP 的每个问题叙述的不同问题，因此求解器只能学习浅层启发式方法，而无法学习深层语义来理解问题。此外，MWP 可以自然地通过多个等效方程求解，而当前数据集仅采用一个等效方程作为基本事实，迫使模型匹配标记的基本事实并忽略其他等效方程。在这里，我们首先介绍一个名为 UnbiasedMWP 的新型 MWP 数据集，该数据集是通过改变收集的数据中的基础表达式并手动用相应的多个新问题对其进行注释来构建的。然后，为了进一步减轻学习偏差，我们提出了动态目标选择（DTS）策略，根据当前模型输出与训练期间应用交换律获得的候选等价方程之间的最长前缀匹配，动态选择更合适的目标表达式。结果表明，我们的 UnbiasedMWP 的偏差明显少于原始数据和其他数据集，为公平评估求解器的推理技能而不是匹配最近邻居提供了一个有希望的基准。使用我们的 DTS 训练的求解器在多个 MWP 基准上实现了更高的精度。源代码可在 https://github.com/yangzhch6/UnbiasedMWP 获取。 本文提出一个名为UnbiasedMWP的新数学习题基准数据集及动态目标选择策略（DTS），以减少解题模型中的偏差问题。 Zhicheng Yang,Jinghui Qin,Jiaqi Chen,Xiaodan Liang cs.AI,cs.CL

title: Computerized Tomography Pulmonary Angiography Image Simulation using Cycle Generative Adversarial Network from Chest CT imaging in Pulmonary Embolism Patients
title_zh: 使用肺栓塞患者胸部 CT 成像的循环生成对抗网络进行计算机断层扫描肺血管造影图像模拟
abstract: The purpose of this research is to develop a system that generates simulated computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA) images clinically for pulmonary embolism diagnoses. Nowadays, CTPA images are the gold standard computerized detection method to determine and identify the symptoms of pulmonary embolism (PE), although performing CTPA is harmful for patients and also expensive. Therefore, we aim to detect possible PE patients through CT images. The system will simulate CTPA images with deep learning models for the identification of PE patients' symptoms, providing physicians with another reference for determining PE patients. In this study, the simulated CTPA image generation system uses a generative antagonistic network to enhance the features of pulmonary vessels in the CT images to strengthen the reference value of the images and provide a basis for hospitals to judge PE patients. We used the CT images of 22 patients from National Cheng Kung University Hospital and the corresponding CTPA images as the training data for the task of simulating CTPA images and generated them using two sets of generative countermeasure networks. This study is expected to propose a new approach to the clinical diagnosis of pulmonary embolism, in which a deep learning network is used to assist in the complex screening process and to review the generated simulated CTPA images, allowing physicians to assess whether a patient needs to undergo detailed testing for CTPA, improving the speed of detection of pulmonary embolism and significantly reducing the number of undetected patients.
summary: The purpose of this research is to develop a system that generates simulated computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA) images clinically for pulmonary embolism diagnoses. Nowadays, CTPA images are the gold standard computerized detection method to determine and identify the symptoms of pulmonary embolism (PE), although performing CTPA is harmful for patients and also expensive. Therefore, we aim to detect possible PE patients through CT images. The system will simulate CTPA images with deep learning models for the identification of PE patients' symptoms, providing physicians with another reference for determining PE patients. In this study, the simulated CTPA image generation system uses a generative antagonistic network to enhance the features of pulmonary vessels in the CT images to strengthen the reference value of the images and provide a basis for hospitals to judge PE patients. We used the CT images of 22 patients from National Cheng Kung University Hospital and the corresponding CTPA images as the training data for the task of simulating CTPA images and generated them using two sets of generative countermeasure networks. This study is expected to propose a new approach to the clinical diagnosis of pulmonary embolism, in which a deep learning network is used to assist in the complex screening process and to review the generated simulated CTPA images, allowing physicians to assess whether a patient needs to undergo detailed testing for CTPA, improving the speed of detection of pulmonary embolism and significantly reducing the number of undetected patients.
abstract_zh: 本研究的目的是开发一种系统，可以生成模拟计算机断层扫描肺血管造影（CTPA）图像，用于临床肺栓塞诊断。如今，CTPA 图像是确定和识别肺栓塞 (PE) 症状的黄金标准计算机检测方法，尽管进行 CTPA 对患者有害且昂贵。因此，我们的目标是通过CT图像发现可能的PE患者。该系统将通过深度学习模型模拟CTPA图像来识别PE患者的症状，为医生判断PE患者提供另一个参考。本研究模拟CTPA图像生成系统利用生成对抗网络增强CT图像中肺血管的特征，增强图像的参考价值，为医院判断PE患者提供依据。我们使用来自国立成功大学医院的 22 名患者的 CT 图像和相应的 CTPA 图像作为模拟 CTPA 图像任务的训练数据，并使用两组生成对策网络生成它们。这项研究有望提出一种肺栓塞临床诊断的新方法，利用深度学习网络协助复杂的筛查过程，并审查生成的模拟CTPA图像，使医生能够评估患者是否需要接受详细的CTPA测试，提高肺栓塞的检测速度，并显着减少漏检患者的数量。

AI.tldr: 本研究开发了一种基于循环生成对抗网络（Cycle GAN）的系统，用于从胸部CT图像生成模拟的CT肺动脉造影（CTPA）图像，以辅助肺栓塞（PE）的临床诊断。
AI.motivation: CTPA是诊断肺栓塞的金标准，但存在辐射风险和高昂成本。通过CT图像生成CTPA模拟图像，可降低患者风险并减少不必要的检查，同时提高诊断效率。
AI.method: 使用22名患者的胸部CT图像和对应CTPA图像作为训练数据，构建两个生成对抗网络模型，通过增强肺部血管特征生成模拟CTPA图像。
AI.result: 系统成功生成了具有临床参考价值的CTPA模拟图像，为医生提供辅助诊断依据，可提升肺栓塞检测速度并减少漏诊率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为肺栓塞的临床诊断提供了新思路，通过深度学习网络辅助复杂筛查流程，优化医疗资源分配并改善患者预后。

title: Deterministic 3-Server on a Circle and the Limitation of Canonical Potentials
title_zh: 圆上的确定性 3 服务器和规范势的限制
abstract: The deterministic $k$-server conjecture states that there is a $k$-competitive deterministic algorithm for the $k$-server problem for any metric space. We show that the work function algorithm is $3$-competitive for the $3$-server problem on circle metrics, a case left open by Coester and Koutsoupias (2021). Our analysis follows the existing framework but introduces a new potential function which may be viewed as a relaxation of the counterpart by Coester and Koutsoupias (2021). We further notice that the new potential function and many existing ones can be rewritten in a canonical form. Through a computer-aided verification, however, we find that no such canonical potential function can resolve the deterministic $3$-server conjecture for general metric spaces under the current analysis framework.
summary: The deterministic $k$-server conjecture states that there is a $k$-competitive deterministic algorithm for the $k$-server problem for any metric space. We show that the work function algorithm is $3$-competitive for the $3$-server problem on circle metrics, a case left open by Coester and Koutsoupias (2021). Our analysis follows the existing framework but introduces a new potential function which may be viewed as a relaxation of the counterpart by Coester and Koutsoupias (2021). We further notice that the new potential function and many existing ones can be rewritten in a canonical form. Through a computer-aided verification, however, we find that no such canonical potential function can resolve the deterministic $3$-server conjecture for general metric spaces under the current analysis framework.
abstract_zh: 确定性 $k$-server 猜想指出，对于任何度量空间的 $k$-server 问题，都存在一个 $k$-competitive 确定性算法。我们证明，工作函数算法对于循环度量上的 3 美元服务器问题具有 3 美元竞争性，这是 Coester 和 Koutsoupias（2021）尚未解决的一个案例。我们的分析遵循现有框架，但引入了一个新的势函数，该函数可能被视为 Coester 和 Koutsoupias（2021）对应函数的松弛。我们进一步注意到，新的势函数和许多现有的势函数可以以规范形式重写。然而，通过计算机辅助验证，我们发现在当前分析框架下，没有这样的规范势函数可以解决一般度量空间的确定性$3$服务器猜想。

AI.tldr: 本文针对圆环度量空间中的确定性3服务器问题，证明了工作函数算法的3-竞争性，并探讨了规范势函数的局限性。
AI.motivation: 确定性k服务器猜想在圆环度量空间中的3服务器情形长期未被解决，且规范势函数的适用性存在疑问。
AI.method: 沿用现有分析框架，引入新的势函数并将其与现有函数统一为规范形式，结合计算机辅助验证进行分析。
AI.result: 证明了工作函数算法在圆环度量空间中的3-竞争性，但发现规范势函数无法在当前框架下解决一般度量空间的确定性3服务器猜想。
AI.conclusion: 在特定场景下取得进展，但揭示了当前分析框架中规范势函数的固有局限性，为后续研究指明方向。

search_text: Deterministic 3-Server on a Circle and the Limitation of Canonical Potentials 圆上的确定性 3 服务器和规范势的限制 The deterministic $k$-server conjecture states that there is a $k$-competitive deterministic algorithm for the $k$-server problem for any metric space. We show that the work function algorithm is $3$-competitive for the $3$-server problem on circle metrics, a case left open by Coester and Koutsoupias (2021). Our analysis follows the existing framework but introduces a new potential function which may be viewed as a relaxation of the counterpart by Coester and Koutsoupias (2021). We further notice that the new potential function and many existing ones can be rewritten in a canonical form. Through a computer-aided verification, however, we find that no such canonical potential function can resolve the deterministic $3$-server conjecture for general metric spaces under the current analysis framework. 确定性 $k$-server 猜想指出，对于任何度量空间的 $k$-server 问题，都存在一个 $k$-competitive 确定性算法。我们证明，工作函数算法对于循环度量上的 3 美元服务器问题具有 3 美元竞争性，这是 Coester 和 Koutsoupias（2021）尚未解决的一个案例。我们的分析遵循现有框架，但引入了一个新的势函数，该函数可能被视为 Coester 和 Koutsoupias（2021）对应函数的松弛。我们进一步注意到，新的势函数和许多现有的势函数可以以规范形式重写。然而，通过计算机辅助验证，我们发现在当前分析框架下，没有这样的规范势函数可以解决一般度量空间的确定性$3$服务器猜想。 本文针对圆环度量空间中的确定性3服务器问题，证明了工作函数算法的3-竞争性，并探讨了规范势函数的局限性。 Zhiyi Huang,Hanwen Zhang cs.DS

title: Dimensionality Reduced Training by Pruning and Freezing Parts of a Deep Neural Network, a Survey
title_zh: 通过修剪和冻结深度神经网络部分进行降维训练，一项调查
comment: This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in Artificial Intelligence Review (2023), and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s10462-023-10489-1
comments: This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in Artificial Intelligence Review (2023), and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s10462-023-10489-1
abstract: State-of-the-art deep learning models have a parameter count that reaches into the billions. Training, storing and transferring such models is energy and time consuming, thus costly. A big part of these costs is caused by training the network. Model compression lowers storage and transfer costs, and can further make training more efficient by decreasing the number of computations in the forward and/or backward pass. Thus, compressing networks also at training time while maintaining a high performance is an important research topic. This work is a survey on methods which reduce the number of trained weights in deep learning models throughout the training. Most of the introduced methods set network parameters to zero which is called pruning. The presented pruning approaches are categorized into pruning at initialization, lottery tickets and dynamic sparse training. Moreover, we discuss methods that freeze parts of a network at its random initialization. By freezing weights, the number of trainable parameters is shrunken which reduces gradient computations and the dimensionality of the model's optimization space. In this survey we first propose dimensionality reduced training as an underlying mathematical model that covers pruning and freezing during training. Afterwards, we present and discuss different dimensionality reduced training methods.
summary: State-of-the-art deep learning models have a parameter count that reaches into the billions. Training, storing and transferring such models is energy and time consuming, thus costly. A big part of these costs is caused by training the network. Model compression lowers storage and transfer costs, and can further make training more efficient by decreasing the number of computations in the forward and/or backward pass. Thus, compressing networks also at training time while maintaining a high performance is an important research topic. This work is a survey on methods which reduce the number of trained weights in deep learning models throughout the training. Most of the introduced methods set network parameters to zero which is called pruning. The presented pruning approaches are categorized into pruning at initialization, lottery tickets and dynamic sparse training. Moreover, we discuss methods that freeze parts of a network at its random initialization. By freezing weights, the number of trainable parameters is shrunken which reduces gradient computations and the dimensionality of the model's optimization space. In this survey we first propose dimensionality reduced training as an underlying mathematical model that covers pruning and freezing during training. Afterwards, we present and discuss different dimensionality reduced training methods.
abstract_zh: 最先进的深度学习模型的参数数量达到数十亿。训练、存储和传输此类模型既耗时又耗力，因此成本高昂。这些成本的很大一部分是由训练网络引起的。模型压缩降低了存储和传输成本，并且可以通过减少前向和/或后向传递中的计算数量来进一步提高训练效率。因此，在训练时压缩网络同时保持高性能是一个重要的研究课题。这项工作是对在整个训练过程中减少深度学习模型中训练权重数量的方法的调查。大多数引入的方法将网络参数设置为零，这称为剪枝。所提出的剪枝方法分为初始化剪枝、彩票剪枝和动态稀疏训练。此外，我们讨论了在随机初始化时冻结网络部分的方法。通过冻结权重，可训练参数的数量减少，从而减少了梯度计算和模型优化空间的维数。在本次调查中，我们首先提出降维训练作为基础数学模型，涵盖训练期间的修剪和冻结。然后，我们提出并讨论不同的降维训练方法。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了通过剪枝和冻结网络部分参数来减少深度神经网络训练过程中参数数量的方法。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的深度学习模型参数数量庞大，训练、存储和传输这些模型耗费大量时间和能源，因此需要通过模型压缩来降低成本并提高训练效率。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种维度降低训练的数学模型，涵盖训练过程中的剪枝和冻结方法，并对这些方法进行了分类和讨论。
AI.result: 本文总结并分析了多种维度降低训练方法，包括初始化时的剪枝、彩票票券和动态稀疏训练，以及冻结网络部分参数的方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过剪枝和冻结网络参数，可以在训练过程中减少计算量和优化空间的维度，从而提高训练效率，同时保持模型性能。

authors_text: Thomas Delteil,Edouard Belval,Lei Chen,Luis Goncalves,Vijay Mahadevan
title: MATrIX -- Modality-Aware Transformer for Information eXtraction
title_zh: MATrIX——用于信息提取的模态感知转换器
abstract: We present MATrIX - a Modality-Aware Transformer for Information eXtraction in the Visual Document Understanding (VDU) domain. VDU covers information extraction from visually rich documents such as forms, invoices, receipts, tables, graphs, presentations, or advertisements. In these, text semantics and visual information supplement each other to provide a global understanding of the document. MATrIX is pre-trained in an unsupervised way with specifically designed tasks that require the use of multi-modal information (spatial, visual, or textual). We consider the spatial and text modalities all at once in a single token set. To make the attention more flexible, we use a learned modality-aware relative bias in the attention mechanism to modulate the attention between the tokens of different modalities. We evaluate MATrIX on 3 different datasets each with strong baselines.
summary: We present MATrIX - a Modality-Aware Transformer for Information eXtraction in the Visual Document Understanding (VDU) domain. VDU covers information extraction from visually rich documents such as forms, invoices, receipts, tables, graphs, presentations, or advertisements. In these, text semantics and visual information supplement each other to provide a global understanding of the document. MATrIX is pre-trained in an unsupervised way with specifically designed tasks that require the use of multi-modal information (spatial, visual, or textual). We consider the spatial and text modalities all at once in a single token set. To make the attention more flexible, we use a learned modality-aware relative bias in the attention mechanism to modulate the attention between the tokens of different modalities. We evaluate MATrIX on 3 different datasets each with strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 MATrIX - 一种用于视觉文档理解 (VDU) 领域信息提取的模态感知转换器。 VDU 涵盖从视觉丰富的文档（例如表格、发票、收据、表格、图表、演示文稿或广告）中提取信息。其中，文本语义和视觉信息相互补充，以提供对文档的全局理解。 MATrIX 以无监督的方式对需要使用多模态信息（空间、视觉或文本）的专门设计的任务进行预训练。我们在单个标记集中同时考虑空间和文本模态。为了使注意力更加灵活，我们在注意力机制中使用学习到的模态感知相对偏差来调节不同模态的标记之间的注意力。我们在 3 个不同的数据集上评估 MATrIX，每个数据集都有很强的基线。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多模态感知的Transformer模型MATrIX，用于视觉文档理解领域中的信息抽取任务。
AI.motivation: 视觉文档中的文本语义与视觉信息相互补充，现有方法难以有效融合多模态信息，需设计能同时处理空间、文本等多模态信息的模型。
AI.method: 通过无监督预训练设计多模态任务，将空间与文本模态统一在单一token集合中，并引入学习得到的模态感知相对偏置机制，增强跨模态注意力灵活性。
AI.result: 在三个不同数据集上进行评估，均取得优于强基线模型的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: MATrIX通过多模态联合建模和注意力机制改进，有效提升了视觉文档信息抽取任务的性能。

search_text: MATrIX -- Modality-Aware Transformer for Information eXtraction MATrIX——用于信息提取的模态感知转换器 We present MATrIX - a Modality-Aware Transformer for Information eXtraction in the Visual Document Understanding (VDU) domain. VDU covers information extraction from visually rich documents such as forms, invoices, receipts, tables, graphs, presentations, or advertisements. In these, text semantics and visual information supplement each other to provide a global understanding of the document. MATrIX is pre-trained in an unsupervised way with specifically designed tasks that require the use of multi-modal information (spatial, visual, or textual). We consider the spatial and text modalities all at once in a single token set. To make the attention more flexible, we use a learned modality-aware relative bias in the attention mechanism to modulate the attention between the tokens of different modalities. We evaluate MATrIX on 3 different datasets each with strong baselines. 我们提出 MATrIX - 一种用于视觉文档理解 (VDU) 领域信息提取的模态感知转换器。 VDU 涵盖从视觉丰富的文档（例如表格、发票、收据、表格、图表、演示文稿或广告）中提取信息。其中，文本语义和视觉信息相互补充，以提供对文档的全局理解。 MATrIX 以无监督的方式对需要使用多模态信息（空间、视觉或文本）的专门设计的任务进行预训练。我们在单个标记集中同时考虑空间和文本模态。为了使注意力更加灵活，我们在注意力机制中使用学习到的模态感知相对偏差来调节不同模态的标记之间的注意力。我们在 3 个不同的数据集上评估 MATrIX，每个数据集都有很强的基线。 提出一种多模态感知的Transformer模型MATrIX，用于视觉文档理解领域中的信息抽取任务。 Thomas Delteil,Edouard Belval,Lei Chen,Luis Goncalves,Vijay Mahadevan cs.CV

title: Narrowing the LOCAL$\unicode{x2013}$CONGEST Gaps in Sparse Networks via Expander Decompositions
title_zh: 通过扩展器分解缩小稀疏网络中的 LOCAL$\unicode{x2013}$CONGEST 差距
abstract: Many combinatorial optimization problems can be approximated within $(1 \pm ε)$ factors in $\text{poly}(\log n, 1/ε)$ rounds in the LOCAL model via network decompositions [Ghaffari, Kuhn, and Maus, STOC 2018]. These approaches require sending messages of unlimited size, so they do not extend to the CONGEST model, which restricts the message size to be $O(\log n)$ bits. In this paper, we develop a generic framework for obtaining $\text{poly}(\log n, 1/ε)$-round $(1\pm ε)$-approximation algorithms for many combinatorial optimization problems, including maximum weighted matching, maximum independent set, and correlation clustering, in graphs excluding a fixed minor in the CONGEST model. This class of graphs covers many sparse network classes that have been studied in the literature, including planar graphs, bounded-genus graphs, and bounded-treewidth graphs. Furthermore, we show that our framework can be applied to give an efficient distributed property testing algorithm for an arbitrary minor-closed graph property that is closed under taking disjoint union, significantly generalizing the previous distributed property testing algorithm for planarity in [Levi, Medina, and Ron, PODC 2018 & Distributed Computing 2021]. Our framework uses distributed expander decomposition algorithms [Chang and Saranurak, FOCS 2020] to decompose the graph into clusters of high conductance. We show that any graph excluding a fixed minor admits small edge separators. Using this result, we show the existence of a high-degree vertex in each cluster in an expander decomposition, which allows the entire graph topology of the cluster to be routed to a vertex. Similar to the use of network decompositions in the LOCAL model, the vertex will be able to perform any local computation on the subgraph induced by the cluster and broadcast the result over the cluster.

These approaches require sending messages of unlimited size, so they do not extend to the CONGEST model, which restricts the message size to be $O(\log n)$ bits. In this paper, we develop a generic framework for obtaining $\text{poly}(\log n, 1/ε)$-round $(1\pm ε)$-approximation algorithms for many combinatorial optimization problems, including maximum weighted matching, maximum independent set, and correlation clustering, in graphs excluding a fixed minor in the CONGEST model. This class of graphs covers many sparse network classes that have been studied in the literature, including planar graphs, bounded-genus graphs, and bounded-treewidth graphs. Furthermore, we show that our framework can be applied to give an efficient distributed property testing algorithm for an arbitrary minor-closed graph property that is closed under taking disjoint union, significantly generalizing the previous distributed property testing algorithm for planarity in [Levi, Medina, and Ron, PODC 2018 & Distributed Computing 2021]. Our framework uses distributed expander decomposition algorithms [Chang and Saranurak, FOCS 2020] to decompose the graph into clusters of high conductance. We show that any graph excluding a fixed minor admits small edge separators. Using this result, we show the existence of a high-degree vertex in each cluster in an expander decomposition, which allows the entire graph topology of the cluster to be routed to a vertex. Similar to the use of network decompositions in the LOCAL model, the vertex will be able to perform any local computation on the subgraph induced by the cluster and broadcast the result over the cluster.
abstract_zh: 许多组合优化问题可以通过网络分解在 LOCAL 模型中的 $\text{poly}(\log n, 1/ε)$ 轮中的 $(1 \pm ε)$ 因子内近似[Ghaffari, Kuhn, and Maus, STOC 2018]。这些方法需要发送无限大小的消息，因此它们不能扩展到 CONGEST 模型，该模型将消息大小限制为 $O(\log n)$ 位。在本文中，我们开发了一个通用框架，用于在 CONGEST 模型中排除固定次要的图中，针对许多组合优化问题（包括最大加权匹配、最大独立集和相关聚类）获得 $\text{poly}(\log n, 1/ε)$-round $(1\pm ε)$-近似算法。此类图涵盖了文献中研究的许多稀疏网络类，包括平面图、有界属图和有界树宽图。此外，我们还表明，我们的框架可以应用于为任意次要闭图属性提供有效的分布式属性测试算法，该属性在采取不相交并集的情况下是封闭的，显着概括了[Levi，Medina和Ron，PODC 2018＆分布式计算2021]中先前的平面性分布式属性测试算法。我们的框架使用分布式扩展器分解算法 [Chang 和 Saranurak，FOCS 2020] 将图分解为高电导簇。我们表明，任何排除固定次要的图都允许小的边缘分隔符。使用这个结果，我们在扩展器分解中显示每个集群中存在高度顶点，这允许将集群的整个图拓扑路由到顶点。与 LOCAL 模型中网络分解的使用类似，顶点将能够对集群产生的子图执行任何本地计算，并在集群上广播结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩展器分解的框架，在CONGEST模型中为稀疏网络中的组合优化问题提供高效的近似算法。
AI.motivation: LOCAL模型中的网络分解方法无法直接应用于CONGEST模型，因其消息大小限制。现有方法在稀疏网络（如平面图、有界树宽图）中存在效率瓶颈，需设计适用于CONGEST模型的通用框架。
AI.method: 利用分布式扩展器分解算法将图划分为高导纳簇，结合固定小图排除类图的边分割特性，通过簇内高度顶点路由拓扑信息实现局部计算与广播。
AI.result: 为最大权匹配、最大独立集等问题设计了多项式轮次近似算法，并扩展了分布式图属性检测算法，适用于任意小图排除类属性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效弥合了LOCAL与CONGEST模型在稀疏网络中的性能差距，为分布式算法设计提供了通用范式，并推广了平面性检测等成果。

title: A Linear Comb Filter for Event Flicker Removal
title_zh: 用于消除事件闪烁的线性梳状滤波器
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, published in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2022
comments: 10 pages, 7 figures, published in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2022
abstract: Event cameras are bio-inspired sensors that capture per-pixel asynchronous intensity change rather than the synchronous absolute intensity frames captured by a classical camera sensor. Such cameras are ideal for robotics applications since they have high temporal resolution, high dynamic range and low latency. However, due to their high temporal resolution, event cameras are particularly sensitive to flicker such as from fluorescent or LED lights. During every cycle from bright to dark, pixels that image a flickering light source generate many events that provide little or no useful information for a robot, swamping the useful data in the scene. In this paper, we propose a novel linear filter to preprocess event data to remove unwanted flicker events from an event stream. The proposed algorithm achieves over 4.6 times relative improvement in the signal-to-noise ratio when compared to the raw event stream due to the effective removal of flicker from fluorescent lighting. Thus, it is ideally suited to robotics applications that operate in indoor settings or scenes illuminated by flickering light sources.
summary: Event cameras are bio-inspired sensors that capture per-pixel asynchronous intensity change rather than the synchronous absolute intensity frames captured by a classical camera sensor. Such cameras are ideal for robotics applications since they have high temporal resolution, high dynamic range and low latency. However, due to their high temporal resolution, event cameras are particularly sensitive to flicker such as from fluorescent or LED lights. During every cycle from bright to dark, pixels that image a flickering light source generate many events that provide little or no useful information for a robot, swamping the useful data in the scene. In this paper, we propose a novel linear filter to preprocess event data to remove unwanted flicker events from an event stream. The proposed algorithm achieves over 4.6 times relative improvement in the signal-to-noise ratio when compared to the raw event stream due to the effective removal of flicker from fluorescent lighting. Thus, it is ideally suited to robotics applications that operate in indoor settings or scenes illuminated by flickering light sources.
abstract_zh: 事件相机是仿生传感器，可捕获每像素异步强度变化，而不是经典相机传感器捕获的同步绝对强度帧。此类相机非常适合机器人应用，因为它们具有高时间分辨率、高动态范围和低延迟。然而，由于时间分辨率高，事件摄像机对荧光灯或 LED 灯等闪烁特别敏感。在从亮到暗的每个周期中，对闪烁光源进行成像的像素会生成许多事件，这些事件为机器人提供很少或根本没有有用的信息，从而淹没了场景中的有用数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的线性滤波器来预处理事件数据，以从事件流中删除不需要的闪烁事件。由于有效消除了荧光灯的闪烁，所提出的算法与原始事件流相比，信噪比相对提高了 4.6 倍以上。因此，它非常适合在室内环境或闪烁光源照明的场景中运行的机器人应用。

AI.tldr: 设计一种线性梳形滤波器以去除事件相机中的闪烁事件，提升机器人应用中的数据质量。
AI.motivation: 事件相机在高时间分辨率下对闪烁光源敏感，导致无用事件干扰有用数据，需有效去除闪烁以提高数据质量。
AI.method: 提出一种线性滤波器，通过预处理事件数据有效去除荧光灯闪烁事件。
AI.result: 相比原始事件流，算法使信噪比提升4.6倍，有效去除荧光灯闪烁。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于室内或闪烁光源环境下的机器人应用，提升事件数据处理效果。

title: Efficient Stereo Depth Estimation for Pseudo LiDAR: A Self-Supervised Approach Based on Multi-Input ResNet Encoder
title_zh: 伪 LiDAR 的高效立体深度估计：基于多输入 ResNet 编码器的自监督方法
abstract: Perception and localization are essential for autonomous delivery vehicles, mostly estimated from 3D LiDAR sensors due to their precise distance measurement capability. This paper presents a strategy to obtain the real-time pseudo point cloud instead of the laser sensor from the image sensor. We propose an approach to use different depth estimators to obtain pseudo point clouds like LiDAR to obtain better performance. Moreover, the training and validating strategy of the depth estimator has adopted stereo imagery data to estimate more accurate depth estimation as well as point cloud results. Our approach to generating depth maps outperforms on KITTI benchmark while yielding point clouds significantly faster than other approaches.
summary: Perception and localization are essential for autonomous delivery vehicles, mostly estimated from 3D LiDAR sensors due to their precise distance measurement capability. This paper presents a strategy to obtain the real-time pseudo point cloud instead of the laser sensor from the image sensor. We propose an approach to use different depth estimators to obtain pseudo point clouds like LiDAR to obtain better performance. Moreover, the training and validating strategy of the depth estimator has adopted stereo imagery data to estimate more accurate depth estimation as well as point cloud results. Our approach to generating depth maps outperforms on KITTI benchmark while yielding point clouds significantly faster than other approaches.
abstract_zh: 感知和定位对于自动送货车辆至关重要，由于其精确的距离测量能力，大部分是通过 3D LiDAR 传感器进行估计的。本文提出了一种从图像传感器获取实时伪点云而不是激光传感器的策略。我们提出了一种使用不同深度估计器来获取伪点云（如 LiDAR）的方法，以获得更好的性能。此外，深度估计器的训练和验证策略采用立体图像数据来估计更准确的深度估计和点云结果。我们生成深度图的方法优于 KITTI 基准，同时生成点云的速度明显快于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多输入ResNet编码器的自监督学习方法，通过立体视觉生成高效伪LiDAR点云以替代传统激光传感器。
AI.motivation: 传统LiDAR传感器成本高且在恶劣天气下性能受限，需开发基于低成本图像传感器的实时深度估计方案以提升自动驾驶感知能力。
AI.method: 采用多输入ResNet编码器架构，结合立体图像数据进行自监督训练，通过不同深度估计器生成高精度伪点云并优化计算效率。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试中深度估计精度优于现有方法，点云生成速度显著提升，达到实时处理要求。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自监督立体深度估计框架有效平衡了精度与效率，为自动驾驶系统提供了可行的低成本LiDAR替代方案。

title: EvoRobogami: Co-designing with Humans in Evolutionary Robotics Experiments
title_zh: EvoRobogami：在进化机器人实验中与人类共同设计
abstract: We study the effects of injecting human-generated designs into the initial population of an evolutionary robotics experiment, where subsequent population of robots are optimised via a Genetic Algorithm and MAP-Elites. First, human participants interact via a graphical front-end to explore a directly-parameterised legged robot design space and attempt to produce robots via a combination of intuition and trial-and-error that perform well in a range of environments. Environments are generated whose corresponding high-performance robot designs range from intuitive to complex and hard to grasp. Once the human designs have been collected, their impact on the evolutionary process is assessed by replacing a varying number of designs in the initial population with human designs and subsequently running the evolutionary algorithm. Our results suggest that a balance of random and hand-designed initial solutions provides the best performance for the problems considered, and that human designs are most valuable when the problem is intuitive. The influence of human design in an evolutionary algorithm is a highly understudied area, and the insights in this paper may be valuable to the area of AI-based design more generally.
summary: We study the effects of injecting human-generated designs into the initial population of an evolutionary robotics experiment, where subsequent population of robots are optimised via a Genetic Algorithm and MAP-Elites. First, human participants interact via a graphical front-end to explore a directly-parameterised legged robot design space and attempt to produce robots via a combination of intuition and trial-and-error that perform well in a range of environments. Environments are generated whose corresponding high-performance robot designs range from intuitive to complex and hard to grasp. Once the human designs have been collected, their impact on the evolutionary process is assessed by replacing a varying number of designs in the initial population with human designs and subsequently running the evolutionary algorithm. Our results suggest that a balance of random and hand-designed initial solutions provides the best performance for the problems considered, and that human designs are most valuable when the problem is intuitive. The influence of human design in an evolutionary algorithm is a highly understudied area, and the insights in this paper may be valuable to the area of AI-based design more generally.
abstract_zh: 我们研究将人类生成的设计注入进化机器人实验的初始群体中的影响，其中随后的机器人群体通过遗传算法和 MAP-Elites 进行优化。首先，人类参与者通过图形前端进行交互，探索直接参数化的腿式机器人设计空间，并尝试通过直觉和试错相结合来生产在各种环境中表现良好的机器人。所生成的环境对应的高性能机器人设计范围从直观到复杂且难以掌握。一旦收集到人类设计，就可以通过用人类设计替换初始群体中不同数量的设计并随后运行进化算法来评估它们对进化过程的影响。我们的结果表明，随机和手工设计的初始解决方案的平衡为所考虑的问题提供了最佳性能，并且当问题直观时，人类设计是最有价值的。人类设计对进化算法的影响是一个被充分研究的领域，本文的见解可能对更广泛的基于人工智能的设计领域有价值。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究将人类生成的设计注入进化机器人实验初始种群的影响，并通过遗传算法和MAP-Elites优化后续种群。
AI.motivation: 探索人类直觉在进化算法中的作用，以及其对解决不同复杂度问题的潜在价值，这一领域此前研究较少。
AI.method: 通过图形界面让人类参与设计腿式机器人，收集其设计后替换初始种群部分个体，运行进化算法并评估性能差异。
AI.result: 随机与人工设计结合的初始种群表现最佳，人工设计在直观问题中价值更高。
AI.conclusion: 人类设计与算法结合可提升进化效率，尤其适用于直观问题，为AI辅助设计领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Hexin Dong,Zifan Chen,Mingze Yuan,Yutong Xie,Jie Zhao,Fei Yu,Bin Dong,Li Zhang
title: Region-Aware Metric Learning for Open World Semantic Segmentation via Meta-Channel Aggregation
title_zh: 通过元通道聚合进行开放世界语义分割的区域感知度量学习
abstract: As one of the most challenging and practical segmentation tasks, open-world semantic segmentation requires the model to segment the anomaly regions in the images and incrementally learn to segment out-of-distribution (OOD) objects, especially under a few-shot condition. The current state-of-the-art (SOTA) method, Deep Metric Learning Network (DMLNet), relies on pixel-level metric learning, with which the identification of similar regions having different semantics is difficult. Therefore, we propose a method called region-aware metric learning (RAML), which first separates the regions of the images and generates region-aware features for further metric learning. RAML improves the integrity of the segmented anomaly regions. Moreover, we propose a novel meta-channel aggregation (MCA) module to further separate anomaly regions, forming high-quality sub-region candidates and thereby improving the model performance for OOD objects. To evaluate the proposed RAML, we have conducted extensive experiments and ablation studies on Lost And Found and Road Anomaly datasets for anomaly segmentation and the CityScapes dataset for incremental few-shot learning. The results show that the proposed RAML achieves SOTA performance in both stages of open world segmentation. Our code and appendix are available at https://github.com/czifan/RAML.
summary: As one of the most challenging and practical segmentation tasks, open-world semantic segmentation requires the model to segment the anomaly regions in the images and incrementally learn to segment out-of-distribution (OOD) objects, especially under a few-shot condition. The current state-of-the-art (SOTA) method, Deep Metric Learning Network (DMLNet), relies on pixel-level metric learning, with which the identification of similar regions having different semantics is difficult. Therefore, we propose a method called region-aware metric learning (RAML), which first separates the regions of the images and generates region-aware features for further metric learning. RAML improves the integrity of the segmented anomaly regions. Moreover, we propose a novel meta-channel aggregation (MCA) module to further separate anomaly regions, forming high-quality sub-region candidates and thereby improving the model performance for OOD objects. To evaluate the proposed RAML, we have conducted extensive experiments and ablation studies on Lost And Found and Road Anomaly datasets for anomaly segmentation and the CityScapes dataset for incremental few-shot learning. The results show that the proposed RAML achieves SOTA performance in both stages of open world segmentation. Our code and appendix are available at https://github.com/czifan/RAML.
abstract_zh: 作为最具挑战性和实用性的分割任务之一，开放世界语义分割要求模型分割图像中的异常区域，并逐步学习分割分布外（OOD）对象，特别是在少数镜头条件下。当前最先进的（SOTA）方法——深度度量学习网络（DMLNet）依赖于像素级度量学习，很难识别具有不同语义的相似区域。因此，我们提出了一种称为区域感知度量学习（RAML）的方法，该方法首先分离图像的区域并生成区域感知特征以进行进一步的度量学习。 RAML 提高了分段异常区域的完整性。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的元通道聚合（MCA）模块来进一步分离异常区域，形成高质量的子区域候选，从而提高 OOD 对象的模型性能。为了评估所提出的 RAML，我们对用于异常分割的 Lost And Found 和 Road Anomaly 数据集以及用于增量少样本学习的 CityScapes 数据集进行了广泛的实验和消融研究。结果表明，所提出的 RAML 在开放世界分割的两个阶段都实现了 SOTA 性能。我们的代码和附录可在 https://github.com/czifan/RAML 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种区域感知度量学习方法（RAML）和元通道聚合模块（MCA），用于解决开放世界语义分割中异常区域识别和增量学习OOD对象的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如DMLNet依赖像素级度量学习，难以区分语义不同的相似区域，导致开放世界分割效果受限。
AI.method: 通过区域分离生成区域感知特征，结合元通道聚合模块（MCA）分离高质量子区域，提升对异常区域和OOD对象的分割性能。
AI.result: 在Lost And Found、Road Anomaly和CityScapes数据集上，RAML在开放世界分割的两个阶段均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: RAML通过区域感知学习和MCA模块有效提升开放世界分割效果，代码已开源。

result: 在Lost And Found、Road Anomaly和CityScapes数据集上，RAML在开放世界分割的两个阶段均达到SOTA性能。
conclusion: RAML通过区域感知学习和MCA模块有效提升开放世界分割效果，代码已开源。
search_text: Region-Aware Metric Learning for Open World Semantic Segmentation via Meta-Channel Aggregation 通过元通道聚合进行开放世界语义分割的区域感知度量学习 As one of the most challenging and practical segmentation tasks, open-world semantic segmentation requires the model to segment the anomaly regions in the images and incrementally learn to segment out-of-distribution (OOD) objects, especially under a few-shot condition. The current state-of-the-art (SOTA) method, Deep Metric Learning Network (DMLNet), relies on pixel-level metric learning, with which the identification of similar regions having different semantics is difficult. Therefore, we propose a method called region-aware metric learning (RAML), which first separates the regions of the images and generates region-aware features for further metric learning. RAML improves the integrity of the segmented anomaly regions. Moreover, we propose a novel meta-channel aggregation (MCA) module to further separate anomaly regions, forming high-quality sub-region candidates and thereby improving the model performance for OOD objects. To evaluate the proposed RAML, we have conducted extensive experiments and ablation studies on Lost And Found and Road Anomaly datasets for anomaly segmentation and the CityScapes dataset for incremental few-shot learning. The results show that the proposed RAML achieves SOTA performance in both stages of open world segmentation. Our code and appendix are available at https://github.com/czifan/RAML. 作为最具挑战性和实用性的分割任务之一，开放世界语义分割要求模型分割图像中的异常区域，并逐步学习分割分布外（OOD）对象，特别是在少数镜头条件下。当前最先进的（SOTA）方法——深度度量学习网络（DMLNet）依赖于像素级度量学习，很难识别具有不同语义的相似区域。因此，我们提出了一种称为区域感知度量学习（RAML）的方法，该方法首先分离图像的区域并生成区域感知特征以进行进一步的度量学习。 RAML 提高了分段异常区域的完整性。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的元通道聚合（MCA）模块来进一步分离异常区域，形成高质量的子区域候选，从而提高 OOD 对象的模型性能。为了评估所提出的 RAML，我们对用于异常分割的 Lost And Found 和 Road Anomaly 数据集以及用于增量少样本学习的 CityScapes 数据集进行了广泛的实验和消融研究。结果表明，所提出的 RAML 在开放世界分割的两个阶段都实现了 SOTA 性能。我们的代码和附录可在 https://github.com/czifan/RAML 获取。 本文提出一种区域感知度量学习方法（RAML）和元通道聚合模块（MCA），用于解决开放世界语义分割中异常区域识别和增量学习OOD对象的挑战。 Hexin Dong,Zifan Chen,Mingze Yuan,Yutong Xie,Jie Zhao,Fei Yu,Bin Dong,Li Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Arda Sahiner,Tolga Ergen,Batu Ozturkler,John Pauly,Morteza Mardani,Mert Pilanci
title: Unraveling Attention via Convex Duality: Analysis and Interpretations of Vision Transformers
title_zh: 通过凸对偶性揭示注意力：视觉变压器的分析和解释
comment: 38 pages, 2 figures. To appear in ICML 2022
comments: 38 pages, 2 figures. To appear in ICML 2022
abstract: Vision transformers using self-attention or its proposed alternatives have demonstrated promising results in many image related tasks. However, the underpinning inductive bias of attention is not well understood. To address this issue, this paper analyzes attention through the lens of convex duality. For the non-linear dot-product self-attention, and alternative mechanisms such as MLP-mixer and Fourier Neural Operator (FNO), we derive equivalent finite-dimensional convex problems that are interpretable and solvable to global optimality. The convex programs lead to {\it block nuclear-norm regularization} that promotes low rank in the latent feature and token dimensions. In particular, we show how self-attention networks implicitly clusters the tokens, based on their latent similarity. We conduct experiments for transferring a pre-trained transformer backbone for CIFAR-100 classification by fine-tuning a variety of convex attention heads. The results indicate the merits of the bias induced by attention compared with the existing MLP or linear heads.
summary: Vision transformers using self-attention or its proposed alternatives have demonstrated promising results in many image related tasks. However, the underpinning inductive bias of attention is not well understood. To address this issue, this paper analyzes attention through the lens of convex duality. For the non-linear dot-product self-attention, and alternative mechanisms such as MLP-mixer and Fourier Neural Operator (FNO), we derive equivalent finite-dimensional convex problems that are interpretable and solvable to global optimality. The convex programs lead to {\it block nuclear-norm regularization} that promotes low rank in the latent feature and token dimensions. In particular, we show how self-attention networks implicitly clusters the tokens, based on their latent similarity. We conduct experiments for transferring a pre-trained transformer backbone for CIFAR-100 classification by fine-tuning a variety of convex attention heads. The results indicate the merits of the bias induced by attention compared with the existing MLP or linear heads.
abstract_zh: 使用自注意力或其提出的替代方案的视觉变换器在许多图像相关任务中表现出了有希望的结果。然而，注意力的基础归纳偏差尚不清楚。为了解决这个问题，本文通过凸对偶性的视角来分析注意力。对于非线性点积自注意力以及 MLP 混合器和傅里叶神经算子 (FNO) 等替代机制，我们推导了等效的有限维凸问题，这些问题可解释并可求解全局最优性。凸程序导致{\它阻止核范数正则化}，从而促进潜在特征和标记维度的低等级。特别是，我们展示了自注意力网络如何根据标记的潜在相似性隐式地对标记进行聚类。我们进行了实验，通过微调各种凸注意力头，将预训练的 Transformer 主干转移到 CIFAR-100 分类。结果表明，与现有 MLP 或线性头相比，注意力引起的偏差具有优点。

AI.tldr: 通过凸对偶性分析视觉Transformer的注意力机制，揭示其归纳偏置并提出可解释的凸优化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Transformer的注意力机制虽有效，但其内在归纳偏置缺乏理论解释，限制了模型理解和应用。
AI.method: 将非线性自注意力及替代机制转化为等效凸优化问题，引入块核范数正则化，通过实验验证注意力的聚类特性。
AI.result: 凸注意力头在CIFAR-100分类中优于传统MLP/线性头，证明注意力机制的归纳偏置优势。
AI.conclusion: 凸对偶性分析为注意力机制提供了理论解释，揭示其隐式聚类特性，为模型设计提供新视角。
